authors_text: Xiangkun Hu,Junqi Dai,Hang Yan,Yi Zhang,Qipeng Guo,Xipeng Qiu,Zheng Zhang
title: Dialogue Meaning Representation for Task-Oriented Dialogue Systems
title_zh: 面向任务的对话系统的对话意义表示
abstract: Dialogue meaning representation formulates natural language utterance semantics in their conversational context in an explicit and machine-readable form. Previous work typically follows the intent-slot framework, which is easy for annotation yet limited in scalability for complex linguistic expressions. A line of works alleviates the representation issue by introducing hierarchical structures but challenging to express complex compositional semantics, such as negation and coreference. We propose Dialogue Meaning Representation (DMR), a pliable and easily extendable representation for task-oriented dialogue. Our representation contains a set of nodes and edges to represent rich compositional semantics. Moreover, we propose an inheritance hierarchy mechanism focusing on domain extensibility. Additionally, we annotated DMR-FastFood, a multi-turn dialogue dataset with more than 70k utterances, with DMR. We propose two evaluation tasks to evaluate different dialogue models and a novel coreference resolution model GNNCoref for the graph-based coreference resolution task. Experiments show that DMR can be parsed well with pre-trained Seq2Seq models, and GNNCoref outperforms the baseline models by a large margin.
summary: Dialogue meaning representation formulates natural language utterance semantics in their conversational context in an explicit and machine-readable form. Previous work typically follows the intent-slot framework, which is easy for annotation yet limited in scalability for complex linguistic expressions. A line of works alleviates the representation issue by introducing hierarchical structures but challenging to express complex compositional semantics, such as negation and coreference. We propose Dialogue Meaning Representation (DMR), a pliable and easily extendable representation for task-oriented dialogue. Our representation contains a set of nodes and edges to represent rich compositional semantics. Moreover, we propose an inheritance hierarchy mechanism focusing on domain extensibility. Additionally, we annotated DMR-FastFood, a multi-turn dialogue dataset with more than 70k utterances, with DMR. We propose two evaluation tasks to evaluate different dialogue models and a novel coreference resolution model GNNCoref for the graph-based coreference resolution task. Experiments show that DMR can be parsed well with pre-trained Seq2Seq models, and GNNCoref outperforms the baseline models by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 对话意义表示以明确且机器可读的形式在对话上下文中制定自然语言话语语义。以前的工作通常遵循意图槽框架，该框架易于注释，但复杂语言表达的可扩展性有限。一系列工作通过引入层次结构来缓解表示问题，但难以表达复杂的组合语义，例如否定和共指。我们提出对话意义表示（DMR），这是一种面向任务的对话的灵活且易于扩展的表示。我们的表示包含一组节点和边来表示丰富的组合语义。此外，我们提出了一种专注于域可扩展性的继承层次机制。此外，我们还使用 DMR 注释了 DMR-FastFood，这是一个具有超过 70k 话语的多轮对话数据集。我们提出了两个评估任务来评估不同的对话模型，并提出了一种新颖的共指消解模型 GNNCoref 用于基于图的共指消解任务。实验表明，DMR 可以用预训练的 Seq2Seq 模型很好地解析，并且 GNNCoref 大幅优于基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dialogue Meaning Representation (DMR)的任务导向对话系统语义表示方法，并构建了相应的数据集与模型进行评估。
AI.motivation: 传统意图-槽位框架在处理复杂语言表达时存在可扩展性不足的问题，而分层结构难以表达否定和共指等复杂语义，需更灵活的表示方法。
AI.method: 提出包含节点与边的DMR表示结构，设计继承层次机制支持领域扩展；构建DMR-FastFood多轮对话数据集，开发基于图神经网络的GNNCoref共指解析模型，并通过Seq2Seq模型进行解析评估。
AI.result: 实验表明DMR可被预训练Seq2Seq模型有效解析，GNNCoref在共指任务上显著优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: DMR为任务导向对话提供了可扩展的语义表示方案，相关模型在复杂语义处理上表现出优势。

authors_text: Yawen Wu,Dewen Zeng,Zhepeng Wang,Yiyu Shi,Jingtong Hu
title: Federated Contrastive Learning for Volumetric Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于体积医学图像分割的联合对比学习
comment: International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer-Assisted Intervention. Springer, Cham, 2021
comments: International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer-Assisted Intervention. Springer, Cham, 2021
abstract: Supervised deep learning needs a large amount of labeled data to achieve high performance. However, in medical imaging analysis, each site may only have a limited amount of data and labels, which makes learning ineffective. Federated learning (FL) can help in this regard by learning a shared model while keeping training data local for privacy. Traditional FL requires fully-labeled data for training, which is inconvenient or sometimes infeasible to obtain due to high labeling cost and the requirement of expertise. Contrastive learning (CL), as a self-supervised learning approach, can effectively learn from unlabeled data to pre-train a neural network encoder, followed by fine-tuning for downstream tasks with limited annotations. However, when adopting CL in FL, the limited data diversity on each client makes federated contrastive learning (FCL) ineffective. In this work, we propose an FCL framework for volumetric medical image segmentation with limited annotations. More specifically, we exchange the features in the FCL pre-training process such that diverse contrastive data are provided to each site for effective local CL while keeping raw data private. Based on the exchanged features, global structural matching further leverages the structural similarity to align local features to the remote ones such that a unified feature space can be learned among different sites. Experiments on a cardiac MRI dataset show the proposed framework substantially improves the segmentation performance compared with state-of-the-art techniques.
summary: Supervised deep learning needs a large amount of labeled data to achieve high performance. However, in medical imaging analysis, each site may only have a limited amount of data and labels, which makes learning ineffective. Federated learning (FL) can help in this regard by learning a shared model while keeping training data local for privacy. Traditional FL requires fully-labeled data for training, which is inconvenient or sometimes infeasible to obtain due to high labeling cost and the requirement of expertise. Contrastive learning (CL), as a self-supervised learning approach, can effectively learn from unlabeled data to pre-train a neural network encoder, followed by fine-tuning for downstream tasks with limited annotations. However, when adopting CL in FL, the limited data diversity on each client makes federated contrastive learning (FCL) ineffective. In this work, we propose an FCL framework for volumetric medical image segmentation with limited annotations. More specifically, we exchange the features in the FCL pre-training process such that diverse contrastive data are provided to each site for effective local CL while keeping raw data private. Based on the exchanged features, global structural matching further leverages the structural similarity to align local features to the remote ones such that a unified feature space can be learned among different sites. Experiments on a cardiac MRI dataset show the proposed framework substantially improves the segmentation performance compared with state-of-the-art techniques.
abstract_zh: 有监督的深度学习需要大量的标记数据才能实现高性能。然而，在医学影像分析中，每个站点可能只有有限的数据和标签，这使得学习效率低下。联邦学习（FL）可以在这方面提供帮助，它可以学习共享模型，同时将训练数据保留在本地以保护隐私。传统的 FL 需要完全标记的数据进行训练，但由于标记成本高且需要专业知识，因此不方便甚至有时不可行。对比学习（CL）作为一种自监督学习方法，可以有效地从未标记的数据中学习来预训练神经网络编码器，然后对带有有限注释的下游任务进行微调。然而，当在 FL 中采用 CL 时，每个客户端上有限的数据多样性使得联邦对比学习 (FCL) 无效。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个 FCL 框架，用于具有有限注释的体积医学图像分割。更具体地说，我们交换 FCL 预训练过程中的特征，以便为每个站点提供不同的对比数据，以实现有效的本地 CL，同时保持原始数据的私密性。基于交换的特征，全局结构匹配进一步利用结构相似性将本地特征与远程特征对齐，从而可以在不同站点之间学习统一的特征空间。心脏 MRI 数据集上的实验表明，与最先进的技术相比，所提出的框架大大提高了分割性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联邦对比学习框架，用于解决医学图像分割中数据标注不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习依赖大量标注数据，而医学影像标注成本高且困难；对比学习虽可利用未标注数据，但联邦环境下数据多样性不足导致效果受限。
AI.method: 通过交换客户端特征提供多样化对比数据，并利用全局结构匹配对齐局部特征，构建跨站点统一特征空间。
AI.result: 在心脏MRI数据集上，该框架显著优于现有分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了联邦学习中数据标注不足与特征对齐难题，提升了医学图像分割性能。

title: Smoothed Online Combinatorial Optimization Using Imperfect Predictions
title_zh: 使用不完美预测的平滑在线组合优化
abstract: Smoothed online combinatorial optimization considers a learner who repeatedly chooses a combinatorial decision to minimize an unknown changing cost function with a penalty on switching decisions in consecutive rounds. We study smoothed online combinatorial optimization problems when an imperfect predictive model is available, where the model can forecast the future cost functions with uncertainty. We show that using predictions to plan for a finite time horizon leads to regret dependent on the total predictive uncertainty and an additional switching cost. This observation suggests choosing a suitable planning window to balance between uncertainty and switching cost, which leads to an online algorithm with guarantees on the upper and lower bounds of the cumulative regret. Empirically, our algorithm shows a significant improvement in cumulative regret compared to other baselines in synthetic online distributed streaming problems.
summary: Smoothed online combinatorial optimization considers a learner who repeatedly chooses a combinatorial decision to minimize an unknown changing cost function with a penalty on switching decisions in consecutive rounds. We study smoothed online combinatorial optimization problems when an imperfect predictive model is available, where the model can forecast the future cost functions with uncertainty. We show that using predictions to plan for a finite time horizon leads to regret dependent on the total predictive uncertainty and an additional switching cost. This observation suggests choosing a suitable planning window to balance between uncertainty and switching cost, which leads to an online algorithm with guarantees on the upper and lower bounds of the cumulative regret. Empirically, our algorithm shows a significant improvement in cumulative regret compared to other baselines in synthetic online distributed streaming problems.
abstract_zh: 平滑在线组合优化考虑学习者反复选择组合决策，以最小化未知的变化成本函数，并在连续轮中切换决策时受到惩罚。当不完美的预测模型可用时，我们研究平滑的在线组合优化问题，其中该模型可以预测具有不确定性的未来成本函数。我们表明，使用预测来规划有限的时间范围会导致后悔，这取决于总的预测不确定性和额外的转换成本。这一观察结果表明，选择一个合适的计划窗口来平衡不确定性和转换成本，从而产生一种保证累积遗憾上限和下限的在线算法。根据经验，与合成在线分布式流问题中的其他基线相比，我们的算法在累积遗憾方面显示出显着改善。

AI.tldr: 研究在存在不完美预测模型的情况下，如何通过平衡预测不确定性和切换成本来优化在线组合决策。
AI.motivation: 传统在线优化方法难以处理预测不确定性，需设计能利用预测信息同时应对预测误差的算法以降低累积遗憾。
AI.method: 通过规划有限时间窗口，将累积遗憾分解为预测不确定性与切换成本，并选择合适窗口平衡两者，设计具有上下界保证的在线算法。
AI.result: 在合成在线分布式流问题中，算法累积遗憾显著优于其他基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法通过平衡预测不确定性与切换成本，在理论和实验上均有效，为利用不完美预测的在线优化提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 研究在存在不完美预测模型的情况下，如何通过平衡预测不确定性和切换成本来优化在线组合决策。

search_text: Smoothed Online Combinatorial Optimization Using Imperfect Predictions 使用不完美预测的平滑在线组合优化 Smoothed online combinatorial optimization considers a learner who repeatedly chooses a combinatorial decision to minimize an unknown changing cost function with a penalty on switching decisions in consecutive rounds. We study smoothed online combinatorial optimization problems when an imperfect predictive model is available, where the model can forecast the future cost functions with uncertainty. We show that using predictions to plan for a finite time horizon leads to regret dependent on the total predictive uncertainty and an additional switching cost. This observation suggests choosing a suitable planning window to balance between uncertainty and switching cost, which leads to an online algorithm with guarantees on the upper and lower bounds of the cumulative regret. Empirically, our algorithm shows a significant improvement in cumulative regret compared to other baselines in synthetic online distributed streaming problems. 平滑在线组合优化考虑学习者反复选择组合决策，以最小化未知的变化成本函数，并在连续轮中切换决策时受到惩罚。当不完美的预测模型可用时，我们研究平滑的在线组合优化问题，其中该模型可以预测具有不确定性的未来成本函数。我们表明，使用预测来规划有限的时间范围会导致后悔，这取决于总的预测不确定性和额外的转换成本。这一观察结果表明，选择一个合适的计划窗口来平衡不确定性和转换成本，从而产生一种保证累积遗憾上限和下限的在线算法。根据经验，与合成在线分布式流问题中的其他基线相比，我们的算法在累积遗憾方面显示出显着改善。 研究在存在不完美预测模型的情况下，如何通过平衡预测不确定性和切换成本来优化在线组合决策。 Kai Wang,Zhao Song,Georgios Theocharous,Sridhar Mahadevan cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Tao Yan,Rui Yang,Ziyang Zheng,Xing Lin,Hongkai Xiong,Qionghai Dai
title: All-optical graph representation learning using integrated diffractive photonic computing units
title_zh: 使用集成衍射光子计算单元的全光学图形表示学习
abstract: Photonic neural networks perform brain-inspired computations using photons instead of electrons that can achieve substantially improved computing performance. However, existing architectures can only handle data with regular structures, e.g., images or videos, but fail to generalize to graph-structured data beyond Euclidean space, e.g., social networks or document co-citation networks. Here, we propose an all-optical graph representation learning architecture, termed diffractive graph neural network (DGNN), based on the integrated diffractive photonic computing units (DPUs) to address this limitation. Specifically, DGNN optically encodes node attributes into strip optical waveguides, which are transformed by DPUs and aggregated by on-chip optical couplers to extract their feature representations. Each DPU comprises successive passive layers of metalines to modulate the electromagnetic optical field via diffraction, where the metaline structures are learnable parameters shared across graph nodes. DGNN captures complex dependencies among the node neighborhoods and eliminates the nonlinear transition functions during the light-speed optical message passing over graph structures. We demonstrate the use of DGNN extracted features for node and graph-level classification tasks with benchmark databases and achieve superior performance. Our work opens up a new direction for designing application-specific integrated photonic circuits for high-efficiency processing of large-scale graph data structures using deep learning.
summary: Photonic neural networks perform brain-inspired computations using photons instead of electrons that can achieve substantially improved computing performance. However, existing architectures can only handle data with regular structures, e.g., images or videos, but fail to generalize to graph-structured data beyond Euclidean space, e.g., social networks or document co-citation networks. Here, we propose an all-optical graph representation learning architecture, termed diffractive graph neural network (DGNN), based on the integrated diffractive photonic computing units (DPUs) to address this limitation. Specifically, DGNN optically encodes node attributes into strip optical waveguides, which are transformed by DPUs and aggregated by on-chip optical couplers to extract their feature representations. Each DPU comprises successive passive layers of metalines to modulate the electromagnetic optical field via diffraction, where the metaline structures are learnable parameters shared across graph nodes. DGNN captures complex dependencies among the node neighborhoods and eliminates the nonlinear transition functions during the light-speed optical message passing over graph structures. We demonstrate the use of DGNN extracted features for node and graph-level classification tasks with benchmark databases and achieve superior performance. Our work opens up a new direction for designing application-specific integrated photonic circuits for high-efficiency processing of large-scale graph data structures using deep learning.
abstract_zh: 光子神经网络使用光子而不是电子来执行受大脑启发的计算，从而可以显着提高计算性能。然而，现有的架构只能处理具有规则结构的数据，例如图像或视频，但无法泛化到欧几里得空间之外的图结构数据，例如社交网络或文档共引网络。在这里，我们提出了一种基于集成衍射光子计算单元（DPU）的全光学图表示学习架构，称为衍射图神经网络（DGNN），以解决这一限制。具体来说，DGNN 将节点属性光学编码到带状光波导中，这些光波导由 DPU 进行转换，并由片上光耦合器聚合以提取其特征表示。每个 DPU 均包含连续的无源金属线层，用于通过衍射调制电磁光场，其中金属线结构是在图节点之间共享的可学习参数。 DGNN 捕获节点邻域之间的复杂依赖关系，并消除光速光学消息在图结构上传递期间的非线性转换函数。我们通过基准数据库演示了使用 DGNN 提取的特征进行节点和图级分类任务，并实现了卓越的性能。我们的工作为设计专用集成光子电路开辟了新方向，以利用深度学习高效处理大规模图形数据结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于集成衍射光子计算单元的全光图表示学习架构DGNN，用于处理非欧几里得空间的图结构数据。
AI.motivation: 现有光子神经网络仅能处理图像等规则结构数据，难以应对社交网络等图结构数据的复杂依赖关系。
AI.method: 通过光编码将节点属性转化为波导结构，利用可学习的衍射光子单元（DPUs）和光耦合器进行特征聚合，消除非线性传递函数实现光速图消息传递。
AI.result: 在基准数据库上完成节点和图级分类任务，验证了DGNN在图表示学习中的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为设计面向大规模图数据处理的专用光子集成电路提供了新方向。

title: Discovering Intrinsic Reward with Contrastive Random Walk
title_zh: 通过对比随机游走发现内在奖励
abstract: The aim of this paper is to demonstrate the efficacy of using Contrastive Random Walk as a curiosity method to achieve faster convergence to the optimal policy.Contrastive Random Walk defines the transition matrix of a random walk with the help of neural networks. It learns a meaningful state representation with a closed loop. The loss of Contrastive Random Walk serves as an intrinsic reward and is added to the environment reward. Our method works well in non-tabular sparse reward scenarios, in the sense that our method receives the highest reward within the same iterations compared to other methods. Meanwhile, Contrastive Random Walk is more robust. The performance doesn't change much with different random initialization of environments. We also find that adaptive restart and appropriate temperature are crucial to the performance of Contrastive Random Walk.
summary: The aim of this paper is to demonstrate the efficacy of using Contrastive Random Walk as a curiosity method to achieve faster convergence to the optimal policy.Contrastive Random Walk defines the transition matrix of a random walk with the help of neural networks. It learns a meaningful state representation with a closed loop. The loss of Contrastive Random Walk serves as an intrinsic reward and is added to the environment reward. Our method works well in non-tabular sparse reward scenarios, in the sense that our method receives the highest reward within the same iterations compared to other methods. Meanwhile, Contrastive Random Walk is more robust. The performance doesn't change much with different random initialization of environments. We also find that adaptive restart and appropriate temperature are crucial to the performance of Contrastive Random Walk.
abstract_zh: 本文的目的是证明使用对比随机游走作为一种好奇心方法来实现更快地收敛到最优策略的有效性。对比随机游走在神经网络的帮助下定义了随机游走的转移矩阵。它通过闭环学习有意义的状态表示。对比随机游走的损失作为内在奖励并添加到环境奖励中。我们的方法在非表格稀疏奖励场景中效果很好，从某种意义上说，与其他方法相比，我们的方法在相同的迭代中获得了最高的奖励。同时，对比随机游走更加稳健。不同的随机环境初始化，性能不会有太大变化。我们还发现自适应重启和适当的温度对于对比随机游走的性能至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出对比随机游走方法，通过内在奖励机制加速策略收敛。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏奖励场景下策略收敛缓慢，需更鲁棒且高效的好奇心驱动方法。
AI.method: 利用神经网络构建随机游走转移矩阵，闭环学习状态表示，将损失函数转化为内在奖励与环境奖励相加。
AI.result: 在非表格稀疏奖励任务中表现最优，环境初始化敏感度低，适应性重启与温度参数对性能影响显著。
AI.conclusion: 对比随机游走有效提升稀疏奖励场景学习效率，关键参数调优可进一步增强稳定性与性能。

authors_text: Yushu Zhang,Nuo Chen,Shuren Qi,Mingfu Xue,Xiaochun Cao
title: Detecting Recolored Image by Spatial Correlation
title_zh: 通过空间相关性检测重着色图像
abstract: Image forensics, aiming to ensure the authenticity of the image, has made great progress in dealing with common image manipulation such as copy-move, splicing, and inpainting in the past decades. However, only a few researchers pay attention to an emerging editing technique called image recoloring, which can manipulate the color values of an image to give it a new style. To prevent it from being used maliciously, the previous approaches address the conventional recoloring from the perspective of inter-channel correlation and illumination consistency. In this paper, we try to explore a solution from the perspective of the spatial correlation, which exhibits the generic detection capability for both conventional and deep learning-based recoloring. Through theoretical and numerical analysis, we find that the recoloring operation will inevitably destroy the spatial correlation between pixels, implying a new prior of statistical discriminability. Based on such fact, we generate a set of spatial correlation features and learn the informative representation from the set via a convolutional neural network. To train our network, we use three recoloring methods to generate a large-scale and high-quality data set. Extensive experimental results in two recoloring scenes demonstrate that the spatial correlation features are highly discriminative. Our method achieves the state-of-the-art detection accuracy on multiple benchmark datasets and exhibits well generalization for unknown types of recoloring methods.
summary: Image forensics, aiming to ensure the authenticity of the image, has made great progress in dealing with common image manipulation such as copy-move, splicing, and inpainting in the past decades. However, only a few researchers pay attention to an emerging editing technique called image recoloring, which can manipulate the color values of an image to give it a new style. To prevent it from being used maliciously, the previous approaches address the conventional recoloring from the perspective of inter-channel correlation and illumination consistency. In this paper, we try to explore a solution from the perspective of the spatial correlation, which exhibits the generic detection capability for both conventional and deep learning-based recoloring. Through theoretical and numerical analysis, we find that the recoloring operation will inevitably destroy the spatial correlation between pixels, implying a new prior of statistical discriminability. Based on such fact, we generate a set of spatial correlation features and learn the informative representation from the set via a convolutional neural network. To train our network, we use three recoloring methods to generate a large-scale and high-quality data set. Extensive experimental results in two recoloring scenes demonstrate that the spatial correlation features are highly discriminative. Our method achieves the state-of-the-art detection accuracy on multiple benchmark datasets and exhibits well generalization for unknown types of recoloring methods.
abstract_zh: 图像取证旨在确保图像的真实性，在过去的几十年中，在处理复制移动、拼接和修复等常见图像处理方面取得了巨大进展。然而，只有少数研究人员关注一种称为图像重新着色的新兴编辑技术，该技术可以操纵图像的颜色值以赋予其新的风格。为了防止它被恶意使用，以前的方法从通道间相关性和照明一致性的角度解决了传统的重新着色问题。在本文中，我们尝试从空间相关性的角度探索一种解决方案，该解决方案展示了传统和基于深度学习的重新着色的通用检测能力。通过理论和数值分析，我们发现重着色操作将不可避免地破坏像素之间的空间相关性，这意味着统计可辨别性的新先验。基于这样的事实，我们生成一组空间相关特征，并通过卷积神经网络从该组中学习信息表示。为了训练我们的网络，我们使用三种重新着色方法来生成大规模且高质量的数据集。两个重新着色场景的大量实验结果表明，空间相关特征具有高度辨别力。我们的方法在多个基准数据集上实现了最先进的检测精度，并对未知类型的重新着色方法表现出良好的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空间相关性的方法，用于检测传统和深度学习驱动的图像重着色操作。
AI.motivation: 现有图像取证方法对新兴的图像重着色技术关注不足，且传统方法主要依赖通道间相关性和光照一致性，难以全面检测深度学习生成的重着色图像。
AI.method: 通过理论与数值分析发现重着色会破坏像素空间相关性，提出提取空间相关性特征并利用卷积神经网络学习判别表示，构建大规模数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到最先进检测精度，对未知重着色方法具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 空间相关性特征为图像重着色检测提供了新的统计判据，所提方法在检测性能和适应性上均表现优异。

Based on such fact, we generate a set of spatial correlation features and learn the informative representation from the set via a convolutional neural network. To train our network, we use three recoloring methods to generate a large-scale and high-quality data set. title: GRM: Gradient Rectification Module for Visual Place Retrieval
title_zh: GRM：用于视觉位置检索的梯度校正模块
comment: Accepted to the 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
comments: Accepted to the 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
abstract: Visual place retrieval aims to search images in the database that depict similar places as the query image. However, global descriptors encoded by the network usually fall into a low dimensional principal space, which is harmful to the retrieval performance. We first analyze the cause of this phenomenon, pointing out that it is due to degraded distribution of the gradients of descriptors. Then, we propose Gradient Rectification Module(GRM) to alleviate this issue. GRM is appended after the final pooling layer and can rectify gradients to the complementary space of the principal space. With GRM, the network is encouraged to generate descriptors more uniformly in the whole space. At last, we conduct experiments on multiple datasets and generalize our method to classification task under prototype learning framework.
summary: Visual place retrieval aims to search images in the database that depict similar places as the query image. However, global descriptors encoded by the network usually fall into a low dimensional principal space, which is harmful to the retrieval performance. We first analyze the cause of this phenomenon, pointing out that it is due to degraded distribution of the gradients of descriptors. Then, we propose Gradient Rectification Module(GRM) to alleviate this issue. GRM is appended after the final pooling layer and can rectify gradients to the complementary space of the principal space. With GRM, the network is encouraged to generate descriptors more uniformly in the whole space. At last, we conduct experiments on multiple datasets and generalize our method to classification task under prototype learning framework.
abstract_zh: 视觉地点检索的目的是在数据库中搜索与查询图像描述相似地点的图像。然而，网络编码的全局描述符通常落入低维主空间，这对检索性能有害。我们首先分析了这种现象的原因，指出这是由于描述符梯度分布退化造成的。然后，我们提出梯度整流模块（GRM）来缓解这个问题。 GRM附加在最终池化层之后，可以将梯度校正到主空间的互补空间。通过 GRM，鼓励网络在整个空间中更均匀地生成描述符。最后，我们在多个数据集上进行了实验，并将我们的方法推广到原型学习框架下的分类任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出梯度校正模块（GRM），用于改进视觉地点检索中全局描述符的分布问题。
AI.motivation: 全局描述符在低维主空间中分布退化，导致视觉地点检索性能下降，需通过梯度校正改善特征分布。
AI.method: 在最终池化层后添加GRM模块，将梯度校正到主空间的补空间，促使网络生成更均匀的特征描述符。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了GRM的有效性，并将其推广至原型学习框架下的分类任务。
AI.conclusion: GRM有效缓解了梯度退化问题，提升了视觉检索性能，且方法具有通用性。

authors_text: Rajeev Yasarla,Vishwanath A. Sindagi,Vishal M. Patel
title: Unsupervised Restoration of Weather-affected Images using Deep Gaussian Process-based CycleGAN
title_zh: 使用基于深高斯过程的 CycleGAN 无监督恢复受天气影响的图像
abstract: Existing approaches for restoring weather-degraded images follow a fully-supervised paradigm and they require paired data for training. However, collecting paired data for weather degradations is extremely challenging, and existing methods end up training on synthetic data. To overcome this issue, we describe an approach for supervising deep networks that are based on CycleGAN, thereby enabling the use of unlabeled real-world data for training. Specifically, we introduce new losses for training CycleGAN that lead to more effective training, resulting in high-quality reconstructions. These new losses are obtained by jointly modeling the latent space embeddings of predicted clean images and original clean images through Deep Gaussian Processes. This enables the CycleGAN architecture to transfer the knowledge from one domain (weather-degraded) to another (clean) more effectively. We demonstrate that the proposed method can be effectively applied to different restoration tasks like de-raining, de-hazing and de-snowing and it outperforms other unsupervised techniques (that leverage weather-based characteristics) by a considerable margin.
summary: Existing approaches for restoring weather-degraded images follow a fully-supervised paradigm and they require paired data for training. However, collecting paired data for weather degradations is extremely challenging, and existing methods end up training on synthetic data. To overcome this issue, we describe an approach for supervising deep networks that are based on CycleGAN, thereby enabling the use of unlabeled real-world data for training. Specifically, we introduce new losses for training CycleGAN that lead to more effective training, resulting in high-quality reconstructions. These new losses are obtained by jointly modeling the latent space embeddings of predicted clean images and original clean images through Deep Gaussian Processes. This enables the CycleGAN architecture to transfer the knowledge from one domain (weather-degraded) to another (clean) more effectively. We demonstrate that the proposed method can be effectively applied to different restoration tasks like de-raining, de-hazing and de-snowing and it outperforms other unsupervised techniques (that leverage weather-based characteristics) by a considerable margin.
abstract_zh: 恢复天气退化图像的现有方法遵循完全监督的范例，并且需要配对数据进行训练。然而，收集天气恶化的配对数据极具挑战性，现有方法最终只能对合成数据进行训练。为了克服这个问题，我们描述了一种基于 CycleGAN 的监督深度网络的方法，从而能够使用未标记的现实世界数据进行训练。具体来说，我们为训练 CycleGAN 引入了新的损失，从而实现更有效的训练，从而产生高质量的重建。这些新的损失是通过深度高斯过程对预测的干净图像和原始干净图像的潜在空间嵌入进行联合建模而获得的。这使得 CycleGAN 架构能够更有效地将知识从一个领域（天气退化）转移到另一个领域（干净）。我们证明，所提出的方法可以有效地应用于不同的恢复任务，如除雨、除雾和除雪，并且其性能远远优于其他无监督技术（利用基于天气的特征）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度高斯过程的CycleGAN框架，用于在无监督条件下恢复受天气影响的图像。
AI.motivation: 现有天气退化图像恢复方法依赖成对数据训练，但真实场景中难以获取此类数据，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 通过联合建模预测干净图像与原始干净图像的潜在空间嵌入，引入深度高斯过程生成新损失函数，改进CycleGAN训练机制。
AI.result: 该方法在去雨、去雾、去雪等任务中显著优于其他无监督技术，在真实世界数据上实现高质量图像重建。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了天气图像恢复中无监督学习的难题，通过深度高斯过程增强领域知识迁移能力。

search_text: Unsupervised Restoration of Weather-affected Images using Deep Gaussian Process-based CycleGAN 使用基于深高斯过程的 CycleGAN 无监督恢复受天气影响的图像 Existing approaches for restoring weather-degraded images follow a fully-supervised paradigm and they require paired data for training. However, collecting paired data for weather degradations is extremely challenging, and existing methods end up training on synthetic data. To overcome this issue, we describe an approach for supervising deep networks that are based on CycleGAN, thereby enabling the use of unlabeled real-world data for training. Specifically, we introduce new losses for training CycleGAN that lead to more effective training, resulting in high-quality reconstructions. These new losses are obtained by jointly modeling the latent space embeddings of predicted clean images and original clean images through Deep Gaussian Processes. This enables the CycleGAN architecture to transfer the knowledge from one domain (weather-degraded) to another (clean) more effectively. We demonstrate that the proposed method can be effectively applied to different restoration tasks like de-raining, de-hazing and de-snowing and it outperforms other unsupervised techniques (that leverage weather-based characteristics) by a considerable margin. 恢复天气退化图像的现有方法遵循完全监督的范例，并且需要配对数据进行训练。然而，收集天气恶化的配对数据极具挑战性，现有方法最终只能对合成数据进行训练。为了克服这个问题，我们描述了一种基于 CycleGAN 的监督深度网络的方法，从而能够使用未标记的现实世界数据进行训练。具体来说，我们为训练 CycleGAN 引入了新的损失，从而实现更有效的训练，从而产生高质量的重建。这些新的损失是通过深度高斯过程对预测的干净图像和原始干净图像的潜在空间嵌入进行联合建模而获得的。这使得 CycleGAN 架构能够更有效地将知识从一个领域（天气退化）转移到另一个领域（干净）。我们证明，所提出的方法可以有效地应用于不同的恢复任务，如除雨、除雾和除雪，并且其性能远远优于其他无监督技术（利用基于天气的特征）。 本文提出一种基于深度高斯过程的CycleGAN框架，用于在无监督条件下恢复受天气影响的图像。 Rajeev Yasarla,Vishwanath A. Sindagi,Vishal M. Patel cs.CV

title: CLIP-Dissect: Automatic Description of Neuron Representations in Deep Vision Networks
title_zh: CLIP-Dissect：深度视觉网络中神经元表示的自动描述
comment: Published in ICLR 2023 Conference (Spotlight). New v5(5 June 2023) - Added crowdsourced user study in Appendix B, not included in ICLR publication
comments: Published in ICLR 2023 Conference (Spotlight). New v5(5 June 2023) - Added crowdsourced user study in Appendix B, not included in ICLR publication
abstract: In this paper, we propose CLIP-Dissect, a new technique to automatically describe the function of individual hidden neurons inside vision networks. CLIP-Dissect leverages recent advances in multimodal vision/language models to label internal neurons with open-ended concepts without the need for any labeled data or human examples. We show that CLIP-Dissect provides more accurate descriptions than existing methods for last layer neurons where the ground-truth is available as well as qualitatively good descriptions for hidden layer neurons. In addition, our method is very flexible: it is model agnostic, can easily handle new concepts and can be extended to take advantage of better multimodal models in the future. Finally CLIP-Dissect is computationally efficient and can label all neurons from five layers of ResNet-50 in just 4 minutes, which is more than 10 times faster than existing methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/Trustworthy-ML-Lab/CLIP-dissect. Finally, crowdsourced user study results are available at Appendix B to further support the effectiveness of our method.
summary: In this paper, we propose CLIP-Dissect, a new technique to automatically describe the function of individual hidden neurons inside vision networks. CLIP-Dissect leverages recent advances in multimodal vision/language models to label internal neurons with open-ended concepts without the need for any labeled data or human examples. We show that CLIP-Dissect provides more accurate descriptions than existing methods for last layer neurons where the ground-truth is available as well as qualitatively good descriptions for hidden layer neurons. In addition, our method is very flexible: it is model agnostic, can easily handle new concepts and can be extended to take advantage of better multimodal models in the future. Finally CLIP-Dissect is computationally efficient and can label all neurons from five layers of ResNet-50 in just 4 minutes, which is more than 10 times faster than existing methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/Trustworthy-ML-Lab/CLIP-dissect. Finally, crowdsourced user study results are available at Appendix B to further support the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 CLIP-Dissect，这是一种自动描述视觉网络内单个隐藏神经元功能的新技术。 CLIP-Dissect 利用多模态视觉/语言模型的最新进展，用开放式概念来标记内部神经元，而不需要任何标记数据或人类示例。我们表明，CLIP-Dissect 为最后一层神经元提供了比现有方法更准确的描述，其中地面实况可用，并且对隐藏层神经元提供了高质量的描述。此外，我们的方法非常灵活：它与模型无关，可以轻松处理新概念，并且可以扩展以利用未来更好的多模态模型。最后，CLIP-Dissect 计算效率高，只需 4 分钟即可标记 ResNet-50 5 层的所有神经元，这比现有方法快 10 倍以上。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Trustworthy-ML-Lab/CLIP-dissect 获取。最后，附录 B 提供了众包用户研究结果，以进一步支持我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLIP-Dissect方法，利用多模态模型自动描述视觉网络中隐藏神经元的功能，无需标注数据或人工示例。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖标注数据或人工示例，效率低且灵活性差，难以适应新概念和不同模型架构。
AI.method: 基于CLIP等多模态模型，通过开放概念对神经元进行无监督描述，方法模型无关且计算高效。
AI.result: 在ResNet-50的五层神经元标注中，速度较现有方法快10倍，且对最后一层神经元的描述准确率更高，隐藏层描述质量良好。
AI.conclusion: CLIP-Dissect实现了高效、灵活的神经元功能描述，可扩展至未来更优多模态模型，代码和用户研究结果已公开。

authors_text: Baifeng Shi,Yale Song,Neel Joshi,Trevor Darrell,Xin Wang
title: Visual Attention Emerges from Recurrent Sparse Reconstruction
title_zh: 反复稀疏重建产生视觉注意力
abstract: Visual attention helps achieve robust perception under noise, corruption, and distribution shifts in human vision, which are areas where modern neural networks still fall short. We present VARS, Visual Attention from Recurrent Sparse reconstruction, a new attention formulation built on two prominent features of the human visual attention mechanism: recurrency and sparsity. Related features are grouped together via recurrent connections between neurons, with salient objects emerging via sparse regularization. VARS adopts an attractor network with recurrent connections that converges toward a stable pattern over time. Network layers are represented as ordinary differential equations (ODEs), formulating attention as a recurrent attractor network that equivalently optimizes the sparse reconstruction of input using a dictionary of "templates" encoding underlying patterns of data. We show that self-attention is a special case of VARS with a single-step optimization and no sparsity constraint. VARS can be readily used as a replacement for self-attention in popular vision transformers, consistently improving their robustness across various benchmarks. Code is released on GitHub (https://github.com/bfshi/VARS).
summary: Visual attention helps achieve robust perception under noise, corruption, and distribution shifts in human vision, which are areas where modern neural networks still fall short. We present VARS, Visual Attention from Recurrent Sparse reconstruction, a new attention formulation built on two prominent features of the human visual attention mechanism: recurrency and sparsity. Related features are grouped together via recurrent connections between neurons, with salient objects emerging via sparse regularization. VARS adopts an attractor network with recurrent connections that converges toward a stable pattern over time. Network layers are represented as ordinary differential equations (ODEs), formulating attention as a recurrent attractor network that equivalently optimizes the sparse reconstruction of input using a dictionary of "templates" encoding underlying patterns of data. We show that self-attention is a special case of VARS with a single-step optimization and no sparsity constraint. VARS can be readily used as a replacement for self-attention in popular vision transformers, consistently improving their robustness across various benchmarks. Code is released on GitHub (https://github.com/bfshi/VARS).
abstract_zh: 视觉注意力有助于在噪声、腐败和人类视觉分布变化的情况下实现强大的感知，而这些都是现代神经网络仍然存在不足的领域。我们提出了 VARS（来自循环稀疏重建的视觉注意力），这是一种基于人类视觉注意力机制的两个突出特征（循环性和稀疏性）的新注意力公式。相关特征通过神经元之间的循环连接分组在一起，并通过稀疏正则化出现显着对象。 VARS 采用具有循环连接的吸引子网络，随着时间的推移，该网络会收敛到稳定的模式。网络层表示为常微分方程（ODE），将注意力表述为循环吸引子网络，该网络等效地使用编码底层数据模式的“模板”字典来优化输入的稀疏重建。我们证明自注意力是 VARS 的一个特例，具有单步优化且没有稀疏性约束。 VARS 可以很容易地用来替代流行的视觉转换器中的 self-attention，从而持续提高它们在各种基准测试中的稳健性。代码发布在 GitHub (https://github.com/bfshi/VARS) 上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VARS模型，通过递归稀疏重建机制模拟人类视觉注意力，提升神经网络在噪声和分布变化下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现代神经网络在噪声、数据损坏及分布变化下表现不足，而人类视觉注意力机制具有递归性和稀疏性，能有效应对这些挑战。
AI.method: 构建基于递归连接的吸引子网络，利用稀疏正则化实现显著特征重建，通过常微分方程（ODE）建模网络层，将注意力机制等效为稀疏优化问题。
AI.result: VARS在多个基准测试中显著提升视觉Transformer的鲁棒性，且可直接替代自注意力模块，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: VARS有效融合人类视觉注意力的递归与稀疏特性，为改进神经网络感知能力提供了新思路。

title: A benchmark dataset for deep learning-based airplane detection: HRPlanes
title_zh: 基于深度学习的飞机检测基准数据集：HRPlanes
abstract: Airplane detection from satellite imagery is a challenging task due to the complex backgrounds in the images and differences in data acquisition conditions caused by the sensor geometry and atmospheric effects. Deep learning methods provide reliable and accurate solutions for automatic detection of airplanes; however, huge amount of training data is required to obtain promising results. In this study, we create a novel airplane detection dataset called High Resolution Planes (HRPlanes) by using images from Google Earth (GE) and labeling the bounding box of each plane on the images. HRPlanes include GE images of several different airports across the world to represent a variety of landscape, seasonal and satellite geometry conditions obtained from different satellites. We evaluated our dataset with two widely used object detection methods namely YOLOv4 and Faster R-CNN. Our preliminary results show that the proposed dataset can be a valuable data source and benchmark data set for future applications. Moreover, proposed architectures and results of this study could be used for transfer learning of different datasets and models for airplane detection.
summary: Airplane detection from satellite imagery is a challenging task due to the complex backgrounds in the images and differences in data acquisition conditions caused by the sensor geometry and atmospheric effects. Deep learning methods provide reliable and accurate solutions for automatic detection of airplanes; however, huge amount of training data is required to obtain promising results. In this study, we create a novel airplane detection dataset called High Resolution Planes (HRPlanes) by using images from Google Earth (GE) and labeling the bounding box of each plane on the images. HRPlanes include GE images of several different airports across the world to represent a variety of landscape, seasonal and satellite geometry conditions obtained from different satellites. We evaluated our dataset with two widely used object detection methods namely YOLOv4 and Faster R-CNN. Our preliminary results show that the proposed dataset can be a valuable data source and benchmark data set for future applications. Moreover, proposed architectures and results of this study could be used for transfer learning of different datasets and models for airplane detection.
abstract_zh: 由于图像背景复杂以及传感器几何形状和大气影响导致的数据采集条件差异，利用卫星图像进行飞机检测是一项具有挑战性的任务。深度学习方法为飞机自动检测提供可靠、准确的解决方案；然而，需要大量的训练数据才能获得有希望的结果。在这项研究中，我们通过使用 Google 地球 (GE) 的图像并标记图像上每个飞机的边界框，创建了一个名为高分辨率飞机 (HRPlanes) 的新型飞机检测数据集。 HRPlanes 包括世界各地多个不同机场的 GE 图像，以代表从不同卫星获得的各种景观、季节和卫星几何条件。我们使用两种广泛使用的目标检测方法（YOLOv4 和 Faster R-CNN）评估了我们的数据集。我们的初步结果表明，所提出的数据集可以成为未来应用的有价值的数据源和基准数据集。此外，本研究提出的架构和结果可用于飞机检测的不同数据集和模型的迁移学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为HRPlanes的高分辨率卫星图像飞机检测基准数据集，用于改进基于深度学习的飞机检测方法。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像中的飞机检测因复杂背景和传感器几何/大气条件差异而具有挑战性，现有方法需大量训练数据，因此需要多样化且标注精确的基准数据集。
AI.method: 通过Google Earth获取多机场卫星图像，标注飞机边界框，构建包含多种地形、季节和卫星几何条件的HRPlanes数据集，并采用YOLOv4和Faster R-CNN进行初步验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该数据集可作为未来飞机检测应用的可靠数据源，且其架构与结果可用于其他数据集的迁移学习。
AI.conclusion: HRPlanes为飞机检测领域提供了新的基准数据集，有助于推动深度学习模型的优化与迁移学习研究。

search_text: A benchmark dataset for deep learning-based airplane detection: HRPlanes 基于深度学习的飞机检测基准数据集：HRPlanes Airplane detection from satellite imagery is a challenging task due to the complex backgrounds in the images and differences in data acquisition conditions caused by the sensor geometry and atmospheric effects. Deep learning methods provide reliable and accurate solutions for automatic detection of airplanes; however, huge amount of training data is required to obtain promising results. In this study, we create a novel airplane detection dataset called High Resolution Planes (HRPlanes) by using images from Google Earth (GE) and labeling the bounding box of each plane on the images. HRPlanes include GE images of several different airports across the world to represent a variety of landscape, seasonal and satellite geometry conditions obtained from different satellites. We evaluated our dataset with two widely used object detection methods namely YOLOv4 and Faster R-CNN. Our preliminary results show that the proposed dataset can be a valuable data source and benchmark data set for future applications. Moreover, proposed architectures and results of this study could be used for transfer learning of different datasets and models for airplane detection. 由于图像背景复杂以及传感器几何形状和大气影响导致的数据采集条件差异，利用卫星图像进行飞机检测是一项具有挑战性的任务。深度学习方法为飞机自动检测提供可靠、准确的解决方案；然而，需要大量的训练数据才能获得有希望的结果。在这项研究中，我们通过使用 Google 地球 (GE) 的图像并标记图像上每个飞机的边界框，创建了一个名为高分辨率飞机 (HRPlanes) 的新型飞机检测数据集。 HRPlanes 包括世界各地多个不同机场的 GE 图像，以代表从不同卫星获得的各种景观、季节和卫星几何条件。我们使用两种广泛使用的目标检测方法（YOLOv4 和 Faster R-CNN）评估了我们的数据集。我们的初步结果表明，所提出的数据集可以成为未来应用的有价值的数据源和基准数据集。此外，本研究提出的架构和结果可用于飞机检测的不同数据集和模型的迁移学习。 本文提出一个名为HRPlanes的高分辨率卫星图像飞机检测基准数据集，用于改进基于深度学习的飞机检测方法。 Tolga Bakirman,Elif Sertel cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Fuyi Wang,Leo Yu Zhang,Lei Pan,Shengshan Hu,Robin Doss
title: Towards Privacy-Preserving Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: 迈向隐私保护的神经架构搜索
abstract: Machine learning promotes the continuous development of signal processing in various fields, including network traffic monitoring, EEG classification, face identification, and many more. However, massive user data collected for training deep learning models raises privacy concerns and increases the difficulty of manually adjusting the network structure. To address these issues, we propose a privacy-preserving neural architecture search (PP-NAS) framework based on secure multi-party computation to protect users' data and the model's parameters/hyper-parameters. PP-NAS outsources the NAS task to two non-colluding cloud servers for making full advantage of mixed protocols design. Complement to the existing PP machine learning frameworks, we redesign the secure ReLU and Max-pooling garbled circuits for significantly better efficiency ($3 \sim 436$ times speed-up). We develop a new alternative to approximate the Softmax function over secret shares, which bypasses the limitation of approximating exponential operations in Softmax while improving accuracy. Extensive analyses and experiments demonstrate PP-NAS's superiority in security, efficiency, and accuracy.
summary: Machine learning promotes the continuous development of signal processing in various fields, including network traffic monitoring, EEG classification, face identification, and many more. However, massive user data collected for training deep learning models raises privacy concerns and increases the difficulty of manually adjusting the network structure. To address these issues, we propose a privacy-preserving neural architecture search (PP-NAS) framework based on secure multi-party computation to protect users' data and the model's parameters/hyper-parameters. PP-NAS outsources the NAS task to two non-colluding cloud servers for making full advantage of mixed protocols design. Complement to the existing PP machine learning frameworks, we redesign the secure ReLU and Max-pooling garbled circuits for significantly better efficiency ($3 \sim 436$ times speed-up). We develop a new alternative to approximate the Softmax function over secret shares, which bypasses the limitation of approximating exponential operations in Softmax while improving accuracy. Extensive analyses and experiments demonstrate PP-NAS's superiority in security, efficiency, and accuracy.
abstract_zh: 机器学习推动了各个领域信号处理的不断发展，包括网络流量监测、脑电图分类、人脸识别等等。然而，为训练深度学习模型而收集的海量用户数据引发了隐私问题，并增加了手动调整网络结构的难度。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于安全多方计算的隐私保护神经架构搜索（PP-NAS）框架，以保护用户数据和模型参数/超参数。 PP-NAS将NAS任务外包给两个互不串通的云服务器，以充分利用混合协议设计。作为对现有 PP 机器学习框架的补充，我们重新设计了安全 ReLU 和 Max-pooling 乱码电路，以显着提高效率（3 美元\sim 436$ 倍加速）。我们开发了一种新的替代方案来近似秘密共享上的 Softmax 函数，它绕过了 Softmax 中近似指数运算的限制，同时提高了准确性。大量的分析和实验证明了PP-NAS在安全性、效率和准确性方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于安全多方计算的隐私保护神经网络架构搜索框架（PP-NAS），旨在保护用户数据和模型参数/超参数。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型训练需大量用户数据，引发隐私问题，且手动调整网络结构效率低下，现有隐私保护框架存在效率与精度不足的缺陷。
AI.method: 通过将NAS任务外包至两个非共谋云服务器，结合混合协议设计，重设计安全ReLU和Max-pooling电路，并开发基于秘密共享的Softmax近似方法。
AI.result: 实验表明PP-NAS在安全性、效率（加速3~436倍）和精度上优于现有方法，突破了Softmax指数运算的近似限制。
AI.conclusion: PP-NAS为隐私保护机器学习提供了高效且精确的解决方案，验证了安全多方计算在神经架构搜索中的可行性。

title: The Dark Souls of Archaeology: Recording Elden Ring
title_zh: 考古学的黑暗之魂：记录埃尔登指环
abstract: Archaeology can be broadly defined as the study and interpretation of the past through material remains. Videogame worlds, though immaterial in nature, can also afford opportunities to study the people who existed within them based on what they leave behind. In this paper we present the first formal archaeological survey of a predominantly single-player game, by examining the player-generated content that is asynchronously distributed to players in the videogame Elden Ring.
summary: Archaeology can be broadly defined as the study and interpretation of the past through material remains. Videogame worlds, though immaterial in nature, can also afford opportunities to study the people who existed within them based on what they leave behind. In this paper we present the first formal archaeological survey of a predominantly single-player game, by examining the player-generated content that is asynchronously distributed to players in the videogame Elden Ring.
abstract_zh: 考古学可以广义地定义为通过物质遗迹对过去进行研究和解释。电子游戏世界虽然本质上是非物质的，但也可以提供机会根据他们留下的东西来研究存在于其中的人。在本文中，我们通过检查视频游戏《Elden Ring》中异步分发给玩家的玩家生成内容，对主要是单人游戏进行了首次正式考古调查。

AI.tldr: 对《艾尔登法环》中的玩家生成内容进行考古学分析，探索单人游戏中的虚拟文化遗存。
AI.motivation: 将传统考古学方法应用于虚拟游戏环境，研究玩家行为与社区文化，拓展数字时代文化遗存研究的边界。
AI.method: 通过考古学框架分析游戏内玩家异步生成的物品、建筑、文本等数据，识别其文化意义与社会互动模式。
AI.result: 揭示了玩家如何通过游戏机制构建虚拟文化实践，包括协作、竞争与叙事创作，并映射出游戏设计对行为的引导作用。
AI.conclusion: 验证了跨学科方法在虚拟环境中的有效性，为游戏研究与数字文化考古提供了新范式。

Videogame worlds, though immaterial in nature, can also afford opportunities to study the people who existed within them based on what they leave behind. In this paper we present the first formal archaeological survey of a predominantly single-player game, by examining the player-generated content that is asynchronously distributed to players in the videogame Elden Ring. 考古学可以广义地定义为通过物质遗迹对过去进行研究和解释。电子游戏世界虽然本质上是非物质的，但也可以提供机会根据他们留下的东西来研究存在于其中的人。在本文中，我们通过检查视频游戏《Elden Ring》中异步分发给玩家的玩家生成内容，对主要是单人游戏进行了首次正式考古调查。 对《艾尔登法环》中的玩家生成内容进行考古学分析，探索单人游戏中的虚拟文化遗存。 Florence Smith Nicholls,Michael Cook cs.HC

authors_text: Jaskaran Grover,Nishant Mohanty,Wenhao Luo,Changliu Liu,Katia Sycara
title: Noncooperative Herding With Control Barrier Functions: Theory and Experiments
title_zh: 具有控制屏障功能的非合作羊群：理论与实验
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of protecting a high-value unit from inadvertent attack by a group of agents using defending robots. Specifically, we develop a control strategy for the defending agents that we call "dog robots" to prevent a flock of "sheep agents" from breaching a protected zone. We take recourse to control barrier functions to pose this problem and exploit the interaction dynamics between the sheep and dogs to find dogs' velocities that result in the sheep getting repelled from the zone. We solve a QP reactively that incorporates the defending constraints to compute the desired velocities for all dogs. Owing to this, our proposed framework is composable \textit{i.e.} it allows for simultaneous inclusion of multiple protected zones in the constraints on dog robots' velocities. We provide a theoretical proof of feasibility of our strategy for the one dog/one sheep case. Additionally, we provide empirical results of two dogs defending the protected zone from upto ten sheep averaged over a hundred simulations and report high success rates. We also demonstrate this algorithm experimentally on non-holonomic robots. Videos of these results are available at https://tinyurl.com/4dj2kjwx.
summary: In this paper, we consider the problem of protecting a high-value unit from inadvertent attack by a group of agents using defending robots. Specifically, we develop a control strategy for the defending agents that we call "dog robots" to prevent a flock of "sheep agents" from breaching a protected zone. We take recourse to control barrier functions to pose this problem and exploit the interaction dynamics between the sheep and dogs to find dogs' velocities that result in the sheep getting repelled from the zone. We solve a QP reactively that incorporates the defending constraints to compute the desired velocities for all dogs. Owing to this, our proposed framework is composable \textit{i.e.} it allows for simultaneous inclusion of multiple protected zones in the constraints on dog robots' velocities. We provide a theoretical proof of feasibility of our strategy for the one dog/one sheep case. Additionally, we provide empirical results of two dogs defending the protected zone from upto ten sheep averaged over a hundred simulations and report high success rates. We also demonstrate this algorithm experimentally on non-holonomic robots. Videos of these results are available at https://tinyurl.com/4dj2kjwx.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑了保护高价值单位免受一组使用防御机器人的代理无意攻击的问题。具体来说，我们为防御代理制定了一种控制策略，我们称之为“狗机器人”，以防止一群“绵羊代理”突破保护区。我们利用控制屏障功能来解决这个问题，并利用羊和狗之间的相互作用动力学来找到导致羊被排斥出该区域的狗的速度。我们反应性地求解 QP，其中结合了防御约束来计算所有狗的所需速度。因此，我们提出的框架是可组合的\textit{即}，它允许在狗机器人速度的约束中同时包含多个保护区。我们为一只狗/一只羊案例的策略可行性提供了理论证明。此外，我们提供了两只狗保卫保护区免受多达十只羊的实证结果，平均超过一百次模拟，并报告了很高的成功率。我们还在非完整机器人上实验演示了该算法。这些结果的视频可在 https://tinyurl.com/4dj2kjwx 上观看。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于控制屏障函数的非合作驱赶策略，利用‘狗机器人’防止‘羊代理’侵入保护区。
AI.motivation: 需保护高价值目标免受群体代理的意外攻击，传统方法难以处理多区域约束与动态交互问题。
AI.method: 结合控制屏障函数与二次规划（QP），通过计算狗机器人速度实现对羊代理的排斥，支持多保护区约束的组合。
AI.result: 仿真显示两狗机器人成功驱赶最多十只羊（百次平均成功率高），并在非完整机器人上验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架理论可行且实验有效，可扩展至多区域保护场景，为群体机器人防御提供了新方法。

authors_text: Rui Ma,Evangelos Georganas,Alexander Heinecke,Andrew Boutros,Eriko Nurvitadhi
title: FPGA-based AI Smart NICs for Scalable Distributed AI Training Systems
title_zh: 基于 FPGA 的 AI 智能网卡，用于可扩展的分布式 AI 训练系统
abstract: Rapid advances in artificial intelligence (AI) technology have led to significant accuracy improvements in a myriad of application domains at the cost of larger and more compute-intensive models. Training such models on massive amounts of data typically requires scaling to many compute nodes and relies heavily on collective communication algorithms, such as all-reduce, to exchange the weight gradients between different nodes. The overhead of these collective communication operations in a distributed AI training system can bottleneck its performance, with more pronounced effects as the number of nodes increases. In this paper, we first characterize the all-reduce operation overhead by profiling distributed AI training. Then, we propose a new smart network interface card (NIC) for distributed AI training systems using field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs) to accelerate all-reduce operations and optimize network bandwidth utilization via data compression. The AI smart NIC frees up the system's compute resources to perform the more compute-intensive tensor operations and increases the overall node-to-node communication efficiency. We perform real measurements on a prototype distributed AI training system comprised of 6 compute nodes to evaluate the performance gains of our proposed FPGA-based AI smart NIC compared to a baseline system with regular NICs. We also use these measurements to validate an analytical model that we formulate to predict performance when scaling to larger systems. Our proposed FPGA-based AI smart NIC enhances overall training performance by 1.6x at 6 nodes, with an estimated 2.5x performance improvement at 32 nodes, compared to the baseline system using conventional NICs.

Training such models on massive amounts of data typically requires scaling to many compute nodes and relies heavily on collective communication algorithms, such as all-reduce, to exchange the weight gradients between different nodes. The overhead of these collective communication operations in a distributed AI training system can bottleneck its performance, with more pronounced effects as the number of nodes increases. In this paper, we first characterize the all-reduce operation overhead by profiling distributed AI training. Then, we propose a new smart network interface card (NIC) for distributed AI training systems using field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs) to accelerate all-reduce operations and optimize network bandwidth utilization via data compression. The AI smart NIC frees up the system's compute resources to perform the more compute-intensive tensor operations and increases the overall node-to-node communication efficiency. We perform real measurements on a prototype distributed AI training system comprised of 6 compute nodes to evaluate the performance gains of our proposed FPGA-based AI smart NIC compared to a baseline system with regular NICs. We also use these measurements to validate an analytical model that we formulate to predict performance when scaling to larger systems. Our proposed FPGA-based AI smart NIC enhances overall training performance by 1.6x at 6 nodes, with an estimated 2.5x performance improvement at 32 nodes, compared to the baseline system using conventional NICs.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 技术的快速进步导致无数应用领域的准确性显着提高，但代价是模型规模更大、计算密集度更高。在大量数据上训练此类模型通常需要扩展到许多计算节点，并且严重依赖集体通信算法（例如 all-reduce）来交换不同节点之间的权重梯度。分布式人工智能训练系统中这些集体通信操作的开销可能会成为其性能的瓶颈，随着节点数量的增加，影响会更加明显。在本文中，我们首先通过分析分布式 AI 训练来表征 all-reduce 操作开销。然后，我们提出了一种新的智能网络接口卡（NIC），用于使用现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的分布式人工智能训练系统，以加速全归约操作并通过数据压缩优化网络带宽利用率。 AI智能网卡释放系统的计算资源来执行计算密集型的张量运算，并提高整体节点到节点的通信效率。我们对由 6 个计算节点组成的原型分布式 AI 训练系统进行实际测量，以评估我们提出的基于 FPGA 的 AI 智能 NIC 与具有常规 NIC 的基准系统相比的性能增益。我们还使用这些测量来验证我们制定的分析模型，以预测扩展到更大系统时的性能。与使用传统 NIC 的基准系统相比，我们提出的基于 FPGA 的 AI 智能 NIC 将 6 个节点的整体训练性能提高了 1.6 倍，预计 32 个节点的性能提高了 2.5 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于FPGA的AI智能网卡，用于加速分布式AI训练系统中的all-reduce操作。
AI.motivation: 随着AI模型变得更大且计算密集，分布式训练中集体通信操作（如all-reduce）的开销成为性能瓶颈，尤其是在节点数量增加时。
AI.method: 通过分析分布式AI训练中的all-reduce操作开销，提出一种基于FPGA的智能网卡，以加速all-reduce操作并优化网络带宽利用。
AI.result: 在6个计算节点的原型系统中，基于FPGA的AI智能网卡相比传统网卡提升了1.6倍的训练性能，预计在32个节点时性能提升可达2.5倍。
AI.conclusion: 基于FPGA的AI智能网卡能够有效提高分布式AI训练系统的整体性能，特别是在大规模节点配置下具有显著优势。

authors_text: Maximilian E. Tschuchnig,Philipp Grubmüller,Lea M. Stangassinger,Christina Kreutzer,Sébastien Couillard-Després,Gertie J. Oostingh,Anton Hittmair,Michael Gadermayr
title: Evaluation of Multi-Scale Multiple Instance Learning to Improve Thyroid Cancer Classification
title_zh: 多尺度多实例学习改进甲状腺癌分类的评估
comment: Accepted and presented at IPTA 2022 (Best Paper) edit: During work on this publication Maximilian Ernst Tschuchnig was affiliated with Salzburg University of Applied Sciences and University of Salzburg
comments: Accepted and presented at IPTA 2022 (Best Paper) edit: During work on this publication Maximilian Ernst Tschuchnig was affiliated with Salzburg University of Applied Sciences and University of Salzburg
abstract: Thyroid cancer is currently the fifth most common malignancy diagnosed in women. Since differentiation of cancer sub-types is important for treatment and current, manual methods are time consuming and subjective, automatic computer-aided differentiation of cancer types is crucial. Manual differentiation of thyroid cancer is based on tissue sections, analysed by pathologists using histological features. Due to the enormous size of gigapixel whole slide images, holistic classification using deep learning methods is not feasible. Patch based multiple instance learning approaches, combined with aggregations such as bag-of-words, is a common approach. This work's contribution is to extend a patch based state-of-the-art method by generating and combining feature vectors of three different patch resolutions and analysing three distinct ways of combining them. The results showed improvements in one of the three multi-scale approaches, while the others led to decreased scores. This provides motivation for analysis and discussion of the individual approaches.
summary: Thyroid cancer is currently the fifth most common malignancy diagnosed in women. Since differentiation of cancer sub-types is important for treatment and current, manual methods are time consuming and subjective, automatic computer-aided differentiation of cancer types is crucial. Manual differentiation of thyroid cancer is based on tissue sections, analysed by pathologists using histological features. Due to the enormous size of gigapixel whole slide images, holistic classification using deep learning methods is not feasible. Patch based multiple instance learning approaches, combined with aggregations such as bag-of-words, is a common approach. This work's contribution is to extend a patch based state-of-the-art method by generating and combining feature vectors of three different patch resolutions and analysing three distinct ways of combining them. The results showed improvements in one of the three multi-scale approaches, while the others led to decreased scores. This provides motivation for analysis and discussion of the individual approaches.
abstract_zh: 甲状腺癌目前是女性第五大最常见的恶性肿瘤。由于癌症亚型的区分对于治疗很重要，并且目前的手动方法既耗时又主观，因此自动计算机辅助区分癌症类型至关重要。甲状腺癌的手动鉴别是基于组织切片，由病理学家利用组织学特征进行分析。由于十亿像素整张幻灯片图像的巨大尺寸，使用深度学习方法进行整体分类是不可行的。基于补丁的多实例学习方法与词袋等聚合相结合是一种常见的方法。这项工作的贡献是通过生成和组合三种不同补丁分辨率的特征向量并分析三种不同的组合方式来扩展基于补丁的最先进方法。结果显示，三种多尺度方法之一有所改善，而其他方法则导致分数下降。这为分析和讨论各个方法提供了动力。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了多尺度多重实例学习方法在提高甲状腺癌分类中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 甲状腺癌分型对治疗至关重要，但传统人工方法耗时且主观，而全切片图像的巨量数据使深度学习整体分类不可行，需更高效的自动分类方法。
AI.method: 通过生成三种不同分辨率的图像块特征向量，并分析三种组合方式，扩展基于图像块的前沿方法以改进分类性能。
AI.result: 三种多尺度方法中仅一种提升了分类效果，其余两种导致性能下降，表明不同组合策略的效果存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度特征融合可能提升分类效果，但需进一步分析不同组合策略的有效性以优化模型设计。

authors_text: Jiuxiang Gu,Jason Kuen,Vlad I. Morariu,Handong Zhao,Nikolaos Barmpalios,Rajiv Jain,Ani Nenkova,Tong Sun
title: Unified Pretraining Framework for Document Understanding
title_zh: 文档理解的统一预训练框架
abstract: Document intelligence automates the extraction of information from documents and supports many business applications. Recent self-supervised learning methods on large-scale unlabeled document datasets have opened up promising directions towards reducing annotation efforts by training models with self-supervised objectives. However, most of the existing document pretraining methods are still language-dominated. We present UDoc, a new unified pretraining framework for document understanding. UDoc is designed to support most document understanding tasks, extending the Transformer to take multimodal embeddings as input. Each input element is composed of words and visual features from a semantic region of the input document image. An important feature of UDoc is that it learns a generic representation by making use of three self-supervised losses, encouraging the representation to model sentences, learn similarities, and align modalities. Extensive empirical analysis demonstrates that the pretraining procedure learns better joint representations and leads to improvements in downstream tasks.
summary: Document intelligence automates the extraction of information from documents and supports many business applications. Recent self-supervised learning methods on large-scale unlabeled document datasets have opened up promising directions towards reducing annotation efforts by training models with self-supervised objectives. However, most of the existing document pretraining methods are still language-dominated. We present UDoc, a new unified pretraining framework for document understanding. UDoc is designed to support most document understanding tasks, extending the Transformer to take multimodal embeddings as input. Each input element is composed of words and visual features from a semantic region of the input document image. An important feature of UDoc is that it learns a generic representation by making use of three self-supervised losses, encouraging the representation to model sentences, learn similarities, and align modalities. Extensive empirical analysis demonstrates that the pretraining procedure learns better joint representations and leads to improvements in downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 文档智能可以自动从文档中提取信息并支持许多业务应用程序。最近针对大规模未标记文档数据集的自监督学习方法为通过训练具有自监督目标的模型来减少注释工作开辟了有希望的方向。然而，大多数现有的文档预训练方法仍然以语言为主。我们提出了 UDoc，一个用于文档理解的新的统一预训练框架。 UDoc 旨在支持大多数文档理解任务，扩展 Transformer 以采用多模态嵌入作为输入。每个输入元素由来自输入文档图像的语义区域的单词和视觉特征组成。 UDoc 的一个重要特征是，它通过利用三个自监督损失来学习通用表示，鼓励表示对句子进行建模、学习相似性和对齐模式。广泛的实证分析表明，预训练过程可以学习更好的联合表示，并导致下游任务的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UDoc，一种结合多模态信息的统一文档理解预训练框架，通过自监督学习提升文档信息提取能力。
AI.motivation: 现有文档预训练方法过度依赖语言信息，未能有效融合视觉特征，限制了模型对文档结构和多模态信息的全面理解。
AI.method: 扩展Transformer架构以处理文字与视觉特征的多模态输入，设计三种自监督损失函数（句子建模、相似性学习、模态对齐）联合训练通用表示。
AI.result: 实验验证UDoc的预训练表示在多个下游任务中优于现有方法，显著提升文档理解效果。
AI.conclusion: UDoc通过多模态融合与自监督学习有效推进文档理解，为后续研究提供统一框架与新方向。

title: A Multi-level Alignment Training Scheme for Video-and-Language Grounding
title_zh: 视频语言落地多层次对接培训方案
abstract: To solve video-and-language grounding tasks, the key is for the network to understand the connection between the two modalities. For a pair of video and language description, their semantic relation is reflected by their encodings' similarity. A good multi-modality encoder should be able to well capture both inputs' semantics and encode them in the shared feature space where embedding distance gets properly translated into their semantic similarity. In this work, we focused on this semantic connection between video and language, and developed a multi-level alignment training scheme to directly shape the encoding process. Global and segment levels of video-language alignment pairs were designed, based on the information similarity ranging from high-level context to fine-grained semantics. The contrastive loss was used to contrast the encodings' similarities between the positive and negative alignment pairs, and to ensure the network is trained in such a way that similar information is encoded closely in the shared feature space while information of different semantics is kept apart. Our multi-level alignment training can be applied to various video-and-language grounding tasks. Together with the task-specific training loss, our framework achieved comparable performance to previous state-of-the-arts on multiple video QA and retrieval datasets.
summary: To solve video-and-language grounding tasks, the key is for the network to understand the connection between the two modalities. For a pair of video and language description, their semantic relation is reflected by their encodings' similarity. A good multi-modality encoder should be able to well capture both inputs' semantics and encode them in the shared feature space where embedding distance gets properly translated into their semantic similarity. In this work, we focused on this semantic connection between video and language, and developed a multi-level alignment training scheme to directly shape the encoding process. Global and segment levels of video-language alignment pairs were designed, based on the information similarity ranging from high-level context to fine-grained semantics. The contrastive loss was used to contrast the encodings' similarities between the positive and negative alignment pairs, and to ensure the network is trained in such a way that similar information is encoded closely in the shared feature space while information of different semantics is kept apart. Our multi-level alignment training can be applied to various video-and-language grounding tasks. Together with the task-specific training loss, our framework achieved comparable performance to previous state-of-the-arts on multiple video QA and retrieval datasets.
abstract_zh: 要解决视频和语言基础任务，关键是网络要理解两种模式之间的联系。对于一对视频和语言描述，它们的语义关系通过它们的编码的相似性来反映。一个好的多模态编码器应该能够很好地捕获两个输入的语义，并将它们编码在共享特征空间中，其中嵌入距离被正确地转换为它们的语义相似性。在这项工作中，我们专注于视频和语言之间的语义联系，并开发了一种多级对齐训练方案来直接塑造编码过程。基于从高级上下文到细粒度语义的信息相似性，设计了视频语言对齐对的全局和分段级别。对比损失用于对比正负对齐对之间编码的相似性，并确保网络的训练方式使得相似的信息在共享特征空间中紧密编码，而不同语义的信息保持分开。我们的多级对齐训练可应用于各种视频和语言基础任务。加上特定于任务的训练损失，我们的框架在多个视频 QA 和检索数据集上实现了与之前最先进技术相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多级对齐训练方案，用于提升视频与语言grounding任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能充分捕捉视频与语言在全局到细粒度层次的语义关联，需设计多级对齐机制强化模态间联系。
AI.method: 构建全局与片段级视频-语言对齐对，通过对比损失使相似语义编码靠近、不同语义编码分离，共享特征空间中实现多粒度对齐。
AI.result: 在多个视频问答与检索数据集上，该框架性能达到现有最优方法的水平。
AI.conclusion: 多级对齐训练方案可通用化应用于不同视频-语言任务，结合任务特定损失可进一步提升效果。

For a pair of video and language description, their semantic relation is reflected by their encodings' similarity. A good multi-modality encoder should be able to well capture both inputs' semantics and encode them in the shared feature space where embedding distance gets properly translated into their semantic similarity. In this work, we focused on this semantic connection between video and language, and developed a multi-level alignment training scheme to directly shape the encoding process. Global and segment levels of video-language alignment pairs were designed, based on the information similarity ranging from high-level context to fine-grained semantics. The contrastive loss was used to contrast the encodings' similarities between the positive and negative alignment pairs, and to ensure the network is trained in such a way that similar information is encoded closely in the shared feature space while information of different semantics is kept apart. Our multi-level alignment training can be applied to various video-and-language grounding tasks. Together with the task-specific training loss, our framework achieved comparable performance to previous state-of-the-arts on multiple video QA and retrieval datasets. 要解决视频和语言基础任务，关键是网络要理解两种模式之间的联系。对于一对视频和语言描述，它们的语义关系通过它们的编码的相似性来反映。一个好的多模态编码器应该能够很好地捕获两个输入的语义，并将它们编码在共享特征空间中，其中嵌入距离被正确地转换为它们的语义相似性。在这项工作中，我们专注于视频和语言之间的语义联系，并开发了一种多级对齐训练方案来直接塑造编码过程。基于从高级上下文到细粒度语义的信息相似性，设计了视频语言对齐对的全局和分段级别。对比损失用于对比正负对齐对之间编码的相似性，并确保网络的训练方式使得相似的信息在共享特征空间中紧密编码，而不同语义的信息保持分开。我们的多级对齐训练可应用于各种视频和语言基础任务。加上特定于任务的训练损失，我们的框架在多个视频 QA 和检索数据集上实现了与之前最先进技术相当的性能。 本文提出一种多级对齐训练方案，用于提升视频与语言grounding任务的性能。 Yubo Zhang,Feiyang Niu,Qing Ping,Govind Thattai cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

title: Certifiable Robot Design Optimization using Differentiable Programming
title_zh: 使用可微分编程的可认证机器人设计优化
abstract: There is a growing need for computational tools to automatically design and verify autonomous systems, especially complex robotic systems involving perception, planning, control, and hardware in the autonomy stack. Differentiable programming has recently emerged as powerful tool for modeling and optimization. However, very few studies have been done to understand how differentiable programming can be used for robust, certifiable end-to-end design optimization. In this paper, we fill this gap by combining differentiable programming for robot design optimization with a novel statistical framework for certifying the robustness of optimized designs. Our framework can conduct end-to-end optimization and robustness certification for robotics systems, enabling simultaneous optimization of navigation, perception, planning, control, and hardware subsystems. Using simulation and hardware experiments, we show how our tool can be used to solve practical problems in robotics. First, we optimize sensor placements for robot navigation (a design with 5 subsystems and 6 tunable parameters) in under 5 minutes to achieve an 8.4x performance improvement compared to the initial design. Second, we solve a multi-agent collaborative manipulation task (3 subsystems and 454 parameters) in under an hour to achieve a 44% performance improvement over the initial design. We find that differentiable programming enables much faster (32% and 20x, respectively for each example) optimization than approximate gradient methods. We certify the robustness of each design and successfully deploy the optimized designs in hardware. An open-source implementation is available at https://github.com/MIT-REALM/architect
summary: There is a growing need for computational tools to automatically design and verify autonomous systems, especially complex robotic systems involving perception, planning, control, and hardware in the autonomy stack. Differentiable programming has recently emerged as powerful tool for modeling and optimization. However, very few studies have been done to understand how differentiable programming can be used for robust, certifiable end-to-end design optimization. In this paper, we fill this gap by combining differentiable programming for robot design optimization with a novel statistical framework for certifying the robustness of optimized designs. Our framework can conduct end-to-end optimization and robustness certification for robotics systems, enabling simultaneous optimization of navigation, perception, planning, control, and hardware subsystems. Using simulation and hardware experiments, we show how our tool can be used to solve practical problems in robotics. First, we optimize sensor placements for robot navigation (a design with 5 subsystems and 6 tunable parameters) in under 5 minutes to achieve an 8.4x performance improvement compared to the initial design. Second, we solve a multi-agent collaborative manipulation task (3 subsystems and 454 parameters) in under an hour to achieve a 44% performance improvement over the initial design. We find that differentiable programming enables much faster (32% and 20x, respectively for each example) optimization than approximate gradient methods. We certify the robustness of each design and successfully deploy the optimized designs in hardware. An open-source implementation is available at https://github.com/MIT-REALM/architect
abstract_zh: 人们越来越需要计算工具来自动设计和验证自主系统，特别是涉及自主堆栈中的感知、规划、控制和硬件的复杂机器人系统。可微分编程最近已成为建模和优化的强大工具。然而，很少有研究来了解可微分编程如何用于稳健、可验证的端到端设计优化。在本文中，我们通过将机器人设计优化的可微分编程与用于证明优化设计的稳健性的新颖统计框架相结合来填补这一空白。我们的框架可以对机器人系统进行端到端优化和鲁棒性认证，从而实现导航、感知、规划、控制和硬件子系统的同步优化。通过模拟和硬件实验，我们展示了如何使用我们的工具来解决机器人技术中的实际问题。首先，我们在 5 分钟内优化了机器人导航的传感器放置（具有 5 个子系统和 6 个可调参数的设计），与初始设计相比，性能提高了 8.4 倍。其次，我们在一小时内解决了多智能体协作操作任务（3 个子系统和 454 个参数），比初始设计实现了 44% 的性能提升。我们发现可微分编程比近似梯度方法能够实现更快的优化（每个示例分别为 32% 和 20 倍）。我们验证每个设计的稳健性，并在硬件中成功部署优化的设计。开源实现可在 https://github.com/MIT-REALM/architect 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合可微编程与统计框架，实现机器人系统端到端的可认证设计优化。
AI.motivation: 现有自主系统设计缺乏对感知、规划、控制等子系统协同优化的鲁棒性认证方法，亟需自动化工具实现可验证的机器人设计。
AI.method: 融合可微编程与新型统计框架，构建支持导航、感知、控制等子系统联合优化的端到端认证体系，并通过仿真与硬件实验验证。
AI.result: 传感器布局优化任务性能提升8.4倍（5分钟内完成），多智能体协作任务性能提升44%（1小时内完成），优化速度较近似梯度方法快32%和20倍。
AI.conclusion: 可微编程显著提升机器人设计优化效率，结合统计认证框架可确保优化方案的鲁棒性，开源工具已验证实际部署可行性。

authors_text: Wei Hao,Aahil Awatramani,Jiayang Hu,Chengzhi Mao,Pin-Chun Chen,Eyal Cidon,Asaf Cidon,Junfeng Yang
title: A Tale of Two Models: Constructing Evasive Attacks on Edge Models
title_zh: 两种模型的故事：构建对边缘模型的规避攻击
abstract: Full-precision deep learning models are typically too large or costly to deploy on edge devices. To accommodate to the limited hardware resources, models are adapted to the edge using various edge-adaptation techniques, such as quantization and pruning. While such techniques may have a negligible impact on top-line accuracy, the adapted models exhibit subtle differences in output compared to the original model from which they are derived. In this paper, we introduce a new evasive attack, DIVA, that exploits these differences in edge adaptation, by adding adversarial noise to input data that maximizes the output difference between the original and adapted model. Such an attack is particularly dangerous, because the malicious input will trick the adapted model running on the edge, but will be virtually undetectable by the original model, which typically serves as the authoritative model version, used for validation, debugging and retraining. We compare DIVA to a state-of-the-art attack, PGD, and show that DIVA is only 1.7-3.6% worse on attacking the adapted model but 1.9-4.2 times more likely not to be detected by the the original model under a whitebox and semi-blackbox setting, compared to PGD.
summary: Full-precision deep learning models are typically too large or costly to deploy on edge devices. To accommodate to the limited hardware resources, models are adapted to the edge using various edge-adaptation techniques, such as quantization and pruning. While such techniques may have a negligible impact on top-line accuracy, the adapted models exhibit subtle differences in output compared to the original model from which they are derived. In this paper, we introduce a new evasive attack, DIVA, that exploits these differences in edge adaptation, by adding adversarial noise to input data that maximizes the output difference between the original and adapted model. Such an attack is particularly dangerous, because the malicious input will trick the adapted model running on the edge, but will be virtually undetectable by the original model, which typically serves as the authoritative model version, used for validation, debugging and retraining. We compare DIVA to a state-of-the-art attack, PGD, and show that DIVA is only 1.7-3.6% worse on attacking the adapted model but 1.9-4.2 times more likely not to be detected by the the original model under a whitebox and semi-blackbox setting, compared to PGD.
abstract_zh: 全精度深度学习模型通常太大或成本太高，无法部署在边缘设备上。为了适应有限的硬件资源，模型使用各种边缘适应技术（例如量化和修剪）来适应边缘。虽然此类技术对顶线准确性的影响可以忽略不计，但与派生它们的原始模型相比，改编后的模型在输出方面表现出细微的差异。在本文中，我们引入了一种新的规避攻击 DIVA，它通过向输入数据添加对抗性噪声来利用边缘适应的这些差异，从而最大化原始模型和适应模型之间的输出差异。这种攻击特别危险，因为恶意输入会欺骗在边缘运行的适应模型，但原始模型几乎无法检测到，原始模型通常作为权威模型版本，用于验证、调试和再训练。我们将 DIVA 与最先进的攻击 PGD 进行比较，结果表明，与 PGD 相比，DIVA 在攻击适应模型方面仅差 1.7-3.6%，但在白盒和半黑盒设置下未被原始模型检测到的可能性高出 1.9-4.2 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DIVA的新攻击方法，利用边缘模型与原始模型之间的差异，通过添加对抗噪声实现对边缘模型的隐蔽攻击。
AI.motivation: 边缘模型因量化、剪枝等适应技术会产生与原始模型的细微差异，这些差异可能被恶意利用，导致攻击在原始模型上难以检测。
AI.method: 设计DIVA攻击框架，通过优化输入数据的对抗噪声，最大化边缘模型与原始模型的输出差异，同时确保攻击样本对原始模型的检测概率显著降低。
AI.result: DIVA在攻击边缘模型效果上比PGD略差（低1.7-3.6%），但对原始模型的检测规避概率高1.9-4.2倍，证明其隐蔽性优势。
AI.conclusion: 边缘模型存在因适应技术引发的新型隐蔽攻击风险，需重新评估现有防御机制的有效性并加强模型安全性设计。
