We compare DIVA to a state-of-the-art attack, PGD, and show that DIVA is only 1.7-3.6% worse on attacking the adapted model but 1.9-4.2 times more likely not to be detected by the the original model under a whitebox and semi-blackbox setting, compared to PGD. 全精度深度学习模型通常太大或成本太高，无法部署在边缘设备上。为了适应有限的硬件资源，模型使用各种边缘适应技术（例如量化和修剪）来适应边缘。虽然此类技术对顶线准确性的影响可以忽略不计，但与派生它们的原始模型相比，改编后的模型在输出方面表现出细微的差异。在本文中，我们引入了一种新的规避攻击 DIVA，它通过向输入数据添加对抗性噪声来利用边缘适应的这些差异，从而最大化原始模型和适应模型之间的输出差异。这种攻击特别危险，因为恶意输入会欺骗在边缘运行的适应模型，但原始模型几乎无法检测到，原始模型通常作为权威模型版本，用于验证、调试和再训练。我们将 DIVA 与最先进的攻击 PGD 进行比较，结果表明，与 PGD 相比，DIVA 在攻击适应模型方面仅差 1.7-3.6%，但在白盒和半黑盒设置下未被原始模型检测到的可能性高出 1.9-4.2 倍。 本文提出一种名为DIVA的新攻击方法，利用边缘模型与原始模型之间的差异，通过添加对抗噪声实现对边缘模型的隐蔽攻击。 Wei Hao,Aahil Awatramani,Jiayang Hu,Chengzhi Mao,Pin-Chun Chen,Eyal Cidon,Asaf Cidon,Junfeng Yang cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.DC,cs.LG

title: Listing, Verifying and Counting Lowest Common Ancestors in DAGs: Algorithms and Fine-Grained Lower Bounds
title_zh: 列出、验证和计算 DAG 中的最低共同祖先：算法和细粒度下界
comment: To appear in ICALP 2022. Abstract shortened to fit arXiv requirement
comments: To appear in ICALP 2022. Abstract shortened to fit arXiv requirement
abstract: The AP-LCA problem asks, given an $n$-node directed acyclic graph (DAG), to compute for every pair of vertices $u$ and $v$ in the DAG a lowest common ancestor (LCA) of $u$ and $v$ if one exists. In this paper we study several interesting variants of AP-LCA, providing both algorithms and fine-grained lower bounds for them. The lower bounds we obtain are the first conditional lower bounds for LCA problems higher than $n^{ω-o(1)}$, where $ω$ is the matrix multiplication exponent. Some of our results include: - In any DAG, we can detect all vertex pairs that have at most two LCAs and list all of their LCAs in $O(n^ω)$ time. This algorithm extends a result of [Kowaluk and Lingas ESA'07] which showed an $\tilde{O}(n^ω)$ time algorithm that detects all pairs with a unique LCA in a DAG and outputs their corresponding LCAs. - Listing $7$ LCAs per vertex pair in DAGs requires $n^{3-o(1)}$ time under the popular assumption that 3-uniform 5-hyperclique detection requires $n^{5-o(1)}$ time. This is surprising since essentially cubic time is sufficient to list all LCAs (if $ω=2$). - Counting the number of LCAs for every vertex pair in a DAG requires $n^{3-o(1)}$ time under the Strong Exponential Time Hypothesis, and $n^{ω(1,2,1)-o(1)}$ time under the $4$-Clique hypothesis. This shows that the algorithm of [Echkardt, Mühling and Nowak ESA'07] for listing all LCAs for every pair of vertices is likely optimal. - Given a DAG and a vertex $w_{u,v}$ for every vertex pair $u,v$, verifying whether all $w_{u,v}$ are valid LCAs requires $n^{2.5-o(1)}$ time assuming 3-uniform 4-hyperclique requires $n^{4 - o(1)}$ time. This defies the common intuition that verification is easier than computation since returning some LCA per vertex pair can be solved in $O(n^{2.447})$ time [Grandoni et al. SODA'21].
summary: The AP-LCA problem asks, given an $n$-node directed acyclic graph (DAG), to compute for every pair of vertices $u$ and $v$ in the DAG a lowest common ancestor (LCA) of $u$ and $v$ if one exists. In this paper we study several interesting variants of AP-LCA, providing both algorithms and fine-grained lower bounds for them. The lower bounds we obtain are the first conditional lower bounds for LCA problems higher than $n^{ω-o(1)}$, where $ω$ is the matrix multiplication exponent. Some of our results include: - In any DAG, we can detect all vertex pairs that have at most two LCAs and list all of their LCAs in $O(n^ω)$ time. This algorithm extends a result of [Kowaluk and Lingas ESA'07] which showed an $\tilde{O}(n^ω)$ time algorithm that detects all pairs with a unique LCA in a DAG and outputs their corresponding LCAs. - Listing $7$ LCAs per vertex pair in DAGs requires $n^{3-o(1)}$ time under the popular assumption that 3-uniform 5-hyperclique detection requires $n^{5-o(1)}$ time. This is surprising since essentially cubic time is sufficient to list all LCAs (if $ω=2$). - Counting the number of LCAs for every vertex pair in a DAG requires $n^{3-o(1)}$ time under the Strong Exponential Time Hypothesis, and $n^{ω(1,2,1)-o(1)}$ time under the $4$-Clique hypothesis. This shows that the algorithm of [Echkardt, Mühling and Nowak ESA'07] for listing all LCAs for every pair of vertices is likely optimal. - Given a DAG and a vertex $w_{u,v}$ for every vertex pair $u,v$, verifying whether all $w_{u,v}$ are valid LCAs requires $n^{2.5-o(1)}$ time assuming 3-uniform 4-hyperclique requires $n^{4 - o(1)}$ time. This defies the common intuition that verification is easier than computation since returning some LCA per vertex pair can be solved in $O(n^{2.447})$ time [Grandoni et al. SODA'21].
abstract_zh: AP-LCA 问题要求，给定 $n$ 节点有向无环图 (DAG)，计算 DAG 中每对顶点 $u$ 和 $v$ 的 $u$ 和 $v$ 的最低共同祖先 (LCA)（如果存在）。在本文中，我们研究了 AP-LCA 的几个有趣的变体，为它们提供了算法和细粒度的下界。我们获得的下界是高于 $n^{ω-o(1)}$ 的 LCA 问题的第一个条件下界，其中 $ω$ 是矩阵乘法指数。我们的一些结果包括： - 在任何 DAG 中，我们可以检测到最多具有两个 LCA 的所有顶点对，并在 $O(n^ω)$ 时间内列出它们的所有 LCA。该算法扩展了 [Kowaluk 和 Lingas ESA'07] 的结果，该结果显示了 $\tilde{O}(n^ω)$ 时间算法，该算法检测 DAG 中具有唯一 LCA 的所有对并输出其相应的 LCA。 - 在 3-uniform 5-hyperclique 检测需要 $n^{5-o(1)}$ 时间的流行假设下，在 DAG 中列出每个顶点对 $7$ LCA 需要 $n^{3-o(1)}$ 时间。这是令人惊讶的，因为基本上立方时间足以列出所有 LCA（如果 $ω=2$）。 - 在强指数时间假设下计算 DAG 中每个顶点对的 LCA 数量需要 $n^{3-o(1)}$ 时间，在 $4$-Clique 假设下需要 $n^{ω(1,2,1)-o(1)}$ 时间。这表明 [Echkardt、Mühling 和 Nowak ESA'07] 列出每对顶点的所有 LCA 的算法可能是最优的。 - 给定一个 DAG 和每个顶点对 $u,v$ 的顶点 $w_{u,v}$，验证所有 $w_{u,v}$ 是否都是有效的 LCA 需要 $n^{2.5-o(1)}$ 时间，假设 3-uniform 4-hyperclique 需要 $n^{4 - o(1)}$ 时间。这违背了验证比计算更容易的普遍直觉，因为每个顶点对返回一些 LCA 可以在 $O(n^{2.447})$ 时间内解决 [Grandoni 等人。苏打'21]。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究有向无环图（DAG）中最低公共祖先（LCA）问题的多个变体，提供算法和精细的条件性下界分析。
AI.motivation: LCA问题在图论和算法设计中具有重要应用，但现有算法的效率和复杂度界限尚不明确，需进一步探索更优算法及理论下界。
AI.method: 结合算法设计与条件性复杂度下界分析，利用矩阵乘法指数ω及超图检测假设（如3-均匀5-超图）推导时间复杂度限制。
AI.result: 提出O(n^ω)时间检测最多两个LCA的算法，证明列举7个LCA需n^{3-o(1)}时间（基于超图假设），并建立计数与验证问题的条件性下界。
AI.conclusion: 现有LCA算法在特定假设下接近最优，验证问题的复杂度可能高于计算，揭示了LCA问题的理论极限与算法设计挑战。

title: An Algorithm to Find Sums of Powers of Consecutive Primes
title_zh: 求连续素数幂和的算法
abstract: We present and analyze an algorithm to enumerate all integers $n\le x$ that can be written as the sum of consecutive $k$th powers of primes, for $k>1$. We show that the number of such integers $n$ is asymptotically bounded by a constant times $$ c_k \frac{ x^{2/(k+1)} }{ (\log x)^{2k/(k+1)} }, $$ where $c_k$ is a constant depending solely on $k$, roughly $k^2$ in magnitude. This also bounds the asymptotic running time of our algorithm. We also give a lower bound of the same order of magnitude, and a very fast algorithm that counts such $n$. Our work extends the previous work by Tongsomporn, Wananiyakul, and Steuding (2022) who examined sums of squares of consecutive primes.
summary: We present and analyze an algorithm to enumerate all integers $n\le x$ that can be written as the sum of consecutive $k$th powers of primes, for $k>1$. We show that the number of such integers $n$ is asymptotically bounded by a constant times $$ c_k \frac{ x^{2/(k+1)} }{ (\log x)^{2k/(k+1)} }, $$ where $c_k$ is a constant depending solely on $k$, roughly $k^2$ in magnitude. This also bounds the asymptotic running time of our algorithm. We also give a lower bound of the same order of magnitude, and a very fast algorithm that counts such $n$. Our work extends the previous work by Tongsomporn, Wananiyakul, and Steuding (2022) who examined sums of squares of consecutive primes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出并分析了一种算法，用于枚举所有整数 $n\le x$，这些整数可以写为连续的素数 $k$ 次幂之和，其中 $k>1$。我们证明，此类整数 $n$ 的数量渐近地受到常数乘以 $$ c_k \frac{ x^{2/(k+1)} }{ (\log x)^{2k/(k+1)} }, $$ 的限制，其中 $c_k$ 是一个仅取决于 $k$ 的常数，大小大约为 $k^2$。这也限制了我们算法的渐近运行时间。我们还给出了相同数量级的下界，以及计算此类 $n$ 的非常快速的算法。我们的工作扩展了 Tongsomporn、Wananiyakul 和 Steuding（2022）之前的工作，他们研究了连续素数的平方和。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种算法，用于枚举所有可以表示为连续素数的k次幂之和的整数n（n≤x），并分析了该算法的效率。
AI.motivation: 扩展之前关于连续素数平方和的研究，将分析范围推广到更高次幂，并提供高效的计算方法。
AI.method: 设计了一种算法来枚举符合条件的整数，并通过渐近分析证明其时间复杂度，同时给出下界估计和快速计数方法。
AI.result: 证明了满足条件的整数n的渐近上界为常数乘以$ c_k \frac{ x^{2/(k+1)} }{ (\\log x)^{2k/(k+1)} } $，并提供了相同数量级的下界及高效算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文在前人研究基础上，提出了适用于更高次幂的算法，证明了其复杂度界，并为相关数论问题提供了新的分析工具。

Our work extends the previous work by Tongsomporn, Wananiyakul, and Steuding (2022) who examined sums of squares of consecutive primes. 我们提出并分析了一种算法，用于枚举所有整数 $n\le x$，这些整数可以写为连续的素数 $k$ 次幂之和，其中 $k>1$。我们证明，此类整数 $n$ 的数量渐近地受到常数乘以 $$ c_k \frac{ x^{2/(k+1)} }{ (\log x)^{2k/(k+1)} }, $$ 的限制，其中 $c_k$ 是一个仅取决于 $k$ 的常数，大小大约为 $k^2$。这也限制了我们算法的渐近运行时间。我们还给出了相同数量级的下界，以及计算此类 $n$ 的非常快速的算法。我们的工作扩展了 Tongsomporn、Wananiyakul 和 Steuding（2022）之前的工作，他们研究了连续素数的平方和。 本文提出了一种算法，用于枚举所有可以表示为连续素数的k次幂之和的整数n（n≤x），并分析了该算法的效率。 Cathal O'Sullivan,Jonathan P. Sorenson,Aryn Stahl math.NT,cs.DS

title: SegDiscover: Visual Concept Discovery via Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: SegDiscover：通过无监督语义分割进行视觉概念发现
abstract: Visual concept discovery has long been deemed important to improve interpretability of neural networks, because a bank of semantically meaningful concepts would provide us with a starting point for building machine learning models that exhibit intelligible reasoning process. Previous methods have disadvantages: either they rely on labelled support sets that incorporate human biases for objects that are "useful," or they fail to identify multiple concepts that occur within a single image. We reframe the concept discovery task as an unsupervised semantic segmentation problem, and present SegDiscover, a novel framework that discovers semantically meaningful visual concepts from imagery datasets with complex scenes without supervision. Our method contains three important pieces: generating concept primitives from raw images, discovering concepts by clustering in the latent space of a self-supervised pretrained encoder, and concept refinement via neural network smoothing. Experimental results provide evidence that our method can discover multiple concepts within a single image and outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised methods on complex datasets such as Cityscapes and COCO-Stuff. Our method can be further used as a neural network explanation tool by comparing results obtained by different encoders.
summary: Visual concept discovery has long been deemed important to improve interpretability of neural networks, because a bank of semantically meaningful concepts would provide us with a starting point for building machine learning models that exhibit intelligible reasoning process. Previous methods have disadvantages: either they rely on labelled support sets that incorporate human biases for objects that are "useful," or they fail to identify multiple concepts that occur within a single image. We reframe the concept discovery task as an unsupervised semantic segmentation problem, and present SegDiscover, a novel framework that discovers semantically meaningful visual concepts from imagery datasets with complex scenes without supervision. Our method contains three important pieces: generating concept primitives from raw images, discovering concepts by clustering in the latent space of a self-supervised pretrained encoder, and concept refinement via neural network smoothing. Experimental results provide evidence that our method can discover multiple concepts within a single image and outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised methods on complex datasets such as Cityscapes and COCO-Stuff. Our method can be further used as a neural network explanation tool by comparing results obtained by different encoders.
abstract_zh: 视觉概念发现长期以来被认为对于提高神经网络的可解释性很重要，因为一组语义上有意义的概念将为我们提供构建机器学习模型的起点，该模型展示可理解的推理过程。以前的方法有缺点：它们要么依赖于包含人类对“有用”对象的偏见的标记支持集，要么无法识别单个图像中出现的多个概念。我们将概念发现任务重新定义为无监督的语义分割问题，并提出了 SegDiscover，这是一种新颖的框架，可以在没有监督的情况下从复杂场景的图像数据集中发现语义上有意义的视觉概念。我们的方法包含三个重要部分：从原始图像生成概念基元，通过在自监督预训练编码器的潜在空间中进行聚类来发现概念，以及通过神经网络平滑来细化概念。实验结果证明我们的方法可以在单个图像中发现多个概念，并且在复杂数据集（例如 Cityscapes 和 COCO-Stuff）上优于最先进的无监督方法。通过比较不同编码器获得的结果，我们的方法可以进一步用作神经网络解释工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SegDiscover框架，通过无监督语义分割从复杂场景图像中自动发现语义概念，无需人工标注。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖带偏见的人工标注数据或无法识别单图多概念，难以提升神经网络可解释性。
AI.method: 包含三步骤：1）从原始图像生成概念原语；2）基于自监督编码器潜在空间聚类发现概念；3）神经网络平滑优化概念。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和COCO-Stuff等复杂数据集上优于现有无监督方法，可作为神经网络解释工具。
AI.conclusion: SegDiscover实现了无监督多概念发现，为构建可解释AI模型提供了有效工具。

authors_text: Annie Y. Chen,Brendan Nyhan,Jason Reifler,Ronald E. Robertson,Christo Wilson
title: Subscriptions and external links help drive resentful users to alternative and extremist YouTube videos
title_zh: 订阅和外部链接有助于驱使心怀不满的用户观看另类和极端主义的 YouTube 视频
abstract: Do online platforms facilitate the consumption of potentially harmful content? Using paired behavioral and survey data provided by participants recruited from a representative sample in 2020 (n=1,181), we show that exposure to alternative and extremist channel videos on YouTube is heavily concentrated among a small group of people with high prior levels of gender and racial resentment. These viewers often subscribe to these channels (prompting recommendations to their videos) and follow external links to them. In contrast, non-subscribers rarely see or follow recommendations to videos from these channels. Our findings suggest YouTube's algorithms were not sending people down "rabbit holes" during our observation window in 2020, possibly due to changes that the company made to its recommender system in 2019. However, the platform continues to play a key role in facilitating exposure to content from alternative and extremist channels among dedicated audiences.
summary: Do online platforms facilitate the consumption of potentially harmful content? Using paired behavioral and survey data provided by participants recruited from a representative sample in 2020 (n=1,181), we show that exposure to alternative and extremist channel videos on YouTube is heavily concentrated among a small group of people with high prior levels of gender and racial resentment. These viewers often subscribe to these channels (prompting recommendations to their videos) and follow external links to them. In contrast, non-subscribers rarely see or follow recommendations to videos from these channels. Our findings suggest YouTube's algorithms were not sending people down "rabbit holes" during our observation window in 2020, possibly due to changes that the company made to its recommender system in 2019. However, the platform continues to play a key role in facilitating exposure to content from alternative and extremist channels among dedicated audiences.
abstract_zh: 在线平台是否会促进潜在有害内容的消费？使用 2020 年代表性样本（n=1,181）中招募的参与者提供的配对行为和调查数据，我们发现 YouTube 上另类和极端主义频道视频的接触主要集中在一小群先前具有较高性别和种族怨恨程度的人群中。这些观看者经常订阅这些频道（提示推荐他们的视频）并点击外部链接。相比之下，非订阅者很少看到或遵循这些频道对视频的推荐。我们的研究结果表明，YouTube 的算法在 2020 年的观察窗口期间并未让人们陷入“兔子洞”，这可能是由于该公司在 2019 年对其推荐系统进行了更改。但是，该平台在促进目标受众接触另类和极端主义频道的内容方面继续发挥着关键作用。

AI.tldr: 研究YouTube的订阅和外部链接如何促使有偏见用户接触极端内容
AI.motivation: 探讨在线平台是否促进有害内容消费，特别是YouTube算法如何影响用户接触极端内容
AI.method: 通过2020年代表性样本（n=1,181）的行为数据和调查问卷，分析订阅和外部链接对极端内容接触的影响
AI.result: 高偏见用户更可能订阅和点击外部链接，导致推荐增加，而非订阅者接触少；2019年算法调整可能减少‘兔子洞’效应，但平台仍促进极端内容接触
AI.conclusion: 2020年YouTube算法未显著引导用户进入极端内容，但平台仍对特定群体接触此类内容起关键作用，可能因2019年算法调整

authors_text: Basile Van Hoorick,Purva Tendulkar,Didac Suris,Dennis Park,Simon Stent,Carl Vondrick
title: Revealing Occlusions with 4D Neural Fields
title_zh: 通过 4D 神经场揭示遮挡
abstract: For computer vision systems to operate in dynamic situations, they need to be able to represent and reason about object permanence. We introduce a framework for learning to estimate 4D visual representations from monocular RGB-D, which is able to persist objects, even once they become obstructed by occlusions. Unlike traditional video representations, we encode point clouds into a continuous representation, which permits the model to attend across the spatiotemporal context to resolve occlusions. On two large video datasets that we release along with this paper, our experiments show that the representation is able to successfully reveal occlusions for several tasks, without any architectural changes. Visualizations show that the attention mechanism automatically learns to follow occluded objects. Since our approach can be trained end-to-end and is easily adaptable, we believe it will be useful for handling occlusions in many video understanding tasks. Data, code, and models are available at https://occlusions.cs.columbia.edu/.
summary: For computer vision systems to operate in dynamic situations, they need to be able to represent and reason about object permanence. We introduce a framework for learning to estimate 4D visual representations from monocular RGB-D, which is able to persist objects, even once they become obstructed by occlusions. Unlike traditional video representations, we encode point clouds into a continuous representation, which permits the model to attend across the spatiotemporal context to resolve occlusions. On two large video datasets that we release along with this paper, our experiments show that the representation is able to successfully reveal occlusions for several tasks, without any architectural changes. Visualizations show that the attention mechanism automatically learns to follow occluded objects. Since our approach can be trained end-to-end and is easily adaptable, we believe it will be useful for handling occlusions in many video understanding tasks. Data, code, and models are available at https://occlusions.cs.columbia.edu/.
abstract_zh: 为了使计算机视觉系统在动态情况下运行，它们需要能够表示和推理对象的持久性。我们引入了一个学习从单目 RGB-D 估计 4D 视觉表示的框架，该框架能够持久保留对象，即使它们被遮挡时也是如此。与传统的视频表示不同，我们将点云编码为连续表示，这允许模型跨越时空上下文来解决遮挡问题。在我们与本文一起发布的两个大型视频数据集上，我们的实验表明，该表示能够成功地揭示多个任务的遮挡，而无需任何架构更改。可视化结果表明，注意力机制会自动学习跟踪被遮挡的物体。由于我们的方法可以进行端到端训练并且易于适应，因此我们相信它将对于处理许多视频理解任务中的遮挡很有用。数据、代码和模型可在 https://occlusions.cs.columbia.edu/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种基于四维神经场的框架，通过单目RGB-D数据学习持续表示被遮挡的物体，解决动态场景中的遮挡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视频表示难以处理遮挡导致的物体恒常性问题，需模型具备跨时空上下文推理能力以维持遮挡物体的持续表示。
AI.method: 将点云编码为连续四维表示，利用注意力机制跨时空关联信息，通过端到端训练实现遮挡物体的自动追踪与恢复。
AI.result: 在两个大型数据集上验证了方法有效性，模型无需架构修改即可成功揭示遮挡，并通过可视化证明注意力机制可自动学习跟踪被遮挡物体。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为视频理解任务中的遮挡处理提供了通用解决方案，具有良好的可扩展性与适应性，相关资源已开源。

ai_content.motivation: 传统视频表示难以处理遮挡导致的物体恒常性问题，需模型具备跨时空上下文推理能力以维持遮挡物体的持续表示。

search_text: Revealing Occlusions with 4D Neural Fields 通过 4D 神经场揭示遮挡 For computer vision systems to operate in dynamic situations, they need to be able to represent and reason about object permanence. We introduce a framework for learning to estimate 4D visual representations from monocular RGB-D, which is able to persist objects, even once they become obstructed by occlusions. Unlike traditional video representations, we encode point clouds into a continuous representation, which permits the model to attend across the spatiotemporal context to resolve occlusions. On two large video datasets that we release along with this paper, our experiments show that the representation is able to successfully reveal occlusions for several tasks, without any architectural changes. Visualizations show that the attention mechanism automatically learns to follow occluded objects. Since our approach can be trained end-to-end and is easily adaptable, we believe it will be useful for handling occlusions in many video understanding tasks. Data, code, and models are available at https://occlusions.cs.columbia.edu/. 为了使计算机视觉系统在动态情况下运行，它们需要能够表示和推理对象的持久性。我们引入了一个学习从单目 RGB-D 估计 4D 视觉表示的框架，该框架能够持久保留对象，即使它们被遮挡时也是如此。与传统的视频表示不同，我们将点云编码为连续表示，这允许模型跨越时空上下文来解决遮挡问题。在我们与本文一起发布的两个大型视频数据集上，我们的实验表明，该表示能够成功地揭示多个任务的遮挡，而无需任何架构更改。可视化结果表明，注意力机制会自动学习跟踪被遮挡的物体。由于我们的方法可以进行端到端训练并且易于适应，因此我们相信它将对于处理许多视频理解任务中的遮挡很有用。数据、代码和模型可在 https://occlusions.cs.columbia.edu/ 获取。 该论文提出一种基于四维神经场的框架，通过单目RGB-D数据学习持续表示被遮挡的物体，解决动态场景中的遮挡问题。 Basile Van Hoorick,Purva Tendulkar,Didac Suris,Dennis Park,Simon Stent,Carl Vondrick cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Label a Herd in Minutes: Individual Holstein-Friesian Cattle Identification
title_zh: 在几分钟内标记牛群：个体荷斯坦-弗里斯兰牛识别
comment: ICIAP Workshop on Learning in Precision Livestock Farming (accepted). 10 pages, 7 figures
comments: ICIAP Workshop on Learning in Precision Livestock Farming (accepted). 10 pages, 7 figures
abstract: We describe a practically evaluated approach for training visual cattle ID systems for a whole farm requiring only ten minutes of labelling effort. In particular, for the task of automatic identification of individual Holstein-Friesians in real-world farm CCTV, we show that self-supervision, metric learning, cluster analysis, and active learning can complement each other to significantly reduce the annotation requirements usually needed to train cattle identification frameworks. Evaluating the approach on the test portion of the publicly available Cows2021 dataset, for training we use 23,350 frames across 435 single individual tracklets generated by automated oriented cattle detection and tracking in operational farm footage. Self-supervised metric learning is first employed to initialise a candidate identity space where each tracklet is considered a distinct entity. Grouping entities into equivalence classes representing cattle identities is then performed by automated merging via cluster analysis and active learning. Critically, we identify the inflection point at which automated choices cannot replicate improvements based on human intervention to reduce annotation to a minimum. Experimental results show that cluster analysis and a few minutes of labelling after automated self-supervision can improve the test identification accuracy of 153 identities to 92.44% (ARI=0.93) from the 74.9% (ARI=0.754) obtained by self-supervision only. These promising results indicate that a tailored combination of human and machine reasoning in visual cattle ID pipelines can be highly effective whilst requiring only minimal labelling effort. We provide all key source code and network weights with this paper for easy result reproduction.
summary: We describe a practically evaluated approach for training visual cattle ID systems for a whole farm requiring only ten minutes of labelling effort. In particular, for the task of automatic identification of individual Holstein-Friesians in real-world farm CCTV, we show that self-supervision, metric learning, cluster analysis, and active learning can complement each other to significantly reduce the annotation requirements usually needed to train cattle identification frameworks. Evaluating the approach on the test portion of the publicly available Cows2021 dataset, for training we use 23,350 frames across 435 single individual tracklets generated by automated oriented cattle detection and tracking in operational farm footage. Self-supervised metric learning is first employed to initialise a candidate identity space where each tracklet is considered a distinct entity. Grouping entities into equivalence classes representing cattle identities is then performed by automated merging via cluster analysis and active learning. Critically, we identify the inflection point at which automated choices cannot replicate improvements based on human intervention to reduce annotation to a minimum. Experimental results show that cluster analysis and a few minutes of labelling after automated self-supervision can improve the test identification accuracy of 153 identities to 92.44% (ARI=0.93) from the 74.9% (ARI=0.754) obtained by self-supervision only. These promising results indicate that a tailored combination of human and machine reasoning in visual cattle ID pipelines can be highly effective whilst requiring only minimal labelling effort. We provide all key source code and network weights with this paper for easy result reproduction.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一种经过实际评估的方法，用于为整个农场训练视觉牛 ID 系统，只需十分钟的标记工作。特别是，对于现实农场闭路电视中个体荷斯坦-弗里斯兰自动识别的任务，我们表明自我监督、度量学习、聚类分析和主动学习可以相互补充，以显着减少训练牛识别框架通常所需的注释要求。在公开可用的 Cows2021 数据集的测试部分上评估该方法，我们使用 435 个单个轨迹中的 23,350 个帧进行训练，这些轨迹是由自动化的牛检测和跟踪操作农场镜头生成的。首先采用自监督度量学习来初始化候选身份空间，其中每个轨迹被视为不同的实体。然后通过聚类分析和主动学习自动合并，将实体分组为代表牛身份的等价类。至关重要的是，我们确定了自动化选择无法复制基于人工干预的改进以将注释减少到最低限度的拐点。实验结果表明，聚类分析和自动自我监督后几分钟的标记可以将153个身份的测试识别准确率从仅通过自我监督获得的74.9%（ARI=0.754）提高到92.44%（ARI=0.93）。这些有希望的结果表明，视觉牛识别管道中人机推理的定制组合可以非常有效，同时只需要很少的标记工作。我们在本文中提供了所有关键源代码和网络权重，以便轻松重现结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种只需十分钟标注即可训练整个农场的视觉牲畜识别系统的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统牲畜个体识别方法需要大量标注数据，耗时耗力，亟需减少人工标注需求的高效方案。
AI.method: 结合自监督学习初始化身份空间、聚类分析自动归类及主动学习筛选关键样本，通过人机协同最小化标注量。
AI.result: 在Cows2021数据集上，使用23,350帧训练后，识别准确率从自监督的74.9%提升至92.44%（ARI=0.93）。
AI.conclusion: 人机协作的视觉牲畜识别流程在保证高精度的同时，可显著降低标注成本，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Si Yang,Lihua Zheng,Xieyuanli Chen,Laura Zabawa,Man Zhang,Minjuan Wang
title: Transfer Learning from Synthetic In-vitro Soybean Pods Dataset for In-situ Segmentation of On-branch Soybean Pod
title_zh: 从合成体外大豆荚数据集进行迁移学习，用于枝上大豆荚的原位分割
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022 Vision for Agriculture Workshop
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022 Vision for Agriculture Workshop
abstract: The mature soybean plants are of complex architecture with pods frequently touching each other, posing a challenge for in-situ segmentation of on-branch soybean pods. Deep learning-based methods can achieve accurate training and strong generalization capabilities, but it demands massive labeled data, which is often a limitation, especially for agricultural applications. As lacking the labeled data to train an in-situ segmentation model for on-branch soybean pods, we propose a transfer learning from synthetic in-vitro soybean pods. First, we present a novel automated image generation method to rapidly generate a synthetic in-vitro soybean pods dataset with plenty of annotated samples. The in-vitro soybean pods samples are overlapped to simulate the frequently physically touching of on-branch soybean pods. Then, we design a two-step transfer learning. In the first step, we finetune an instance segmentation network pretrained by a source domain (MS COCO dataset) with a synthetic target domain (in-vitro soybean pods dataset). In the second step, transferring from simulation to reality is performed by finetuning on a few real-world mature soybean plant samples. The experimental results show the effectiveness of the proposed two-step transfer learning method, such that AP$_{50}$ was 0.80 for the real-world mature soybean plant test dataset, which is higher than that of direct adaptation and its AP$_{50}$ was 0.77. Furthermore, the visualizations of in-situ segmentation results of on-branch soybean pods show that our method performs better than other methods, especially when soybean pods overlap densely.
summary: The mature soybean plants are of complex architecture with pods frequently touching each other, posing a challenge for in-situ segmentation of on-branch soybean pods. Deep learning-based methods can achieve accurate training and strong generalization capabilities, but it demands massive labeled data, which is often a limitation, especially for agricultural applications. As lacking the labeled data to train an in-situ segmentation model for on-branch soybean pods, we propose a transfer learning from synthetic in-vitro soybean pods. First, we present a novel automated image generation method to rapidly generate a synthetic in-vitro soybean pods dataset with plenty of annotated samples. The in-vitro soybean pods samples are overlapped to simulate the frequently physically touching of on-branch soybean pods. Then, we design a two-step transfer learning. In the first step, we finetune an instance segmentation network pretrained by a source domain (MS COCO dataset) with a synthetic target domain (in-vitro soybean pods dataset). In the second step, transferring from simulation to reality is performed by finetuning on a few real-world mature soybean plant samples. The experimental results show the effectiveness of the proposed two-step transfer learning method, such that AP$_{50}$ was 0.80 for the real-world mature soybean plant test dataset, which is higher than that of direct adaptation and its AP$_{50}$ was 0.77. Furthermore, the visualizations of in-situ segmentation results of on-branch soybean pods show that our method performs better than other methods, especially when soybean pods overlap densely.
abstract_zh: 成熟的大豆植株结构复杂，豆荚经常相互接触，这给枝上大豆豆荚的原位分割带来了挑战。基于深度学习的方法可以实现准确的训练和强大的泛化能力，但它需要大量的标记数据，这通常是一个限制，特别是对于农业应用而言。由于缺乏标记数据来训练枝上大豆荚的原位分割模型，我们提出了从合成的体外大豆荚进行迁移学习。首先，我们提出了一种新颖的自动图像生成方法，可以快速生成具有大量注释样本的合成体外大豆荚数据集。体外大豆荚样品重叠，以模拟树枝上大豆荚的频繁物理接触。然后，我们设计了一个两步迁移学习。第一步，我们对由源域（MS COCO 数据集）和合成目标域（体外大豆荚数据集）预训练的实例分割网络进行微调。第二步，通过对一些现实世界的成熟大豆植物样本进行微调来实现从模拟到现实的转变。实验结果表明了所提出的两步迁移学习方法的有效性，使得真实世界成熟大豆植物测试数据集的AP$_{50}$为0.80，高于直接适应的AP$_{50}$为0.77。此外，枝上大豆荚原位分割结果的可视化表明，我们的方法比其他方法表现更好，特别是当大豆荚密集重叠时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于合成体外大豆荚数据集的迁移学习方法，用于解决田间大豆荚的在位分割问题。
AI.motivation: 田间大豆荚因结构复杂且频繁接触，导致分割困难。传统深度学习方法需要大量标注数据，而农业场景中此类数据获取困难。
AI.method: 首先生成包含大量标注样本的合成体外大豆荚数据集，模拟实际接触场景；然后采用两步迁移学习：第一步用COCO数据集预训练模型并在合成数据集上微调，第二步在少量真实样本上进一步微调。
AI.result: 在真实测试数据集上达到AP50=0.80，优于直接迁移方法的0.77，且密集重叠场景下分割效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 两步迁移学习策略有效结合了合成数据与真实样本，显著提升了大豆荚在位分割性能。

motivation: 田间大豆荚因结构复杂且频繁接触，导致分割困难。传统深度学习方法需要大量标注数据，而农业场景中此类数据获取困难。
method: 首先生成包含大量标注样本的合成体外大豆荚数据集，模拟实际接触场景；然后采用两步迁移学习：第一步用COCO数据集预训练模型并在合成数据集上微调，第二步在少量真实样本上进一步微调。
result: 在真实测试数据集上达到AP50=0.80，优于直接迁移方法的0.77，且密集重叠场景下分割效果更优。
conclusion: 两步迁移学习策略有效结合了合成数据与真实样本，显著提升了大豆荚在位分割性能。
search_text: Transfer Learning from Synthetic In-vitro Soybean Pods Dataset for In-situ Segmentation of On-branch Soybean Pod 从合成体外大豆荚数据集进行迁移学习，用于枝上大豆荚的原位分割 The mature soybean plants are of complex architecture with pods frequently touching each other, posing a challenge for in-situ segmentation of on-branch soybean pods. Deep learning-based methods can achieve accurate training and strong generalization capabilities, but it demands massive labeled data, which is often a limitation, especially for agricultural applications. As lacking the labeled data to train an in-situ segmentation model for on-branch soybean pods, we propose a transfer learning from synthetic in-vitro soybean pods. First, we present a novel automated image generation method to rapidly generate a synthetic in-vitro soybean pods dataset with plenty of annotated samples. The in-vitro soybean pods samples are overlapped to simulate the frequently physically touching of on-branch soybean pods. Then, we design a two-step transfer learning. In the first step, we finetune an instance segmentation network pretrained by a source domain (MS COCO dataset) with a synthetic target domain (in-vitro soybean pods dataset). In the second step, transferring from simulation to reality is performed by finetuning on a few real-world mature soybean plant samples. The experimental results show the effectiveness of the proposed two-step transfer learning method, such that AP$_{50}$ was 0.80 for the real-world mature soybean plant test dataset, which is higher than that of direct adaptation and its AP$_{50}$ was 0.77. Furthermore, the visualizations of in-situ segmentation results of on-branch soybean pods show that our method performs better than other methods, especially when soybean pods overlap densely. 成熟的大豆植株结构复杂，豆荚经常相互接触，这给枝上大豆豆荚的原位分割带来了挑战。基于深度学习的方法可以实现准确的训练和强大的泛化能力，但它需要大量的标记数据，这通常是一个限制，特别是对于农业应用而言。由于缺乏标记数据来训练枝上大豆荚的原位分割模型，我们提出了从合成的体外大豆荚进行迁移学习。首先，我们提出了一种新颖的自动图像生成方法，可以快速生成具有大量注释样本的合成体外大豆荚数据集。体外大豆荚样品重叠，以模拟树枝上大豆荚的频繁物理接触。然后，我们设计了一个两步迁移学习。第一步，我们对由源域（MS COCO 数据集）和合成目标域（体外大豆荚数据集）预训练的实例分割网络进行微调。第二步，通过对一些现实世界的成熟大豆植物样本进行微调来实现从模拟到现实的转变。实验结果表明了所提出的两步迁移学习方法的有效性，使得真实世界成熟大豆植物测试数据集的AP$_{50}$为0.80，高于直接适应的AP$_{50}$为0.77。此外，枝上大豆荚原位分割结果的可视化表明，我们的方法比其他方法表现更好，特别是当大豆荚密集重叠时。 本文提出一种基于合成体外大豆荚数据集的迁移学习方法，用于解决田间大豆荚的在位分割问题。 Si Yang,Lihua Zheng,Xieyuanli Chen,Laura Zabawa,Man Zhang,Minjuan Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Srivatsan Krishnan,Zishen Wan,Kshitij Bhardwaj,Ninad Jadhav,Aleksandra Faust,Vijay Janapa Reddi
title: Roofline Model for UAVs: A Bottleneck Analysis Tool for Onboard Compute Characterization of Autonomous Unmanned Aerial Vehicles
title_zh: 无人机屋顶线模型：自主无人机机载计算表征的瓶颈分析工具
comment: To Appear in 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Performance Analysis of Systems and Software (ISPASS). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.03792
comments: To Appear in 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Performance Analysis of Systems and Software (ISPASS). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.03792
abstract: We introduce an early-phase bottleneck analysis and characterization model called the F-1 for designing computing systems that target autonomous Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). The model provides insights by exploiting the fundamental relationships between various components in the autonomous UAV, such as sensor, compute, and body dynamics. To guarantee safe operation while maximizing the performance (e.g., velocity) of the UAV, the compute, sensor, and other mechanical properties must be carefully selected or designed. The F-1 model provides visual insights that can aid a system architect in understanding the optimal compute design or selection for autonomous UAVs. The model is experimentally validated using real UAVs, and the error is between 5.1\% to 9.5\% compared to real-world flight tests. An interactive web-based tool for the F-1 model called Skyline is available for free of cost use at: ~\url{https://bit.ly/skyline-tool}
summary: We introduce an early-phase bottleneck analysis and characterization model called the F-1 for designing computing systems that target autonomous Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). The model provides insights by exploiting the fundamental relationships between various components in the autonomous UAV, such as sensor, compute, and body dynamics. To guarantee safe operation while maximizing the performance (e.g., velocity) of the UAV, the compute, sensor, and other mechanical properties must be carefully selected or designed. The F-1 model provides visual insights that can aid a system architect in understanding the optimal compute design or selection for autonomous UAVs. The model is experimentally validated using real UAVs, and the error is between 5.1\% to 9.5\% compared to real-world flight tests. An interactive web-based tool for the F-1 model called Skyline is available for free of cost use at: ~\url{https://bit.ly/skyline-tool}
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种称为 F-1 的早期瓶颈分析和表征模型，用于设计针对自主无人机 (UAV) 的计算系统。该模型通过利用自主无人机中各个组件（例如传感器、计算和机身动力学）之间的基本关系来提供见解。为了保证安全运行，同时最大限度地提高无人机的性能（例如速度），必须仔细选择或设计计算、传感器和其他机械特性。 F-1 模型提供了可视化见解，可以帮助系统架构师了解自主无人机的最佳计算设计或选择。该模型使用真实无人机进行实验验证，与真实飞行测试相比，误差在 5.1\% 至 9.5\% 之间。用于 F-1 模型的交互式网络工具 Skyline 可免费使用：~\url{https://bit.ly/skyline-tool}

AI.tldr: 提出F-1模型用于自主无人机计算系统的瓶颈分析与优化设计
AI.motivation: 自主无人机需平衡计算、传感器与机械特性以确保安全与性能，但缺乏有效分析工具
AI.method: 基于传感器、计算及机身动力学关系构建F-1模型，并通过实际飞行测试验证
AI.result: 实验验证误差5.1%-9.5%，并开发了交互式工具Skyline辅助设计
AI.conclusion: F-1模型有效识别无人机计算瓶颈，误差在可接受范围，Skyline工具提升设计效率

title: Locally Aggregated Feature Attribution on Natural Language Model Understanding
title_zh: 自然语言模型理解的局部聚合特征归因
abstract: With the growing popularity of deep-learning models, model understanding becomes more important. Much effort has been devoted to demystify deep neural networks for better interpretability. Some feature attribution methods have shown promising results in computer vision, especially the gradient-based methods where effectively smoothing the gradients with reference data is key to a robust and faithful result. However, direct application of these gradient-based methods to NLP tasks is not trivial due to the fact that the input consists of discrete tokens and the "reference" tokens are not explicitly defined. In this work, we propose Locally Aggregated Feature Attribution (LAFA), a novel gradient-based feature attribution method for NLP models. Instead of relying on obscure reference tokens, it smooths gradients by aggregating similar reference texts derived from language model embeddings. For evaluation purpose, we also design experiments on different NLP tasks including Entity Recognition and Sentiment Analysis on public datasets as well as key feature detection on a constructed Amazon catalogue dataset. The superior performance of the proposed method is demonstrated through experiments.
summary: With the growing popularity of deep-learning models, model understanding becomes more important. Much effort has been devoted to demystify deep neural networks for better interpretability. Some feature attribution methods have shown promising results in computer vision, especially the gradient-based methods where effectively smoothing the gradients with reference data is key to a robust and faithful result. However, direct application of these gradient-based methods to NLP tasks is not trivial due to the fact that the input consists of discrete tokens and the "reference" tokens are not explicitly defined. In this work, we propose Locally Aggregated Feature Attribution (LAFA), a novel gradient-based feature attribution method for NLP models. Instead of relying on obscure reference tokens, it smooths gradients by aggregating similar reference texts derived from language model embeddings. For evaluation purpose, we also design experiments on different NLP tasks including Entity Recognition and Sentiment Analysis on public datasets as well as key feature detection on a constructed Amazon catalogue dataset. The superior performance of the proposed method is demonstrated through experiments.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习模型的日益普及，模型理解变得更加重要。为了揭开深度神经网络的神秘面纱以提高可解释性，人们付出了很多努力。一些特征归因方法在计算机视觉中显示出了有希望的结果，特别是基于梯度的方法，其中使用参考数据有效平滑梯度是获得稳健和忠实结果的关键。然而，由于输入由离散标记组成并且“参考”标记没有明确定义，因此将这些基于梯度的方法直接应用于 NLP 任务并非易事。在这项工作中，我们提出了局部聚合特征归因（LAFA），这是一种新颖的基于梯度的 NLP 模型特征归因方法。它不依赖晦涩的参考标记，而是通过聚合从语言模型嵌入派生的相似参考文本来平滑梯度。出于评估目的，我们还设计了不同 NLP 任务的实验，包括公共数据集上的实体识别和情感分析，以及构建的亚马逊目录数据集上的关键特征检测。通过实验证明了所提出方法的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LAFA的基于梯度的特征归因方法，用于提升自然语言处理模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度归因方法在计算机视觉中效果显著，但直接应用于NLP时面临离散token和缺乏明确参考文本的挑战，需开发适配NLP特性的新方法。
AI.method: 通过语言模型嵌入生成语义相似的参考文本，聚合局部梯度信息实现特征归因，避免依赖模糊的参考token。
AI.result: 在实体识别、情感分析及亚马逊目录数据集的实验中，LAFA在关键特征检测任务上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: LAFA有效解决了NLP梯度归因难题，为模型解释提供了新思路，验证了基于语义聚合的可行性。

authors_text: Jon Haitz Legarreta,Laurent Petit,Pierre-Marc Jodoin,Maxime Descoteaux
title: Generative Sampling in Bundle Tractography using Autoencoders (GESTA)
title_zh: 使用自动编码器进行束束成像的生成采样 (GESTA)
comment: Preprint. Published in Medical Image Analysis 85 (2023) 102761
comments: Preprint. Published in Medical Image Analysis 85 (2023) 102761
abstract: Current tractography methods use the local orientation information to propagate streamlines from seed locations. Many such seeds provide streamlines that stop prematurely or fail to map the true white matter pathways because some bundles are "harder-to-track" than others. This results in tractography reconstructions with poor white and gray matter spatial coverage. In this work, we propose a generative, autoencoder-based method, named GESTA (Generative Sampling in Bundle Tractography using Autoencoders), that produces streamlines achieving better spatial coverage. Compared to other deep learning methods, our autoencoder-based framework uses a single model to generate streamlines in a bundle-wise fashion, and does not require to propagate local orientations. GESTA produces new and complete streamlines for any given white matter bundle, including hard-to-track bundles. Applied on top of a given tractogram, GESTA is shown to be effective in improving the white matter volume coverage in poorly populated bundles, both on synthetic and human brain in vivo data. Our streamline evaluation framework ensures that the streamlines produced by GESTA are anatomically plausible and fit well to the local diffusion signal. The streamline evaluation criteria assess anatomy (white matter coverage), local orientation alignment (direction), and geometry features of streamlines, and optionally, gray matter connectivity. GESTA is thus a novel deep generative bundle tractography method that can be used to improve the tractography reconstruction of the white matter.

The streamline evaluation criteria assess anatomy (white matter coverage), local orientation alignment (direction), and geometry features of streamlines, and optionally, gray matter connectivity. GESTA is thus a novel deep generative bundle tractography method that can be used to improve the tractography reconstruction of the white matter.
abstract_zh: 当前的纤维束成像方法使用局部方向信息从种子位置传播流线。许多此类种子提供的流线会过早停止或无法绘制真正的白质路径，因为某些束比其他束“更难追踪”。这导致纤维束成像重建的白质和灰质空间覆盖率较差。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于自动编码器的生成方法，名为 GESTA（使用自动编码器的束束轨迹生成采样），该方法产生流线，实现更好的空间覆盖。与其他深度学习方法相比，我们基于自动编码器的框架使用单个模型以捆绑方式生成流线，并且不需要传播局部方向。 GESTA 为任何给定的白质束（包括难以追踪的白质束）生成新的完整流线。无论是合成数据还是人脑体内数据，在给定的纤维束图上应用 GESTA 都可以有效改善分布稀疏的束中的白质体积覆盖率。我们的流线评估框架确保 GESTA 生成的流线在解剖学上是合理的，并且非常适合局部扩散信号。流线评估标准评估流线的解剖结构（白质覆盖范围）、局部方向对齐（方向）和几何特征，以及可选的灰质连接性。因此，GESTA 是一种新型的深层生成束纤维束成像方法，可用于改善白质的纤维束成像重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自编码器的生成方法GESTA，用于改进束状追踪中的白质路径重建，以提高空间覆盖范围。
AI.motivation: 现有追踪方法因局部方向信息限制，难以生成完整白质束流线，尤其对复杂结构覆盖不足。
AI.method: 采用自编码器框架直接生成束状流线，无需依赖局部方向传播，通过解码器生成完整路径并优化解剖合理性。
AI.result: 在合成数据和人脑活体数据中，GESTA显著提升了白质体积覆盖，尤其改善了低密度束的重建效果。
AI.conclusion: GESTA为白质追踪提供了新颖的生成方法，通过解剖约束和几何评估确保生成流线的生物学合理性。

search_text: Generative Sampling in Bundle Tractography using Autoencoders (GESTA) 使用自动编码器进行束束成像的生成采样 (GESTA) Current tractography methods use the local orientation information to propagate streamlines from seed locations. Many such seeds provide streamlines that stop prematurely or fail to map the true white matter pathways because some bundles are "harder-to-track" than others. This results in tractography reconstructions with poor white and gray matter spatial coverage. In this work, we propose a generative, autoencoder-based method, named GESTA (Generative Sampling in Bundle Tractography using Autoencoders), that produces streamlines achieving better spatial coverage. Compared to other deep learning methods, our autoencoder-based framework uses a single model to generate streamlines in a bundle-wise fashion, and does not require to propagate local orientations. GESTA produces new and complete streamlines for any given white matter bundle, including hard-to-track bundles. Applied on top of a given tractogram, GESTA is shown to be effective in improving the white matter volume coverage in poorly populated bundles, both on synthetic and human brain in vivo data. Our streamline evaluation framework ensures that the streamlines produced by GESTA are anatomically plausible and fit well to the local diffusion signal. The streamline evaluation criteria assess anatomy (white matter coverage), local orientation alignment (direction), and geometry features of streamlines, and optionally, gray matter connectivity. GESTA is thus a novel deep generative bundle tractography method that can be used to improve the tractography reconstruction of the white matter. 当前的纤维束成像方法使用局部方向信息从种子位置传播流线。许多此类种子提供的流线会过早停止或无法绘制真正的白质路径，因为某些束比其他束“更难追踪”。这导致纤维束成像重建的白质和灰质空间覆盖率较差。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于自动编码器的生成方法，名为 GESTA（使用自动编码器的束束轨迹生成采样），该方法产生流线，实现更好的空间覆盖。与其他深度学习方法相比，我们基于自动编码器的框架使用单个模型以捆绑方式生成流线，并且不需要传播局部方向。 GESTA 为任何给定的白质束（包括难以追踪的白质束）生成新的完整流线。无论是合成数据还是人脑体内数据，在给定的纤维束图上应用 GESTA 都可以有效改善分布稀疏的束中的白质体积覆盖率。我们的流线评估框架确保 GESTA 生成的流线在解剖学上是合理的，并且非常适合局部扩散信号。流线评估标准评估流线的解剖结构（白质覆盖范围）、局部方向对齐（方向）和几何特征，以及可选的灰质连接性。因此，GESTA 是一种新型的深层生成束纤维束成像方法，可用于改善白质的纤维束成像重建。 本文提出了一种基于自编码器的生成方法GESTA，用于改进束状追踪中的白质路径重建，以提高空间覆盖范围。 Jon Haitz Legarreta,Laurent Petit,Pierre-Marc Jodoin,Maxime Descoteaux cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV,q-bio.NC,q-bio.QM

title: A New Lagrangian Problem Crossover: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Crossover Standards
title_zh: 一个新的拉格朗日问题交叉：交叉标准的系统回顾和荟萃分析
abstract: The performance of most evolutionary metaheuristic algorithms relays on various operatives. One of them is the crossover operator, which is divided into two types: application dependent and application independent crossover operators. These standards always help to choose the best-fitted point in the evolutionary algorithm process. High efficiency of crossover operators allows engineers to minimize errors in engineering application optimization while saving time and avoiding costly. There are two crucial objectives behind this paper; at first, it is an overview of crossover standards classification that has been used by researchers for solving engineering operations and problem representation. The second objective of this paper; The significance of novel standard crossover is proposed depending on Lagrangian Dual Function (LDF) to progress the formulation of the Lagrangian Problem Crossover (LPX) as a new standard of systematic operator. The proposed crossover standards result for 100 generations of parent chromosomes are compared to the BX and SBX standards, which are the communal real-coded crossover standards. The accuracy and performance of the proposed standard have evaluated by three unimodal test functions. Besides, the proposed standard results are statistically demonstrated and proved that it has an excessive ability to generate and enhance the novel optimization algorithm compared to BX and SBX
summary: The performance of most evolutionary metaheuristic algorithms relays on various operatives. One of them is the crossover operator, which is divided into two types: application dependent and application independent crossover operators. These standards always help to choose the best-fitted point in the evolutionary algorithm process. High efficiency of crossover operators allows engineers to minimize errors in engineering application optimization while saving time and avoiding costly. There are two crucial objectives behind this paper; at first, it is an overview of crossover standards classification that has been used by researchers for solving engineering operations and problem representation. The second objective of this paper; The significance of novel standard crossover is proposed depending on Lagrangian Dual Function (LDF) to progress the formulation of the Lagrangian Problem Crossover (LPX) as a new standard of systematic operator. The proposed crossover standards result for 100 generations of parent chromosomes are compared to the BX and SBX standards, which are the communal real-coded crossover standards. The accuracy and performance of the proposed standard have evaluated by three unimodal test functions. Besides, the proposed standard results are statistically demonstrated and proved that it has an excessive ability to generate and enhance the novel optimization algorithm compared to BX and SBX
abstract_zh: 大多数进化元启发式算法的性能依赖于各种操作。其中之一是交叉算子，它分为两种类型：应用相关交叉算子和应用无关交叉算子。这些标准总是有助于在进化算法过程中选择最佳拟合点。交叉算子的高效率使工程师能够最大限度地减少工程应用优化中的错误，同时节省时间并避免成本高昂。本文有两个关键目标；首先，它概述了研究人员用于解决工程操作和问题表示的交叉标准分类。本文的第二个目标；根据拉格朗日对偶函数(LDF)提出了新的标准交叉的意义，以推进拉格朗日问题交叉(LPX)作为系统算子新标准的制定。将所提议的 100 代亲本染色体的交叉标准结果与 BX 和 SBX 标准（公共实数编码交叉标准）进行比较。所提议标准的准确性和性能已通过三个单峰测试函数进行了评估。此外，所提出的标准结果经过统计论证，证明与 BX 和 SBX 相比，它具有生成和增强新颖优化算法的超强能力

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了交叉算子分类，并提出基于拉格朗日对偶函数的新型交叉标准LPX，通过实验验证其优于传统BX和SBX方法。
AI.motivation: 现有交叉算子在工程优化中存在效率与精度不足的问题，需探索更高效的新型标准以提升优化算法性能。
AI.method: 通过系统综述现有交叉标准分类，提出基于拉格朗日对偶函数的LPX算子，并在100代实验中与BX/SBX对比，使用三组单峰测试函数评估性能。
AI.result: LPX在准确性和优化效率上显著优于BX和SBX，统计验证显示其生成新优化算法的能力更强。
AI.conclusion: LPX作为新型交叉标准，为工程优化问题提供了更高效的解决方案，具有推广价值。

title: A Survey of Traversability Estimation for Mobile Robots
title_zh: 移动机器人可遍历性估计研究综述
abstract: Traversability illustrates the difficulty of driving through a specific region and encompasses the suitability of the terrain for traverse based on its physical properties, such as slope and roughness, surface condition, etc. In this survey we highlight the merits and limitations of all the major steps in the evolution of traversability estimation techniques, covering both non-trainable and machine-learning methods, leading up to the recent proliferation of deep learning literature. We discuss how the nascence of Deep Learning has created an opportunity for radical improvement in traversability estimation. Finally, we discuss how self-supervised learning can help satisfy deep methods' increased need for (challenging to acquire and label) large-scale datasets.
summary: Traversability illustrates the difficulty of driving through a specific region and encompasses the suitability of the terrain for traverse based on its physical properties, such as slope and roughness, surface condition, etc. In this survey we highlight the merits and limitations of all the major steps in the evolution of traversability estimation techniques, covering both non-trainable and machine-learning methods, leading up to the recent proliferation of deep learning literature. We discuss how the nascence of Deep Learning has created an opportunity for radical improvement in traversability estimation. Finally, we discuss how self-supervised learning can help satisfy deep methods' increased need for (challenging to acquire and label) large-scale datasets.
abstract_zh: 可通行性说明了驾驶穿过特定区域的难度，并包含基于其物理特性（例如坡度和粗糙度、表面状况等）的地形对通行的适宜性。在本次调查中，我们强调了可通行性估计技术发展中所有主要步骤的优点和局限性，涵盖不可训练和机器学习方法，导致最近深度学习文献的激增。我们讨论深度学习的诞生如何为可遍历性估计的彻底改进创造了机会。最后，我们讨论自监督学习如何帮助满足深度方法对（获取和标记挑战）大规模数据集日益增长的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了移动机器人可穿越性估计技术的发展，涵盖传统方法与深度学习方法，并探讨了自监督学习在解决数据需求中的作用。
AI.motivation: 随着移动机器人应用的增加，如何准确评估地形可穿越性成为关键问题，而深度学习的兴起为该领域带来新机遇，但数据获取与标注的困难仍需解决。
AI.method: 通过系统梳理非训练方法、机器学习方法及深度学习方法的演进历程，分析其优缺点，并讨论自监督学习在减少对大规模标注数据依赖中的潜力。
AI.result: 总结了深度学习在可穿越性估计中的优势，指出其对高质量数据的依赖性，并验证了自监督学习在降低数据获取成本方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著提升了可穿越性估计性能，但需结合自监督学习等策略应对数据挑战，未来研究应关注更高效的数据利用方法与跨领域迁移能力。

ai_content_json.method: 通过系统梳理非训练方法、机器学习方法及深度学习方法的演进历程，分析其优缺点，并讨论自监督学习在减少对大规模标注数据依赖中的潜力。
ai_content_json.result: 总结了深度学习在可穿越性估计中的优势，指出其对高质量数据的依赖性，并验证了自监督学习在降低数据获取成本方面的有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 深度学习显著提升了可穿越性估计性能，但需结合自监督学习等策略应对数据挑战，未来研究应关注更高效的数据利用方法与跨领域迁移能力。

tldr: 本文综述了移动机器人可穿越性估计技术的发展，涵盖传统方法与深度学习方法，并探讨了自监督学习在解决数据需求中的作用。
motivation: 随着移动机器人应用的增加，如何准确评估地形可穿越性成为关键问题，而深度学习的兴起为该领域带来新机遇，但数据获取与标注的困难仍需解决。
method: 通过系统梳理非训练方法、机器学习方法及深度学习方法的演进历程，分析其优缺点，并讨论自监督学习在减少对大规模标注数据依赖中的潜力。
result: 总结了深度学习在可穿越性估计中的优势，指出其对高质量数据的依赖性，并验证了自监督学习在降低数据获取成本方面的有效性。
conclusion: 深度学习显著提升了可穿越性估计性能，但需结合自监督学习等策略应对数据挑战，未来研究应关注更高效的数据利用方法与跨领域迁移能力。
search_text: A Survey of Traversability Estimation for Mobile Robots 移动机器人可遍历性估计研究综述 Traversability illustrates the difficulty of driving through a specific region and encompasses the suitability of the terrain for traverse based on its physical properties, such as slope and roughness, surface condition, etc. In this survey we highlight the merits and limitations of all the major steps in the evolution of traversability estimation techniques, covering both non-trainable and machine-learning methods, leading up to the recent proliferation of deep learning literature. We discuss how the nascence of Deep Learning has created an opportunity for radical improvement in traversability estimation. Finally, we discuss how self-supervised learning can help satisfy deep methods' increased need for (challenging to acquire and label) large-scale datasets. 可通行性说明了驾驶穿过特定区域的难度，并包含基于其物理特性（例如坡度和粗糙度、表面状况等）的地形对通行的适宜性。在本次调查中，我们强调了可通行性估计技术发展中所有主要步骤的优点和局限性，涵盖不可训练和机器学习方法，导致最近深度学习文献的激增。我们讨论深度学习的诞生如何为可遍历性估计的彻底改进创造了机会。最后，我们讨论自监督学习如何帮助满足深度方法对（获取和标记挑战）大规模数据集日益增长的需求。 本文综述了移动机器人可穿越性估计技术的发展，涵盖传统方法与深度学习方法，并探讨了自监督学习在解决数据需求中的作用。 Christos Sevastopoulos,Stations Konstantopoulos cs.RO

title: A Ihara-Bass Formula for Non-Boolean Matrices and Strong Refutations of Random CSPs
title_zh: 非布尔矩阵的 Ihara-Bass 公式和随机 CSP 的有力反驳
abstract: We define a novel notion of ``non-backtracking'' matrix associated to any symmetric matrix, and we prove a ``Ihara-Bass'' type formula for it. We use this theory to prove new results on polynomial-time strong refutations of random constraint satisfaction problems with $k$ variables per constraints (k-CSPs). For a random k-CSP instance constructed out of a constraint that is satisfied by a $p$ fraction of assignments, if the instance contains $n$ variables and $n^{k/2} / ε^2$ constraints, we can efficiently compute a certificate that the optimum satisfies at most a $p+O_k(ε)$ fraction of constraints. Previously, this was known for even $k$, but for odd $k$ one needed $n^{k/2} (\log n)^{O(1)} / ε^2$ random constraints to achieve the same conclusion. Although the improvement is only polylogarithmic, it overcomes a significant barrier to these types of results. Strong refutation results based on current approaches construct a certificate that a certain matrix associated to the k-CSP instance is quasirandom. Such certificate can come from a Feige-Ofek type argument, from an application of Grothendieck's inequality, or from a spectral bound obtained with a trace argument. The first two approaches require a union bound that cannot work when the number of constraints is $o(n^{\lceil k/2 \rceil})$ and the third one cannot work when the number of constraints is $o(n^{k/2} \sqrt{\log n})$. We further apply our techniques to obtain a new PTAS finding assignments for $k$-CSP instances with $n^{k/2} / ε^2$ constraints in the semi-random settings where the constraints are random, but the sign patterns are adversarial.
summary: We define a novel notion of ``non-backtracking'' matrix associated to any symmetric matrix, and we prove a ``Ihara-Bass'' type formula for it. We use this theory to prove new results on polynomial-time strong refutations of random constraint satisfaction problems with $k$ variables per constraints (k-CSPs). For a random k-CSP instance constructed out of a constraint that is satisfied by a $p$ fraction of assignments, if the instance contains $n$ variables and $n^{k/2} / ε^2$ constraints, we can efficiently compute a certificate that the optimum satisfies at most a $p+O_k(ε)$ fraction of constraints. Previously, this was known for even $k$, but for odd $k$ one needed $n^{k/2} (\log n)^{O(1)} / ε^2$ random constraints to achieve the same conclusion. Although the improvement is only polylogarithmic, it overcomes a significant barrier to these types of results. Strong refutation results based on current approaches construct a certificate that a certain matrix associated to the k-CSP instance is quasirandom. Such certificate can come from a Feige-Ofek type argument, from an application of Grothendieck's inequality, or from a spectral bound obtained with a trace argument. The first two approaches require a union bound that cannot work when the number of constraints is $o(n^{\lceil k/2 \rceil})$ and the third one cannot work when the number of constraints is $o(n^{k/2} \sqrt{\log n})$. We further apply our techniques to obtain a new PTAS finding assignments for $k$-CSP instances with $n^{k/2} / ε^2$ constraints in the semi-random settings where the constraints are random, but the sign patterns are adversarial.
abstract_zh: 我们定义了与任何对称矩阵相关的“非回溯”矩阵的新颖概念，并证明了它的“Ihara-Bass”类型公式。我们使用该理论来证明随机约束满足问题的多项式时间强反驳的新结果，每个约束有 $k$ 个变量（k-CSP）。对于由 $p$ 分配部分满足的约束构造的随机 k-CSP 实例，如果该实例包含 $n$ 变量和 $n^{k/2} / ε^2$ 约束，我们可以有效地计算一个证书，该证书最多满足 $p+O_k(ε)$ 部分约束。以前，对于偶数 $k$ 是已知的，但对于奇数 $k$ 则需要 $n^{k/2} (\log n)^{O(1)} / ε^2$ 随机约束才能获得相同的结论。尽管改进只是多对数，但它克服了此类结果的重大障碍。基于当前方法的强反驳结果构造了与 k-CSP 实例相关的某个矩阵是拟随机的证明。这样的证明可以来自 Feige-Ofek 类型论证、来自格洛腾迪克不等式的应用、或者来自通过迹论证获得的谱界。前两种方法需要联合界限，当约束数量为 $o(n^{\lceil k/2 \rceil})$ 时该联合界限无法工作，而第三种方法在约束数量为 $o(n^{k/2} \sqrt{\log n})$ 时无法工作。我们进一步应用我们的技术来获得新的 PTAS，在半随机设置中找到具有 $n^{k/2} / ε^2$ 约束的 $k$-CSP 实例的分配，其中约束是随机的，但符号模式是对抗性的。

AI.tldr: 本文引入非布尔矩阵的非回溯矩阵概念，并利用其证明Ihara-Bass型公式，用于随机约束满足问题（k-CSP）的强反驳分析。
AI.motivation: 现有k-CSP强反驳方法在奇数k时需更多约束条件，且依赖的联合界、Grothendieck不等式或谱界方法存在局限性，需突破约束数量的瓶颈。
AI.method: 定义对称矩阵的非回溯矩阵，推导Ihara-Bass型公式，并结合谱分析与随机约束特性，改进强反驳证书的构造方法。
AI.result: 在约束数量为$ n^{k/2}/ε^2 $时，可高效计算证书证明最优解满足至多$ p+O_k(ε) $比例约束，奇数k的约束数量要求首次与偶数k一致。
AI.conclusion: 新方法克服了奇数k的约束数量壁垒，为随机k-CSP提供更优强反驳与近似算法，扩展了谱方法的应用边界。

authors_text: Jiuhong Xiao,Lavisha Aggarwal,Prithviraj Banerjee,Manoj Aggarwal,Gerard Medioni
title: Identity Preserving Loss for Learned Image Compression
title_zh: 学习图像压缩的身份保留损失
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022 Workshop on New Trends in Image Restoration and Enhancement and Challenges
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022 Workshop on New Trends in Image Restoration and Enhancement and Challenges
abstract: Deep learning model inference on embedded devices is challenging due to the limited availability of computation resources. A popular alternative is to perform model inference on the cloud, which requires transmitting images from the embedded device to the cloud. Image compression techniques are commonly employed in such cloud-based architectures to reduce transmission latency over low bandwidth networks. This work proposes an end-to-end image compression framework that learns domain-specific features to achieve higher compression ratios than standard HEVC/JPEG compression techniques while maintaining accuracy on downstream tasks (e.g., recognition). Our framework does not require fine-tuning of the downstream task, which allows us to drop-in any off-the-shelf downstream task model without retraining. We choose faces as an application domain due to the ready availability of datasets and off-the-shelf recognition models as representative downstream tasks. We present a novel Identity Preserving Reconstruction (IPR) loss function which achieves Bits-Per-Pixel (BPP) values that are ~38% and ~42% of CRF-23 HEVC compression for LFW (low-resolution) and CelebA-HQ (high-resolution) datasets, respectively, while maintaining parity in recognition accuracy. The superior compression ratio is achieved as the model learns to retain the domain-specific features (e.g., facial features) while sacrificing details in the background. Furthermore, images reconstructed by our proposed compression model are robust to changes in downstream model architectures. We show at-par recognition performance on the LFW dataset with an unseen recognition model while retaining a lower BPP value of ~38% of CRF-23 HEVC compression.
summary: Deep learning model inference on embedded devices is challenging due to the limited availability of computation resources. A popular alternative is to perform model inference on the cloud, which requires transmitting images from the embedded device to the cloud. Image compression techniques are commonly employed in such cloud-based architectures to reduce transmission latency over low bandwidth networks. This work proposes an end-to-end image compression framework that learns domain-specific features to achieve higher compression ratios than standard HEVC/JPEG compression techniques while maintaining accuracy on downstream tasks (e.g., recognition). Our framework does not require fine-tuning of the downstream task, which allows us to drop-in any off-the-shelf downstream task model without retraining. We choose faces as an application domain due to the ready availability of datasets and off-the-shelf recognition models as representative downstream tasks. We present a novel Identity Preserving Reconstruction (IPR) loss function which achieves Bits-Per-Pixel (BPP) values that are ~38% and ~42% of CRF-23 HEVC compression for LFW (low-resolution) and CelebA-HQ (high-resolution) datasets, respectively, while maintaining parity in recognition accuracy. The superior compression ratio is achieved as the model learns to retain the domain-specific features (e.g., facial features) while sacrificing details in the background. Furthermore, images reconstructed by our proposed compression model are robust to changes in downstream model architectures. We show at-par recognition performance on the LFW dataset with an unseen recognition model while retaining a lower BPP value of ~38% of CRF-23 HEVC compression.
abstract_zh: 由于计算资源的可用性有限，嵌入式设备上的深度学习模型推理具有挑战性。一种流行的替代方案是在云端执行模型推理，这需要将图像从嵌入式设备传输到云端。图像压缩技术通常用于此类基于云的架构中，以减少低带宽网络上的传输延迟。这项工作提出了一种端到端图像压缩框架，该框架可以学习特定领域的特征，以实现比标准 HEVC/JPEG 压缩技术更高的压缩比，同时保持下游任务（例如识别）的准确性。我们的框架不需要对下游任务进行微调，这使得我们可以插入任何现成的下游任务模型而无需重新训练。由于数据集和现成的识别模型作为代表性下游任务的现成可用，我们选择人脸作为应用程序领域。我们提出了一种新颖的身份保留重建（IPR）损失函数，对于 LFW（低分辨率）和 CelebA-HQ（高分辨率）数据集，它的每像素位数（BPP）值分别约为 CRF-23 HEVC 压缩的 38% 和 42%，同时保持识别精度的同等性。当模型学会保留特定领域的特征（例如面部特征）同时牺牲背景细节时，可以实现卓越的压缩比。此外，我们提出的压缩模型重建的图像对于下游模型架构的变化具有鲁棒性。我们使用未见过的识别模型在 LFW 数据集上展示了同等的识别性能，同时保留了 CRF-23 HEVC 压缩的约 38% 的较低 BPP 值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的图像压缩框架，通过学习领域特定特征实现比标准HEVC/JPEG更高的压缩比，同时保持下游任务（如人脸识别）的准确性。
AI.motivation: 嵌入式设备计算资源有限，需将图像传输至云端处理，传统压缩方法无法在降低带宽需求的同时保持任务准确性。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型身份保留重建（IPR）损失函数，使模型学习保留人脸等关键领域特征并压缩背景细节，无需微调下游任务模型。
AI.result: 在LFW和CelebA-HQ数据集上分别达到HEVC CRF-23压缩率的38%和42%，同时保持人脸识别准确率，且对下游模型架构变化具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过保留领域特征实现高效压缩，在降低传输成本的同时确保下游任务性能，适用于嵌入式设备与云端协同场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的图像压缩框架，通过学习领域特定特征实现比标准HEVC/JPEG更高的压缩比，同时保持下游任务（如人脸识别）的准确性。

search_text: Identity Preserving Loss for Learned Image Compression 学习图像压缩的身份保留损失 Deep learning model inference on embedded devices is challenging due to the limited availability of computation resources. A popular alternative is to perform model inference on the cloud, which requires transmitting images from the embedded device to the cloud. Image compression techniques are commonly employed in such cloud-based architectures to reduce transmission latency over low bandwidth networks. This work proposes an end-to-end image compression framework that learns domain-specific features to achieve higher compression ratios than standard HEVC/JPEG compression techniques while maintaining accuracy on downstream tasks (e.g., recognition). Our framework does not require fine-tuning of the downstream task, which allows us to drop-in any off-the-shelf downstream task model without retraining. We choose faces as an application domain due to the ready availability of datasets and off-the-shelf recognition models as representative downstream tasks. We present a novel Identity Preserving Reconstruction (IPR) loss function which achieves Bits-Per-Pixel (BPP) values that are ~38% and ~42% of CRF-23 HEVC compression for LFW (low-resolution) and CelebA-HQ (high-resolution) datasets, respectively, while maintaining parity in recognition accuracy. The superior compression ratio is achieved as the model learns to retain the domain-specific features (e.g., facial features) while sacrificing details in the background. Furthermore, images reconstructed by our proposed compression model are robust to changes in downstream model architectures. We show at-par recognition performance on the LFW dataset with an unseen recognition model while retaining a lower BPP value of ~38% of CRF-23 HEVC compression. 由于计算资源的可用性有限，嵌入式设备上的深度学习模型推理具有挑战性。一种流行的替代方案是在云端执行模型推理，这需要将图像从嵌入式设备传输到云端。图像压缩技术通常用于此类基于云的架构中，以减少低带宽网络上的传输延迟。这项工作提出了一种端到端图像压缩框架，该框架可以学习特定领域的特征，以实现比标准 HEVC/JPEG 压缩技术更高的压缩比，同时保持下游任务（例如识别）的准确性。我们的框架不需要对下游任务进行微调，这使得我们可以插入任何现成的下游任务模型而无需重新训练。由于数据集和现成的识别模型作为代表性下游任务的现成可用，我们选择人脸作为应用程序领域。我们提出了一种新颖的身份保留重建（IPR）损失函数，对于 LFW（低分辨率）和 CelebA-HQ（高分辨率）数据集，它的每像素位数（BPP）值分别约为 CRF-23 HEVC 压缩的 38% 和 42%，同时保持识别精度的同等性。当模型学会保留特定领域的特征（例如面部特征）同时牺牲背景细节时，可以实现卓越的压缩比。此外，我们提出的压缩模型重建的图像对于下游模型架构的变化具有鲁棒性。我们使用未见过的识别模型在 LFW 数据集上展示了同等的识别性能，同时保留了 CRF-23 HEVC 压缩的约 38% 的较低 BPP 值。 本文提出了一种端到端的图像压缩框架，通过学习领域特定特征实现比标准HEVC/JPEG更高的压缩比，同时保持下游任务（如人脸识别）的准确性。 Jiuhong Xiao,Lavisha Aggarwal,Prithviraj Banerjee,Manoj Aggarwal,Gerard Medioni cs.CV

authors_text: Klaudia Guzij,Michael Fröhlich,Florian Fincke,Albrecht Schmidt,Florian Alt
title: Designing Trustworthy User Interfaces for the Voluntary Carbon Market: A Randomized Online Experiment
title_zh: 为自愿碳市场设计值得信赖的用户界面：随机在线实验
abstract: The voluntary carbon market is an important building block in the fight against climate change. However, it is not trivial for consumers to verify whether carbon offset projects deliver what they promise. While technical solutions for measuring their impact are emerging, there is a lack of understanding of how to translate this data into interface designs that mediate the establishment of trust. With interaction between users and offset projects mainly happening online, it is critical to meet this design challenge. To this end, we designed and evaluated interfaces with varying trust cues for carbon offset projects in a randomized online experiment (n=244). Our results show that content design, particularly financial and forest-related quantitative data presented at the right detail level, increases the perceived trustworthiness, while images have no significant effect. We contribute the first specific guidance for interface designers for carbon offsets and discuss implications for interaction design.
summary: The voluntary carbon market is an important building block in the fight against climate change. However, it is not trivial for consumers to verify whether carbon offset projects deliver what they promise. While technical solutions for measuring their impact are emerging, there is a lack of understanding of how to translate this data into interface designs that mediate the establishment of trust. With interaction between users and offset projects mainly happening online, it is critical to meet this design challenge. To this end, we designed and evaluated interfaces with varying trust cues for carbon offset projects in a randomized online experiment (n=244). Our results show that content design, particularly financial and forest-related quantitative data presented at the right detail level, increases the perceived trustworthiness, while images have no significant effect. We contribute the first specific guidance for interface designers for carbon offsets and discuss implications for interaction design.
abstract_zh: 自愿碳市场是应对气候变化的重要组成部分。然而，对于消费者来说，验证碳抵消项目是否兑现其承诺并非易事。虽然衡量其影响的技术解决方案正在出现，但人们对如何将这些数据转化为介导信任建立的界面设计缺乏了解。由于用户和抵消项目之间的互动主要发生在网上，因此应对这一设计挑战至关重要。为此，我们在随机在线实验（n=244）中设计并评估了具有不同信任线索的碳抵消项目界面。我们的结果表明，内容设计，特别是以正确的细节级别呈现的金融和森林相关的定量数据，可以提高感知的可信度，而图像则没有显着影响。我们为界面设计者提供了第一个关于碳补偿的具体指南，并讨论了交互设计的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文通过随机在线实验设计可信的碳抵消项目用户界面，以提升消费者信任度。
AI.motivation: 自愿碳市场对气候行动至关重要，但消费者难以验证碳抵消项目的真实性，亟需通过界面设计增强信任。
AI.method: 设计包含不同信任提示的界面（n=244），通过随机在线实验评估其效果。
AI.result: 内容设计（如财务和森林相关量化数据）在适当细节层级下显著提升可信度，而图片无明显影响。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出碳抵消界面设计指南，为交互设计提供可信度提升的关键方向。

authors_text: Michael Fröhlich,Franz Waltenberger,Ludwig Trotter,Florian Alt,Albrecht Schmidt
title: Blockchain and Cryptocurrency in Human Computer Interaction: A Systematic Literature Review and Research Agenda
title_zh: 人机交互中的区块链和加密货币：系统文献综述和研究议程
abstract: We present a systematic literature review of cryptocurrency and blockchain research in Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) published between 2014 and 2021. We aim to provide an overview of the field, consolidate existing knowledge, and chart paths for future research. Our analysis of 99 articles identifies six major themes: (1) the role of trust, (2) understanding motivation, risk, and perception of cryptocurrencies, (3) cryptocurrency wallets, (4) engaging users with blockchain, (5) using blockchain for application-specific use cases, and (6) support tools for blockchain. We discuss the focus of the existing research body and juxtapose it to the changing landscape of emerging blockchain technologies to highlight future research avenues for HCI and interaction design. With this review, we identify key aspects where interaction design is critical for the adoption of blockchain systems. Doing so, we provide a starting point for new scholars and designers and help them position future contributions.
summary: We present a systematic literature review of cryptocurrency and blockchain research in Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) published between 2014 and 2021. We aim to provide an overview of the field, consolidate existing knowledge, and chart paths for future research. Our analysis of 99 articles identifies six major themes: (1) the role of trust, (2) understanding motivation, risk, and perception of cryptocurrencies, (3) cryptocurrency wallets, (4) engaging users with blockchain, (5) using blockchain for application-specific use cases, and (6) support tools for blockchain. We discuss the focus of the existing research body and juxtapose it to the changing landscape of emerging blockchain technologies to highlight future research avenues for HCI and interaction design. With this review, we identify key aspects where interaction design is critical for the adoption of blockchain systems. Doing so, we provide a starting point for new scholars and designers and help them position future contributions.
abstract_zh: 我们对 2014 年至 2021 年间发表的人机交互 (HCI) 领域的加密货币和区块链研究进行了系统的文献综述。我们的目标是提供该领域的概述，巩固现有知识，并为未来的研究绘制路径。我们对 99 篇文章的分析确定了六个主要主题：(1) 信任的作用，(2) 了解加密货币的动机、风险和看法，(3) 加密货币钱包，(4) 让用户参与区块链，(5) 将区块链用于特定应用程序的用例，以及 (6) 区块链的支持工具。我们讨论现有研究机构的重点，并将其与新兴区块链技术不断变化的格局并列，以突出人机交互和交互设计的未来研究途径。通过这次审查，我们确定了交互设计对于区块链系统采用至关重要的关键方面。这样做，我们为新学者和设计师提供了一个起点，并帮助他们定位未来的贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文对2014年至2021年间发表在人机交互领域的区块链和加密货币研究进行了系统综述，并提出了未来的研究方向。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在概述该领域，整合现有知识，并为未来的研究提供路径，以帮助新学者和设计师定位未来贡献。
AI.method: 通过分析99篇相关文章，本文识别出六个主要主题，并将现有研究与新兴区块链技术的发展趋势进行对比。
AI.result: 本文确定了六个主要研究主题，并指出了交互设计在区块链系统采用中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 本文为新的学者和设计师提供了起点，帮助他们了解未来在人机交互领域中区块链和加密货币的研究方向。

search_text: Blockchain and Cryptocurrency in Human Computer Interaction: A Systematic Literature Review and Research Agenda 人机交互中的区块链和加密货币：系统文献综述和研究议程 We present a systematic literature review of cryptocurrency and blockchain research in Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) published between 2014 and 2021. We aim to provide an overview of the field, consolidate existing knowledge, and chart paths for future research. Our analysis of 99 articles identifies six major themes: (1) the role of trust, (2) understanding motivation, risk, and perception of cryptocurrencies, (3) cryptocurrency wallets, (4) engaging users with blockchain, (5) using blockchain for application-specific use cases, and (6) support tools for blockchain. We discuss the focus of the existing research body and juxtapose it to the changing landscape of emerging blockchain technologies to highlight future research avenues for HCI and interaction design. With this review, we identify key aspects where interaction design is critical for the adoption of blockchain systems. Doing so, we provide a starting point for new scholars and designers and help them position future contributions. 我们对 2014 年至 2021 年间发表的人机交互 (HCI) 领域的加密货币和区块链研究进行了系统的文献综述。我们的目标是提供该领域的概述，巩固现有知识，并为未来的研究绘制路径。我们对 99 篇文章的分析确定了六个主要主题：(1) 信任的作用，(2) 了解加密货币的动机、风险和看法，(3) 加密货币钱包，(4) 让用户参与区块链，(5) 将区块链用于特定应用程序的用例，以及 (6) 区块链的支持工具。我们讨论现有研究机构的重点，并将其与新兴区块链技术不断变化的格局并列，以突出人机交互和交互设计的未来研究途径。通过这次审查，我们确定了交互设计对于区块链系统采用至关重要的关键方面。这样做，我们为新学者和设计师提供了一个起点，并帮助他们定位未来的贡献。 本文对2014年至2021年间发表在人机交互领域的区块链和加密货币研究进行了系统综述，并提出了未来的研究方向。 Michael Fröhlich,Franz Waltenberger,Ludwig Trotter,Florian Alt,Albrecht Schmidt cs.HC

title: New Core-Guided and Hitting Set Algorithms for Multi-Objective Combinatorial Optimization
title_zh: 用于多目标组合优化的新核心引导和命中集算法
abstract: In the last decade, a plethora of algorithms for single-objective Boolean optimization has been proposed that rely on the iterative usage of a highly effective Propositional Satisfiability (SAT) solver. But the use of SAT solvers in Multi-Objective Combinatorial Optimization (MOCO) algorithms is still scarce. Due to this shortage of efficient tools for MOCO, many real-world applications formulated as multi-objective are simplified to single-objective, using either a linear combination or a lexicographic ordering of the objective functions to optimize. In this paper, we extend the state of the art of MOCO solvers with two novel unsatisfiability-based algorithms. The first is a core-guided MOCO solver. The second is a hitting set-based MOCO solver. Experimental results obtained in a wide range of benchmark instances show that our new unsatisfiability-based algorithms can outperform state-of-the-art SAT-based algorithms for MOCO.
summary: In the last decade, a plethora of algorithms for single-objective Boolean optimization has been proposed that rely on the iterative usage of a highly effective Propositional Satisfiability (SAT) solver. But the use of SAT solvers in Multi-Objective Combinatorial Optimization (MOCO) algorithms is still scarce. Due to this shortage of efficient tools for MOCO, many real-world applications formulated as multi-objective are simplified to single-objective, using either a linear combination or a lexicographic ordering of the objective functions to optimize. In this paper, we extend the state of the art of MOCO solvers with two novel unsatisfiability-based algorithms. The first is a core-guided MOCO solver. The second is a hitting set-based MOCO solver. Experimental results obtained in a wide range of benchmark instances show that our new unsatisfiability-based algorithms can outperform state-of-the-art SAT-based algorithms for MOCO.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，人们提出了大量的单目标布尔优化算法，这些算法依赖于高效命题可满足性 (SAT) 求解器的迭代使用。但 SAT 求解器在多目标组合优化 (MOCO) 算法中的使用仍然很少。由于 MOCO 缺乏有效的工具，许多现实世界中的多目标应用被简化为单目标，使用目标函数的线性组合或字典顺序进行优化。在本文中，我们通过两种新颖的基于不可满足性的算法扩展了 MOCO 求解器的最新技术。第一个是核心引导的 MOCO 求解器。第二个是基于命中集的 MOCO 求解器。在广泛的基准实例中获得的实验结果表明，我们新的基于不可满足性的算法可以优于 MOCO 的最先进的基于 SAT 的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于不可满足性的新算法（核心引导型和击中集型）以解决多目标组合优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MOCO算法缺乏高效工具，实际应用常将多目标问题简化为单目标优化，导致解的质量下降。
AI.method: 开发两种新型MOCO求解器：1) 核心引导算法通过分析SAT求解器返回的不可满足核心进行搜索；2) 击中集算法基于集合覆盖原理生成帕累托最优解。
AI.result: 在多种基准测试中，新算法的求解效率和解质量均优于现有SAT-based MOCO方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于不可满足性的新算法有效提升了MOCO求解能力，为复杂多目标优化问题提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Gwynn Sturdevant,A. Jonathan R. Godfrey,Andrew Gelman
title: Delivering data differently
title_zh: 以不同方式交付数据
abstract: Human-computer interaction relies on mouse/touchpad, keyboard, and screen, but tools have recently been developed that engage sound, smell, touch, muscular resistance, voice dialogue, balance, and multiple senses at once. How might these improvements impact upon the practice of statistics and data science? People with low vision may be better able to grasp and explore data. More generally, methods developed to enable this have the potential to allow sighted people to use more senses and become better analysts. We would like to adapt some of the wide range of available computer and sensory input/output technologies to transform data science workflows. Here is a vision of what this synthesis might accomplish.
summary: Human-computer interaction relies on mouse/touchpad, keyboard, and screen, but tools have recently been developed that engage sound, smell, touch, muscular resistance, voice dialogue, balance, and multiple senses at once. How might these improvements impact upon the practice of statistics and data science? People with low vision may be better able to grasp and explore data. More generally, methods developed to enable this have the potential to allow sighted people to use more senses and become better analysts. We would like to adapt some of the wide range of available computer and sensory input/output technologies to transform data science workflows. Here is a vision of what this synthesis might accomplish.
abstract_zh: 人机交互依赖于鼠标/触摸板、键盘和屏幕，但最近开发的工具可以同时参与声音、气味、触摸、肌肉阻力、语音对话、平衡和多种感官。这些改进将如何影响统计和数据科学的实践？视力低下的人可能能够更好地掌握和探索数据。更一般地说，为此开发的方法有可能让视力正常的人使用更多的感官并成为更好的分析师。我们希望采用一些广泛的可用计算机和传感输入/输出技术来改变数据科学工作流程。以下是这种综合可能实现的目标。

AI.tldr: 探索多感官技术如何改进数据科学工作流程，提升分析效率并帮助低视力人群
AI.motivation: 传统人机交互方式存在局限，新技术能利用多感官提升数据探索效率和分析能力，尤其帮助低视力人群
AI.method: 整合现有计算机和多感官输入/输出技术，优化数据科学工作流程
AI.result: 提出多感官技术整合的愿景，展示其在数据科学中的应用潜力
AI.conclusion: 多感官技术能革新数据科学工作流程，提升分析效率，并促进包容性数据科学实践

title: An active approach towards monitoring and enhancing drivers' capabilities -- the ADAM cogtec solution
title_zh: 监控和增强驾驶员能力的积极方法——ADAM cogtec 解决方案
abstract: Driver's cognitive ability at a given moment is the most elusive variable in assessing driver's safety. In contrast to other physical conditions, such as short-sight, or manual disability cognitive ability is transient. Safety regulations attempt to reduce risk related to driver's cognitive ability by removing risk factors such as alcohol or drug consumption, forbidding secondary tasks such as texting, and urging drivers to take breaks when feeling tired. However, one cannot regulate all factors that affect driver's cognition, furthermore, the driver's momentary cognitive ability in most cases is covert even to driver. Here, we introduce an active approach aiming at monitoring a specific cognitive process that is affected by all these forementioned causes and directly affects the driver's performance in the driving task. We lean on the scientific approach that was framed by Karl Friston (Friston, 2010). We developed a closed loop-method in which driver's ocular responses to visual probing were recorded. Machine-learning-algorithms were trained on ocular responses of vigilant condition and were able to detect decrease in capability due fatigue and substance abuse. Our results show that we manage to correctly classify subjects with impaired and unimpaired cognitive process regardless of the cause of impairment (77% accuracy, 5% false alarms).
summary: Driver's cognitive ability at a given moment is the most elusive variable in assessing driver's safety. In contrast to other physical conditions, such as short-sight, or manual disability cognitive ability is transient. Safety regulations attempt to reduce risk related to driver's cognitive ability by removing risk factors such as alcohol or drug consumption, forbidding secondary tasks such as texting, and urging drivers to take breaks when feeling tired. However, one cannot regulate all factors that affect driver's cognition, furthermore, the driver's momentary cognitive ability in most cases is covert even to driver. Here, we introduce an active approach aiming at monitoring a specific cognitive process that is affected by all these forementioned causes and directly affects the driver's performance in the driving task. We lean on the scientific approach that was framed by Karl Friston (Friston, 2010). We developed a closed loop-method in which driver's ocular responses to visual probing were recorded. Machine-learning-algorithms were trained on ocular responses of vigilant condition and were able to detect decrease in capability due fatigue and substance abuse. Our results show that we manage to correctly classify subjects with impaired and unimpaired cognitive process regardless of the cause of impairment (77% accuracy, 5% false alarms).
abstract_zh: 驾驶员在特定时刻的认知能力是评估驾驶员安全时最难以捉摸的变量。与其他身体状况相比，例如近视或手部残疾，认知能力是短暂的。安全法规试图通过消除饮酒或吸毒等危险因素、禁止发短信等次要任务以及敦促驾驶员在感到疲劳时休息来降低与驾驶员认知能力相关的风险。然而，我们无法调节所有影响驾驶员认知的因素，而且驾驶员的瞬时认知能力在大多数情况下甚至对驾驶员来说也是隐蔽的。在这里，我们介绍一种主动方法，旨在监控受所有上述原因影响并直接影响驾驶员在驾驶任务中表现的特定认知过程。我们依靠 Karl Friston 提出的科学方法（Friston，2010）。我们开发了一种闭环方法，记录驾驶员对视觉探测的眼睛反应。机器学习算法接受了警惕状态下眼部反应的训练，能够检测到由于疲劳和药物滥用而导致的能力下降。我们的结果表明，无论损伤原因如何，我们都能正确分类认知过程受损和未受损的受试者（准确率 77%，误报 5%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADAM cogtec解决方案，通过监测驾驶员的认知能力变化来提升驾驶安全性。
AI.motivation: 驾驶员的认知能力是影响安全的隐性因素，现有法规难以全面管控疲劳、药物等导致的认知下降问题。
AI.method: 基于Friston理论，采用闭环系统记录驾驶员对视觉刺激的瞳孔反应，并利用机器学习区分清醒与受损认知状态。
AI.result: 算法可准确分类77%的认知受损案例（无论由疲劳还是药物引起），误报率仅5%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效检测认知能力下降的多种诱因，为实时驾驶安全监控提供可行技术路径。
