search_text: An active approach towards monitoring and enhancing drivers' capabilities -- the ADAM cogtec solution 监控和增强驾驶员能力的积极方法——ADAM cogtec 解决方案 Driver's cognitive ability at a given moment is the most elusive variable in assessing driver's safety. In contrast to other physical conditions, such as short-sight, or manual disability cognitive ability is transient. Safety regulations attempt to reduce risk related to driver's cognitive ability by removing risk factors such as alcohol or drug consumption, forbidding secondary tasks such as texting, and urging drivers to take breaks when feeling tired. However, one cannot regulate all factors that affect driver's cognition, furthermore, the driver's momentary cognitive ability in most cases is covert even to driver. Here, we introduce an active approach aiming at monitoring a specific cognitive process that is affected by all these forementioned causes and directly affects the driver's performance in the driving task. We lean on the scientific approach that was framed by Karl Friston (Friston, 2010). We developed a closed loop-method in which driver's ocular responses to visual probing were recorded. Machine-learning-algorithms were trained on ocular responses of vigilant condition and were able to detect decrease in capability due fatigue and substance abuse. Our results show that we manage to correctly classify subjects with impaired and unimpaired cognitive process regardless of the cause of impairment (77% accuracy, 5% false alarms). 驾驶员在特定时刻的认知能力是评估驾驶员安全时最难以捉摸的变量。与其他身体状况相比，例如近视或手部残疾，认知能力是短暂的。安全法规试图通过消除饮酒或吸毒等危险因素、禁止发短信等次要任务以及敦促驾驶员在感到疲劳时休息来降低与驾驶员认知能力相关的风险。然而，我们无法调节所有影响驾驶员认知的因素，而且驾驶员的瞬时认知能力在大多数情况下甚至对驾驶员来说也是隐蔽的。在这里，我们介绍一种主动方法，旨在监控受所有上述原因影响并直接影响驾驶员在驾驶任务中表现的特定认知过程。我们依靠 Karl Friston 提出的科学方法（Friston，2010）。我们开发了一种闭环方法，记录驾驶员对视觉探测的眼睛反应。机器学习算法接受了警惕状态下眼部反应的训练，能够检测到由于疲劳和药物滥用而导致的能力下降。我们的结果表明，无论损伤原因如何，我们都能正确分类认知过程受损和未受损的受试者（准确率 77%，误报 5%）。 本文提出ADAM cogtec解决方案，通过监测驾驶员的认知能力变化来提升驾驶安全性。 Moti Salti,Yair Beery,Erez Aluf cs.HC,cs.CY

title: Exploiting Session Information in BERT-based Session-aware Sequential Recommendation
title_zh: 在基于 BERT 的会话感知顺序推荐中利用会话信息
comment: 6 pages, accepted in The 45th International ACM SIGIR Conference on Research and Development in Information Retrieval (SIGIR) 2022, short paper
comments: 6 pages, accepted in The 45th International ACM SIGIR Conference on Research and Development in Information Retrieval (SIGIR) 2022, short paper
abstract: In recommendation systems, utilizing the user interaction history as sequential information has resulted in great performance improvement. However, in many online services, user interactions are commonly grouped by sessions that presumably share preferences, which requires a different approach from ordinary sequence representation techniques. To this end, sequence representation models with a hierarchical structure or various viewpoints have been developed but with a rather complex network structure. In this paper, we propose three methods to improve recommendation performance by exploiting session information while minimizing additional parameters in a BERT-based sequential recommendation model: using session tokens, adding session segment embeddings, and a time-aware self-attention. We demonstrate the feasibility of the proposed methods through experiments on widely used recommendation datasets.
summary: In recommendation systems, utilizing the user interaction history as sequential information has resulted in great performance improvement. However, in many online services, user interactions are commonly grouped by sessions that presumably share preferences, which requires a different approach from ordinary sequence representation techniques. To this end, sequence representation models with a hierarchical structure or various viewpoints have been developed but with a rather complex network structure. In this paper, we propose three methods to improve recommendation performance by exploiting session information while minimizing additional parameters in a BERT-based sequential recommendation model: using session tokens, adding session segment embeddings, and a time-aware self-attention. We demonstrate the feasibility of the proposed methods through experiments on widely used recommendation datasets.
abstract_zh: 在推荐系统中，利用用户交互历史作为顺序信息已经带来了巨大的性能提升。然而，在许多在线服务中，用户交互通常按可能共享偏好的会话进行分组，这需要与普通序列表示技术不同的方法。为此，已经开发了具有层次结构或各种观点的序列表示模型，但具有相当复杂的网络结构。在本文中，我们提出了三种方法来通过利用会话信息来提高推荐性能，同时最大限度地减少基于 BERT 的顺序推荐模型中的附加参数：使用会话令牌、添加会话段嵌入和时间感知自注意力。我们通过在广泛使用的推荐数据集上的实验证明了所提出方法的可行性。

AI.tldr: 提出三种方法，在基于BERT的推荐模型中利用会话信息以提升性能并减少参数。
AI.motivation: 传统方法处理会话数据时结构复杂，需更高效利用会话信息以提升推荐效果。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：会话标记、会话分段嵌入及时间感知自注意力机制，以有效整合会话信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，方法在常用数据集上有效提升了推荐性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保持模型简洁性的同时有效利用会话信息，为实际推荐系统提供可行方案。

authors_text: Verica Lazova,Vladimir Guzov,Kyle Olszewski,Sergey Tulyakov,Gerard Pons-Moll
title: Control-NeRF: Editable Feature Volumes for Scene Rendering and Manipulation
title_zh: Control-NeRF：用于场景渲染和操作的可编辑特征体积
abstract: We present a novel method for performing flexible, 3D-aware image content manipulation while enabling high-quality novel view synthesis. While NeRF-based approaches are effective for novel view synthesis, such models memorize the radiance for every point in a scene within a neural network. Since these models are scene-specific and lack a 3D scene representation, classical editing such as shape manipulation, or combining scenes is not possible. Hence, editing and combining NeRF-based scenes has not been demonstrated. With the aim of obtaining interpretable and controllable scene representations, our model couples learnt scene-specific feature volumes with a scene agnostic neural rendering network. With this hybrid representation, we decouple neural rendering from scene-specific geometry and appearance. We can generalize to novel scenes by optimizing only the scene-specific 3D feature representation, while keeping the parameters of the rendering network fixed. The rendering function learnt during the initial training stage can thus be easily applied to new scenes, making our approach more flexible. More importantly, since the feature volumes are independent of the rendering model, we can manipulate and combine scenes by editing their corresponding feature volumes. The edited volume can then be plugged into the rendering model to synthesize high-quality novel views. We demonstrate various scene manipulations, including mixing scenes, deforming objects and inserting objects into scenes, while still producing photo-realistic results.
summary: We present a novel method for performing flexible, 3D-aware image content manipulation while enabling high-quality novel view synthesis. While NeRF-based approaches are effective for novel view synthesis, such models memorize the radiance for every point in a scene within a neural network. Since these models are scene-specific and lack a 3D scene representation, classical editing such as shape manipulation, or combining scenes is not possible. Hence, editing and combining NeRF-based scenes has not been demonstrated. With the aim of obtaining interpretable and controllable scene representations, our model couples learnt scene-specific feature volumes with a scene agnostic neural rendering network. With this hybrid representation, we decouple neural rendering from scene-specific geometry and appearance. We can generalize to novel scenes by optimizing only the scene-specific 3D feature representation, while keeping the parameters of the rendering network fixed. The rendering function learnt during the initial training stage can thus be easily applied to new scenes, making our approach more flexible. More importantly, since the feature volumes are independent of the rendering model, we can manipulate and combine scenes by editing their corresponding feature volumes. The edited volume can then be plugged into the rendering model to synthesize high-quality novel views. We demonstrate various scene manipulations, including mixing scenes, deforming objects and inserting objects into scenes, while still producing photo-realistic results.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，用于执行灵活的、3D 感知的图像内容操作，同时实现高质量的新颖视图合成。虽然基于 NeRF 的方法对于新颖的视图合成非常有效，但此类模型会记住神经网络中场景中每个点的辐射率。由于这些模型是特定于场景的并且缺乏 3D 场景表示，因此无法进行形状操作或组合场景等经典编辑。因此，编辑和组合基于 NeRF 的场景尚未得到证实。为了获得可解释和可控的场景表示，我们的模型将学习特定于场景的特征量与场景无关的神经渲染网络结合起来。通过这种混合表示，我们将神经渲染与特定于场景的几何形状和外观分离。我们可以通过仅优化特定于场景的 3D 特征表示，同时保持渲染网络的参数固定来推广到新场景。因此，在初始训练阶段学习的渲染函数可以轻松应用于新场景，使我们的方法更加灵活。更重要的是，由于特征体独立于渲染模型，我们可以通过编辑相应的特征体来操纵和组合场景。然后可以将编辑后的体积插入渲染模型以合成高质量的新颖视图。我们演示了各种场景操作，包括混合场景、使对象变形以及将对象插入到场景中，同时仍然产生逼真的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Control-NeRF方法，通过可编辑的特征体积实现场景渲染与编辑，支持高质量的新视角合成。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF模型无法直接进行场景编辑或组合，因其缺乏可解释的3D场景表示且模型参数与场景强耦合。
AI.method: 将场景特定的特征体积与场景无关的神经渲染网络结合，解耦几何与外观信息，仅优化特征体积即可适配新场景。
AI.result: 实现场景混合、物体变形、插入等操作，生成具有照片级真实感的新型视角图像。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分离特征体积与渲染模块，为场景编辑和新视角合成提供了灵活可控的解决方案。

While NeRF-based approaches are effective for novel view synthesis, such models memorize the radiance for every point in a scene within a neural network. Since these models are scene-specific and lack a 3D scene representation, classical editing such as shape manipulation, or combining scenes is not possible. Hence, editing and combining NeRF-based scenes has not been demonstrated. With the aim of obtaining interpretable and controllable scene representations, our model couples learnt scene-specific feature volumes with a scene agnostic neural rendering network. With this hybrid representation, we decouple neural rendering from scene-specific geometry and appearance. More importantly, since the feature volumes are independent of the rendering model, we can manipulate and combine scenes by editing their corresponding feature volumes. The edited volume can then be plugged into the rendering model to synthesize high-quality novel views. title: MOLE: Digging Tunnels Through Multimodal Multi-Objective Landscapes
title_zh: MOLE：通过多模式多目标景观挖掘隧道
comment: This version has been accepted for publication at the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO '22), July 9-13, 2022, Boston, USA
comments: This version has been accepted for publication at the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO '22), July 9-13, 2022, Boston, USA
abstract: Recent advances in the visualization of continuous multimodal multi-objective optimization (MMMOO) landscapes brought a new perspective to their search dynamics. Locally efficient (LE) sets, often considered as traps for local search, are rarely isolated in the decision space. Rather, intersections by superposing attraction basins lead to further solution sets that at least partially contain better solutions. The Multi-Objective Gradient Sliding Algorithm (MOGSA) is an algorithmic concept developed to exploit these superpositions. While it has promising performance on many MMMOO problems with linear LE sets, closer analysis of MOGSA revealed that it does not sufficiently generalize to a wider set of test problems. Based on a detailed analysis of shortcomings of MOGSA, we propose a new algorithm, the Multi-Objective Landscape Explorer (MOLE). It is able to efficiently model and exploit LE sets in MMMOO problems. An implementation of MOLE is presented for the bi-objective case, and the practicality of the approach is shown in a benchmarking experiment on the Bi-Objective BBOB testbed.
summary: Recent advances in the visualization of continuous multimodal multi-objective optimization (MMMOO) landscapes brought a new perspective to their search dynamics. Locally efficient (LE) sets, often considered as traps for local search, are rarely isolated in the decision space. Rather, intersections by superposing attraction basins lead to further solution sets that at least partially contain better solutions. The Multi-Objective Gradient Sliding Algorithm (MOGSA) is an algorithmic concept developed to exploit these superpositions. While it has promising performance on many MMMOO problems with linear LE sets, closer analysis of MOGSA revealed that it does not sufficiently generalize to a wider set of test problems. Based on a detailed analysis of shortcomings of MOGSA, we propose a new algorithm, the Multi-Objective Landscape Explorer (MOLE). It is able to efficiently model and exploit LE sets in MMMOO problems. An implementation of MOLE is presented for the bi-objective case, and the practicality of the approach is shown in a benchmarking experiment on the Bi-Objective BBOB testbed.
abstract_zh: 连续多模式多目标优化（MMMOO）景观可视化的最新进展为其搜索动态带来了新的视角。局部有效（LE）集通常被认为是局部搜索的陷阱，很少在决策空间中被隔离。相反，通过叠加吸引力盆地的交叉点会产生至少部分包含更好解决方案的进一步解决方案集。多目标梯度滑动算法（MOGSA）是为利用这些叠加而开发的算法概念。虽然它在使用线性 LE 集的许多 MMMOO 问题上具有良好的性能，但对 MOGSA 的进一步分析表明，它并不能充分推广到更广泛的测试问题集。基于对MOGSA缺点的详细分析，我们提出了一种新算法——多目标景观探索器（MOLE）。它能够有效地建模和利用 MMMOO 问题中的 LE 集。针对双目标情况提出了 MOLE 的实现，并且该方法的实用性在双目标 BBOB 测试台上的基准测试实验中得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MOLE的新算法，用于解决多模态多目标优化问题中的局部有效集（LE）利用难题，改进现有MOGSA算法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有MOGSA算法在处理多模态多目标优化问题时，对复杂LE集结构的泛化能力不足，难以有效挖掘交叉吸引子盆地中的更优解。
AI.method: 基于对MOGSA局限性的分析，设计MOLE算法以高效建模和利用LE集结构，重点针对双目标场景实现并验证其有效性。
AI.result: 在双目标BBOB测试集上的实验表明，MOLE算法能够有效处理复杂LE集结构，展现出优于现有方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: MOLE算法通过挖掘多模态景观中交叉吸引子的潜力，为解决更广泛的多目标优化问题提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更多目标场景。

search_text: MOLE: Digging Tunnels Through Multimodal Multi-Objective Landscapes MOLE：通过多模式多目标景观挖掘隧道 Recent advances in the visualization of continuous multimodal multi-objective optimization (MMMOO) landscapes brought a new perspective to their search dynamics. Locally efficient (LE) sets, often considered as traps for local search, are rarely isolated in the decision space. Rather, intersections by superposing attraction basins lead to further solution sets that at least partially contain better solutions. The Multi-Objective Gradient Sliding Algorithm (MOGSA) is an algorithmic concept developed to exploit these superpositions. While it has promising performance on many MMMOO problems with linear LE sets, closer analysis of MOGSA revealed that it does not sufficiently generalize to a wider set of test problems. Based on a detailed analysis of shortcomings of MOGSA, we propose a new algorithm, the Multi-Objective Landscape Explorer (MOLE). It is able to efficiently model and exploit LE sets in MMMOO problems. An implementation of MOLE is presented for the bi-objective case, and the practicality of the approach is shown in a benchmarking experiment on the Bi-Objective BBOB testbed. 连续多模式多目标优化（MMMOO）景观可视化的最新进展为其搜索动态带来了新的视角。局部有效（LE）集通常被认为是局部搜索的陷阱，很少在决策空间中被隔离。相反，通过叠加吸引力盆地的交叉点会产生至少部分包含更好解决方案的进一步解决方案集。多目标梯度滑动算法（MOGSA）是为利用这些叠加而开发的算法概念。虽然它在使用线性 LE 集的许多 MMMOO 问题上具有良好的性能，但对 MOGSA 的进一步分析表明，它并不能充分推广到更广泛的测试问题集。基于对MOGSA缺点的详细分析，我们提出了一种新算法——多目标景观探索器（MOLE）。它能够有效地建模和利用 MMMOO 问题中的 LE 集。针对双目标情况提出了 MOLE 的实现，并且该方法的实用性在双目标 BBOB 测试台上的基准测试实验中得到了证明。 本文提出了一种名为MOLE的新算法，用于解决多模态多目标优化问题中的局部有效集（LE）利用难题，改进现有MOGSA算法的不足。 Lennart Schäpermeier,Christian Grimme,Pascal Kerschke math.OC,cs.NE

authors_text: Jyoti Kini,Fahad Shahbaz Khan,Salman Khan,Mubarak Shah
title: Self-Supervised Video Object Segmentation via Cutout Prediction and Tagging
title_zh: 通过剪切预测和标记进行自监督视频对象分割
abstract: We propose a novel self-supervised Video Object Segmentation (VOS) approach that strives to achieve better object-background discriminability for accurate object segmentation. Distinct from previous self-supervised VOS methods, our approach is based on a discriminative learning loss formulation that takes into account both object and background information to ensure object-background discriminability, rather than using only object appearance. The discriminative learning loss comprises cutout-based reconstruction (cutout region represents part of a frame, whose pixels are replaced with some constant values) and tag prediction loss terms. The cutout-based reconstruction term utilizes a simple cutout scheme to learn the pixel-wise correspondence between the current and previous frames in order to reconstruct the original current frame with added cutout region in it. The introduced cutout patch guides the model to focus as much on the significant features of the object of interest as the less significant ones, thereby implicitly equipping the model to address occlusion-based scenarios. Next, the tag prediction term encourages object-background separability by grouping tags of all pixels in the cutout region that are similar, while separating them from the tags of the rest of the reconstructed frame pixels. Additionally, we introduce a zoom-in scheme that addresses the problem of small object segmentation by capturing fine structural information at multiple scales. Our proposed approach, termed CT-VOS, achieves state-of-the-art results on two challenging benchmarks: DAVIS-2017 and Youtube-VOS. A detailed ablation showcases the importance of the proposed loss formulation to effectively capture object-background discriminability and the impact of our zoom-in scheme to accurately segment small-sized objects.
summary: We propose a novel self-supervised Video Object Segmentation (VOS) approach that strives to achieve better object-background discriminability for accurate object segmentation. Distinct from previous self-supervised VOS methods, our approach is based on a discriminative learning loss formulation that takes into account both object and background information to ensure object-background discriminability, rather than using only object appearance. The discriminative learning loss comprises cutout-based reconstruction (cutout region represents part of a frame, whose pixels are replaced with some constant values) and tag prediction loss terms. The cutout-based reconstruction term utilizes a simple cutout scheme to learn the pixel-wise correspondence between the current and previous frames in order to reconstruct the original current frame with added cutout region in it. The introduced cutout patch guides the model to focus as much on the significant features of the object of interest as the less significant ones, thereby implicitly equipping the model to address occlusion-based scenarios. Next, the tag prediction term encourages object-background separability by grouping tags of all pixels in the cutout region that are similar, while separating them from the tags of the rest of the reconstructed frame pixels. Additionally, we introduce a zoom-in scheme that addresses the problem of small object segmentation by capturing fine structural information at multiple scales. Our proposed approach, termed CT-VOS, achieves state-of-the-art results on two challenging benchmarks: DAVIS-2017 and Youtube-VOS. A detailed ablation showcases the importance of the proposed loss formulation to effectively capture object-background discriminability and the impact of our zoom-in scheme to accurately segment small-sized objects.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的自监督视频对象分割（VOS）方法，该方法致力于实现更好的对象背景辨别力，以实现准确的对象分割。与之前的自监督 VOS 方法不同，我们的方法基于判别性学习损失公式，该公式考虑了对象和背景信息以确保对象与背景的可辨别性，而不是仅使用对象外观。判别学习损失包括基于剪切的重建（剪切区域代表帧的一部分，其像素被一些常数值替换）和标签预测损失项。基于剪切的重建项利用简单的剪切方案来学习当前帧和先前帧之间的逐像素对应关系，以便重建其中添加了剪切区域的原始当前帧。引入的剪切补丁引导模型尽可能多地关注感兴趣对象的重要特征和不太重要的特征，从而隐式地使模型能够解决基于遮挡的场景。接下来，标签预测项通过对剪切区域中相似的所有像素的标签进行分组，同时将它们与重构帧像素的其余部分的标签分开，来鼓励对象背景可分离性。此外，我们引入了一种放大方案，通过捕获多个尺度的精细结构信息来解决小对象分割问题。我们提出的方法称为 CT-VOS，在两个具有挑战性的基准测试上取得了最先进的结果：DAVIS-2017 和 Youtube-VOS。详细的消融展示了所提出的损失公式对于有效捕获对象背景可辨别性的重要性以及我们的放大方案对准确分割小尺寸对象的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督视频目标分割方法CT-VOS，通过割出区域重建和标签预测提升目标与背景的区分能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督视频目标分割方法仅依赖目标外观信息，难以有效区分目标与背景，尤其在遮挡场景下表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计包含割出区域重建损失和标签预测损失的判别学习损失函数，结合多尺度缩放方案捕捉细粒度特征。
AI.result: 在DAVIS-2017和YouTube-VOS基准测试中取得最先进的分割效果，消融实验证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化目标与背景信息，所提方法显著提升了视频目标分割的判别能力与小目标分割精度。

authors_text: Sarthak Pati,Ujjwal Baid,Brandon Edwards,Micah Sheller,Shih-Han Wang,G Anthony Reina,Patrick Foley,Alexey Gruzdev,Deepthi Karkada,Christos Davatzikos,Chiharu Sako,Satyam Ghodasara,Michel Bilello,Suyash Mohan,Philipp Vollmuth,Gianluca Brugnara,Chandrakanth J Preetha,Felix Sahm,Klaus Maier-Hein,Maximilian Zenk,Martin Bendszus,Wolfgang Wick,Evan Calabrese,Jeffrey Rudie,Javier Villanueva-Meyer, et al. title: Federated Learning Enables Big Data for Rare Cancer Boundary Detection
title_zh: 联合学习使大数据能够用于罕见癌症边界检测
comment: federated learning, deep learning, convolutional neural network, segmentation, brain tumor, glioma, glioblastoma, FeTS, BraTS
comments: federated learning, deep learning, convolutional neural network, segmentation, brain tumor, glioma, glioblastoma, FeTS, BraTS
abstract: Although machine learning (ML) has shown promise in numerous domains, there are concerns about generalizability to out-of-sample data. This is currently addressed by centrally sharing ample, and importantly diverse, data from multiple sites. However, such centralization is challenging to scale (or even not feasible) due to various limitations. Federated ML (FL) provides an alternative to train accurate and generalizable ML models, by only sharing numerical model updates. Here we present findings from the largest FL study to-date, involving data from 71 healthcare institutions across 6 continents, to generate an automatic tumor boundary detector for the rare disease of glioblastoma, utilizing the largest dataset of such patients ever used in the literature (25,256 MRI scans from 6,314 patients). We demonstrate a 33% improvement over a publicly trained model to delineate the surgically targetable tumor, and 23% improvement over the tumor's entire extent. We anticipate our study to: 1) enable more studies in healthcare informed by large and diverse data, ensuring meaningful results for rare diseases and underrepresented populations, 2) facilitate further quantitative analyses for glioblastoma via performance optimization of our consensus model for eventual public release, and 3) demonstrate the effectiveness of FL at such scale and task complexity as a paradigm shift for multi-site collaborations, alleviating the need for data sharing.
summary: Although machine learning (ML) has shown promise in numerous domains, there are concerns about generalizability to out-of-sample data. This is currently addressed by centrally sharing ample, and importantly diverse, data from multiple sites. However, such centralization is challenging to scale (or even not feasible) due to various limitations. Federated ML (FL) provides an alternative to train accurate and generalizable ML models, by only sharing numerical model updates. Here we present findings from the largest FL study to-date, involving data from 71 healthcare institutions across 6 continents, to generate an automatic tumor boundary detector for the rare disease of glioblastoma, utilizing the largest dataset of such patients ever used in the literature (25,256 MRI scans from 6,314 patients). We demonstrate a 33% improvement over a publicly trained model to delineate the surgically targetable tumor, and 23% improvement over the tumor's entire extent. We anticipate our study to: 1) enable more studies in healthcare informed by large and diverse data, ensuring meaningful results for rare diseases and underrepresented populations, 2) facilitate further quantitative analyses for glioblastoma via performance optimization of our consensus model for eventual public release, and 3) demonstrate the effectiveness of FL at such scale and task complexity as a paradigm shift for multi-site collaborations, alleviating the need for data sharing.
abstract_zh: 尽管机器学习 (ML) 在许多领域都显示出了前景，但人们仍担心样本外数据的泛化性。目前可以通过集中共享来自多个站点的充足且重要的多样化数据来解决这个问题。然而，由于各种限制，这种集中化很难扩展（甚至不可行）。联合 ML (FL) 提供了一种通过仅共享数值模型更新来训练准确且可泛化的 ML 模型的替代方案。在这里，我们展示了迄今为止最大的 FL 研究的结果，涉及来自六大洲 71 家医疗机构的数据，利用文献中有史以来使用过的此类患者的最大数据集（来自 6,314 名患者的 25,256 幅 MRI 扫描），为胶质母细胞瘤这种罕见疾病生成自动肿瘤边界检测器。我们证明，与公开训练的模型相比，在描绘手术目标肿瘤方面，性能提高了 33%，在肿瘤整体范围方面，性能提高了 23%。我们预计我们的研究将：1）通过大量且多样化的数据实现更多医疗保健研究，确保对罕见疾病和代表性不足的人群产生有意义的结果，2）通过对最终公开发布的共识模型进行性能优化，促进对胶质母细胞瘤的进一步定量分析，3）证明 FL 在如此规模和任务复杂性上的有效性，作为多站点协作的范式转变，从而减轻对数据共享的需求。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用联邦学习框架，通过多医疗机构协作数据，开发自动检测罕见癌症（胶质母细胞瘤）肿瘤边界的模型。
AI.motivation: 传统集中式数据共享面临隐私、规模及可行性挑战，而联邦学习可在不共享原始数据的前提下实现模型泛化，尤其适用于罕见病等数据稀缺场景。
AI.method: 基于71家跨洲医疗机构的25,256例MRI扫描数据，采用联邦学习训练肿瘤边界检测模型，通过模型参数更新聚合实现多站点协作。
AI.result: 模型在手术可靶向肿瘤边界检测上较公开模型提升33%，在肿瘤全范围检测上提升23%，验证了联邦学习在复杂任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习为多中心医疗研究提供新范式，可推动罕见病研究、优化模型公开应用，并减少数据共享壁垒。

search_text: Federated Learning Enables Big Data for Rare Cancer Boundary Detection 联合学习使大数据能够用于罕见癌症边界检测 Although machine learning (ML) has shown promise in numerous domains, there are concerns about generalizability to out-of-sample data. This is currently addressed by centrally sharing ample, and importantly diverse, data from multiple sites. However, such centralization is challenging to scale (or even not feasible) due to various limitations. Federated ML (FL) provides an alternative to train accurate and generalizable ML models, by only sharing numerical model updates. Here we present findings from the largest FL study to-date, involving data from 71 healthcare institutions across 6 continents, to generate an automatic tumor boundary detector for the rare disease of glioblastoma, utilizing the largest dataset of such patients ever used in the literature (25,256 MRI scans from 6,314 patients). We demonstrate a 33% improvement over a publicly trained model to delineate the surgically targetable tumor, and 23% improvement over the tumor's entire extent. We anticipate our study to: 1) enable more studies in healthcare informed by large and diverse data, ensuring meaningful results for rare diseases and underrepresented populations, 2) facilitate further quantitative analyses for glioblastoma via performance optimization of our consensus model for eventual public release, and 3) demonstrate the effectiveness of FL at such scale and task complexity as a paradigm shift for multi-site collaborations, alleviating the need for data sharing. 尽管机器学习 (ML) 在许多领域都显示出了前景，但人们仍担心样本外数据的泛化性。目前可以通过集中共享来自多个站点的充足且重要的多样化数据来解决这个问题。然而，由于各种限制，这种集中化很难扩展（甚至不可行）。联合 ML (FL) 提供了一种通过仅共享数值模型更新来训练准确且可泛化的 ML 模型的替代方案。在这里，我们展示了迄今为止最大的 FL 研究的结果，涉及来自六大洲 71 家医疗机构的数据，利用文献中有史以来使用过的此类患者的最大数据集（来自 6,314 名患者的 25,256 幅 MRI 扫描），为胶质母细胞瘤这种罕见疾病生成自动肿瘤边界检测器。我们证明，与公开训练的模型相比，在描绘手术目标肿瘤方面，性能提高了 33%，在肿瘤整体范围方面，性能提高了 23%。我们预计我们的研究将：1）通过大量且多样化的数据实现更多医疗保健研究，确保对罕见疾病和代表性不足的人群产生有意义的结果，2）通过对最终公开发布的共识模型进行性能优化，促进对胶质母细胞瘤的进一步定量分析，3）证明 FL 在如此规模和任务复杂性上的有效性，作为多站点协作的范式转变，从而减轻对数据共享的需求。 本研究利用联邦学习框架，通过多医疗机构协作数据，开发自动检测罕见癌症（胶质母细胞瘤）肿瘤边界的模型。 Sarthak Pati,Ujjwal Baid,Brandon Edwards,Micah Sheller,Shih-Han Wang,G Anthony Reina,Patrick Foley,Alexey Gruzdev,Deepthi Karkada,Christos Davatzikos,Chiharu Sako,Satyam Ghodasara,Michel Bilello,Suyash Mohan,Philipp Vollmuth,Gianluca Brugnara,Chandrakanth J Preetha,Felix Sahm,Klaus Maier-Hein,Maximilian Zenk,Martin Bendszus,Wolfgang Wick,Evan Calabrese,Jeffrey Rudie,Javier Villanueva-Meyer, et al. (254 additional authors not shown) cs.LG,eess.IV

title: Memory Bounds for Continual Learning
title_zh: 持续学习的记忆界限
abstract: Continual learning, or lifelong learning, is a formidable current challenge to machine learning. It requires the learner to solve a sequence of $k$ different learning tasks, one after the other, while retaining its aptitude for earlier tasks; the continual learner should scale better than the obvious solution of developing and maintaining a separate learner for each of the $k$ tasks. We embark on a complexity-theoretic study of continual learning in the PAC framework. We make novel uses of communication complexity to establish that any continual learner, even an improper one, needs memory that grows linearly with $k$, strongly suggesting that the problem is intractable. When logarithmically many passes over the learning tasks are allowed, we provide an algorithm based on multiplicative weights update whose memory requirement scales well; we also establish that improper learning is necessary for such performance. We conjecture that these results may lead to new promising approaches to continual learning.
summary: Continual learning, or lifelong learning, is a formidable current challenge to machine learning. It requires the learner to solve a sequence of $k$ different learning tasks, one after the other, while retaining its aptitude for earlier tasks; the continual learner should scale better than the obvious solution of developing and maintaining a separate learner for each of the $k$ tasks. We embark on a complexity-theoretic study of continual learning in the PAC framework. We make novel uses of communication complexity to establish that any continual learner, even an improper one, needs memory that grows linearly with $k$, strongly suggesting that the problem is intractable. When logarithmically many passes over the learning tasks are allowed, we provide an algorithm based on multiplicative weights update whose memory requirement scales well; we also establish that improper learning is necessary for such performance. We conjecture that these results may lead to new promising approaches to continual learning.
abstract_zh: 持续学习或终身学习是当前机器学习面临的巨大挑战。它要求学习者一个接一个地解决一系列 $k$ 个不同的学习任务，同时保留其对早期任务的能力；持续学习器应该比为每个 $k$ 任务开发和维护单独的学习器的显而易见的解决方案更好地扩展。我们开始对 PAC 框架中的持续学习进行复杂性理论研究。我们对通信复杂性进行了新颖的利用，以确定任何持续学习者，即使是不恰当的学习者，都需要与 $k$ 线性增长的记忆，这强烈表明这个问题是棘手的。当允许对数多次传递学习任务时，我们提供了一种基于乘法权重更新的算法，其内存需求可以很好地扩展；我们还确定，不适当的学习对于这种表现是必要的。我们推测这些结果可能会带来新的有希望的持续学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算复杂性理论研究持续学习的内存需求，证明了内存需随任务数量线性增长，并提出了一种允许多次遍历任务的算法。
AI.motivation: 持续学习要求模型在学习新任务时保留旧任务知识，但现有方法需为每个任务单独维护模型，存在资源浪费问题。本文旨在通过理论分析明确持续学习的内存复杂度。
AI.method: 采用通信复杂性理论证明内存下界，并设计基于乘法权重更新的算法，在允许多次遍历任务时实现更优内存效率。
AI.result: 证明任何持续学习器内存需求必须随任务数k线性增长，但允许多次遍历时提出的算法可实现良好内存扩展性，且必须使用非正规学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明持续学习在内存需求上存在固有困难，但通过多次遍历和非正规学习方法可获得可行方案，为后续研究提供理论指导。

authors_text: Jiawei Meng,Ankita Humne,Richard Bucknall,Brendan Englot,Yuanchang Liu
title: A Fully-autonomous Framework of Unmanned Surface Vehicles in Maritime Environments using Gaussian Process Motion Planning
title_zh: 使用高斯过程运动规划的海洋环境中无人水面车辆的完全自主框架
abstract: Unmanned surface vehicles (USVs) are of increasing importance to a growing number of sectors in the maritime industry, including offshore exploration, marine transportation and defence operations. A major factor in the growth in use and deployment of USVs is the increased operational flexibility that is offered through use of autonomous navigation systems that generate optimised trajectories. Unlike path planning in terrestrial environments, planning in the maritime environment is more demanding as there is need to assure mitigating action is taken against the significant, random and often unpredictable environmental influences from winds and ocean currents. With the focus of these necessary requirements as the main basis of motivation, this paper proposes a novel motion planner, denoted as GPMP2*, extending the application scope of the fundamental GP-based motion planner, GPMP2, into complex maritime environments. An interpolation strategy based on Monte-Carlo stochasticity has been innovatively added to GPMP2* to produce a new algorithm named GPMP2* with Monte-Carlo stochasticity (MC-GPMP2*), which can increase the diversity of the paths generated. In parallel with algorithm design, a ROS based fully-autonomous framework for an advanced unmanned surface vehicle, the WAM-V 20 USV, has been proposed. The practicability of the proposed motion planner as well as the fully-autonomous framework have been functionally validated in a simulated inspection missions for an offshore wind farm in ROS.
summary: Unmanned surface vehicles (USVs) are of increasing importance to a growing number of sectors in the maritime industry, including offshore exploration, marine transportation and defence operations. A major factor in the growth in use and deployment of USVs is the increased operational flexibility that is offered through use of autonomous navigation systems that generate optimised trajectories. Unlike path planning in terrestrial environments, planning in the maritime environment is more demanding as there is need to assure mitigating action is taken against the significant, random and often unpredictable environmental influences from winds and ocean currents. With the focus of these necessary requirements as the main basis of motivation, this paper proposes a novel motion planner, denoted as GPMP2*, extending the application scope of the fundamental GP-based motion planner, GPMP2, into complex maritime environments. An interpolation strategy based on Monte-Carlo stochasticity has been innovatively added to GPMP2* to produce a new algorithm named GPMP2* with Monte-Carlo stochasticity (MC-GPMP2*), which can increase the diversity of the paths generated. In parallel with algorithm design, a ROS based fully-autonomous framework for an advanced unmanned surface vehicle, the WAM-V 20 USV, has been proposed. The practicability of the proposed motion planner as well as the fully-autonomous framework have been functionally validated in a simulated inspection missions for an offshore wind farm in ROS.
abstract_zh: 无人水面车辆 (USV) 对于越来越多的海事行业，包括海上勘探、海上运输和国防行动，变得越来越重要。 USV 使用和部署增长的一个主要因素是通过使用生成优化轨迹的自主导航系统来提高操作灵活性。与陆地环境中的路径规划不同，海洋环境中的规划要求更高，因为需要确保针对风和洋流带来的重大、随机且通常不可预测的环境影响采取缓解措施。以这些必要的需求为主要动机，本文提出了一种新颖的运动规划器，记为 GPMP2*，将基于 GP 的基本运动规划器 GPMP2 的应用范围扩展到复杂的海洋环境。 GPMP2* 创新性地添加了基于蒙特卡罗随机性的插值策略，产生了一种新的蒙特卡罗随机性 GPMP2* 算法（MC-GPMP2*），可以增加生成路径的多样性。在算法设计的同时，还提出了一种基于 ROS 的先进无人水面车辆 WAM-V 20 USV 的全自动框架。所提出的运动规划器以及完全自主框架的实用性已在 ROS 海上风电场的模拟检查任务中得到了功能验证。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于高斯过程运动规划的全新自主框架，用于海上无人水面船的路径规划，以应对复杂海洋环境的挑战。
AI.motivation: 海上环境中的不可预测因素（如风浪、洋流）使得传统路径规划难以应对，需提升USV自主导航的灵活性和适应性。
AI.method: 提出改进的GPMP2*算法，结合蒙特卡洛随机性策略生成多样化路径，并构建基于ROS的USV自主框架。
AI.result: 通过ROS模拟验证了MC-GPMP2*算法和自主框架在海上风电场巡检任务中的可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架和算法有效提升了USV在复杂海洋环境中的自主路径规划能力，为海上应用提供了可靠解决方案。

tldr: 提出一种基于高斯过程运动规划的全新自主框架，用于海上无人水面船的路径规划，以应对复杂海洋环境的挑战。
motivation: 海上环境中的不可预测因素（如风浪、洋流）使得传统路径规划难以应对，需提升USV自主导航的灵活性和适应性。
method: 提出改进的GPMP2*算法，结合蒙特卡洛随机性策略生成多样化路径，并构建基于ROS的USV自主框架。
result: 通过ROS模拟验证了MC-GPMP2*算法和自主框架在海上风电场巡检任务中的可行性与有效性。
conclusion: 该框架和算法有效提升了USV在复杂海洋环境中的自主路径规划能力，为海上应用提供了可靠解决方案。
search_text: A Fully-autonomous Framework of Unmanned Surface Vehicles in Maritime Environments using Gaussian Process Motion Planning 使用高斯过程运动规划的海洋环境中无人水面车辆的完全自主框架 Unmanned surface vehicles (USVs) are of increasing importance to a growing number of sectors in the maritime industry, including offshore exploration, marine transportation and defence operations. A major factor in the growth in use and deployment of USVs is the increased operational flexibility that is offered through use of autonomous navigation systems that generate optimised trajectories. Unlike path planning in terrestrial environments, planning in the maritime environment is more demanding as there is need to assure mitigating action is taken against the significant, random and often unpredictable environmental influences from winds and ocean currents. With the focus of these necessary requirements as the main basis of motivation, this paper proposes a novel motion planner, denoted as GPMP2*, extending the application scope of the fundamental GP-based motion planner, GPMP2, into complex maritime environments. An interpolation strategy based on Monte-Carlo stochasticity has been innovatively added to GPMP2* to produce a new algorithm named GPMP2* with Monte-Carlo stochasticity (MC-GPMP2*), which can increase the diversity of the paths generated. In parallel with algorithm design, a ROS based fully-autonomous framework for an advanced unmanned surface vehicle, the WAM-V 20 USV, has been proposed. The practicability of the proposed motion planner as well as the fully-autonomous framework have been functionally validated in a simulated inspection missions for an offshore wind farm in ROS. 无人水面车辆 (USV) 对于越来越多的海事行业，包括海上勘探、海上运输和国防行动，变得越来越重要。 USV 使用和部署增长的一个主要因素是通过使用生成优化轨迹的自主导航系统来提高操作灵活性。与陆地环境中的路径规划不同，海洋环境中的规划要求更高，因为需要确保针对风和洋流带来的重大、随机且通常不可预测的环境影响采取缓解措施。以这些必要的需求为主要动机，本文提出了一种新颖的运动规划器，记为 GPMP2*，将基于 GP 的基本运动规划器 GPMP2 的应用范围扩展到复杂的海洋环境。 GPMP2* 创新性地添加了基于蒙特卡罗随机性的插值策略，产生了一种新的蒙特卡罗随机性 GPMP2* 算法（MC-GPMP2*），可以增加生成路径的多样性。在算法设计的同时，还提出了一种基于 ROS 的先进无人水面车辆 WAM-V 20 USV 的全自动框架。所提出的运动规划器以及完全自主框架的实用性已在 ROS 海上风电场的模拟检查任务中得到了功能验证。 提出一种基于高斯过程运动规划的全新自主框架，用于海上无人水面船的路径规划，以应对复杂海洋环境的挑战。 Jiawei Meng,Ankita Humne,Richard Bucknall,Brendan Englot,Yuanchang Liu cs.RO

title: Parameterized Sensitivity Oracles and Dynamic Algorithms using Exterior Algebras
title_zh: 使用外代数的参数化灵敏度预言和动态算法
abstract: We design the first efficient sensitivity oracles and dynamic algorithms for a variety of parameterized problems. Our main approach is to modify the algebraic coding technique from static parameterized algorithm design, which had not previously been used in a dynamic context. We particularly build off of the `extensor coding' method of Brand, Dell and Husfeldt [STOC'18], employing properties of the exterior algebra over different fields. For the $k$-Path detection problem for directed graphs, it is known that no efficient dynamic algorithm exists (under popular assumptions from fine-grained complexity). We circumvent this by designing an efficient sensitivity oracle, which preprocesses a directed graph on $n$ vertices in $2^k poly(k) n^{ω+o(1)}$ time, such that, given $\ell$ updates (mixing edge insertions and deletions, and vertex deletions) to that input graph, it can decide in time $\ell^2 2^kpoly(k)$ and with high probability, whether the updated graph contains a path of length $k$. We also give a deterministic sensitivity oracle requiring $4^k poly(k) n^{ω+o(1)}$ preprocessing time and $\ell^2 2^{ωk + o(k)}$ query time, and obtain a randomized sensitivity oracle for the task of approximately counting the number of $k$-paths. For $k$-Path detection in undirected graphs, we obtain a randomized sensitivity oracle with $O(1.66^k n^3)$ preprocessing time and $O(\ell^3 1.66^k)$ query time, and a better bound for undirected bipartite graphs. In addition, we present the first fully dynamic algorithms for a variety of problems: $k$-Partial Cover, $m$-Set $k$-Packing, $t$-Dominating Set, $d$-Dimensional $k$-Matching, and Exact $k$-Partial Cover. For example, for $k$-Partial Cover we show a randomized dynamic algorithm with $2^k poly(k)polylog(n)$ update time, and a deterministic dynamic algorithm with $4^kpoly(k)polylog(n)$ update time.

Our main approach is to modify the algebraic coding technique from static parameterized algorithm design, which had not previously been used in a dynamic context. We particularly build off of the `extensor coding' method of Brand, Dell and Husfeldt [STOC'18], employing properties of the exterior algebra over different fields. For the $k$-Path detection problem for directed graphs, it is known that no efficient dynamic algorithm exists (under popular assumptions from fine-grained complexity). We circumvent this by designing an efficient sensitivity oracle, which preprocesses a directed graph on $n$ vertices in $2^k poly(k) n^{ω+o(1)}$ time, such that, given $\ell$ updates (mixing edge insertions and deletions, and vertex deletions) to that input graph, it can decide in time $\ell^2 2^kpoly(k)$ and with high probability, whether the updated graph contains a path of length $k$. We also give a deterministic sensitivity oracle requiring $4^k poly(k) n^{ω+o(1)}$ preprocessing time and $\ell^2 2^{ωk + o(k)}$ query time, and obtain a randomized sensitivity oracle for the task of approximately counting the number of $k$-paths. For $k$-Path detection in undirected graphs, we obtain a randomized sensitivity oracle with $O(1.66^k n^3)$ preprocessing time and $O(\ell^3 1.66^k)$ query time, and a better bound for undirected bipartite graphs. In addition, we present the first fully dynamic algorithms for a variety of problems: $k$-Partial Cover, $m$-Set $k$-Packing, $t$-Dominating Set, $d$-Dimensional $k$-Matching, and Exact $k$-Partial Cover. For example, for $k$-Partial Cover we show a randomized dynamic algorithm with $2^k poly(k)polylog(n)$ update time, and a deterministic dynamic algorithm with $4^kpoly(k)polylog(n)$ update time.
abstract_zh: 我们为各种参数化问题设计了第一个有效的灵敏度预言机和动态算法。我们的主要方法是从静态参数化算法设计中修改代数编码技术，该技术以前没有在动态环境中使用过。我们特别建立了 Brand、Dell 和 Husfeldt [STOC'18] 的“伸量编码”方法，利用不同领域的外代数特性。对于有向图的 $k$ 路径检测问题，众所周知，不存在有效的动态算法（在细粒度复杂性的流行假设下）。我们通过设计一个高效的敏感性预言机来规避这个问题，它在 $2^k poly(k) n^{ω+o(1)}$ 时间内预处理 $n$ 顶点上的有向图，这样，给定输入图的 $\ell$ 更新（混合边插入和删除，以及顶点删除），它可以及时决定 $\ell^2 2^kpoly(k)$ 并以很高的概率确定更新后的图是否包含长度为 $k$ 的路径。我们还给出了一个需要 $4^k poly(k) n^{ω+o(1)}$ 预处理时间和 $\ell^2 2^{ωk + o(k)}$ 查询时间的确定性灵敏度预言机，并获得一个随机灵敏度预言机，用于大约计算 $k$ 路径数量的任务。对于无向图中的 $k$ 路径检测，我们获得了一个具有 $O(1.66^k n^3)$ 预处理时间和 $O(\ell^3 1.66^k)$ 查询时间的随机灵敏度预言，以及无向二分图的更好界限。此外，我们还提出了针对各种问题的第一个完全动态算法：$k$-部分覆盖、$m$-Set $k$-Packing、$t$-Dominate Set、$d$-Dimensional $k$-Matching 和 Exact $k$-Partial Cover。例如，对于 $k$-Partial Cover，我们展示了具有 $2^k poly(k)polylog(n)$ 更新时间的随机动态算法，以及具有 $4^kpoly(k)polylog(n)$ 更新时间的确定性动态算法。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了用于多种参数化问题的高效灵敏度预言机和动态算法，利用外代数技术改进静态参数化算法设计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统动态算法在处理参数化问题（如k-Path检测）时效率低下，尤其在有向图中缺乏有效解决方案，需突破现有方法限制。
AI.method: 基于Brand等人提出的‘外积编码’方法，结合外代数在不同域的性质，改进静态参数化算法的代数编码技术以适应动态场景。
AI.result: 为有向图k-Path问题设计了预处理时间$2^k \text{poly}(k) n^{ω+o(1)}$、查询时间$\\ell^2 2^k \text{poly}(k)$的灵敏度预言机，并给出确定性和近似计数版本；针对无向图及多种参数化问题（如k-Partial Cover）提出动态算法，更新时间复杂度从$2^k$到$4^k$不等。
AI.conclusion: 首次为多类参数化问题提供了高效动态算法，突破了有向图k-Path的理论瓶颈，外代数方法为动态参数化算法开辟了新方向。

authors_text: Md Mofijul Islam,Gustavo Aguilar,Pragaash Ponnusamy,Clint Solomon Mathialagan,Chengyuan Ma,Chenlei Guo
title: A Vocabulary-Free Multilingual Neural Tokenizer for End-to-End Task Learning
title_zh: 用于端到端任务学习的无词汇多语言神经分词器
comment: ef:ACL 2022 Workshop on Representation Learning for NLP
comments: ef:ACL 2022 Workshop on Representation Learning for NLP
abstract: Subword tokenization is a commonly used input pre-processing step in most recent NLP models. However, it limits the models' ability to leverage end-to-end task learning. Its frequency-based vocabulary creation compromises tokenization in low-resource languages, leading models to produce suboptimal representations. Additionally, the dependency on a fixed vocabulary limits the subword models' adaptability across languages and domains. In this work, we propose a vocabulary-free neural tokenizer by distilling segmentation information from heuristic-based subword tokenization. We pre-train our character-based tokenizer by processing unique words from multilingual corpus, thereby extensively increasing word diversity across languages. Unlike the predefined and fixed vocabularies in subword methods, our tokenizer allows end-to-end task learning, resulting in optimal task-specific tokenization. The experimental results show that replacing the subword tokenizer with our neural tokenizer consistently improves performance on multilingual (NLI) and code-switching (sentiment analysis) tasks, with larger gains in low-resource languages. Additionally, our neural tokenizer exhibits a robust performance on downstream tasks when adversarial noise is present (typos and misspelling), further increasing the initial improvements over statistical subword tokenizers.
summary: Subword tokenization is a commonly used input pre-processing step in most recent NLP models. However, it limits the models' ability to leverage end-to-end task learning. Its frequency-based vocabulary creation compromises tokenization in low-resource languages, leading models to produce suboptimal representations. Additionally, the dependency on a fixed vocabulary limits the subword models' adaptability across languages and domains. In this work, we propose a vocabulary-free neural tokenizer by distilling segmentation information from heuristic-based subword tokenization. We pre-train our character-based tokenizer by processing unique words from multilingual corpus, thereby extensively increasing word diversity across languages. Unlike the predefined and fixed vocabularies in subword methods, our tokenizer allows end-to-end task learning, resulting in optimal task-specific tokenization. The experimental results show that replacing the subword tokenizer with our neural tokenizer consistently improves performance on multilingual (NLI) and code-switching (sentiment analysis) tasks, with larger gains in low-resource languages. Additionally, our neural tokenizer exhibits a robust performance on downstream tasks when adversarial noise is present (typos and misspelling), further increasing the initial improvements over statistical subword tokenizers.
abstract_zh: 子词标记化是最新 NLP 模型中常用的输入预处理步骤。然而，它限制了模型利用端到端任务学习的能力。其基于频率的词汇创建会损害低资源语言的标记化，导致模型产生次优的表示。此外，对固定词汇的依赖限制了子词模型跨语言和领域的适应性。在这项工作中，我们通过从基于启发式的子词标记化中提取分段信息，提出了一种无词汇的神经标记化器。我们通过处理多语言语料库中的独特单词来预训练基于字符的标记器，从而广泛增加跨语言的单词多样性。与子词方法中预定义和固定的词汇不同，我们的分词器允许端到端的任务学习，从而实现最佳的特定于任务的分词。实验结果表明，用我们的神经分词器替换子词分词器可以持续提高多语言（NLI）和代码转换（情感分析）任务的性能，并且在低资源语言中获得更大的收益。此外，当存在对抗性噪声（拼写错误和拼写错误）时，我们的神经分词器在下游任务中表现出强大的性能，进一步提高了对统计子词分词器的初步改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需词汇表的多语言神经分词器，通过端到端任务学习优化分词过程，解决传统子词分词在低资源语言和跨领域适应性上的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统子词分词依赖固定词汇表，导致低资源语言分词效果差且跨语言/领域适应性弱，难以支持端到端任务学习的最优表示生成。
AI.method: 通过蒸馏启发式子词分词的分割信息，预训练基于字符的神经分词器，利用多语言语料库中独特词汇提升跨语言词多样性，实现动态自适应分词。
AI.result: 在多语言NLI和代码切换情感分析任务中，新分词器性能优于传统方法，低资源语言提升显著，且在对抗噪声（拼写错误等）下表现更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 该神经分词器通过端到端学习有效提升多语言任务表现，尤其在低资源场景和噪声环境下优势明显，为跨语言NLP任务提供更优基础组件。

search_text: A Vocabulary-Free Multilingual Neural Tokenizer for End-to-End Task Learning 用于端到端任务学习的无词汇多语言神经分词器 Subword tokenization is a commonly used input pre-processing step in most recent NLP models. However, it limits the models' ability to leverage end-to-end task learning. Its frequency-based vocabulary creation compromises tokenization in low-resource languages, leading models to produce suboptimal representations. Additionally, the dependency on a fixed vocabulary limits the subword models' adaptability across languages and domains. In this work, we propose a vocabulary-free neural tokenizer by distilling segmentation information from heuristic-based subword tokenization. We pre-train our character-based tokenizer by processing unique words from multilingual corpus, thereby extensively increasing word diversity across languages. Unlike the predefined and fixed vocabularies in subword methods, our tokenizer allows end-to-end task learning, resulting in optimal task-specific tokenization. The experimental results show that replacing the subword tokenizer with our neural tokenizer consistently improves performance on multilingual (NLI) and code-switching (sentiment analysis) tasks, with larger gains in low-resource languages. Additionally, our neural tokenizer exhibits a robust performance on downstream tasks when adversarial noise is present (typos and misspelling), further increasing the initial improvements over statistical subword tokenizers. 子词标记化是最新 NLP 模型中常用的输入预处理步骤。然而，它限制了模型利用端到端任务学习的能力。其基于频率的词汇创建会损害低资源语言的标记化，导致模型产生次优的表示。此外，对固定词汇的依赖限制了子词模型跨语言和领域的适应性。在这项工作中，我们通过从基于启发式的子词标记化中提取分段信息，提出了一种无词汇的神经标记化器。我们通过处理多语言语料库中的独特单词来预训练基于字符的标记器，从而广泛增加跨语言的单词多样性。与子词方法中预定义和固定的词汇不同，我们的分词器允许端到端的任务学习，从而实现最佳的特定于任务的分词。实验结果表明，用我们的神经分词器替换子词分词器可以持续提高多语言（NLI）和代码转换（情感分析）任务的性能，并且在低资源语言中获得更大的收益。此外，当存在对抗性噪声（拼写错误和拼写错误）时，我们的神经分词器在下游任务中表现出强大的性能，进一步提高了对统计子词分词器的初步改进。 本文提出一种无需词汇表的多语言神经分词器，通过端到端任务学习优化分词过程，解决传统子词分词在低资源语言和跨领域适应性上的不足。 Md Mofijul Islam,Gustavo Aguilar,Pragaash Ponnusamy,Clint Solomon Mathialagan,Chengyuan Ma,Chenlei Guo cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Hong Shen,Ángel Alexander Cabrera,Adam Perer,Jason Hong
title: "Public(s)-in-the-Loop": Facilitating Deliberation of Algorithmic Decisions in Contentious Public Policy Domains
title_zh: “公共循环”：促进有争议的公共政策领域的算法决策审议
comment: 5 pages, 0 figure, accepted to CHI2020 Fair & Responsible AI Workshop
comments: 5 pages, 0 figure, accepted to CHI2020 Fair & Responsible AI Workshop
abstract: This position paper offers a framework to think about how to better involve human influence in algorithmic decision-making of contentious public policy issues. Drawing from insights in communication literature, we introduce a "public(s)-in-the-loop" approach and enumerates three features that are central to this approach: publics as plural political entities, collective decision-making through deliberation, and the construction of publics. It explores how these features might advance our understanding of stakeholder participation in AI design in contentious public policy domains such as recidivism prediction. Finally, it sketches out part of a research agenda for the HCI community to support this work.
summary: This position paper offers a framework to think about how to better involve human influence in algorithmic decision-making of contentious public policy issues. Drawing from insights in communication literature, we introduce a "public(s)-in-the-loop" approach and enumerates three features that are central to this approach: publics as plural political entities, collective decision-making through deliberation, and the construction of publics. It explores how these features might advance our understanding of stakeholder participation in AI design in contentious public policy domains such as recidivism prediction. Finally, it sketches out part of a research agenda for the HCI community to support this work.
abstract_zh: 本立场文件提供了一个框架来思考如何更好地将人类影响力纳入有争议的公共政策问题的算法决策中。借鉴传播文献中的见解，我们引入了“公众参与循环”方法，并列举了该方法的三个核心特征：公众作为多元政治实体、通过协商进行集体决策以及公众的建设。它探讨了这些功能如何增进我们对利益相关者参与有争议的公共政策领域（例如累犯预测）的人工智能设计的理解。最后，它概述了人机交互社区支持这项工作的部分研究议程。

AI.tldr: 提出一个框架，将公众纳入算法决策，以改善存在争议的公共政策领域中的算法决策过程
AI.motivation: 现有算法决策缺乏公众参与，导致透明度和公平性不足，需在争议性政策中增强利益相关者的参与
AI.method: 基于传播学理论，提出包含三个核心特征的‘公众参与循环’方法，探讨其在AI设计中的应用
AI.result: 提出了一种促进公众参与的框架，并为HCI领域指明了研究方向
AI.conclusion: 该方法有助于提升算法决策的透明度和包容性，但需进一步研究以实现实际应用

authors_text: Patrick Fernandes,Marcos Treviso,Danish Pruthi,André F. T. Martins,Graham Neubig
title: Learning to Scaffold: Optimizing Model Explanations for Teaching
title_zh: 学习支架：优化教学模型解释
abstract: Modern machine learning models are opaque, and as a result there is a burgeoning academic subfield on methods that explain these models' behavior. However, what is the precise goal of providing such explanations, and how can we demonstrate that explanations achieve this goal? Some research argues that explanations should help teach a student (either human or machine) to simulate the model being explained, and that the quality of explanations can be measured by the simulation accuracy of students on unexplained examples. In this work, leveraging meta-learning techniques, we extend this idea to improve the quality of the explanations themselves, specifically by optimizing explanations such that student models more effectively learn to simulate the original model. We train models on three natural language processing and computer vision tasks, and find that students trained with explanations extracted with our framework are able to simulate the teacher significantly more effectively than ones produced with previous methods. Through human annotations and a user study, we further find that these learned explanations more closely align with how humans would explain the required decisions in these tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/coderpat/learning-scaffold
summary: Modern machine learning models are opaque, and as a result there is a burgeoning academic subfield on methods that explain these models' behavior. However, what is the precise goal of providing such explanations, and how can we demonstrate that explanations achieve this goal? Some research argues that explanations should help teach a student (either human or machine) to simulate the model being explained, and that the quality of explanations can be measured by the simulation accuracy of students on unexplained examples. In this work, leveraging meta-learning techniques, we extend this idea to improve the quality of the explanations themselves, specifically by optimizing explanations such that student models more effectively learn to simulate the original model. We train models on three natural language processing and computer vision tasks, and find that students trained with explanations extracted with our framework are able to simulate the teacher significantly more effectively than ones produced with previous methods. Through human annotations and a user study, we further find that these learned explanations more closely align with how humans would explain the required decisions in these tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/coderpat/learning-scaffold
abstract_zh: 现代机器学习模型是不透明的，因此解释这些模型行为的方法的学术子领域正在蓬勃发展。然而，提供此类解释的确切目标是什么？我们如何证明解释实现了这一目标？一些研究认为，解释应该有助于教导学生（无论是人类还是机器）模拟所解释的模型，并且解释的质量可以通过学生对无法解释的示例的模拟准确性来衡量。在这项工作中，我们利用元学习技术扩展了这一想法，以提高解释本身的质量，特别是通过优化解释，使学生模型更有效地学习模拟原始模型。我们在三个自然语言处理和计算机视觉任务上训练模型，发现使用我们的框架提取的解释进行训练的学生能够比使用以前的方法生成的模型更有效地模拟教师。通过人工注释和用户研究，我们进一步发现这些学习到的解释与人类解释这些任务中所需决策的方式更加一致。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/coderpat/learning-scaffold

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过优化模型解释，提升学生模型对教师模型行为的模拟效果。
AI.motivation: 现代机器学习模型通常不透明，而提供解释的方法尚未明确其目标，也缺乏有效衡量标准。研究认为，解释应帮助学生（人或机器）模拟模型行为，但如何优化解释以提高模拟效果仍需探索。
AI.method: 本文利用元学习技术，优化模型解释，使学生模型更有效地学习并模拟原始模型的行为。
AI.result: 在三个自然语言处理和计算机视觉任务中，使用本文框架提取解释训练的学生模型，比之前方法更有效地模拟了教师模型。同时，人类标注和用户研究显示，这些解释更符合人类对任务决策的解释。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化模型解释，可以显著提升学生模型的模拟效果，并且这些解释更符合人类的解释方式。

We train models on three natural language processing and computer vision tasks, and find that students trained with explanations extracted with our framework are able to simulate the teacher significantly more effectively than ones produced with previous methods. Through human annotations and a user study, we further find that these learned explanations more closely align with how humans would explain the required decisions in these tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/coderpat/learning-scaffold 现代机器学习模型是不透明的，因此解释这些模型行为的方法的学术子领域正在蓬勃发展。然而，提供此类解释的确切目标是什么？我们如何证明解释实现了这一目标？一些研究认为，解释应该有助于教导学生（无论是人类还是机器）模拟所解释的模型，并且解释的质量可以通过学生对无法解释的示例的模拟准确性来衡量。在这项工作中，我们利用元学习技术扩展了这一想法，以提高解释本身的质量，特别是通过优化解释，使学生模型更有效地学习模拟原始模型。我们在三个自然语言处理和计算机视觉任务上训练模型，发现使用我们的框架提取的解释进行训练的学生能够比使用以前的方法生成的模型更有效地模拟教师。通过人工注释和用户研究，我们进一步发现这些学习到的解释与人类解释这些任务中所需决策的方式更加一致。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/coderpat/learning-scaffold 本文旨在通过优化模型解释，提升学生模型对教师模型行为的模拟效果。 Patrick Fernandes,Marcos Treviso,Danish Pruthi,André F. T. Martins,Graham Neubig cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV

title: A Taxonomy of Human and ML Strengths in Decision-Making to Investigate Human-ML Complementarity
title_zh: 人类和机器学习在决策中的优势分类，以研究人类与机器学习的互补性
abstract: Hybrid human-ML systems increasingly make consequential decisions in a wide range of domains. These systems are often introduced with the expectation that the combined human-ML system will achieve complementary performance, that is, the combined decision-making system will be an improvement compared with either decision-making agent in isolation. However, empirical results have been mixed, and existing research rarely articulates the sources and mechanisms by which complementary performance is expected to arise. Our goal in this work is to provide conceptual tools to advance the way researchers reason and communicate about human-ML complementarity. Drawing upon prior literature in human psychology, machine learning, and human-computer interaction, we propose a taxonomy characterizing distinct ways in which human and ML-based decision-making can differ. In doing so, we conceptually map potential mechanisms by which combining human and ML decision-making may yield complementary performance, developing a language for the research community to reason about design of hybrid systems in any decision-making domain. To illustrate how our taxonomy can be used to investigate complementarity, we provide a mathematical aggregation framework to examine enabling conditions for complementarity. Through synthetic simulations, we demonstrate how this framework can be used to explore specific aspects of our taxonomy and shed light on the optimal mechanisms for combining human-ML judgments
summary: Hybrid human-ML systems increasingly make consequential decisions in a wide range of domains. These systems are often introduced with the expectation that the combined human-ML system will achieve complementary performance, that is, the combined decision-making system will be an improvement compared with either decision-making agent in isolation. However, empirical results have been mixed, and existing research rarely articulates the sources and mechanisms by which complementary performance is expected to arise. Our goal in this work is to provide conceptual tools to advance the way researchers reason and communicate about human-ML complementarity. Drawing upon prior literature in human psychology, machine learning, and human-computer interaction, we propose a taxonomy characterizing distinct ways in which human and ML-based decision-making can differ. In doing so, we conceptually map potential mechanisms by which combining human and ML decision-making may yield complementary performance, developing a language for the research community to reason about design of hybrid systems in any decision-making domain. To illustrate how our taxonomy can be used to investigate complementarity, we provide a mathematical aggregation framework to examine enabling conditions for complementarity. Through synthetic simulations, we demonstrate how this framework can be used to explore specific aspects of our taxonomy and shed light on the optimal mechanisms for combining human-ML judgments
abstract_zh: 混合人类机器学习系统越来越多地在广泛的领域做出重要决策。引入这些系统时，通常期望组合的人类机器学习系统能够实现互补的性能，也就是说，与单独的决策代理相比，组合的决策系统将得到改进。然而，实证结果好坏参半，现有研究很少阐明预期互补绩效产生的来源和机制。我们这项工作的目标是提供概念工具来推进研究人员推理和交流人类机器学习互补性的方式。借鉴人类心理学、机器学习和人机交互方面的现有文献，我们提出了一种分类法，描述了人类和基于机器学习的决策的不同方式。在此过程中，我们从概念上映射了潜在的机制，通过这些机制将人类和机器学习决策相结合可以产生互补的性能，为研究社区开发一种语言来推理任何决策领域的混合系统的设计。为了说明如何使用我们的分类法来研究互补性，我们提供了一个数学聚合框架来检查互补性的有利条件。通过综合模拟，我们演示了如何使用该框架来探索分类法的特定方面，并阐明结合人类机器学习判断的最佳机制

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过构建人类与机器学习（ML）决策优势的分类体系，探讨二者互补性的机制，并提供数学框架验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 混合人类-ML系统在多个领域广泛应用，但其互补性效果存在争议，现有研究缺乏对互补机制的系统性分析工具。
AI.method: 整合心理学、机器学习和人机交互领域文献，提出分类体系并构建数学聚合框架，通过合成模拟验证框架对互补性条件的分析能力。
AI.result: 提出了描述人类与ML决策差异的分类体系，开发了数学框架并验证其可有效分析互补性条件及组合机制。
AI.conclusion: 分类体系与数学框架为设计混合系统提供了理论工具，未来需进一步研究不同领域下最优组合机制的实现条件。

title: Pay "Attention" to Adverse Weather: Weather-aware Attention-based Object Detection
title_zh: “注意”恶劣天气：基于天气感知注意的物体检测
comment: This paper is accepted at IEEE International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR), 2022
comments: This paper is accepted at IEEE International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR), 2022
abstract: Despite the recent advances of deep neural networks, object detection for adverse weather remains challenging due to the poor perception of some sensors in adverse weather. Instead of relying on one single sensor, multimodal fusion has been one promising approach to provide redundant detection information based on multiple sensors. However, most existing multimodal fusion approaches are ineffective in adjusting the focus of different sensors under varying detection environments in dynamic adverse weather conditions. Moreover, it is critical to simultaneously observe local and global information under complex weather conditions, which has been neglected in most early or late-stage multimodal fusion works. In view of these, this paper proposes a Global-Local Attention (GLA) framework to adaptively fuse the multi-modality sensing streams, i.e., camera, gated camera, and lidar data, at two fusion stages. Specifically, GLA integrates an early-stage fusion via a local attention network and a late-stage fusion via a global attention network to deal with both local and global information, which automatically allocates higher weights to the modality with better detection features at the late-stage fusion to cope with the specific weather condition adaptively. Experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed GLA compared with state-of-the-art fusion approaches under various adverse weather conditions, such as light fog, dense fog, and snow.
summary: Despite the recent advances of deep neural networks, object detection for adverse weather remains challenging due to the poor perception of some sensors in adverse weather. Instead of relying on one single sensor, multimodal fusion has been one promising approach to provide redundant detection information based on multiple sensors. However, most existing multimodal fusion approaches are ineffective in adjusting the focus of different sensors under varying detection environments in dynamic adverse weather conditions. Moreover, it is critical to simultaneously observe local and global information under complex weather conditions, which has been neglected in most early or late-stage multimodal fusion works. In view of these, this paper proposes a Global-Local Attention (GLA) framework to adaptively fuse the multi-modality sensing streams, i.e., camera, gated camera, and lidar data, at two fusion stages. Specifically, GLA integrates an early-stage fusion via a local attention network and a late-stage fusion via a global attention network to deal with both local and global information, which automatically allocates higher weights to the modality with better detection features at the late-stage fusion to cope with the specific weather condition adaptively. Experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed GLA compared with state-of-the-art fusion approaches under various adverse weather conditions, such as light fog, dense fog, and snow.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络最近取得了进展，但由于某些传感器在恶劣天气下的感知能力较差，恶劣天气的目标检测仍然具有挑战性。多模态融合不再依赖于单个传感器，而是一种基于多个传感器提供冗余检测信息的有前景的方法。然而，大多数现有的多模态融合方法在动态恶劣天气条件下的不同检测环境下调整不同传感器的焦点是无效的。此外，在复杂天气条件下同时观测局部和全球信息至关重要，而这一点在大多数早期或后期的多模态融合工作中都被忽视了。鉴于这些，本文提出了一种全局局部注意力（GLA）框架，在两个融合阶段自适应地融合多模态传感流，即相机、门控相机和激光雷达数据。具体来说，GLA集成了通过局部注意力网络进行的早期融合和通过全局注意力网络进行的后期融合来处理局部和全局信息，在后期融合中自动为具有更好检测特征的模态分配更高的权重，以自适应地应对特定的天气条件。实验结果表明，在各种恶劣天气条件下（例如小雾、浓雾和雪），与最先进的融合方法相比，所提出的 GLA 具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于注意力机制的多模态融合框架，以应对恶劣天气下的目标检测挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态恶劣天气中难以有效调整传感器焦点，且忽视了局部与全局信息的协同感知需求。
AI.method: 设计全局-局部注意力（GLA）框架，通过早期局部注意力网络与晚期全局注意力网络分阶段融合相机、门控相机和激光雷达数据，自适应分配模态权重。
AI.result: 在轻雾、浓雾和雪等天气场景中，GLA框架性能优于现有最先进融合方法。
AI.conclusion: GLA框架通过双阶段注意力机制有效提升了恶劣天气下的多模态目标检测鲁棒性。

title: Verification of Locally Tight Programs
title_zh: 局部紧程序的验证
comment: Under consideration for publication in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming
comments: Under consideration for publication in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming
abstract: Program completion is a translation from the language of logic programs into the language of first-order theories. Its original definition has been extended to programs that include integer arithmetic, accept input, and distinguish between output predicates and auxiliary predicates. For tight programs, that generalization of completion is known to match the stable model semantics, which is the basis of answer set programming. We show that the tightness condition in this theorem can be replaced by a less restrictive "local tightness" requirement. From this fact we conclude that the proof assistant anthem-p2p can be used to verify equivalence between locally tight programs. Under consideration for publication in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming

For tight programs, that generalization of completion is known to match the stable model semantics, which is the basis of answer set programming. We show that the tightness condition in this theorem can be replaced by a less restrictive "local tightness" requirement. From this fact we conclude that the proof assistant anthem-p2p can be used to verify equivalence between locally tight programs. Under consideration for publication in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming
abstract_zh: 程序完成是从逻辑程序语言到一阶理论语言的翻译。它的原始定义已扩展到包括整数算术、接受输入以及区分输出谓词和辅助谓词的程序。对于紧凑的程序，已知完成的泛化与稳定的模型语义相匹配，这是答案集编程的基础。我们证明了该定理中的紧密性条件可以用限制性较小的“局部紧密性”要求来代替。从这个事实我们得出结论，证明助手 anthem-p2p 可用于验证局部紧程序之间的等价性。正在考虑在逻辑编程理论与实践中发表

search_text: Verification of Locally Tight Programs 局部紧程序的验证 Program completion is a translation from the language of logic programs into the language of first-order theories. Its original definition has been extended to programs that include integer arithmetic, accept input, and distinguish between output predicates and auxiliary predicates. For tight programs, that generalization of completion is known to match the stable model semantics, which is the basis of answer set programming. We show that the tightness condition in this theorem can be replaced by a less restrictive "local tightness" requirement. From this fact we conclude that the proof assistant anthem-p2p can be used to verify equivalence between locally tight programs. Under consideration for publication in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming 程序完成是从逻辑程序语言到一阶理论语言的翻译。它的原始定义已扩展到包括整数算术、接受输入以及区分输出谓词和辅助谓词的程序。对于紧凑的程序，已知完成的泛化与稳定的模型语义相匹配，这是答案集编程的基础。我们证明了该定理中的紧密性条件可以用限制性较小的“局部紧密性”要求来代替。从这个事实我们得出结论，证明助手 anthem-p2p 可用于验证局部紧程序之间的等价性。正在考虑在逻辑编程理论与实践中发表 验证局部紧程序的等价性，并证明局部紧条件可替代原有紧条件 Jorge Fandinno,Vladimir Lifschitz,Nathan Temple cs.LO,cs.AI

title: CgAT: Center-Guided Adversarial Training for Deep Hashing-Based Retrieval
title_zh: CgAT：用于基于深度哈希的检索的中心引导对抗训练
abstract: Deep hashing has been extensively utilized in massive image retrieval because of its efficiency and effectiveness. However, deep hashing models are vulnerable to adversarial examples, making it essential to develop adversarial defense methods for image retrieval. Existing solutions achieved limited defense performance because of using weak adversarial samples for training and lacking discriminative optimization objectives to learn robust features. In this paper, we present a min-max based Center-guided Adversarial Training, namely CgAT, to improve the robustness of deep hashing networks through worst adversarial examples. Specifically, we first formulate the center code as a semantically-discriminative representative of the input image content, which preserves the semantic similarity with positive samples and dissimilarity with negative examples. We prove that a mathematical formula can calculate the center code immediately. After obtaining the center codes in each optimization iteration of the deep hashing network, they are adopted to guide the adversarial training process. On the one hand, CgAT generates the worst adversarial examples as augmented data by maximizing the Hamming distance between the hash codes of the adversarial examples and the center codes. On the other hand, CgAT learns to mitigate the effects of adversarial samples by minimizing the Hamming distance to the center codes. Extensive experiments on the benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our adversarial training algorithm in defending against adversarial attacks for deep hashing-based retrieval. Compared with the current state-of-the-art defense method, we significantly improve the defense performance by an average of 18.61\%, 12.35\%, and 11.56\% on FLICKR-25K, NUS-WIDE, and MS-COCO, respectively. The code is available at https://github.com/xunguangwang/CgAT.
summary: Deep hashing has been extensively utilized in massive image retrieval because of its efficiency and effectiveness. However, deep hashing models are vulnerable to adversarial examples, making it essential to develop adversarial defense methods for image retrieval. Existing solutions achieved limited defense performance because of using weak adversarial samples for training and lacking discriminative optimization objectives to learn robust features. In this paper, we present a min-max based Center-guided Adversarial Training, namely CgAT, to improve the robustness of deep hashing networks through worst adversarial examples. Specifically, we first formulate the center code as a semantically-discriminative representative of the input image content, which preserves the semantic similarity with positive samples and dissimilarity with negative examples. We prove that a mathematical formula can calculate the center code immediately. After obtaining the center codes in each optimization iteration of the deep hashing network, they are adopted to guide the adversarial training process. On the one hand, CgAT generates the worst adversarial examples as augmented data by maximizing the Hamming distance between the hash codes of the adversarial examples and the center codes. On the other hand, CgAT learns to mitigate the effects of adversarial samples by minimizing the Hamming distance to the center codes. Extensive experiments on the benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our adversarial training algorithm in defending against adversarial attacks for deep hashing-based retrieval. Compared with the current state-of-the-art defense method, we significantly improve the defense performance by an average of 18.61\%, 12.35\%, and 11.56\% on FLICKR-25K, NUS-WIDE, and MS-COCO, respectively. The code is available at https://github.com/xunguangwang/CgAT.
abstract_zh: 深度哈希因其高效性而在海量图像检索中得到广泛应用。然而，深度哈希模型很容易受到对抗性示例的影响，因此开发用于图像检索的对抗性防御方法至关重要。由于使用较弱的对抗性样本进行训练并且缺乏区分性的优化目标来学习鲁棒的特征，现有的解决方案实现的防御性能有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于最小-最大的中心引导对抗训练，即 CgAT，通过最差的对抗示例来提高深度哈希网络的鲁棒性。具体来说，我们首先将中心代码制定为输入图像内容的语义判别表示，它保留了与正样本的语义相似性和与负样本的不相似性。我们证明了一个数学公式可以立即计算出中心码。在获得深度哈希网络每次优化迭代的中心代码后，采用它们来指导对抗训练过程。一方面，CgAT 通过最大化对抗性示例的哈希码与中心代码之间的汉明距离来生成最差的对抗性示例作为增强数据。另一方面，CgAT 学习通过最小化到中心代码的汉明距离来减轻对抗性样本的影响。对基准数据集的大量实验证明了我们的对抗训练算法在防御基于深度哈希的检索的对抗攻击方面的有效性。与当前最先进的防御方法相比，我们在 FLICKR-25K、NUS-WIDE 和 MS-COCO 上的防御性能平均分别显着提高了 18.61%、12.35% 和 11.56%。代码可在 https://github.com/xunguangwang/CgAT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CgAT方法，通过中心引导的对抗训练提升深度哈希模型在图像检索中的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度哈希模型在对抗样本攻击下表现脆弱，且防御方法因使用弱对抗样本和缺乏判别优化目标效果有限。
AI.method: CgAT基于min-max框架，通过数学公式计算语义判别性中心码，利用中心码生成最差对抗样本并优化哈希码与中心码的汉明距离。
AI.result: 在FLICKR-25K、NUS-WIDE和MS-COCO数据集上，CgAT分别平均提升防御性能18.61%、12.35%和11.56%。
AI.conclusion: CgAT通过中心码引导的对抗训练有效增强了深度哈希模型的鲁棒性，显著优于现有防御方法。

title: ParkPredict+: Multimodal Intent and Motion Prediction for Vehicles in Parking Lots with CNN and Transformer
title_zh: ParkPredict+：使用 CNN 和 Transformer 对停车场中的车辆进行多模态意图和运动预测
abstract: The problem of multimodal intent and trajectory prediction for human-driven vehicles in parking lots is addressed in this paper. Using models designed with CNN and Transformer networks, we extract temporal-spatial and contextual information from trajectory history and local bird's eye view (BEV) semantic images, and generate predictions about intent distribution and future trajectory sequences. Our methods outperform existing models in accuracy, while allowing an arbitrary number of modes, encoding complex multi-agent scenarios, and adapting to different parking maps. To train and evaluate our method, we present the first public 4K video dataset of human driving in parking lots with accurate annotation, high frame rate, and rich traffic scenarios.
summary: The problem of multimodal intent and trajectory prediction for human-driven vehicles in parking lots is addressed in this paper. Using models designed with CNN and Transformer networks, we extract temporal-spatial and contextual information from trajectory history and local bird's eye view (BEV) semantic images, and generate predictions about intent distribution and future trajectory sequences. Our methods outperform existing models in accuracy, while allowing an arbitrary number of modes, encoding complex multi-agent scenarios, and adapting to different parking maps. To train and evaluate our method, we present the first public 4K video dataset of human driving in parking lots with accurate annotation, high frame rate, and rich traffic scenarios.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了停车场中人类驾驶车辆的多模态意图和轨迹预测问题。使用使用 CNN 和 Transformer 网络设计的模型，我们从轨迹历史和本地鸟瞰 (BEV) 语义图像中提取时空和上下文信息，并生成有关意图分布和未来轨迹序列的预测。我们的方法在准确性方面优于现有模型，同时允许任意数量的模式、编码复杂的多代理场景并适应不同的停车地图。为了训练和评估我们的方法，我们提出了第一个人类在停车场驾驶的公共 4K 视频数据集，具有准确的注释、高帧率和丰富的交通场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ParkPredict+模型，利用CNN和Transformer网络解决停车场景中车辆的多模态意图与轨迹预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理停车场景中复杂的多智能体交互和多样化的停车地图，需支持任意数量预测模式并提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 融合CNN提取BEV语义图像特征与Transformer处理轨迹时序信息，结合历史轨迹数据和局部鸟瞰图生成意图分布及多模态轨迹预测，并发布首个4K高帧率停车场景数据集。
AI.result: 在准确性指标上优于现有模型，可适应复杂交通场景和不同停车地图，支持任意数量预测模式生成。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多模态预测框架与公开数据集为智能驾驶在停车场景中的决策规划提供了有效工具和基准。

search_text: ParkPredict+: Multimodal Intent and Motion Prediction for Vehicles in Parking Lots with CNN and Transformer ParkPredict+：使用 CNN 和 Transformer 对停车场中的车辆进行多模态意图和运动预测 The problem of multimodal intent and trajectory prediction for human-driven vehicles in parking lots is addressed in this paper. Using models designed with CNN and Transformer networks, we extract temporal-spatial and contextual information from trajectory history and local bird's eye view (BEV) semantic images, and generate predictions about intent distribution and future trajectory sequences. Our methods outperform existing models in accuracy, while allowing an arbitrary number of modes, encoding complex multi-agent scenarios, and adapting to different parking maps. To train and evaluate our method, we present the first public 4K video dataset of human driving in parking lots with accurate annotation, high frame rate, and rich traffic scenarios. 本文解决了停车场中人类驾驶车辆的多模态意图和轨迹预测问题。使用使用 CNN 和 Transformer 网络设计的模型，我们从轨迹历史和本地鸟瞰 (BEV) 语义图像中提取时空和上下文信息，并生成有关意图分布和未来轨迹序列的预测。我们的方法在准确性方面优于现有模型，同时允许任意数量的模式、编码复杂的多代理场景并适应不同的停车地图。为了训练和评估我们的方法，我们提出了第一个人类在停车场驾驶的公共 4K 视频数据集，具有准确的注释、高帧率和丰富的交通场景。 本文提出ParkPredict+模型，利用CNN和Transformer网络解决停车场景中车辆的多模态意图与轨迹预测问题。 Xu Shen,Matthew Lacayo,Nidhir Guggilla,Francesco Borrelli cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Yuan Liu,Yilin Wen,Sida Peng,Cheng Lin,Xiaoxiao Long,Taku Komura,Wenping Wang
title: Gen6D: Generalizable Model-Free 6-DoF Object Pose Estimation from RGB Images
title_zh: Gen6D：基于 RGB 图像的可推广无模型 6-DoF 物体姿态估计
comment: Camera ready version for ECCV2022, Project page: https://liuyuan-pal.github.io/Gen6D/ Code: https://github.com/liuyuan-pal/Gen6D
comments: Camera ready version for ECCV2022, Project page: https://liuyuan-pal.github.io/Gen6D/ Code: https://github.com/liuyuan-pal/Gen6D
abstract: In this paper, we present a generalizable model-free 6-DoF object pose estimator called Gen6D. Existing generalizable pose estimators either need high-quality object models or require additional depth maps or object masks in test time, which significantly limits their application scope. In contrast, our pose estimator only requires some posed images of the unseen object and is able to accurately predict the poses of the object in arbitrary environments. Gen6D consists of an object detector, a viewpoint selector and a pose refiner, all of which do not require the 3D object model and can generalize to unseen objects. Experiments show that Gen6D achieves state-of-the-art results on two model-free datasets: the MOPED dataset and a new GenMOP dataset collected by us. In addition, on the LINEMOD dataset, Gen6D achieves competitive results compared with instance-specific pose estimators. Project page: https://liuyuan-pal.github.io/Gen6D/.
summary: In this paper, we present a generalizable model-free 6-DoF object pose estimator called Gen6D. Existing generalizable pose estimators either need high-quality object models or require additional depth maps or object masks in test time, which significantly limits their application scope. In contrast, our pose estimator only requires some posed images of the unseen object and is able to accurately predict the poses of the object in arbitrary environments. Gen6D consists of an object detector, a viewpoint selector and a pose refiner, all of which do not require the 3D object model and can generalize to unseen objects. Experiments show that Gen6D achieves state-of-the-art results on two model-free datasets: the MOPED dataset and a new GenMOP dataset collected by us. In addition, on the LINEMOD dataset, Gen6D achieves competitive results compared with instance-specific pose estimators. Project page: https://liuyuan-pal.github.io/Gen6D/.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Gen6D 的通用无模型 6-DoF 物体姿态估计器。现有的可概括的姿态估计器要么需要高质量的对象模型，要么在测试时需要额外的深度图或对象掩模，这极大地限制了它们的应用范围。相比之下，我们的姿势估计器只需要一些看不见的物体的姿势图像，并且能够准确地预测任意环境中物体的姿势。 Gen6D 由对象检测器、视点选择器和姿态细化器组成，所有这些都不需要 3D 对象模型，并且可以泛化到看不见的对象。实验表明，Gen6D 在两个无模型数据集上取得了最先进的结果：MOPED 数据集和我们收集的新 GenMOP 数据集。此外，在 LINEMOD 数据集上，与特定于实例的姿态估计器相比，Gen6D 取得了有竞争力的结果。项目页面：https://liuyuan-pal.github.io/Gen6D/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需3D模型的通用6自由度物体姿态估计方法Gen6D，仅需少量目标物体的图像即可在任意环境中准确预测姿态。
AI.motivation: 现有通用姿态估计方法依赖高质量物体模型或测试时的深度图/物体掩码，限制了实际应用。作者旨在开发一种无需这些先验信息且能泛化到新物体的模型。
AI.method: Gen6D包含物体检测器、视角选择器和姿态优化器三个模块，均无需3D模型，通过少量目标图像实现跨场景的姿态估计。
AI.result: 在MOPED和自建GenMOP数据集上达到SOTA性能，在LINEMOD数据集上与实例特定方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: Gen6D验证了无需3D模型和额外数据的通用姿态估计可行性，为实际应用提供了新思路。
