authors_text: Shutian Zhao,Donal G. Cahill,Siyue Li,Fan Xiao,Thierry Blu,James F Griffith,Weitian Chen
title: Denoising of Three-Dimensional Fast Spin Echo Magnetic Resonance Images of Knee Joints using Spatial-Variant Noise-Relevant Residual Learning of Convolution Neural Network
title_zh: 利用卷积神经网络的空间变异噪声相关残差学习对膝关节三维快速自旋回波磁共振图像进行去噪
comment: 6 figures, abstract accepted by Joint Annual Meeting ISMRM-ESMRMB & ISMRT 31st Annual Meeting
comments: 6 figures, abstract accepted by Joint Annual Meeting ISMRM-ESMRMB & ISMRT 31st Annual Meeting
abstract: Two-dimensional (2D) fast spin echo (FSE) techniques play a central role in the clinical magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of knee joints. Moreover, three-dimensional (3D) FSE provides high-isotropic-resolution magnetic resonance (MR) images of knee joints, but it has a reduced signal-to-noise ratio compared to 2D FSE. Deep-learning denoising methods are a promising approach for denoising MR images, but they are often trained using synthetic noise due to challenges in obtaining true noise distributions for MR images. In this study, inherent true noise information from 2-NEX acquisition was used to develop a deep-learning model based on residual learning of convolutional neural network (CNN), and this model was used to suppress the noise in 3D FSE MR images of knee joints. The proposed CNN used two-step residual learning over parallel transporting and residual blocks and was designed to comprehensively learn real noise features from 2-NEX training data. The results of an ablation study validated the network design. The new method achieved improved denoising performance of 3D FSE knee MR images compared with current state-of-the-art methods, based on the peak signal-to-noise ratio and structural similarity index measure. The improved image quality after denoising using the new method was verified by radiological evaluation. A deep CNN using the inherent spatial-varying noise information in 2-NEX acquisitions was developed. This method showed promise for clinical MRI assessments of the knee, and has potential applications for the assessment of other anatomical structures.
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) fast spin echo (FSE) techniques play a central role in the clinical magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of knee joints. Moreover, three-dimensional (3D) FSE provides high-isotropic-resolution magnetic resonance (MR) images of knee joints, but it has a reduced signal-to-noise ratio compared to 2D FSE. Deep-learning denoising methods are a promising approach for denoising MR images, but they are often trained using synthetic noise due to challenges in obtaining true noise distributions for MR images. In this study, inherent true noise information from 2-NEX acquisition was used to develop a deep-learning model based on residual learning of convolutional neural network (CNN), and this model was used to suppress the noise in 3D FSE MR images of knee joints. The proposed CNN used two-step residual learning over parallel transporting and residual blocks and was designed to comprehensively learn real noise features from 2-NEX training data. The results of an ablation study validated the network design. The new method achieved improved denoising performance of 3D FSE knee MR images compared with current state-of-the-art methods, based on the peak signal-to-noise ratio and structural similarity index measure. The improved image quality after denoising using the new method was verified by radiological evaluation. A deep CNN using the inherent spatial-varying noise information in 2-NEX acquisitions was developed. This method showed promise for clinical MRI assessments of the knee, and has potential applications for the assessment of other anatomical structures.
abstract_zh: 二维 (2D) 快速自旋回波 (FSE) 技术在膝关节临床磁共振成像 (MRI) 中发挥着核心作用。此外，三维（3D）FSE 可提供膝关节的高各向同性分辨率磁共振（MR）图像，但与 2D FSE 相比，其信噪比较低。深度学习去噪方法是一种很有前景的 MR 图像去噪方法，但由于获取 MR 图像的真实噪声分布存在挑战，它们通常使用合成噪声进行训练。本研究利用2-NEX采集的固有真实噪声信息开发了基于卷积神经网络（CNN）残差学习的深度学习模型，并利用该模型抑制膝关节3D FSE MR图像中的噪声。所提出的 CNN 在并行传输和残差块上使用两步残差学习，旨在从 2-NEX 训练数据中全面学习真实噪声特征。消融研究的结果验证了网络设计。与当前最先进的方法相比，基于峰值信噪比和结构相似性指数测量，新方法提高了 3D FSE 膝部 MR 图像的去噪性能。通过放射学评价验证了新方法去噪后图像质量的改善。开发了一种利用 2-NEX 采集中固有的空间变化噪声信息的深度 CNN。这种方法为膝关节的临床 MRI 评估带来了希望，并且在评估其他解剖结构方面具有潜在的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的空间可变噪声相关残差学习方法，用于去噪膝关节三维快速自旋回波（3D FSE）磁共振图像。
AI.motivation: 3D FSE磁共振成像虽具有高各向同性分辨率，但信噪比较低，而现有深度学习去噪方法多依赖合成噪声，难以准确反映真实噪声分布。
AI.method: 利用2-NEX采集的真实噪声信息，设计两步残差学习结构，结合平行传输与残差块，从训练数据中全面学习真实噪声特征。
AI.result: 与现有最先进方法相比，该方法在峰值信噪比（PSNR）和结构相似性指数（SSIM）上表现更优，且经放射科评估验证了去噪后图像质量的提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过利用真实空间可变噪声信息，为膝关节MRI临床评估提供了有效工具，并可能推广至其他解剖结构的分析。

title: Tag-Based Attention Guided Bottom-Up Approach for Video Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 基于标签的注意力引导的自下而上的视频实例分割方法
abstract: Video Instance Segmentation is a fundamental computer vision task that deals with segmenting and tracking object instances across a video sequence. Most existing methods typically accomplish this task by employing a multi-stage top-down approach that usually involves separate networks to detect and segment objects in each frame, followed by associating these detections in consecutive frames using a learned tracking head. In this work, however, we introduce a simple end-to-end trainable bottom-up approach to achieve instance mask predictions at the pixel-level granularity, instead of the typical region-proposals-based approach. Unlike contemporary frame-based models, our network pipeline processes an input video clip as a single 3D volume to incorporate temporal information. The central idea of our formulation is to solve the video instance segmentation task as a tag assignment problem, such that generating distinct tag values essentially separates individual object instances across the video sequence (here each tag could be any arbitrary value between 0 and 1). To this end, we propose a novel spatio-temporal tagging loss that allows for sufficient separation of different objects as well as necessary identification of different instances of the same object. Furthermore, we present a tag-based attention module that improves instance tags, while concurrently learning instance propagation within a video. Evaluations demonstrate that our method provides competitive results on YouTube-VIS and DAVIS-19 datasets, and has minimum run-time compared to other state-of-the-art performance methods.

Most existing methods typically accomplish this task by employing a multi-stage top-down approach that usually involves separate networks to detect and segment objects in each frame, followed by associating these detections in consecutive frames using a learned tracking head. In this work, however, we introduce a simple end-to-end trainable bottom-up approach to achieve instance mask predictions at the pixel-level granularity, instead of the typical region-proposals-based approach. Unlike contemporary frame-based models, our network pipeline processes an input video clip as a single 3D volume to incorporate temporal information. The central idea of our formulation is to solve the video instance segmentation task as a tag assignment problem, such that generating distinct tag values essentially separates individual object instances across the video sequence (here each tag could be any arbitrary value between 0 and 1). To this end, we propose a novel spatio-temporal tagging loss that allows for sufficient separation of different objects as well as necessary identification of different instances of the same object. Furthermore, we present a tag-based attention module that improves instance tags, while concurrently learning instance propagation within a video. Evaluations demonstrate that our method provides competitive results on YouTube-VIS and DAVIS-19 datasets, and has minimum run-time compared to other state-of-the-art performance methods.
abstract_zh: 视频实例分割是一项基本的计算机视觉任务，处理视频序列中的分割和跟踪对象实例。大多数现有方法通常通过采用多阶段自上而下的方法来完成此任务，该方法通常涉及单独的网络来检测和分割每个帧中的对象，然后使用学习的跟踪头将这些检测关联到连续帧中。然而，在这项工作中，我们引入了一种简单的端到端可训练的自下而上的方法来实现像素级粒度的实例掩模预测，而不是典型的基于区域提议的方法。与当代基于帧的模型不同，我们的网络管道将输入视频剪辑作为单个 3D 体积进行处理，以合并时间信息。我们的公式的中心思想是将视频实例分割任务作为标签分配问题来解决，这样生成不同的标签值本质上将整个视频序列中的各个对象实例分开（这里每个标签可以是 0 到 1 之间的任意值）。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的时空标记损失，它允许不同对象的充分分离以及同一对象的不同实例的必要识别。此外，我们提出了一个基于标签的注意力模块，可以改进实例标签，同时学习视频中的实例传播。评估表明，我们的方法在 YouTube-VIS 和 DAVIS-19 数据集上提供了有竞争力的结果，并且与其他最先进的性能方法相比，运行时间最短。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于标签注意力的自下而上方法，用于视频实例分割任务，通过将视频视为3D体积并解决标签分配问题实现像素级实例分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多采用多阶段自上而下框架，需分别检测分割后再跟踪，流程复杂且效率低。本文旨在提出更简洁的端到端自下而上方法，提升分割与跟踪的协同性。
AI.method: 将视频输入视为3D体积，通过标签分配问题分离实例；设计时空标签损失函数确保实例区分度，并引入标签注意力模块同步优化标签与实例传播。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VIS和DAVIS-19数据集上达到与SOTA方法相当的性能，且运行时间最短。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过标签驱动的自下而上框架，在保证分割精度的同时显著提升计算效率，为视频实例分割提供新思路。

authors_text: Qun Li,Ziyi Zhang,Fu Xiao,Feng Zhang,Bir Bhanu
title: Dite-HRNet: Dynamic Lightweight High-Resolution Network for Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: Dite-HRNet：用于人体姿势估计的动态轻量级高分辨率网络
abstract: A high-resolution network exhibits remarkable capability in extracting multi-scale features for human pose estimation, but fails to capture long-range interactions between joints and has high computational complexity. To address these problems, we present a Dynamic lightweight High-Resolution Network (Dite-HRNet), which can efficiently extract multi-scale contextual information and model long-range spatial dependency for human pose estimation. Specifically, we propose two methods, dynamic split convolution and adaptive context modeling, and embed them into two novel lightweight blocks, which are named dynamic multi-scale context block and dynamic global context block. These two blocks, as the basic component units of our Dite-HRNet, are specially designed for the high-resolution networks to make full use of the parallel multi-resolution architecture. Experimental results show that the proposed network achieves superior performance on both COCO and MPII human pose estimation datasets, surpassing the state-of-the-art lightweight networks. Code is available at: https://github.com/ZiyiZhang27/Dite-HRNet.
summary: A high-resolution network exhibits remarkable capability in extracting multi-scale features for human pose estimation, but fails to capture long-range interactions between joints and has high computational complexity. To address these problems, we present a Dynamic lightweight High-Resolution Network (Dite-HRNet), which can efficiently extract multi-scale contextual information and model long-range spatial dependency for human pose estimation. Specifically, we propose two methods, dynamic split convolution and adaptive context modeling, and embed them into two novel lightweight blocks, which are named dynamic multi-scale context block and dynamic global context block. These two blocks, as the basic component units of our Dite-HRNet, are specially designed for the high-resolution networks to make full use of the parallel multi-resolution architecture. Experimental results show that the proposed network achieves superior performance on both COCO and MPII human pose estimation datasets, surpassing the state-of-the-art lightweight networks. Code is available at: https://github.com/ZiyiZhang27/Dite-HRNet.
abstract_zh: 高分辨率网络在提取人体姿态估计的多尺度特征方面表现出卓越的能力，但无法捕获关节之间的长距离交互，并且计算复杂度很高。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种动态轻量级高分辨率网络（Dite-HRNet），它可以有效地提取多尺度上下文信息并为人体姿态估计建立远程空间依赖性模型。具体来说，我们提出了动态分割卷积和自适应上下文建模两种方法，并将它们嵌入到两个新颖的轻量级块中，即动态多尺度上下文块和动态全局上下文块。这两个块作为我们Dite-HRNet的基本组成单元，是专门为高分辨率网络而设计的，以充分利用并行多分辨率架构。实验结果表明，所提出的网络在 COCO 和 MPII 人体姿态估计数据集上均取得了优异的性能，超越了最先进的轻量级网络。代码位于：https://github.com/ZiyiZhang27/Dite-HRNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dite-HRNet，一种动态轻量级高分辨率网络，用于改进人体姿态估计中的多尺度特征提取和长距离交互建模。
AI.motivation: 现有高分辨率网络在人体姿态估计中存在计算复杂度高且无法捕捉关节间长距离交互的问题，需设计更高效且轻量的模型。
AI.method: 提出动态分割卷积和自适应上下文建模方法，嵌入动态多尺度上下文块和动态全局上下文块，优化高分辨率网络的并行多分辨率架构。
AI.result: 在COCO和MPII数据集上达到优于现有轻量级网络的性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: Dite-HRNet通过轻量化设计有效平衡了精度与效率，适用于实时人体姿态估计场景。

authors_text: Yixuan Wei,Yue Cao,Zheng Zhang,Zhuliang Yao,Zhenda Xie,Han Hu,Baining Guo
title: iCAR: Bridging Image Classification and Image-text Alignment for Visual Recognition
title_zh: iCAR：连接图像分类和图像文本对齐以实现视觉识别
abstract: Image classification, which classifies images by pre-defined categories, has been the dominant approach to visual representation learning over the last decade. Visual learning through image-text alignment, however, has emerged to show promising performance, especially for zero-shot recognition. We believe that these two learning tasks are complementary, and suggest combining them for better visual learning. We propose a deep fusion method with three adaptations that effectively bridge two learning tasks, rather than shallow fusion through naive multi-task learning. First, we modify the previous common practice in image classification, a linear classifier, with a cosine classifier which shows comparable performance. Second, we convert the image classification problem from learning parametric category classifier weights to learning a text encoder as a meta network to generate category classifier weights. The learnt text encoder is shared between image classification and image-text alignment. Third, we enrich each class name with a description to avoid confusion between classes and make the classification method closer to the image-text alignment. We prove that this deep fusion approach performs better on a variety of visual recognition tasks and setups than the individual learning or shallow fusion approach, from zero-shot/few-shot image classification, such as the Kornblith 12-dataset benchmark, to downstream tasks of action recognition, semantic segmentation, and object detection in fine-tuning and open-vocabulary settings. The code will be available at https://github.com/weiyx16/iCAR.

We prove that this deep fusion approach performs better on a variety of visual recognition tasks and setups than the individual learning or shallow fusion approach, from zero-shot/few-shot image classification, such as the Kornblith 12-dataset benchmark, to downstream tasks of action recognition, semantic segmentation, and object detection in fine-tuning and open-vocabulary settings. The code will be available at https://github.com/weiyx16/iCAR.
abstract_zh: 图像分类，即按预定义类别对图像进行分类，是过去十年中视觉表示学习的主要方法。然而，通过图像文本对齐进行的视觉学习已经显示出有希望的性能，特别是对于零样本识别。我们认为这两项学习任务是互补的，并建议将它们结合起来以获得更好的视觉学习。我们提出了一种具有三种适应能力的深度融合方法，可以有效地桥接两个学习任务，而不是通过朴素的多任务学习进行浅层融合。首先，我们用余弦分类器修改了图像分类中先前的常见做法（线性分类器），该分类器显示出可比的性能。其次，我们将图像分类问题从学习参数类别分类器权重转换为学习文本编码器作为元网络以生成类别分类器权重。学习到的文本编码器在图像分类和图像文本对齐之间共享。第三，我们用描述来丰富每个类名称，以避免类之间的混淆，并使分类方法更接近图文对齐。我们证明，这种深度融合方法在各种视觉识别任务和设置上比单独学习或浅层融合方法表现更好，从零样本/少样本图像分类（例如 Kornblith 12 数据集基准）到动作识别、语义分割和微调和开放词汇设置中的对象检测的下游任务。该代码可在 https://github.com/weiyx16/iCAR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iCAR方法，通过深度融合图像分类与图像-文本对齐任务，提升视觉识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统图像分类与图像-文本对齐任务各自存在局限，前者在零样本场景表现不足，后者需更有效的融合方式。两者互补性未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 提出三重改进：1）用余弦分类器替代线性分类器；2）通过文本编码器作为元网络生成分类权重；3）用描述性文本增强类别名称，实现跨任务共享与对齐。
AI.result: 在零样本/少样本分类（如Kornblith数据集）、动作识别、语义分割等下游任务中，iCAR均优于单独学习或浅层融合方法。
AI.conclusion: 深度融合策略有效结合图像分类与文本对齐优势，为开放词汇和微调场景提供更优视觉表征学习框架。

search_text: iCAR: Bridging Image Classification and Image-text Alignment for Visual Recognition iCAR：连接图像分类和图像文本对齐以实现视觉识别 Image classification, which classifies images by pre-defined categories, has been the dominant approach to visual representation learning over the last decade. Visual learning through image-text alignment, however, has emerged to show promising performance, especially for zero-shot recognition. We believe that these two learning tasks are complementary, and suggest combining them for better visual learning. We propose a deep fusion method with three adaptations that effectively bridge two learning tasks, rather than shallow fusion through naive multi-task learning. First, we modify the previous common practice in image classification, a linear classifier, with a cosine classifier which shows comparable performance. Second, we convert the image classification problem from learning parametric category classifier weights to learning a text encoder as a meta network to generate category classifier weights. The learnt text encoder is shared between image classification and image-text alignment. Third, we enrich each class name with a description to avoid confusion between classes and make the classification method closer to the image-text alignment. We prove that this deep fusion approach performs better on a variety of visual recognition tasks and setups than the individual learning or shallow fusion approach, from zero-shot/few-shot image classification, such as the Kornblith 12-dataset benchmark, to downstream tasks of action recognition, semantic segmentation, and object detection in fine-tuning and open-vocabulary settings. The code will be available at https://github.com/weiyx16/iCAR. 图像分类，即按预定义类别对图像进行分类，是过去十年中视觉表示学习的主要方法。然而，通过图像文本对齐进行的视觉学习已经显示出有希望的性能，特别是对于零样本识别。我们认为这两项学习任务是互补的，并建议将它们结合起来以获得更好的视觉学习。我们提出了一种具有三种适应能力的深度融合方法，可以有效地桥接两个学习任务，而不是通过朴素的多任务学习进行浅层融合。首先，我们用余弦分类器修改了图像分类中先前的常见做法（线性分类器），该分类器显示出可比的性能。其次，我们将图像分类问题从学习参数类别分类器权重转换为学习文本编码器作为元网络以生成类别分类器权重。学习到的文本编码器在图像分类和图像文本对齐之间共享。第三，我们用描述来丰富每个类名称，以避免类之间的混淆，并使分类方法更接近图文对齐。我们证明，这种深度融合方法在各种视觉识别任务和设置上比单独学习或浅层融合方法表现更好，从零样本/少样本图像分类（例如 Kornblith 12 数据集基准）到动作识别、语义分割和微调和开放词汇设置中的对象检测的下游任务。该代码可在 https://github.com/weiyx16/iCAR 获取。 本文提出iCAR方法，通过深度融合图像分类与图像-文本对齐任务，提升视觉识别性能。 Yixuan Wei,Yue Cao,Zheng Zhang,Zhuliang Yao,Zhenda Xie,Han Hu,Baining Guo cs.CV

title: The Boltzmann Policy Distribution: Accounting for Systematic Suboptimality in Human Models
title_zh: 玻尔兹曼策略分布：解释人类模型中的系统次优性
abstract: Models of human behavior for prediction and collaboration tend to fall into two categories: ones that learn from large amounts of data via imitation learning, and ones that assume human behavior to be noisily-optimal for some reward function. The former are very useful, but only when it is possible to gather a lot of human data in the target environment and distribution. The advantage of the latter type, which includes Boltzmann rationality, is the ability to make accurate predictions in new environments without extensive data when humans are actually close to optimal. However, these models fail when humans exhibit systematic suboptimality, i.e. when their deviations from optimal behavior are not independent, but instead consistent over time. Our key insight is that systematic suboptimality can be modeled by predicting policies, which couple action choices over time, instead of trajectories. We introduce the Boltzmann policy distribution (BPD), which serves as a prior over human policies and adapts via Bayesian inference to capture systematic deviations by observing human actions during a single episode. The BPD is difficult to compute and represent because policies lie in a high-dimensional continuous space, but we leverage tools from generative and sequence models to enable efficient sampling and inference. We show that the BPD enables prediction of human behavior and human-AI collaboration equally as well as imitation learning-based human models while using far less data.
summary: Models of human behavior for prediction and collaboration tend to fall into two categories: ones that learn from large amounts of data via imitation learning, and ones that assume human behavior to be noisily-optimal for some reward function. The former are very useful, but only when it is possible to gather a lot of human data in the target environment and distribution. The advantage of the latter type, which includes Boltzmann rationality, is the ability to make accurate predictions in new environments without extensive data when humans are actually close to optimal. However, these models fail when humans exhibit systematic suboptimality, i.e. when their deviations from optimal behavior are not independent, but instead consistent over time. Our key insight is that systematic suboptimality can be modeled by predicting policies, which couple action choices over time, instead of trajectories. We introduce the Boltzmann policy distribution (BPD), which serves as a prior over human policies and adapts via Bayesian inference to capture systematic deviations by observing human actions during a single episode. The BPD is difficult to compute and represent because policies lie in a high-dimensional continuous space, but we leverage tools from generative and sequence models to enable efficient sampling and inference. We show that the BPD enables prediction of human behavior and human-AI collaboration equally as well as imitation learning-based human models while using far less data.
abstract_zh: 用于预测和协作的人类行为模型往往分为两类：一类通过模仿学习从大量数据中学习，另一类假设人类行为对于某些奖励函数来说是最优的。前者非常有用，但前提是可以在目标环境和分布中收集大量人类数据。包括玻尔兹曼理性在内的后一种类型的优点是，当人类实际上接近最优时，能够在没有大量数据的情况下在新环境中做出准确的预测。然而，当人类表现出系统性次优性时，即当他们与最佳行为的偏差不是独立的，而是随着时间的推移而一致时，这些模型就会失败。我们的主要见解是，系统性次优性可以通过预测政策来建模，这些政策随着时间的推移而不是轨迹来耦合行动选择。我们引入了玻尔兹曼策略分布（BPD），它作为人类策略的先验，并通过贝叶斯推理进行调整，通过观察单个事件中的人类行为来捕获系统偏差。 BPD 很难计算和表示，因为策略位于高维连续空间中，但我们利用生成模型和序列模型的工具来实现高效的采样和推理。我们表明，BPD 能够同等地预测人类行为和人类与人工智能的协作以及基于模仿学习的人类模型，同时使用更少的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为玻尔兹曼策略分布（BPD）的新模型，用于更准确地捕捉人类行为中的系统性次优特性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在预测人类行为时存在局限性：基于模仿学习的模型需要大量数据，而基于噪声最优假设的模型无法处理人类行为中持续存在的系统性偏差。
AI.method: 通过贝叶斯推断构建策略层面的先验分布（BPD），利用生成模型和序列模型技术解决高维连续策略空间的计算难题，仅通过单次交互即可学习人类策略。
AI.result: BPD在行为预测和人机协作任务中表现与模仿学习模型相当，但所需数据量显著减少。
AI.conclusion: BPD为建模人类系统性次优行为提供了高效且数据友好的解决方案，拓展了传统最优性假设的适用范围。

authors_text: Takato Kinoshita,Naoki Masuyama,Yiping Liu,Yusuke Nojima,Hisao Ishibuchi
title: Reference Vector Adaptation and Mating Selection Strategy via Adaptive Resonance Theory-based Clustering for Many-objective Optimization
title_zh: 基于自适应共振理论的多目标优化聚类的参考向量自适应和交配选择策略
comment: This paper is currently under review
comments: This paper is currently under review
abstract: Decomposition-based multiobjective evolutionary algorithms (MOEAs) with clustering-based reference vector adaptation show good optimization performance for many-objective optimization problems (MaOPs). Especially, algorithms that employ a clustering algorithm with a topological structure (i.e., a network composed of nodes and edges) show superior optimization performance to other MOEAs for MaOPs with irregular Pareto optimal fronts (PFs). These algorithms, however, do not effectively utilize information of the topological structure in the search process. Moreover, the clustering algorithms typically used in conventional studies have limited clustering performance, inhibiting the ability to extract useful information for the search process. This paper proposes an adaptive reference vector-guided evolutionary algorithm using an adaptive resonance theory-based clustering with a topological structure. The proposed algorithm utilizes the information of the topological structure not only for reference vector adaptation but also for mating selection. The proposed algorithm is compared with 8 state-of-the-art MOEAs on 78 test problems. Experimental results reveal the outstanding optimization performance of the proposed algorithm over the others on MaOPs with various properties.
summary: Decomposition-based multiobjective evolutionary algorithms (MOEAs) with clustering-based reference vector adaptation show good optimization performance for many-objective optimization problems (MaOPs). Especially, algorithms that employ a clustering algorithm with a topological structure (i.e., a network composed of nodes and edges) show superior optimization performance to other MOEAs for MaOPs with irregular Pareto optimal fronts (PFs). These algorithms, however, do not effectively utilize information of the topological structure in the search process. Moreover, the clustering algorithms typically used in conventional studies have limited clustering performance, inhibiting the ability to extract useful information for the search process. This paper proposes an adaptive reference vector-guided evolutionary algorithm using an adaptive resonance theory-based clustering with a topological structure. The proposed algorithm utilizes the information of the topological structure not only for reference vector adaptation but also for mating selection. The proposed algorithm is compared with 8 state-of-the-art MOEAs on 78 test problems. Experimental results reveal the outstanding optimization performance of the proposed algorithm over the others on MaOPs with various properties.
abstract_zh: 基于分解的多目标进化算法（MOEA）和基于聚类的参考向量自适应在多目标优化问题（MaOP）中表现出良好的优化性能。特别是，对于具有不规则帕累托最优前沿（PF）的MaOP，采用具有拓扑结构（即由节点和边组成的网络）的聚类算法的算法比其他MOEA表现出优越的优化性能。然而，这些算法在搜索过程中并没有有效利用拓扑结构的信息。此外，传统研究中通常使用的聚类算法的聚类性能有限，抑制了为搜索过程提取有用信息的能力。本文提出了一种采用基于自适应共振理论的拓扑结构聚类的自适应参考向量引导进化算法。该算法利用拓扑结构的信息不仅用于参考向量自适应，而且还用于交配选择。该算法在 78 个测试问题上与 8 个最先进的 MOEA 进行了比较。实验结果表明，与其他算法相比，该算法在具有各种属性的 MaOP 上具有出色的优化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自适应共振理论的聚类方法，用于改进多目标优化算法中的参考向量自适应和交配选择策略。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于分解的多目标进化算法（MOEAs）在处理多目标优化问题（MaOPs）时，对于具有不规则帕累托最优前沿（PFs）的问题表现不佳，且未能有效利用拓扑结构信息。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于自适应共振理论（ART）的聚类方法，结合拓扑结构信息用于参考向量自适应和交配选择策略，以提高优化性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该算法在78个测试问题上优于8种最先进的MOEAs，尤其在具有不同特性的多目标优化问题上表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法通过有效利用拓扑结构信息，显著提升了多目标优化问题的求解性能。

search_text: Reference Vector Adaptation and Mating Selection Strategy via Adaptive Resonance Theory-based Clustering for Many-objective Optimization 基于自适应共振理论的多目标优化聚类的参考向量自适应和交配选择策略 Decomposition-based multiobjective evolutionary algorithms (MOEAs) with clustering-based reference vector adaptation show good optimization performance for many-objective optimization problems (MaOPs). Especially, algorithms that employ a clustering algorithm with a topological structure (i.e., a network composed of nodes and edges) show superior optimization performance to other MOEAs for MaOPs with irregular Pareto optimal fronts (PFs). These algorithms, however, do not effectively utilize information of the topological structure in the search process. Moreover, the clustering algorithms typically used in conventional studies have limited clustering performance, inhibiting the ability to extract useful information for the search process. This paper proposes an adaptive reference vector-guided evolutionary algorithm using an adaptive resonance theory-based clustering with a topological structure. The proposed algorithm utilizes the information of the topological structure not only for reference vector adaptation but also for mating selection. The proposed algorithm is compared with 8 state-of-the-art MOEAs on 78 test problems. Experimental results reveal the outstanding optimization performance of the proposed algorithm over the others on MaOPs with various properties. 基于分解的多目标进化算法（MOEA）和基于聚类的参考向量自适应在多目标优化问题（MaOP）中表现出良好的优化性能。特别是，对于具有不规则帕累托最优前沿（PF）的MaOP，采用具有拓扑结构（即由节点和边组成的网络）的聚类算法的算法比其他MOEA表现出优越的优化性能。然而，这些算法在搜索过程中并没有有效利用拓扑结构的信息。此外，传统研究中通常使用的聚类算法的聚类性能有限，抑制了为搜索过程提取有用信息的能力。本文提出了一种采用基于自适应共振理论的拓扑结构聚类的自适应参考向量引导进化算法。该算法利用拓扑结构的信息不仅用于参考向量自适应，而且还用于交配选择。该算法在 78 个测试问题上与 8 个最先进的 MOEA 进行了比较。实验结果表明，与其他算法相比，该算法在具有各种属性的 MaOP 上具有出色的优化性能。 本文提出了一种基于自适应共振理论的聚类方法，用于改进多目标优化算法中的参考向量自适应和交配选择策略。 Takato Kinoshita,Naoki Masuyama,Yiping Liu,Yusuke Nojima,Hisao Ishibuchi cs.NE

authors_text: Chen Avin,Marcin Bienkowski,Iosif Salem,Robert Sama,Stefan Schmid,Paweł Schmidt
title: Deterministic Self-Adjusting Tree Networks Using Rotor Walks
title_zh: 使用转子行走的确定性自调节树网络
abstract: We revisit the design of self-adjusting single-source tree networks. The problem can be seen as a generalization of the classic list update problem to trees, and finds applications in reconfigurable datacenter networks. We are given a fixed balanced binary tree T connecting n nodes V = {v_1, ... , v_n}. A source node v_0, attached to the root of the tree, issues communication requests to nodes in V, in an online and adversarial manner; the access cost of a request to a node v, is given by the current depth of v in T. The online algorithm can try to reduce the access cost by performing swap operations, with which the position of a node is exchanged with the position of its parent in the tree; a swap operation costs one unit. The objective is to design an online algorithm which minimizes the total access cost plus adjustment cost (swapping). Avin et al. recently presented Random-Push, a constant competitive online algorithm for this problem, based on random walks, together with an analysis exploiting the most recently used (MRU) property of random walks. We study analytically and empirically, online algorithms for this problem. In particular, we explore how to derandomize Random-Push. We consider a simple derandomized algorithm which we call Rotor-Push, as its behavior is reminiscent of rotor walks. We first prove that Rotor-Push is constant competitive: its competitive ratio is 12 and hence by a factor of five lower than the best existing competitive ratio. In contrast to Random-Push, the algorithm does not feature the MRU property, which requires a new analysis. We present a significantly improved and simpler analysis for the randomized algorithm, showing that it is 16-competitive. We compare empirically all self-adjusting single-source tree networks, using synthetic and real data with varying locality and observe that Rotor-Push and Random-Push have almost identical performance.

The objective is to design an online algorithm which minimizes the total access cost plus adjustment cost (swapping). Avin et al. recently presented Random-Push, a constant competitive online algorithm for this problem, based on random walks, together with an analysis exploiting the most recently used (MRU) property of random walks. We study analytically and empirically, online algorithms for this problem. In particular, we explore how to derandomize Random-Push. We consider a simple derandomized algorithm which we call Rotor-Push, as its behavior is reminiscent of rotor walks. We first prove that Rotor-Push is constant competitive: its competitive ratio is 12 and hence by a factor of five lower than the best existing competitive ratio. In contrast to Random-Push, the algorithm does not feature the MRU property, which requires a new analysis. We present a significantly improved and simpler analysis for the randomized algorithm, showing that it is 16-competitive. We compare empirically all self-adjusting single-source tree networks, using synthetic and real data with varying locality and observe that Rotor-Push and Random-Push have almost identical performance.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视自我调整单源树网络的设计。该问题可以看作是经典列表更新问题对树的推广，并在可重新配置的数据中心网络中找到了应用。给定一个连接 n 个节点的固定平衡二叉树 T V = {v_1, ... , v_n}。源节点 v_0，连接到树的根，以在线和对抗的方式向 V 中的节点发出通信请求；对节点 v 的请求的访问成本由 v 在 T 中的当前深度给出。在线算法可以尝试通过执行交换操作来降低访问成本，通过交换操作，节点的位置与其父节点在树中的位置进行交换；交换操作花费一个单位。目标是设计一种在线算法，使总访问成本加上调整成本（交换）最小化。艾文等人。最近提出了 Random-Push，这是针对该问题的一种持续竞争在线算法，基于随机游走，以及利用随机游走的最近使用的 (MRU) 属性的分析。我们通过分析和实证研究了该问题的在线算法。特别是，我们探索如何去随机化随机推送。我们考虑一种简单的去随机化算法，我们称之为转子推，因为它的行为让人想起转子行走。我们首先证明 Rotor-Push 具有恒定的竞争力：其竞争比为 12，因此比现有最佳竞争比低五倍。与Random-Push相比，该算法不具有MRU特性，这需要重新分析。我们对随机算法进行了显着改进且更简单的分析，表明它具有 16 竞争性。我们使用具有不同局部性的合成数据和真实数据，根据经验比较所有自调整单源树网络，并观察到转子推送和随机推送具有几乎相同的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了确定性自调整树网络的设计，通过旋转行走方法优化通信请求的访问成本与调整成本。
AI.motivation: 传统随机算法Random-Push在处理数据中心网络等场景时存在随机性限制，需探索确定性替代方案以提升性能稳定性。
AI.method: 提出确定性算法Rotor-Push，基于旋转行走机制替代随机行走，并通过理论分析与实验验证其竞争力。
AI.result: 证明Rotor-Push的竞争力比率为12，较Random-Push提升5倍；实验显示其性能与Random-Push几乎一致。
AI.conclusion: Rotor-Push作为Random-Push的确定性替代方案，在理论保证与实际表现上均达到优异效果，适用于需要稳定性的网络场景。

title: Impact of initial outbreak locations on transmission risk of infectious diseases in an intra-urban area
title_zh: 城市内首次暴发地点对传染病传播风险的影响
comment: COVID-19, epidemic model, human mobility, mobile phone location data
comments: COVID-19, epidemic model, human mobility, mobile phone location data
abstract: Infectious diseases usually originate from a specific location within a city. Due to the heterogenous distribution of population and public facilities, and the structural heterogeneity of human mobility network embedded in space, infectious diseases break out at different locations would cause different transmission risk and control difficulty. This study aims to investigate the impact of initial outbreak locations on the risk of spatiotemporal transmission and reveal the driving force behind high-risk outbreak locations. First, integrating mobile phone location data, we built a SLIR (susceptible-latent-infectious-removed)-based meta-population model to simulate the spreading process of an infectious disease (i.e., COVID-19) across fine-grained intra-urban regions (i.e., 649 communities of Shenzhen City, China). Based on the simulation model, we evaluated the transmission risk caused by different initial outbreak locations by proposing three indexes including the number of infected cases (CaseNum), the number of affected regions (RegionNum), and the spatial diffusion range (SpatialRange). Finally, we investigated the contribution of different influential factors to the transmission risk via machine learning models. Results indicates that different initial outbreak locations would cause similar CaseNum but different RegionNum and SpatialRange. To avoid the epidemic spread quickly to more regions, it is necessary to prevent epidemic breaking out in locations with high population-mobility flow density. While to avoid epidemic spread to larger spatial range, remote regions with long daily trip distance of residents need attention. Those findings can help understand the transmission risk and driving force of initial outbreak locations within cities and make precise prevention and control strategies in advance.

First, integrating mobile phone location data, we built a SLIR (susceptible-latent-infectious-removed)-based meta-population model to simulate the spreading process of an infectious disease (i.e., COVID-19) across fine-grained intra-urban regions (i.e., 649 communities of Shenzhen City, China). Based on the simulation model, we evaluated the transmission risk caused by different initial outbreak locations by proposing three indexes including the number of infected cases (CaseNum), the number of affected regions (RegionNum), and the spatial diffusion range (SpatialRange). Finally, we investigated the contribution of different influential factors to the transmission risk via machine learning models. Results indicates that different initial outbreak locations would cause similar CaseNum but different RegionNum and SpatialRange. To avoid the epidemic spread quickly to more regions, it is necessary to prevent epidemic breaking out in locations with high population-mobility flow density. While to avoid epidemic spread to larger spatial range, remote regions with long daily trip distance of residents need attention. abstract_zh: 传染病通常起源于城市内的特定地点。由于人口和公共设施分布的异质性，以及嵌入空间的人员流动网络的结构异质性，传染病在不同地点的爆发会造成不同的传播风险和控制难度。本研究旨在调查初始爆发地点对时空传播风险的影响，揭示高风险爆发地点背后的驱动力。首先，整合手机位置数据，我们构建了基于 SLIR（易感潜伏感染去除）的元群体模型，以模拟传染病（即 COVID-19）在细粒度城市内区域（即中国深圳市的 649 个社区）的传播过程。基于模拟模型，我们提出了感染病例数（CaseNum）、受影响区域数（RegionNum）和空间扩散范围（SpatialRange）三个指标来评估不同初始爆发地点造成的传播风险。最后，我们通过机器学习模型研究了不同影响因素对传播风险的贡献。结果表明，不同的初始爆发地点会导致相似的 CaseNum，但不同的 RegionNum 和 SpatialRange。为避免疫情向更多地区快速蔓延，需要防止疫情在人口流动密度大的地区暴发。同时，为了避免疫情向更大的空间范围扩散，居民日常出行距离较长的偏远地区需要引起重视。这些发现有助于了解城市内最初疫情爆发地点的传播风险和驱动力，提前制定精准的防控策略。

AI.tldr: 研究城市内部不同初始暴发地点对传染病传播风险的影响，揭示高风险地点的驱动因素。
AI.motivation: 城市人口分布、公共设施和人类移动网络的异质性导致不同地点的传染病暴发会产生差异化的传播风险和防控难度。
AI.method: 整合手机位置数据，构建基于SLIR模型的元种群模型，通过感染病例数、受影响区域数和空间扩散范围三个指标评估传播风险，并利用机器学习分析影响因素。
AI.result: 不同初始暴发地点导致相似的感染病例数，但受影响区域数量和空间扩散范围存在显著差异。高人口流动密度区域和居民长距离出行的偏远地区需重点关注。
AI.conclusion: 需提前制定精准防控策略，重点防范高流动密度区域的疫情暴发及偏远地区的空间扩散风险。

search_text: Impact of initial outbreak locations on transmission risk of infectious diseases in an intra-urban area 城市内首次暴发地点对传染病传播风险的影响 Infectious diseases usually originate from a specific location within a city. Due to the heterogenous distribution of population and public facilities, and the structural heterogeneity of human mobility network embedded in space, infectious diseases break out at different locations would cause different transmission risk and control difficulty. This study aims to investigate the impact of initial outbreak locations on the risk of spatiotemporal transmission and reveal the driving force behind high-risk outbreak locations. First, integrating mobile phone location data, we built a SLIR (susceptible-latent-infectious-removed)-based meta-population model to simulate the spreading process of an infectious disease (i.e., COVID-19) across fine-grained intra-urban regions (i.e., 649 communities of Shenzhen City, China). Based on the simulation model, we evaluated the transmission risk caused by different initial outbreak locations by proposing three indexes including the number of infected cases (CaseNum), the number of affected regions (RegionNum), and the spatial diffusion range (SpatialRange). Finally, we investigated the contribution of different influential factors to the transmission risk via machine learning models. Results indicates that different initial outbreak locations would cause similar CaseNum but different RegionNum and SpatialRange. To avoid the epidemic spread quickly to more regions, it is necessary to prevent epidemic breaking out in locations with high population-mobility flow density. While to avoid epidemic spread to larger spatial range, remote regions with long daily trip distance of residents need attention. Those findings can help understand the transmission risk and driving force of initial outbreak locations within cities and make precise prevention and control strategies in advance. 传染病通常起源于城市内的特定地点。由于人口和公共设施分布的异质性，以及嵌入空间的人员流动网络的结构异质性，传染病在不同地点的爆发会造成不同的传播风险和控制难度。本研究旨在调查初始爆发地点对时空传播风险的影响，揭示高风险爆发地点背后的驱动力。首先，整合手机位置数据，我们构建了基于 SLIR（易感潜伏感染去除）的元群体模型，以模拟传染病（即 COVID-19）在细粒度城市内区域（即中国深圳市的 649 个社区）的传播过程。基于模拟模型，我们提出了感染病例数（CaseNum）、受影响区域数（RegionNum）和空间扩散范围（SpatialRange）三个指标来评估不同初始爆发地点造成的传播风险。最后，我们通过机器学习模型研究了不同影响因素对传播风险的贡献。结果表明，不同的初始爆发地点会导致相似的 CaseNum，但不同的 RegionNum 和 SpatialRange。为避免疫情向更多地区快速蔓延，需要防止疫情在人口流动密度大的地区暴发。同时，为了避免疫情向更大的空间范围扩散，居民日常出行距离较长的偏远地区需要引起重视。这些发现有助于了解城市内最初疫情爆发地点的传播风险和驱动力，提前制定精准的防控策略。 研究城市内部不同初始暴发地点对传染病传播风险的影响，揭示高风险地点的驱动因素。 Kang Liu,Ling Yin,Jianzhang Xue physics.soc-ph,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Luqing Luo,Lulu Tang,Wanyi Zhou,Shizheng Wang,Zhi-Xin Yang
title: PU-EVA: An Edge Vector based Approximation Solution for Flexible-scale Point Cloud Upsampling
title_zh: PU-EVA：一种基于边缘向量的近似解决方案，用于灵活规模的点云上采样
abstract: High-quality point clouds have practical significance for point-based rendering, semantic understanding, and surface reconstruction. Upsampling sparse, noisy and nonuniform point clouds for a denser and more regular approximation of target objects is a desirable but challenging task. Most existing methods duplicate point features for upsampling, constraining the upsampling scales at a fixed rate. In this work, the flexible upsampling rates are achieved via edge vector based affine combinations, and a novel design of Edge Vector based Approximation for Flexible-scale Point clouds Upsampling (PU-EVA) is proposed. The edge vector based approximation encodes the neighboring connectivity via affine combinations based on edge vectors, and restricts the approximation error within the second-order term of Taylor's Expansion. The EVA upsampling decouples the upsampling scales with network architecture, achieving the flexible upsampling rates in one-time training. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that the proposed PU-EVA outperforms the state-of-the-art in terms of proximity-to-surface, distribution uniformity, and geometric details preservation.
summary: High-quality point clouds have practical significance for point-based rendering, semantic understanding, and surface reconstruction. Upsampling sparse, noisy and nonuniform point clouds for a denser and more regular approximation of target objects is a desirable but challenging task. Most existing methods duplicate point features for upsampling, constraining the upsampling scales at a fixed rate. In this work, the flexible upsampling rates are achieved via edge vector based affine combinations, and a novel design of Edge Vector based Approximation for Flexible-scale Point clouds Upsampling (PU-EVA) is proposed. The edge vector based approximation encodes the neighboring connectivity via affine combinations based on edge vectors, and restricts the approximation error within the second-order term of Taylor's Expansion. The EVA upsampling decouples the upsampling scales with network architecture, achieving the flexible upsampling rates in one-time training. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that the proposed PU-EVA outperforms the state-of-the-art in terms of proximity-to-surface, distribution uniformity, and geometric details preservation.
abstract_zh: 高质量点云对于基于点的渲染、语义理解和表面重建具有实际意义。对稀疏、嘈杂和不均匀的点云进行上采样以获得更密集和更规则的目标对象近似是一项理想但具有挑战性的任务。大多数现有方法复制点特征进行上采样，将上采样尺度限制在固定速率。在这项工作中，通过基于边缘向量的仿射组合实现灵活的上采样率，并提出了一种基于边缘向量的灵活尺度点云上采样近似（PU-EVA）的新颖设计。基于边缘向量的近似通过基于边缘向量的仿射组合对邻近连通性进行编码，并将近似误差限制在泰勒展开式的二阶项内。 EVA上采样将上采样规模与网络架构解耦，在一次性训练中实现灵活的上采样率。定性和定量评估表明，所提出的 PU-EVA 在接近表面、分布均匀性和几何细节保留方面优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于边向量的灵活尺度点云上采样方法PU-EVA，解决现有方法固定上采样比例的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有点云上采样方法受限于固定比例，难以适应不同场景需求，且难以保持几何细节与分布均匀性。
AI.method: 通过边向量仿射组合编码邻接关系，利用泰勒展开二阶项约束误差，解耦上采样尺度与网络结构实现单次训练多尺度适应。
AI.result: 在表面接近度、分布均匀性和几何细节保留指标上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: PU-EVA通过边向量近似有效实现灵活尺度点云上采样，在保持几何特征的同时提升点云质量。

authors_text: W. Ronny Huang,Shuo-yiin Chang,David Rybach,Rohit Prabhavalkar,Tara N. Sainath,Cyril Allauzen,Cal Peyser,Zhiyun Lu
title: E2E Segmenter: Joint Segmenting and Decoding for Long-Form ASR
title_zh: E2E Segmenter：长格式 ASR 的联合分段和解码
abstract: Improving the performance of end-to-end ASR models on long utterances ranging from minutes to hours in length is an ongoing challenge in speech recognition. A common solution is to segment the audio in advance using a separate voice activity detector (VAD) that decides segment boundary locations based purely on acoustic speech/non-speech information. VAD segmenters, however, may be sub-optimal for real-world speech where, e.g., a complete sentence that should be taken as a whole may contain hesitations in the middle ("set an alarm for... 5 o'clock"). We propose to replace the VAD with an end-to-end ASR model capable of predicting segment boundaries in a streaming fashion, allowing the segmentation decision to be conditioned not only on better acoustic features but also on semantic features from the decoded text with negligible extra computation. In experiments on real world long-form audio (YouTube) with lengths of up to 30 minutes, we demonstrate 8.5% relative WER improvement and 250 ms reduction in median end-of-segment latency compared to the VAD segmenter baseline on a state-of-the-art Conformer RNN-T model.
summary: Improving the performance of end-to-end ASR models on long utterances ranging from minutes to hours in length is an ongoing challenge in speech recognition. A common solution is to segment the audio in advance using a separate voice activity detector (VAD) that decides segment boundary locations based purely on acoustic speech/non-speech information. VAD segmenters, however, may be sub-optimal for real-world speech where, e.g., a complete sentence that should be taken as a whole may contain hesitations in the middle ("set an alarm for... 5 o'clock"). We propose to replace the VAD with an end-to-end ASR model capable of predicting segment boundaries in a streaming fashion, allowing the segmentation decision to be conditioned not only on better acoustic features but also on semantic features from the decoded text with negligible extra computation. In experiments on real world long-form audio (YouTube) with lengths of up to 30 minutes, we demonstrate 8.5% relative WER improvement and 250 ms reduction in median end-of-segment latency compared to the VAD segmenter baseline on a state-of-the-art Conformer RNN-T model.
abstract_zh: 提高端到端 ASR 模型在长度从几分钟到几小时的长话语上的性能是语音识别领域持续面临的挑战。常见的解决方案是使用单独的语音活动检测器 (VAD) 提前对音频进行分段，该检测器纯粹基于声学语音/非语音信息来决定分段边界位置。然而，VAD 分段器对于现实世界的语音可能不是最佳的，例如，应该作为一个整体的完整句子可能在中间包含犹豫（“设置闹钟...... 5 点”）。我们建议用能够以流方式预测分段边界的端到端 ASR 模型取代 VAD，从而允许分段决策不仅以更好的声学特征为条件，而且以解码文本的语义特征为条件，而额外的计算可以忽略不计。在长度长达 30 分钟的现实世界长格式音频 (YouTube) 的实验中，我们展示了与最先进的 Conformer RNN-T 模型上的 VAD 分段器基线相比，相对 WER 提高了 8.5%，中位段结束延迟减少了 250 毫秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的语音识别分割器（E2E Segmenter），通过联合分割和解码来改进长时长语音识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于VAD的分割方法在处理包含停顿或语义连续的长句时表现不佳，例如句子中间的犹豫（如“set an alarm for... 5 o'clock”）可能导致分割错误。
AI.method: 用端到端ASR模型替代VAD，该模型以流式方式预测分割边界，同时结合声学特征和解码文本的语义特征进行分割决策，计算开销可忽略。
AI.result: 在长达30分钟的YouTube真实音频数据上，相比VAD基线，相对词错误率（WER）降低8.5%，且分割结束的中位延迟减少250毫秒。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合语义信息，端到端分割器在长时长语音识别任务中实现了更优的分割效果和更低的延迟，优于传统VAD方法。

ai_content_json.result: 在长达30分钟的YouTube真实音频数据上，相比VAD基线，相对词错误率（WER）降低8.5%，且分割结束的中位延迟减少250毫秒。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过整合语义信息，端到端分割器在长时长语音识别任务中实现了更优的分割效果和更低的延迟，优于传统VAD方法。

tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的语音识别分割器（E2E Segmenter），通过联合分割和解码来改进长时长语音识别的性能。
motivation: 传统基于VAD的分割方法在处理包含停顿或语义连续的长句时表现不佳，例如句子中间的犹豫（如“set an alarm for... 5 o'clock”）可能导致分割错误。

result: 在长达30分钟的YouTube真实音频数据上，相比VAD基线，相对词错误率（WER）降低8.5%，且分割结束的中位延迟减少250毫秒。
conclusion: 通过整合语义信息，端到端分割器在长时长语音识别任务中实现了更优的分割效果和更低的延迟，优于传统VAD方法。
search_text: E2E Segmenter: Joint Segmenting and Decoding for Long-Form ASR E2E Segmenter：长格式 ASR 的联合分段和解码 Improving the performance of end-to-end ASR models on long utterances ranging from minutes to hours in length is an ongoing challenge in speech recognition. A common solution is to segment the audio in advance using a separate voice activity detector (VAD) that decides segment boundary locations based purely on acoustic speech/non-speech information. VAD segmenters, however, may be sub-optimal for real-world speech where, e.g., a complete sentence that should be taken as a whole may contain hesitations in the middle ("set an alarm for... 5 o'clock"). We propose to replace the VAD with an end-to-end ASR model capable of predicting segment boundaries in a streaming fashion, allowing the segmentation decision to be conditioned not only on better acoustic features but also on semantic features from the decoded text with negligible extra computation. In experiments on real world long-form audio (YouTube) with lengths of up to 30 minutes, we demonstrate 8.5% relative WER improvement and 250 ms reduction in median end-of-segment latency compared to the VAD segmenter baseline on a state-of-the-art Conformer RNN-T model. 提高端到端 ASR 模型在长度从几分钟到几小时的长话语上的性能是语音识别领域持续面临的挑战。常见的解决方案是使用单独的语音活动检测器 (VAD) 提前对音频进行分段，该检测器纯粹基于声学语音/非语音信息来决定分段边界位置。然而，VAD 分段器对于现实世界的语音可能不是最佳的，例如，应该作为一个整体的完整句子可能在中间包含犹豫（“设置闹钟...... 5 点”）。我们建议用能够以流方式预测分段边界的端到端 ASR 模型取代 VAD，从而允许分段决策不仅以更好的声学特征为条件，而且以解码文本的语义特征为条件，而额外的计算可以忽略不计。在长度长达 30 分钟的现实世界长格式音频 (YouTube) 的实验中，我们展示了与最先进的 Conformer RNN-T 模型上的 VAD 分段器基线相比，相对 WER 提高了 8.5%，中位段结束延迟减少了 250 毫秒。 本文提出了一种端到端的语音识别分割器（E2E Segmenter），通过联合分割和解码来改进长时长语音识别的性能。 W. Ronny Huang,Shuo-yiin Chang,David Rybach,Rohit Prabhavalkar,Tara N. Sainath,Cyril Allauzen,Cal Peyser,Zhiyun Lu cs.SD,cs.CL,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Leveraging Deepfakes to Close the Domain Gap between Real and Synthetic Images in Facial Capture Pipelines
title_zh: 利用 Deepfakes 缩小面部捕捉管道中真实图像和合成图像之间的域差距
abstract: We propose an end-to-end pipeline for both building and tracking 3D facial models from personalized in-the-wild (cellphone, webcam, youtube clips, etc.) video data. First, we present a method for automatic data curation and retrieval based on a hierarchical clustering framework typical of collision detection algorithms in traditional computer graphics pipelines. Subsequently, we utilize synthetic turntables and leverage deepfake technology in order to build a synthetic multi-view stereo pipeline for appearance capture that is robust to imperfect synthetic geometry and image misalignment. The resulting model is fit with an animation rig, which is then used to track facial performances. Notably, our novel use of deepfake technology enables us to perform robust tracking of in-the-wild data using differentiable renderers despite a significant synthetic-to-real domain gap. Finally, we outline how we train a motion capture regressor, leveraging the aforementioned techniques to avoid the need for real-world ground truth data and/or a high-end calibrated camera capture setup.
summary: We propose an end-to-end pipeline for both building and tracking 3D facial models from personalized in-the-wild (cellphone, webcam, youtube clips, etc.) video data. First, we present a method for automatic data curation and retrieval based on a hierarchical clustering framework typical of collision detection algorithms in traditional computer graphics pipelines. Subsequently, we utilize synthetic turntables and leverage deepfake technology in order to build a synthetic multi-view stereo pipeline for appearance capture that is robust to imperfect synthetic geometry and image misalignment. The resulting model is fit with an animation rig, which is then used to track facial performances. Notably, our novel use of deepfake technology enables us to perform robust tracking of in-the-wild data using differentiable renderers despite a significant synthetic-to-real domain gap. Finally, we outline how we train a motion capture regressor, leveraging the aforementioned techniques to avoid the need for real-world ground truth data and/or a high-end calibrated camera capture setup.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个端到端的管道，用于根据个性化的野外（手机、网络摄像头、YouTube 剪辑等）视​​频数据构建和跟踪 3D 面部模型。首先，我们提出了一种基于传统计算机图形管道中碰撞检测算法典型的分层聚类框架的自动数据管理和检索方法。随后，我们利用合成转盘并利用 Deepfake 技术来构建用于外观捕捉的合成多视图立体管道，该管道对不完美的合成几何体和图像未对准具有鲁棒性。生成的模型与动画装备相匹配，然后用于跟踪面部表现。值得注意的是，我们对 Deepfake 技术的新颖使用使我们能够使用可微渲染器对野外数据进行稳健的跟踪，尽管合成域与真实域之间存在显着差距。最后，我们概述了如何训练运动捕捉回归器，利用上述技术来避免对现实世界地面实况数据和/或高端校准相机捕捉设置的需要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端流程，通过深度伪造技术缩小真实与合成图像在面部捕捉中的领域差距，实现从真实视频数据构建和跟踪3D面部模型。
AI.motivation: 传统面部捕捉需依赖真实场景数据或高端设备，而真实与合成数据间的领域差异导致模型性能下降，亟需低成本高效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用分层聚类框架进行数据整理，结合合成旋转平台与深度伪造技术构建多视角立体捕捉流程，并利用可微渲染器实现跨领域跟踪。
AI.result: 成功训练出无需真实标注数据或高端设备的动作捕捉回归器，验证了方法在真实场景中的鲁棒性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 深度伪造技术有效弥合了合成与真实数据的领域鸿沟，为低成本面部捕捉提供了新范式，推动了相关技术在实际应用中的普及。

title: Embracing AWKWARD! Real-time Adjustment of Reactive Plans Using Social Norms
title_zh: 拥抱尴尬！利用社会规范实时调整反应计划
comment: 18 pages, 2 figures, 3 Tables, 4 Formalisms, Accepted at COINE 2022 Workshop
comments: 18 pages, 2 figures, 3 Tables, 4 Formalisms, Accepted at COINE 2022 Workshop
abstract: This paper presents the AWKWARD architecture for the development of hybrid agents in Multi-Agent Systems. AWKWARD agents can have their plans re-configured in real time to align with social role requirements under changing environmental and social circumstances. The proposed hybrid architecture makes use of Behaviour Oriented Design (BOD) to develop agents with reactive planning and of the well-established OperA framework to provide organisational, social, and interaction definitions in order to validate and adjust agents' behaviours. Together, OperA and BOD can achieve real-time adjustment of agent plans for evolving social roles, while providing the additional benefit of transparency into the interactions that drive this behavioural change in individual agents. We present this architecture to motivate the bridging between traditional symbolic- and behaviour-based AI communities, where such combined solutions can help MAS researchers in their pursuit of building stronger, more robust intelligent agent teams. We use DOTA2, a game where success is heavily dependent on social interactions, as a medium to demonstrate a sample implementation of our proposed hybrid architecture.
summary: This paper presents the AWKWARD architecture for the development of hybrid agents in Multi-Agent Systems. AWKWARD agents can have their plans re-configured in real time to align with social role requirements under changing environmental and social circumstances. The proposed hybrid architecture makes use of Behaviour Oriented Design (BOD) to develop agents with reactive planning and of the well-established OperA framework to provide organisational, social, and interaction definitions in order to validate and adjust agents' behaviours. Together, OperA and BOD can achieve real-time adjustment of agent plans for evolving social roles, while providing the additional benefit of transparency into the interactions that drive this behavioural change in individual agents. We present this architecture to motivate the bridging between traditional symbolic- and behaviour-based AI communities, where such combined solutions can help MAS researchers in their pursuit of building stronger, more robust intelligent agent teams. We use DOTA2, a game where success is heavily dependent on social interactions, as a medium to demonstrate a sample implementation of our proposed hybrid architecture.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了用于在多代理系统中开发混合代理的 AWKWARD 架构。 AWKWARD 代理可以实时重新配置他们的计划，以适应不断变化的环境和社会情况下的社会角色要求。所提出的混合架构利用行为导向设计（BOD）来开发具有反应性规划的代理，并利用完善的 OperA 框架来提供组织、社交和交互定义，以验证和调整代理的行为。 OperaA 和 BOD 可以共同实现代理计划的实时调整，以适应不断变化的社会角色，同时为推动个体代理行为变化的交互提供透明度的额外好处。我们提出这种架构是为了促进传统的基于符号和基于行为的人工智能社区之间的桥梁，这种组合解决方案可以帮助 MAS 研究人员建立更强大、更稳健的智能代理团队。我们使用 DOTA2（一款成功很大程度上依赖于社交互动的游戏）作为媒介来演示我们提出的混合架构的示例实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AWKWARD架构，通过结合行为导向设计（BOD）和OperA框架，实现多智能体系统中基于社会规范的实时反应计划调整。
AI.motivation: 传统符号主义与行为主义AI方法存在割裂，需融合以提升多智能体系统在动态社会环境中的适应性与协作能力。
AI.method: 采用BOD构建反应式规划模块，结合OperA框架定义组织规则与社会规范，通过实时交互验证与调整智能体行为，确保计划与社会角色动态对齐。
AI.result: 在DOTA2游戏中验证了架构有效性，展示了智能体在复杂社会互动场景下实时调整策略的能力。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构有效弥合符号主义与行为主义AI的鸿沟，为构建高鲁棒性智能体团队提供新范式，未来可拓展至更多社会交互密集场景。

Together, OperA and BOD can achieve real-time adjustment of agent plans for evolving social roles, while providing the additional benefit of transparency into the interactions that drive this behavioural change in individual agents. We present this architecture to motivate the bridging between traditional symbolic- and behaviour-based AI communities, where such combined solutions can help MAS researchers in their pursuit of building stronger, more robust intelligent agent teams. We use DOTA2, a game where success is heavily dependent on social interactions, as a medium to demonstrate a sample implementation of our proposed hybrid architecture. 本文提出了用于在多代理系统中开发混合代理的 AWKWARD 架构。 AWKWARD 代理可以实时重新配置他们的计划，以适应不断变化的环境和社会情况下的社会角色要求。所提出的混合架构利用行为导向设计（BOD）来开发具有反应性规划的代理，并利用完善的 OperA 框架来提供组织、社交和交互定义，以验证和调整代理的行为。 OperaA 和 BOD 可以共同实现代理计划的实时调整，以适应不断变化的社会角色，同时为推动个体代理行为变化的交互提供透明度的额外好处。我们提出这种架构是为了促进传统的基于符号和基于行为的人工智能社区之间的桥梁，这种组合解决方案可以帮助 MAS 研究人员建立更强大、更稳健的智能代理团队。我们使用 DOTA2（一款成功很大程度上依赖于社交互动的游戏）作为媒介来演示我们提出的混合架构的示例实现。 本文提出AWKWARD架构，通过结合行为导向设计（BOD）和OperA框架，实现多智能体系统中基于社会规范的实时反应计划调整。 Leila Methnani,Andreas Antoniades,Andreas Theodorou cs.MA,cs.AI

authors_text: Yunqing Hu,Xuan Jin,Yin Zhang,Haiwen Hong,Jingfeng Zhang,Feihu Yan,Yuan He,Hui Xue
title: Diverse Instance Discovery: Vision-Transformer for Instance-Aware Multi-Label Image Recognition
title_zh: 多样化实例发现：用于实例感知多标签图像识别的 Vision-Transformer
abstract: Previous works on multi-label image recognition (MLIR) usually use CNNs as a starting point for research. In this paper, we take pure Vision Transformer (ViT) as the research base and make full use of the advantages of Transformer with long-range dependency modeling to circumvent the disadvantages of CNNs limited to local receptive field. However, for multi-label images containing multiple objects from different categories, scales, and spatial relations, it is not optimal to use global information alone. Our goal is to leverage ViT's patch tokens and self-attention mechanism to mine rich instances in multi-label images, named diverse instance discovery (DiD). To this end, we propose a semantic category-aware module and a spatial relationship-aware module, respectively, and then combine the two by a re-constraint strategy to obtain instance-aware attention maps. Finally, we propose a weakly supervised object localization-based approach to extract multi-scale local features, to form a multi-view pipeline. Our method requires only weakly supervised information at the label level, no additional knowledge injection or other strongly supervised information is required. Experiments on three benchmark datasets show that our method significantly outperforms previous works and achieves state-of-the-art results under fair experimental comparisons.
summary: Previous works on multi-label image recognition (MLIR) usually use CNNs as a starting point for research. In this paper, we take pure Vision Transformer (ViT) as the research base and make full use of the advantages of Transformer with long-range dependency modeling to circumvent the disadvantages of CNNs limited to local receptive field. However, for multi-label images containing multiple objects from different categories, scales, and spatial relations, it is not optimal to use global information alone. Our goal is to leverage ViT's patch tokens and self-attention mechanism to mine rich instances in multi-label images, named diverse instance discovery (DiD). To this end, we propose a semantic category-aware module and a spatial relationship-aware module, respectively, and then combine the two by a re-constraint strategy to obtain instance-aware attention maps. Finally, we propose a weakly supervised object localization-based approach to extract multi-scale local features, to form a multi-view pipeline. Our method requires only weakly supervised information at the label level, no additional knowledge injection or other strongly supervised information is required. Experiments on three benchmark datasets show that our method significantly outperforms previous works and achieves state-of-the-art results under fair experimental comparisons.
abstract_zh: 先前的多标签图像识别（MLIR）工作通常使用 CNN 作为研究起点。在本文中，我们以纯视觉变换器（ViT）为研究基础，充分利用变换器具有远程依赖建模的优势来规避CNN仅限于局部感受野的缺点。然而，对于包含来自不同类别、尺度和空间关系的多个对象的多标签图像，单独使用全局信息并不是最佳的。我们的目标是利用 ViT 的 patch token 和 self-attention 机制来挖掘多标签图像中的丰富实例，称为多样化实例发现（DiD）。为此，我们分别提出了语义类别感知模块和空间关系感知模块，然后通过重新约束策略将两者结合起来以获得实例感知注意图。最后，我们提出了一种基于弱监督对象定位的方法来提取多尺度局部特征，以形成多视图管道。我们的方法只需要标签级别的弱监督信息，不需要额外的知识注入或其他强监督信息。对三个基准数据集的实验表明，我们的方法显着优于以前的工作，并在公平的实验比较下实现了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于纯视觉Transformer（ViT）的多标签图像识别方法，通过挖掘多实例特征提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在多标签图像识别中受限于局部感受野，而纯ViT虽具备长距离依赖建模优势，但对包含多尺度、多类别物体的图像仍需结合局部信息。
AI.method: 设计语义类别感知模块与空间关系感知模块，通过再约束策略融合生成实例感知注意力图，并采用弱监督目标定位方法提取多尺度局部特征构建多视角流水线。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合ViT的全局建模能力与局部实例特征，无需强监督信息即可实现多标签图像识别的性能突破。

title: Revealing interactions between HVDC cross-area flows and frequency stability with explainable AI
title_zh: 通过可解释的 AI 揭示 HVDC 跨区域流量与频率稳定性之间的相互作用
abstract: The energy transition introduces more volatile energy sources into the power grids. In this context, power transfer between different synchronous areas through High Voltage Direct Current (HVDC) links becomes increasingly important. Such links can balance volatile generation by enabling long-distance transport or by leveraging their fast control behavior. Here, we investigate the interaction of power imbalances - represented through the power grid frequency - and power flows on HVDC links between synchronous areas in Europe. We use explainable machine learning to identify key dependencies and disentangle the interaction of critical features. Our results show that market-based HVDC flows introduce deterministic frequency deviations, which however can be mitigated through strict ramping limits. Moreover, varying HVDC operation modes strongly affect the interaction with the grid. In particular, we show that load-frequency control via HVDC links can both have control-like or disturbance-like impacts on frequency stability.
summary: The energy transition introduces more volatile energy sources into the power grids. In this context, power transfer between different synchronous areas through High Voltage Direct Current (HVDC) links becomes increasingly important. Such links can balance volatile generation by enabling long-distance transport or by leveraging their fast control behavior. Here, we investigate the interaction of power imbalances - represented through the power grid frequency - and power flows on HVDC links between synchronous areas in Europe. We use explainable machine learning to identify key dependencies and disentangle the interaction of critical features. Our results show that market-based HVDC flows introduce deterministic frequency deviations, which however can be mitigated through strict ramping limits. Moreover, varying HVDC operation modes strongly affect the interaction with the grid. In particular, we show that load-frequency control via HVDC links can both have control-like or disturbance-like impacts on frequency stability.
abstract_zh: 能源转型将更多不稳定的能源引入电网。在此背景下，通过高压直流（HVDC）链路在不同同步区域之间进行电力传输变得越来越重要。此类链路可以通过实现长距离传输或利用其快速控制行为来平衡不稳定的产生。在这里，我们研究了电力不平衡（通过电网频率表示）与欧洲同步区域之间高压直流输电链路上的功率流的相互作用。我们使用可解释的机器学习来识别关键依赖性并理清关键特征的交互。我们的结果表明，基于市场的高压直流输电流量会引入确定性频率偏差，但可以通过严格的斜坡限制来缓解。此外，不同的高压直流输电运行模式强烈影响与电网的相互作用。特别是，我们表明通过高压直流链路进行负载频率控制可以对频率稳定性产生类似控制或类似干扰的影响。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过可解释人工智能方法研究高压直流（HVDC）跨区域输电与电网频率稳定性的相互作用。
AI.motivation: 能源转型导致电网中波动性能源增加，HVDC输电在平衡区域间电力供需中扮演关键角色，但其与频率稳定性的复杂交互机制尚未明确。
AI.method: 采用可解释机器学习技术，分析欧洲同步区域间HVDC输电功率流动与电网频率波动的关键依赖关系及交互特征。
AI.result: 市场驱动的HVDC输电会引发确定性频率偏差，但可通过严格爬坡限制缓解；不同HVDC运行模式显著影响电网交互特性，其负荷频率控制可能产生控制或扰动双重效应。
AI.conclusion: 可解释AI有效揭示了HVDC运行与频率稳定性的内在关联，表明通过优化HVDC控制策略可增强电网稳定性。

title: Determinants from homomorphisms
title_zh: 同态的决定因素
abstract: We give a new combinatorial explanation for well-known relations between determinants and traces of matrix powers. Such relations can be used to obtain polynomial-time and poly-logarithmic space algorithms for the determinant. Our new explanation avoids linear-algebraic arguments and instead exploits a classical connection between subgraph and homomorphism counts.
summary: We give a new combinatorial explanation for well-known relations between determinants and traces of matrix powers. Such relations can be used to obtain polynomial-time and poly-logarithmic space algorithms for the determinant. Our new explanation avoids linear-algebraic arguments and instead exploits a classical connection between subgraph and homomorphism counts.
abstract_zh: 我们对矩阵幂的行列式和迹之间众所周知的关系给出了新的组合解释。这种关系可用于获得行列式的多项式时间和多对数空间算法。我们的新解释避免了线性代数论证，而是利​​用了子图和同态计数之间的经典联系。

AI.tldr: 本文通过同态计数提供行列式与矩阵幂迹关系的新组合解释。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖线性代数证明行列式与迹的关系，而作者希望寻找更简洁的组合解释以优化算法设计。
AI.method: 利用子图计数与同态计数的经典关联，替代传统线性代数方法。
AI.result: 获得多项式时间及对数空间复杂度的行列式计算算法。
AI.conclusion: 组合方法为理解行列式性质提供了新视角，促进高效算法开发。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过同态计数提供行列式与矩阵幂迹关系的新组合解释。
ai_content.motivation: 传统方法依赖线性代数证明行列式与迹的关系，而作者希望寻找更简洁的组合解释以优化算法设计。
ai_content.method: 利用子图计数与同态计数的经典关联，替代传统线性代数方法。

search_text: Determinants from homomorphisms 同态的决定因素 We give a new combinatorial explanation for well-known relations between determinants and traces of matrix powers. Such relations can be used to obtain polynomial-time and poly-logarithmic space algorithms for the determinant. Our new explanation avoids linear-algebraic arguments and instead exploits a classical connection between subgraph and homomorphism counts. 我们对矩阵幂的行列式和迹之间众所周知的关系给出了新的组合解释。这种关系可用于获得行列式的多项式时间和多对数空间算法。我们的新解释避免了线性代数论证，而是利​​用了子图和同态计数之间的经典联系。 本文通过同态计数提供行列式与矩阵幂迹关系的新组合解释。 Radu Curticapean math.CO,cs.CC,cs.DS

title: EmbedTrack -- Simultaneous Cell Segmentation and Tracking Through Learning Offsets and Clustering Bandwidths
title_zh: EmbedTrack——通过学习偏移量和聚类带宽进行同步细胞分割和跟踪
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: A systematic analysis of the cell behavior requires automated approaches for cell segmentation and tracking. While deep learning has been successfully applied for the task of cell segmentation, there are few approaches for simultaneous cell segmentation and tracking using deep learning. Here, we present EmbedTrack, a single convolutional neural network for simultaneous cell segmentation and tracking which predicts easy to interpret embeddings. As embeddings, offsets of cell pixels to their cell center and bandwidths are learned. We benchmark our approach on nine 2D data sets from the Cell Tracking Challenge, where our approach performs on seven out of nine data sets within the top 3 contestants including three top 1 performances. The source code is publicly available at https://git.scc.kit.edu/kit-loe-ge/embedtrack.
summary: A systematic analysis of the cell behavior requires automated approaches for cell segmentation and tracking. While deep learning has been successfully applied for the task of cell segmentation, there are few approaches for simultaneous cell segmentation and tracking using deep learning. Here, we present EmbedTrack, a single convolutional neural network for simultaneous cell segmentation and tracking which predicts easy to interpret embeddings. As embeddings, offsets of cell pixels to their cell center and bandwidths are learned. We benchmark our approach on nine 2D data sets from the Cell Tracking Challenge, where our approach performs on seven out of nine data sets within the top 3 contestants including three top 1 performances. The source code is publicly available at https://git.scc.kit.edu/kit-loe-ge/embedtrack.
abstract_zh: 对细胞行为的系统分析需要自动化的细胞分割和跟踪方法。虽然深度学习已成功应用于细胞分割任务，但使用深度学习同时进行细胞分割和跟踪的方法很少。在这里，我们提出了 EmbedTrack，这是一个用于同时进行细胞分割和跟踪的单个卷积神经网络，它可以预测易于解释的嵌入。作为嵌入，学习单元像素相对于单元中心的偏移和带宽。我们在 Cell Tracking Challenge 的 9 个 2D 数据集上对我们的方法进行了基准测试，其中我们的方法在前 3 名参赛者的 9 个数据集中的 7 个上执行，其中包括 3 个前 1 名的表现。源代码可在 https://git.scc.kit.edu/kit-loe-ge/embedtrack 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EmbedTrack，一种通过学习偏移量和聚类带宽实现细胞分割与追踪的深度学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法多专注于细胞分割，缺乏同时进行分割与追踪的高效方案，需开发更全面的自动化分析工具。
AI.method: 设计单一流形卷积神经网络，预测细胞像素到中心的偏移量及聚类带宽作为可解释嵌入，实现分割与追踪的联合优化。
AI.result: 在Cell Tracking Challenge的九个2D数据集中，七个数据集排名前三，其中三个数据集取得第一名，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: EmbedTrack通过嵌入学习有效结合分割与追踪任务，在多个基准数据集上验证了方法的优越性与实用性。

title: Tweets2Stance: Users stance detection exploiting Zero-Shot Learning Algorithms on Tweets
title_zh: Tweets2Stance：利用推文上的零样本学习算法进行用户姿态检测
abstract: In the last years there has been a growing attention towards predicting the political orientation of active social media users, being this of great help to study political forecasts, opinion dynamics modeling and users polarization. Existing approaches, mainly targeting Twitter users, rely on content-based analysis or are based on a mixture of content, network and communication analysis. The recent research perspective exploits the fact that a user's political affinity mainly depends on his/her positions on major political and social issues, thus shifting the focus on detecting the stance of users through user-generated content shared on social networks. The work herein described focuses on a completely unsupervised stance detection framework that predicts the user's stance about specific social-political statements by exploiting content-based analysis of its Twitter timeline. The ground-truth user's stance may come from Voting Advice Applications, online tools that help citizens to identify their political leanings by comparing their political preferences with party political stances. Starting from the knowledge of the agreement level of six parties on 20 different statements, the objective of the study is to predict the stance of a Party p in regard to each statement s exploiting what the Twitter Party account wrote on Twitter. To this end we propose Tweets2Stance (T2S), a novel and totally unsupervised stance detector framework which relies on the zero-shot learning technique to quickly and accurately operate on non-labeled data. Interestingly, T2S can be applied to any social media user for any context of interest, not limited to the political one. Results obtained from multiple experiments show that, although the general maximum F1 value is 0.4, T2S can correctly predict the stance with a general minimum MAE of 1.13, which is a great achievement considering the task complexity.
summary: In the last years there has been a growing attention towards predicting the political orientation of active social media users, being this of great help to study political forecasts, opinion dynamics modeling and users polarization. Existing approaches, mainly targeting Twitter users, rely on content-based analysis or are based on a mixture of content, network and communication analysis. The recent research perspective exploits the fact that a user's political affinity mainly depends on his/her positions on major political and social issues, thus shifting the focus on detecting the stance of users through user-generated content shared on social networks. The work herein described focuses on a completely unsupervised stance detection framework that predicts the user's stance about specific social-political statements by exploiting content-based analysis of its Twitter timeline. The ground-truth user's stance may come from Voting Advice Applications, online tools that help citizens to identify their political leanings by comparing their political preferences with party political stances. Starting from the knowledge of the agreement level of six parties on 20 different statements, the objective of the study is to predict the stance of a Party p in regard to each statement s exploiting what the Twitter Party account wrote on Twitter. To this end we propose Tweets2Stance (T2S), a novel and totally unsupervised stance detector framework which relies on the zero-shot learning technique to quickly and accurately operate on non-labeled data. Interestingly, T2S can be applied to any social media user for any context of interest, not limited to the political one. Results obtained from multiple experiments show that, although the general maximum F1 value is 0.4, T2S can correctly predict the stance with a general minimum MAE of 1.13, which is a great achievement considering the task complexity.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，人们越来越关注预测活跃社交媒体用户的政治倾向，这对于研究政治预测、舆论动态模型和用户两极分化有很大帮助。现有的方法主要针对 Twitter 用户，依赖于基于内容的分析或基于内容、网络和通信分析的混合。最近的研究视角利用了用户的政治亲和力主要取决于他/她在重大政治和社会问题上的立场这一事实，从而将重点转移到通过在社交网络上共享的用户生成的内容来检测用户的立场。本文描述的工作重点关注完全无监督的立场检测框架，该框架通过利用对 Twitter 时间线的基于内容的分析来预测用户对特定社会政治言论的立场。真实用户的立场可能来自投票建议应用程序，这是一种在线工具，可以通过将公民的政治偏好与政党政治立场进行比较来帮助公民识别他们的政治倾向。该研究的目的是从六方对 20 种不同声明的一致程度的了解出发，预测一方 p 对利用 Twitter 党账户在 Twitter 上所写内容的每条声明的立场。为此，我们提出了 Tweets2Stance (T2S)，这是一种新颖且完全无监督的姿态检测器框架，它依赖于零样本学习技术来快速准确地对非标记数据进行操作。有趣的是，T2S 可以应用于任何社交媒体用户的任何兴趣背景，而不仅限于政治背景。多次实验的结果表明，虽然一般最大F1值为0.4，但T2S可以正确预测姿态，一般最小MAE为1.13，考虑到任务复杂性，这是一个伟大的成就。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于零样本学习的无监督框架Tweets2Stance（T2S），通过分析用户推文内容来检测其对特定社会政治声明的立场。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖内容、网络或通信分析预测用户政治倾向，但难以准确捕捉用户对具体议题的立场。本文旨在通过用户生成内容和零样本学习技术，无需标注数据即可高效检测用户立场。
AI.method: 利用零样本学习技术，基于用户推文时间线进行内容分析，结合六个政党的20条声明的共识水平，通过政党推文预测其立场，框架完全无监督且适用于任意社交媒体用户。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，T2S在复杂任务中取得显著成果，最大F1值为0.4，最小平均绝对误差（MAE）为1.13。
AI.conclusion: T2S证明了零样本学习在无监督立场检测中的有效性，且具有跨领域应用潜力，为政治预测和舆论分析提供了新方法。

Results obtained from multiple experiments show that, although the general maximum F1 value is 0.4, T2S can correctly predict the stance with a general minimum MAE of 1.13, which is a great achievement considering the task complexity. 在过去的几年里，人们越来越关注预测活跃社交媒体用户的政治倾向，这对于研究政治预测、舆论动态模型和用户两极分化有很大帮助。现有的方法主要针对 Twitter 用户，依赖于基于内容的分析或基于内容、网络和通信分析的混合。最近的研究视角利用了用户的政治亲和力主要取决于他/她在重大政治和社会问题上的立场这一事实，从而将重点转移到通过在社交网络上共享的用户生成的内容来检测用户的立场。本文描述的工作重点关注完全无监督的立场检测框架，该框架通过利用对 Twitter 时间线的基于内容的分析来预测用户对特定社会政治言论的立场。真实用户的立场可能来自投票建议应用程序，这是一种在线工具，可以通过将公民的政治偏好与政党政治立场进行比较来帮助公民识别他们的政治倾向。该研究的目的是从六方对 20 种不同声明的一致程度的了解出发，预测一方 p 对利用 Twitter 党账户在 Twitter 上所写内容的每条声明的立场。为此，我们提出了 Tweets2Stance (T2S)，这是一种新颖且完全无监督的姿态检测器框架，它依赖于零样本学习技术来快速准确地对非标记数据进行操作。有趣的是，T2S 可以应用于任何社交媒体用户的任何兴趣背景，而不仅限于政治背景。多次实验的结果表明，虽然一般最大F1值为0.4，但T2S可以正确预测姿态，一般最小MAE为1.13，考虑到任务复杂性，这是一个伟大的成就。 本文提出了一种基于零样本学习的无监督框架Tweets2Stance（T2S），通过分析用户推文内容来检测其对特定社会政治声明的立场。 Margherita Gambini,Tiziano Fagni,Caterina Senette,Maurizio Tesconi cs.SI,cs.AI

authors_text: Runzhe Zhu,Ling Yin,Mingze Yang,Fei Wu,Yuncheng Yang,Wenbo Hu
title: SUES-200: A Multi-height Multi-scene Cross-view Image Benchmark Across Drone and Satellite
title_zh: SUES-200：无人机和卫星的多高度多场景交叉视图图像基准
abstract: Cross-view image matching aims to match images of the same target scene acquired from different platforms. With the rapid development of drone technology, cross-view matching by neural network models has been a widely accepted choice for drone position or navigation. However, existing public datasets do not include images obtained by drones at different heights, and the types of scenes are relatively homogeneous, which yields issues in assessing a model's capability to adapt to complex and changing scenes. In this end, we present a new cross-view dataset called SUES-200 to address these issues. SUES-200 contains 24120 images acquired by the drone at four different heights and corresponding satellite view images of the same target scene. To the best of our knowledge, SUES-200 is the first public dataset that considers the differences generated in aerial photography captured by drones flying at different heights. In addition, we developed an evaluation for efficient training, testing and evaluation of cross-view matching models, under which we comprehensively analyze the performance of nine architectures. Then, we propose a robust baseline model for use with SUES-200. Experimental results show that SUES-200 can help the model to learn highly discriminative features of the height of the drone.
summary: Cross-view image matching aims to match images of the same target scene acquired from different platforms. With the rapid development of drone technology, cross-view matching by neural network models has been a widely accepted choice for drone position or navigation. However, existing public datasets do not include images obtained by drones at different heights, and the types of scenes are relatively homogeneous, which yields issues in assessing a model's capability to adapt to complex and changing scenes. In this end, we present a new cross-view dataset called SUES-200 to address these issues. SUES-200 contains 24120 images acquired by the drone at four different heights and corresponding satellite view images of the same target scene. To the best of our knowledge, SUES-200 is the first public dataset that considers the differences generated in aerial photography captured by drones flying at different heights. In addition, we developed an evaluation for efficient training, testing and evaluation of cross-view matching models, under which we comprehensively analyze the performance of nine architectures. Then, we propose a robust baseline model for use with SUES-200. Experimental results show that SUES-200 can help the model to learn highly discriminative features of the height of the drone.
abstract_zh: 跨视角图像匹配旨在匹配从不同平台获取的同一目标场景的图像。随着无人机技术的快速发展，神经网络模型的交叉视图匹配已成为无人机定位或导航的广泛接受的选择。然而，现有的公共数据集不包含无人机在不同高度获得的图像，且场景类型相对同质，这在评估模型适应复杂多变场景的能力时产生了问题。最后，我们提出了一个名为 SUES-200 的新跨视图数据集来解决这些问题。 SUES-200包含无人机在四个不同高度采集的24120张图像以及同一目标场景的相应卫星视图图像。据我们所知，SUES-200 是第一个考虑不同高度无人机拍摄的航空摄影所产生差异的公共数据集。此外，我们还开发了跨视图匹配模型的高效训练、测试和评估的评估方法，在该评估方法下，我们全面分析了九种架构的性能。然后，我们提出了一个与 SUES-200 一起使用的稳健基线模型。实验结果表明，SUES-200可以帮助模型学习无人机高度的高判别性特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为SUES-200的跨视角图像数据集，包含无人机在不同高度拍摄的图像与对应卫星视图，用于改进跨视角图像匹配模型的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有公开数据集缺乏无人机多高度拍摄图像且场景类型单一，难以全面评估模型对复杂场景的适应能力。
AI.method: 采集无人机四类高度拍摄的24120张图像及其对应卫星视图，构建跨视角数据集，并开发评估框架对九种模型架构进行训练测试，提出稳健基线模型。
AI.result: 实验表明SUES-200能帮助模型学习区分无人机高度的高判别性特征，验证了数据集的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SUES-200是首个考虑无人机飞行高度差异的公开跨视角数据集，为后续研究提供了基准模型和评估方案。

title: Graph Gain: A Concave-Hull Based Volumetric Gain for Robotic Exploration
title_zh: 图增益：用于机器人探索的基于凹壳的体积增益
abstract: The existing volumetric gain for robotic exploration is calculated in the 3D occupancy map, while the sampling-based exploration method is extended in the reachable (free) space. The inconsistency between them makes the existing calculation of volumetric gain inappropriate for a complete exploration of the environment. To address this issue, we propose a concave-hull based volumetric gain in a sampling-based exploration framework. The concave hull is constructed based on the viewpoints generated by Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT) and the nodes that fail to expand. All space outside this concave hull is considered unknown. The volumetric gain is calculated based on the viewpoints configuration rather than using the occupancy map. With the new volumetric gain, robots can avoid inefficient or even erroneous exploration behavior caused by the inappropriateness of existing volumetric gain calculation methods. Our exploration method is evaluated against the existing state-of-the-art RRT-based method in a benchmark environment. In the evaluated environment, the average running time of our method is about 38.4% of the existing state-of-the-art method and our method is more robust.
summary: The existing volumetric gain for robotic exploration is calculated in the 3D occupancy map, while the sampling-based exploration method is extended in the reachable (free) space. The inconsistency between them makes the existing calculation of volumetric gain inappropriate for a complete exploration of the environment. To address this issue, we propose a concave-hull based volumetric gain in a sampling-based exploration framework. The concave hull is constructed based on the viewpoints generated by Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT) and the nodes that fail to expand. All space outside this concave hull is considered unknown. The volumetric gain is calculated based on the viewpoints configuration rather than using the occupancy map. With the new volumetric gain, robots can avoid inefficient or even erroneous exploration behavior caused by the inappropriateness of existing volumetric gain calculation methods. Our exploration method is evaluated against the existing state-of-the-art RRT-based method in a benchmark environment. In the evaluated environment, the average running time of our method is about 38.4% of the existing state-of-the-art method and our method is more robust.
abstract_zh: 机器人探索现有的体积增益是在 3D 占用图中计算的，而基于采样的探索方法则扩展到可到达（自由）空间。它们之间的不一致使得现有的体积增益计算不适合对环境进行完整的探索。为了解决这个问题，我们在基于采样的探索框架中提出了基于凹壳的体积增益。凹壳是根据快速探索随机树（RRT）生成的视点和扩展失败的节点构建的。该凹形船体之外的所有空间都被认为是未知的。体积增益是根据视点配置而不是使用占用图来计算的。借助新的体积增益，机器人可以避免因现有体积增益计算方法不合适而导致的低效甚至错误的探索行为。我们的探索方法是在基准环境中根据现有最先进的基于 RRT 的方法进行评估的。在评估环境中，我们的方法的平均运行时间约为现有最先进方法的38.4%，并且我们的方法更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于凹包的体积增益方法，用于改进机器人探索中的采样框架。
AI.motivation: 现有体积增益计算依赖3D占用地图，而采样方法在自由空间扩展，两者不一致导致探索效率低下。
AI.method: 基于RRT生成的视角和未扩展节点构建凹包，将凹包外空间视为未知，通过视角配置计算体积增益。
AI.result: 在基准环境中，新方法平均运行时间仅为现有最优方法的38.4%，且鲁棒性更强。
AI.conclusion: 凹包体积增益方法有效解决了现有计算不一致问题，提升了机器人探索效率和可靠性。
