title: Reinforcing Generated Images via Meta-learning for One-Shot Fine-Grained Visual Recognition
title_zh: 通过元学习强化生成的图像以实现一次性细粒度视觉识别
comment: Accepted to PAMI 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1911.07164
comments: Accepted to PAMI 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1911.07164
abstract: One-shot fine-grained visual recognition often suffers from the problem of having few training examples for new fine-grained classes. To alleviate this problem, off-the-shelf image generation techniques based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) can potentially create additional training images. However, these GAN-generated images are often not helpful for actually improving the accuracy of one-shot fine-grained recognition. In this paper, we propose a meta-learning framework to combine generated images with original images, so that the resulting "hybrid" training images improve one-shot learning. Specifically, the generic image generator is updated by a few training instances of novel classes, and a Meta Image Reinforcing Network (MetaIRNet) is proposed to conduct one-shot fine-grained recognition as well as image reinforcement. Our experiments demonstrate consistent improvement over baselines on one-shot fine-grained image classification benchmarks. Furthermore, our analysis shows that the reinforced images have more diversity compared to the original and GAN-generated images.
summary: One-shot fine-grained visual recognition often suffers from the problem of having few training examples for new fine-grained classes. To alleviate this problem, off-the-shelf image generation techniques based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) can potentially create additional training images. However, these GAN-generated images are often not helpful for actually improving the accuracy of one-shot fine-grained recognition. In this paper, we propose a meta-learning framework to combine generated images with original images, so that the resulting "hybrid" training images improve one-shot learning. Specifically, the generic image generator is updated by a few training instances of novel classes, and a Meta Image Reinforcing Network (MetaIRNet) is proposed to conduct one-shot fine-grained recognition as well as image reinforcement. Our experiments demonstrate consistent improvement over baselines on one-shot fine-grained image classification benchmarks. Furthermore, our analysis shows that the reinforced images have more diversity compared to the original and GAN-generated images.
abstract_zh: 一次性细粒度视觉识别通常会遇到新细粒度类的训练样例很少的问题。为了缓解这个问题，基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的现成图像生成技术可以创建额外的训练图像。然而，这些 GAN 生成的图像通常对于实际提高一次性细粒度识别的准确性没有帮助。在本文中，我们提出了一种元学习框架，将生成的图像与原始图像相结合，从而得到的“混合”训练图像可以改善一次性学习。具体来说，通用图像生成器通过一些新类的训练实例进行更新，并提出了元图像强化网络（MetaIRNet）来进行一次性细粒度识别和图像强化。我们的实验证明了一次性细粒度图像分类基准的基线持续改进。此外，我们的分析表明，与原始图像和 GAN 生成的图像相比，增强后的图像具有更多的多样性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习的框架，通过结合生成图像与原始图像来提升少样本细粒度视觉识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 少样本细粒度识别因新类别训练样本稀缺而面临挑战，现有生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的图像难以有效提升识别准确率。
AI.method: 设计元图像强化网络（MetaIRNet），利用少量新类别样本更新通用图像生成器，并通过元学习框架实现图像增强与识别任务的联合优化。
AI.result: 在少样本细粒度分类基准测试中持续优于基线方法，强化后的图像相比原始图像和GAN生成图像具有更高多样性。
AI.conclusion: 元学习框架有效融合生成图像与真实数据，通过图像多样性增强显著提升少样本细粒度识别性能。

search_text: Reinforcing Generated Images via Meta-learning for One-Shot Fine-Grained Visual Recognition 通过元学习强化生成的图像以实现一次性细粒度视觉识别 One-shot fine-grained visual recognition often suffers from the problem of having few training examples for new fine-grained classes. To alleviate this problem, off-the-shelf image generation techniques based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) can potentially create additional training images. However, these GAN-generated images are often not helpful for actually improving the accuracy of one-shot fine-grained recognition. In this paper, we propose a meta-learning framework to combine generated images with original images, so that the resulting "hybrid" training images improve one-shot learning. Specifically, the generic image generator is updated by a few training instances of novel classes, and a Meta Image Reinforcing Network (MetaIRNet) is proposed to conduct one-shot fine-grained recognition as well as image reinforcement. Our experiments demonstrate consistent improvement over baselines on one-shot fine-grained image classification benchmarks. Furthermore, our analysis shows that the reinforced images have more diversity compared to the original and GAN-generated images. 一次性细粒度视觉识别通常会遇到新细粒度类的训练样例很少的问题。为了缓解这个问题，基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的现成图像生成技术可以创建额外的训练图像。然而，这些 GAN 生成的图像通常对于实际提高一次性细粒度识别的准确性没有帮助。在本文中，我们提出了一种元学习框架，将生成的图像与原始图像相结合，从而得到的“混合”训练图像可以改善一次性学习。具体来说，通用图像生成器通过一些新类的训练实例进行更新，并提出了元图像强化网络（MetaIRNet）来进行一次性细粒度识别和图像强化。我们的实验证明了一次性细粒度图像分类基准的基线持续改进。此外，我们的分析表明，与原始图像和 GAN 生成的图像相比，增强后的图像具有更多的多样性。 本文提出一种基于元学习的框架，通过结合生成图像与原始图像来提升少样本细粒度视觉识别的性能。 Satoshi Tsutsui,Yanwei Fu,David Crandall cs.CV

title: Spatiality-guided Transformer for 3D Dense Captioning on Point Clouds
title_zh: 用于点云上 3D 密集字幕的空间引导变压器
abstract: Dense captioning in 3D point clouds is an emerging vision-and-language task involving object-level 3D scene understanding. Apart from coarse semantic class prediction and bounding box regression as in traditional 3D object detection, 3D dense captioning aims at producing a further and finer instance-level label of natural language description on visual appearance and spatial relations for each scene object of interest. To detect and describe objects in a scene, following the spirit of neural machine translation, we propose a transformer-based encoder-decoder architecture, namely SpaCap3D, to transform objects into descriptions, where we especially investigate the relative spatiality of objects in 3D scenes and design a spatiality-guided encoder via a token-to-token spatial relation learning objective and an object-centric decoder for precise and spatiality-enhanced object caption generation. Evaluated on two benchmark datasets, ScanRefer and ReferIt3D, our proposed SpaCap3D outperforms the baseline method Scan2Cap by 4.94% and 9.61% in CIDEr@0.5IoU, respectively. Our project page with source code and supplementary files is available at https://SpaCap3D.github.io/ .
summary: Dense captioning in 3D point clouds is an emerging vision-and-language task involving object-level 3D scene understanding. Apart from coarse semantic class prediction and bounding box regression as in traditional 3D object detection, 3D dense captioning aims at producing a further and finer instance-level label of natural language description on visual appearance and spatial relations for each scene object of interest. To detect and describe objects in a scene, following the spirit of neural machine translation, we propose a transformer-based encoder-decoder architecture, namely SpaCap3D, to transform objects into descriptions, where we especially investigate the relative spatiality of objects in 3D scenes and design a spatiality-guided encoder via a token-to-token spatial relation learning objective and an object-centric decoder for precise and spatiality-enhanced object caption generation. Evaluated on two benchmark datasets, ScanRefer and ReferIt3D, our proposed SpaCap3D outperforms the baseline method Scan2Cap by 4.94% and 9.61% in CIDEr@0.5IoU, respectively. Our project page with source code and supplementary files is available at https://SpaCap3D.github.io/ .
abstract_zh: 3D 点云中的密集字幕是一项新兴的视觉和语言任务，涉及对象级 3D 场景理解。除了传统 3D 对象检测中的粗略语义类预测和边界框回归之外，3D 密集字幕的目的是为每个感兴趣的场景对象的视觉外观和空间关系生成更进一步、更精细的自然语言描述的实例级标签。为了检测和描述场景中的对象，遵循神经机器翻译的精神，我们提出了一种基于变压器的编码器解码器架构，即 SpaCap3D，将对象转换为描述，其中我们特别研究 3D 场景中对象的相对空间性，并通过令牌到令牌空间关系学习目标和以对象为中心的解码器设计一个空间引导编码器，以实现精确和空间增强的对象标题生成。在两个基准数据集 ScanRefer 和 ReferIt3D 上进行评估，我们提出的 SpaCap3D 在 CIDEr@0.5IoU 中分别比基线方法 Scan2Cap 好 4.94% 和 9.61%。我们的项目页面包含源代码和补充文件，可在 https://SpaCap3D.github.io/ 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空间引导Transformer的三维点云密集字幕生成方法，通过建模物体空间关系提升描述精度。
AI.motivation: 现有三维目标检测仅实现粗粒度语义预测，无法生成包含物体外观与空间关系的细粒度自然语言描述，需探索更精确的建模方式。
AI.method: 设计SpaCap3D架构，包含空间关系学习编码器和物体中心解码器，通过token级空间关系建模与解码器优化实现空间感知的字幕生成。
AI.result: 在ScanRefer和ReferIt3D数据集上，CIDEr@0.5IoU指标分别超越基线Scan2Cap 4.94%和9.61%。
AI.conclusion: 空间引导机制有效捕捉三维场景中物体的空间依赖性，验证了该方法在密集字幕任务中的优越性。

authors_text: Davide Bilò,Keerti Choudhary,Sarel Cohen,Tobias Friedrich,Martin Schirneck
title: Deterministic Sensitivity Oracles for Diameter, Eccentricities and All Pairs Distances
title_zh: 直径、偏心率和所有线对距离的确定性灵敏度预言
comment: Full version of an ICALP 2022 paper
comments: Full version of an ICALP 2022 paper
abstract: We construct data structures for extremal and pairwise distances in directed graphs in the presence of transient edge failures. Henzinger et al. [ITCS 2017] initiated the study of fault-tolerant (sensitivity) oracles for the diameter and vertex eccentricities. We extend this with a special focus on space efficiency. We present several new data structures, among them the first fault-tolerant eccentricity oracle for dual failures in subcubic space. We further prove lower bounds that show limits to approximation vs. space and diameter vs. space trade-offs for fault-tolerant oracles. They highlight key differences between data structures for undirected and directed graphs. Initially, our oracles are randomized leaning on a sampling technique frequently used in sensitivity analysis. Building on the work of Alon, Chechik, and Cohen [ICALP 2019] as well as Karthik and Parter [SODA 2021], we develop a hierarchical framework to derandomize fault-tolerant data structures. We first apply it to our own diameter and eccentricity oracles and then show its versatility by derandomizing algorithms from the literature: the distance sensitivity oracle of Ren [JCSS 2022] and the Single-Source Replacement Path algorithm of Chechik and Magen [ICALP 2020]. This way, we obtain the first deterministic distance sensitivity oracle with subcubic preprocessing time.
summary: We construct data structures for extremal and pairwise distances in directed graphs in the presence of transient edge failures. Henzinger et al. [ITCS 2017] initiated the study of fault-tolerant (sensitivity) oracles for the diameter and vertex eccentricities. We extend this with a special focus on space efficiency. We present several new data structures, among them the first fault-tolerant eccentricity oracle for dual failures in subcubic space. We further prove lower bounds that show limits to approximation vs. space and diameter vs. space trade-offs for fault-tolerant oracles. They highlight key differences between data structures for undirected and directed graphs. Initially, our oracles are randomized leaning on a sampling technique frequently used in sensitivity analysis. Building on the work of Alon, Chechik, and Cohen [ICALP 2019] as well as Karthik and Parter [SODA 2021], we develop a hierarchical framework to derandomize fault-tolerant data structures. We first apply it to our own diameter and eccentricity oracles and then show its versatility by derandomizing algorithms from the literature: the distance sensitivity oracle of Ren [JCSS 2022] and the Single-Source Replacement Path algorithm of Chechik and Magen [ICALP 2020]. This way, we obtain the first deterministic distance sensitivity oracle with subcubic preprocessing time.
abstract_zh: 我们在存在瞬态边缘故障的情况下构建有向图中的极值和成对距离的数据结构。亨辛格等人。 [ITCS 2017] 启动了直径和顶点偏心率的容错（敏感性）预言机的研究。我们对此进行了扩展，特别关注空间效率。我们提出了几种新的数据结构，其中包括第一个用于亚立方空间中双重故障的容错偏心率预言机。我们进一步证明了下界，显示了容错预言机的近似与空间以及直径与空间权衡的限制。它们强调了无向图和有向图数据结构之间的关键区别。最初，我们的预言机是根据敏感性分析中常用的抽样技术进行随机的。基于 Alon、Chechik 和 Cohen [ICALP 2019] 以及 Karthik 和 Parter [SODA 2021] 的工作，我们开发了一个分层框架来去随机化容错数据结构。我们首先将其应用于我们自己的直径和偏心率预言机，然后通过对文献中的算法进行去随机化来展示其多功能性：Ren 的距离灵敏度预言机 [JCSS 2022] 以及 Chechik 和 Magen 的单源替换路径算法 [ICALP 2020]。这样，我们获得了第一个具有亚三次预处理时间的确定性距离灵敏度预言。

AI.tldr: 该论文设计了用于处理有向图中瞬时边故障的确定性灵敏度预言机，以高效计算直径、偏心率和所有点对距离。
AI.motivation: 现有故障容忍预言机在空间效率和近似精度上存在局限，尤其针对有向图的差异性研究不足，需改进数据结构以平衡空间与计算效率。
AI.method: 结合随机采样技术与分层框架实现去随机化，扩展并优化已有算法，构建子立方空间复杂度的容错数据结构。
AI.result: 首次提出子立方空间的双故障容错偏心率预言机，实现首个确定性距离灵敏度预言机，且预处理时间为子立方级。
AI.conclusion: 通过去随机化框架提升了容错数据结构的效率与确定性，揭示了有向图与无向图在空间与精度权衡上的本质差异。

ai_content_json.result: 首次提出子立方空间的双故障容错偏心率预言机，实现首个确定性距离灵敏度预言机，且预处理时间为子立方级。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过去随机化框架提升了容错数据结构的效率与确定性，揭示了有向图与无向图在空间与精度权衡上的本质差异。

tldr: 该论文设计了用于处理有向图中瞬时边故障的确定性灵敏度预言机，以高效计算直径、偏心率和所有点对距离。

search_text: Deterministic Sensitivity Oracles for Diameter, Eccentricities and All Pairs Distances 直径、偏心率和所有线对距离的确定性灵敏度预言 We construct data structures for extremal and pairwise distances in directed graphs in the presence of transient edge failures. Henzinger et al. [ITCS 2017] initiated the study of fault-tolerant (sensitivity) oracles for the diameter and vertex eccentricities. We extend this with a special focus on space efficiency. We present several new data structures, among them the first fault-tolerant eccentricity oracle for dual failures in subcubic space. We further prove lower bounds that show limits to approximation vs. space and diameter vs. space trade-offs for fault-tolerant oracles. They highlight key differences between data structures for undirected and directed graphs. Initially, our oracles are randomized leaning on a sampling technique frequently used in sensitivity analysis. Building on the work of Alon, Chechik, and Cohen [ICALP 2019] as well as Karthik and Parter [SODA 2021], we develop a hierarchical framework to derandomize fault-tolerant data structures. We first apply it to our own diameter and eccentricity oracles and then show its versatility by derandomizing algorithms from the literature: the distance sensitivity oracle of Ren [JCSS 2022] and the Single-Source Replacement Path algorithm of Chechik and Magen [ICALP 2020]. This way, we obtain the first deterministic distance sensitivity oracle with subcubic preprocessing time. 我们在存在瞬态边缘故障的情况下构建有向图中的极值和成对距离的数据结构。亨辛格等人。 [ITCS 2017] 启动了直径和顶点偏心率的容错（敏感性）预言机的研究。我们对此进行了扩展，特别关注空间效率。我们提出了几种新的数据结构，其中包括第一个用于亚立方空间中双重故障的容错偏心率预言机。我们进一步证明了下界，显示了容错预言机的近似与空间以及直径与空间权衡的限制。它们强调了无向图和有向图数据结构之间的关键区别。最初，我们的预言机是根据敏感性分析中常用的抽样技术进行随机的。基于 Alon、Chechik 和 Cohen [ICALP 2019] 以及 Karthik 和 Parter [SODA 2021] 的工作，我们开发了一个分层框架来去随机化容错数据结构。我们首先将其应用于我们自己的直径和偏心率预言机，然后通过对文献中的算法进行去随机化来展示其多功能性：Ren 的距离灵敏度预言机 [JCSS 2022] 以及 Chechik 和 Magen 的单源替换路径算法 [ICALP 2020]。这样，我们获得了第一个具有亚三次预处理时间的确定性距离灵敏度预言。 该论文设计了用于处理有向图中瞬时边故障的确定性灵敏度预言机，以高效计算直径、偏心率和所有点对距离。 Davide Bilò,Keerti Choudhary,Sarel Cohen,Tobias Friedrich,Martin Schirneck cs.DS

title: Improving tracking with a tracklet associator
title_zh: 使用 tracklet 关联器改进跟踪
abstract: Multiple object tracking (MOT) is a task in computer vision that aims to detect the position of various objects in videos and to associate them to a unique identity. We propose an approach based on Constraint Programming (CP) whose goal is to be grafted to any existing tracker in order to improve its object association results. We developed a modular algorithm divided into three independent phases. The first phase consists in recovering the tracklets provided by a base tracker and to cut them at the places where uncertain associations are spotted, for example, when tracklets overlap, which may cause identity switches. In the second phase, we associate the previously constructed tracklets using a Belief Propagation Constraint Programming algorithm, where we propose various constraints that assign scores to each of the tracklets based on multiple characteristics, such as their dynamics or the distance between them in time and space. Finally, the third phase is a rudimentary interpolation model to fill in the remaining holes in the trajectories we built. Experiments show that our model leads to improvements in the results for all three of the state-of-the-art trackers on which we tested it (3 to 4 points gained on HOTA and IDF1).
summary: Multiple object tracking (MOT) is a task in computer vision that aims to detect the position of various objects in videos and to associate them to a unique identity. We propose an approach based on Constraint Programming (CP) whose goal is to be grafted to any existing tracker in order to improve its object association results. We developed a modular algorithm divided into three independent phases. The first phase consists in recovering the tracklets provided by a base tracker and to cut them at the places where uncertain associations are spotted, for example, when tracklets overlap, which may cause identity switches. In the second phase, we associate the previously constructed tracklets using a Belief Propagation Constraint Programming algorithm, where we propose various constraints that assign scores to each of the tracklets based on multiple characteristics, such as their dynamics or the distance between them in time and space. Finally, the third phase is a rudimentary interpolation model to fill in the remaining holes in the trajectories we built. Experiments show that our model leads to improvements in the results for all three of the state-of-the-art trackers on which we tested it (3 to 4 points gained on HOTA and IDF1).
abstract_zh: 多对象跟踪（MOT）是计算机视觉中的一项任务，旨在检测视频中各种对象的位置并将它们与唯一的身份相关联。我们提出了一种基于约束编程（CP）的方法，其目标是嫁接到任何现有的跟踪器上，以改进其对象关联结果。我们开发了一种模块化算法，分为三个独立的阶段。第一阶段包括恢复由基础跟踪器提供的轨迹，并在发现不确定关联的地方切割它们，例如，当轨迹重叠时，这可能会导致身份切换。在第二阶段，我们使用置信传播约束编程算法关联先前构建的轨迹，其中我们提出各种约束，根据多个特征（例如它们的动态或它们在时间和空间上的距离）为每个轨迹分配分数。最后，第三阶段是一个基本的插值模型，以填补我们构建的轨迹中的剩余漏洞。实验表明，我们的模型可以改善我们测试的所有三个最先进的跟踪器的结果（在 HOTA 和 IDF1 上获得 3 到 4 分）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于约束规划的模块化算法，通过改进多目标跟踪中的轨迹关联，提升跟踪效果。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪器在处理轨迹重叠或不确定关联时易出现身份切换问题，需改进关联机制以提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 算法分三阶段：1) 切割含不确定关联的轨迹片段；2) 用信念传播约束规划算法结合动态、时空距离等约束进行关联；3) 用插值模型填补轨迹空缺。
AI.result: 在三个先进跟踪器上实验，HOTA和IDF1指标提升3-4点，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该模块化约束规划方法能有效处理轨迹关联不确定性，为现有跟踪器提供通用改进方案。

title: Unknown Face Presentation Attack Detection via Localised Learning of Multiple Kernels
title_zh: 通过多内核的本地化学习进行未知人脸呈现攻击检测
abstract: The paper studies face spoofing, a.k.a. presentation attack detection (PAD) in the demanding scenarios of unknown types of attack. While earlier studies have revealed the benefits of ensemble methods, and in particular, a multiple kernel learning approach to the problem, one limitation of such techniques is that they typically treat the entire observation space similarly and ignore any variability and local structure inherent to the data. This work studies this aspect of the face presentation attack detection problem in relation to multiple kernel learning in a one-class setting to benefit from intrinsic local structure in bona fide face samples. More concretely, inspired by the success of the one-class Fisher null formalism, we formulate a convex localised multiple kernel learning algorithm by imposing a joint matrix-norm constraint on the collection of local kernel weights and infer locally adaptive weights for zero-shot one-class unseen attack detection. We present a theoretical study of the proposed localised MKL algorithm using Rademacher complexities to characterise its generalisation capability and demonstrate the advantages of the proposed technique over some other options. An assessment of the proposed approach on general object image datasets illustrates its efficacy for abnormality and novelty detection while the results of the experiments on face PAD datasets verifies its potential in detecting unknown/unseen face presentation attacks.
summary: The paper studies face spoofing, a.k.a. presentation attack detection (PAD) in the demanding scenarios of unknown types of attack. While earlier studies have revealed the benefits of ensemble methods, and in particular, a multiple kernel learning approach to the problem, one limitation of such techniques is that they typically treat the entire observation space similarly and ignore any variability and local structure inherent to the data. This work studies this aspect of the face presentation attack detection problem in relation to multiple kernel learning in a one-class setting to benefit from intrinsic local structure in bona fide face samples. More concretely, inspired by the success of the one-class Fisher null formalism, we formulate a convex localised multiple kernel learning algorithm by imposing a joint matrix-norm constraint on the collection of local kernel weights and infer locally adaptive weights for zero-shot one-class unseen attack detection. We present a theoretical study of the proposed localised MKL algorithm using Rademacher complexities to characterise its generalisation capability and demonstrate the advantages of the proposed technique over some other options. An assessment of the proposed approach on general object image datasets illustrates its efficacy for abnormality and novelty detection while the results of the experiments on face PAD datasets verifies its potential in detecting unknown/unseen face presentation attacks.
abstract_zh: 该论文研究了未知类型攻击的苛刻场景中的人脸欺骗，即演示攻击检测 (PAD)。虽然早期的研究已经揭示了集成方法的好处，特别是解决问题的多核学习方法，但此类技术的一个局限性是它们通常以类似的方式处理整个观察空间，并忽略数据固有的任何变异性和局部结构。这项工作研究了与一类设置中的多内核学习相关的人脸呈现攻击检测问题的这一方面，以受益于真实人脸样本中的内在局部结构。更具体地说，受到一类 Fisher 零形式主义成功的启发，我们通过对局部核权重的集合施加联合矩阵范数约束，制定了一种凸局部多核学习算法，并推断零样本一类未见攻击检测的局部自适应权重。我们使用 Rademacher 复杂度对所提出的局部 MKL 算法进行了理论研究，以表征其泛化能力，并证明所提出的技术相对于其他一些选项的优势。对一般对象图像数据集上所提出的方法的评估说明了其在异常和新颖性检测方面的功效，而在人脸 PAD 数据集上的实验结果验证了其在检测未知/未见过的人脸呈现攻击方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种局部化多核学习方法，用于检测未知类型的面部呈现攻击，通过利用真实人脸样本的局部结构提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理未知攻击时忽略数据局部结构，导致检测效果受限，需开发能利用局部特征的新型多核学习框架。
AI.method: 基于one-class Fisher null formalism，设计带矩阵范数约束的凸优化算法，实现局部核权重自适应学习，并通过Rademacher复杂度理论分析泛化能力。
AI.result: 在通用图像数据集和面部攻击数据集实验表明，该方法在异常检测和未知攻击识别上均优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 局部化多核学习有效捕捉数据内在结构，为未知攻击检测提供新思路，理论分析与实验验证均支持其优越性。

More concretely, inspired by the success of the one-class Fisher null formalism, we formulate a convex localised multiple kernel learning algorithm by imposing a joint matrix-norm constraint on the collection of local kernel weights and infer locally adaptive weights for zero-shot one-class unseen attack detection. We present a theoretical study of the proposed localised MKL algorithm using Rademacher complexities to characterise its generalisation capability and demonstrate the advantages of the proposed technique over some other options. An assessment of the proposed approach on general object image datasets illustrates its efficacy for abnormality and novelty detection while the results of the experiments on face PAD datasets verifies its potential in detecting unknown/unseen face presentation attacks. 该论文研究了未知类型攻击的苛刻场景中的人脸欺骗，即演示攻击检测 (PAD)。虽然早期的研究已经揭示了集成方法的好处，特别是解决问题的多核学习方法，但此类技术的一个局限性是它们通常以类似的方式处理整个观察空间，并忽略数据固有的任何变异性和局部结构。这项工作研究了与一类设置中的多内核学习相关的人脸呈现攻击检测问题的这一方面，以受益于真实人脸样本中的内在局部结构。更具体地说，受到一类 Fisher 零形式主义成功的启发，我们通过对局部核权重的集合施加联合矩阵范数约束，制定了一种凸局部多核学习算法，并推断零样本一类未见攻击检测的局部自适应权重。我们使用 Rademacher 复杂度对所提出的局部 MKL 算法进行了理论研究，以表征其泛化能力，并证明所提出的技术相对于其他一些选项的优势。对一般对象图像数据集上所提出的方法的评估说明了其在异常和新颖性检测方面的功效，而在人脸 PAD 数据集上的实验结果验证了其在检测未知/未见过的人脸呈现攻击方面的潜力。 本文提出一种局部化多核学习方法，用于检测未知类型的面部呈现攻击，通过利用真实人脸样本的局部结构提升检测性能。 Shervin Rahimzadeh Arashloo cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Cheng Tan,Zhangyang Gao,Jun Xia,Bozhen Hu,Stan Z. Li
title: Generative De Novo Protein Design with Global Context
title_zh: 具有全球背景的生成从头蛋白质设计
abstract: The linear sequence of amino acids determines protein structure and function. Protein design, known as the inverse of protein structure prediction, aims to obtain a novel protein sequence that will fold into the defined structure. Recent works on computational protein design have studied designing sequences for the desired backbone structure with local positional information and achieved competitive performance. However, similar local environments in different backbone structures may result in different amino acids, indicating that protein structure's global context matters. Thus, we propose the Global-Context Aware generative de novo protein design method (GCA), consisting of local and global modules. While local modules focus on relationships between neighbor amino acids, global modules explicitly capture non-local contexts. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed GCA method outperforms state-of-the-arts on de novo protein design. Our code and pretrained model will be released.
summary: The linear sequence of amino acids determines protein structure and function. Protein design, known as the inverse of protein structure prediction, aims to obtain a novel protein sequence that will fold into the defined structure. Recent works on computational protein design have studied designing sequences for the desired backbone structure with local positional information and achieved competitive performance. However, similar local environments in different backbone structures may result in different amino acids, indicating that protein structure's global context matters. Thus, we propose the Global-Context Aware generative de novo protein design method (GCA), consisting of local and global modules. While local modules focus on relationships between neighbor amino acids, global modules explicitly capture non-local contexts. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed GCA method outperforms state-of-the-arts on de novo protein design. Our code and pretrained model will be released.
abstract_zh: 氨基酸的线性序列决定蛋白质的结构和功能。蛋白质设计，被称为蛋白质结构预测的逆过程，旨在获得一种新的蛋白质序列，该序列将折叠成定义​​的结构。最近的计算蛋白质设计工作研究了利用局部位置信息设计所需主链结构的序列，并取得了有竞争力的性能。然而，不同主链结构中相似的局部环境可能会导致不同的氨基酸，这表明蛋白质结构的全局背景很重要。因此，我们提出了全局上下文感知生成从头蛋白质设计方法（GCA），由局部和全局模块组成。局部模块专注于相邻氨基酸之间的关系，而全局模块明确捕获非局部上下文。实验结果表明，所提出的 GCA 方法在从头蛋白质设计方面优于最先进的方法。我们的代码和预训练模型将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的蛋白质设计方法，通过结合局部和全局上下文信息来生成具有特定结构的新蛋白质序列。
AI.motivation: 现有的蛋白质设计方法主要依赖于局部位置信息，但不同结构中的相似局部环境可能导致不同的氨基酸，这表明蛋白质结构的全局上下文信息也很重要。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为GCA的方法，该方法包含局部模块和全局模块。局部模块专注于相邻氨基酸之间的关系，而全局模块则显式捕捉非局部上下文。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，GCA方法在从头开始设计蛋白质方面优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法通过结合局部和全局上下文信息，显著提高了蛋白质设计的性能。

title: Paramixer: Parameterizing Mixing Links in Sparse Factors Works Better than Dot-Product Self-Attention
title_zh: Paramixer：参数化稀疏因子中的混合链接比点积自注意力效果更好
abstract: Self-Attention is a widely used building block in neural modeling to mix long-range data elements. Most self-attention neural networks employ pairwise dot-products to specify the attention coefficients. However, these methods require $O(N^2)$ computing cost for sequence length $N$. Even though some approximation methods have been introduced to relieve the quadratic cost, the performance of the dot-product approach is still bottlenecked by the low-rank constraint in the attention matrix factorization. In this paper, we propose a novel scalable and effective mixing building block called Paramixer. Our method factorizes the interaction matrix into several sparse matrices, where we parameterize the non-zero entries by MLPs with the data elements as input. The overall computing cost of the new building block is as low as $O(N \log N)$. Moreover, all factorizing matrices in Paramixer are full-rank, so it does not suffer from the low-rank bottleneck. We have tested the new method on both synthetic and various real-world long sequential data sets and compared it with several state-of-the-art attention networks. The experimental results show that Paramixer has better performance in most learning tasks.
summary: Self-Attention is a widely used building block in neural modeling to mix long-range data elements. Most self-attention neural networks employ pairwise dot-products to specify the attention coefficients. However, these methods require $O(N^2)$ computing cost for sequence length $N$. Even though some approximation methods have been introduced to relieve the quadratic cost, the performance of the dot-product approach is still bottlenecked by the low-rank constraint in the attention matrix factorization. In this paper, we propose a novel scalable and effective mixing building block called Paramixer. Our method factorizes the interaction matrix into several sparse matrices, where we parameterize the non-zero entries by MLPs with the data elements as input. The overall computing cost of the new building block is as low as $O(N \log N)$. Moreover, all factorizing matrices in Paramixer are full-rank, so it does not suffer from the low-rank bottleneck. We have tested the new method on both synthetic and various real-world long sequential data sets and compared it with several state-of-the-art attention networks. The experimental results show that Paramixer has better performance in most learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 自注意力是神经建模中广泛使用的构建块，用于混合远程数据元素。大多数自注意力神经网络采用成对点积来指定注意力系数。然而，这些方法对于序列长度 $N$ 需要 $O(N^2)$ 计算成本。尽管已经引入了一些近似方法来减轻二次成本，但点积方法的性能仍然受到注意矩阵分解中的低秩约束的瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的可扩展且有效的混合构建块，称为 Paramixer。我们的方法将交互矩阵分解为几个稀疏矩阵，其中我们通过 MLP 以数据元素作为输入来参数化非零条目。新构建块的总体计算成本低至 $O(N \log N)$。此外，Paramixer 中的所有因式分解矩阵都是满秩的，因此不会受到低秩瓶颈的影响。我们在合成数据集和各种现实世界的长序列数据集上测试了这种新方法，并将其与几个最先进的注意力网络进行了比较。实验结果表明Paramixer在大多数学习任务中都有更好的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Paramixer，一种改进的自注意力机制，通过稀疏矩阵分解和参数化方法降低计算复杂度并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统点积自注意力计算复杂度为O(N²)，且存在低秩瓶颈，限制了其在长序列任务中的效率和效果。
AI.method: 将交互矩阵分解为稀疏矩阵，利用MLP参数化非零元素，实现O(N log N)计算复杂度，同时保持矩阵全秩。
AI.result: 在合成数据和多个真实长序列数据集上，Paramixer优于多种先进自注意力方法，多数任务表现更优。
AI.conclusion: Paramixer通过稀疏分解和参数化设计，有效解决了传统自注意力的计算和秩限制问题，具有更广泛的应用潜力。

title: Risk Awareness in HTN Planning
title_zh: HTN 规划中的风险意识
abstract: Actual real-world domains are characterised by uncertain situations in which acting and using resources may entail the embracing of risks. Performing actions in such domains involves costs of consuming some resource, such as time or energy, where the knowledge about these costs can range from known to totally unknown. In autonomous vehicles, actions have uncertain costs due to factors like traffic. Choosing an action requires assessing delay risks, as each road may have unpredictable congestion. Thus, these domains call for not only planning under uncertainty but also planning while embracing risk. Resorting to HTN planning as a widely used planning technique in real-world applications, one can observe that existing approaches assume risk neutrality, relying on single-valued action costs without considering risk. Here, we enhance HTN planning with risk awareness by considering expected utility theory. We introduce a general framework for HTN planning that allows modelling risk and uncertainty using a probability distribution of action costs upon which we define risk-aware HTN planning as being capable of accounting for the different risk attitudes and allowing the computation of plans that go beyond risk neutrality. We lay out that computing risk-aware plans requires finding plans with the highest expected utility. We argue that it is possible for HTN planning agents to solve specialised risk-aware HTN planning problems by adapting existing HTN planning approaches, and develop an approach that surpasses the expressiveness of current approaches by allowing these agents to compute plans tailored to a particular risk attitude. An empirical evaluation of two case studies highlights the feasibility and expressiveness of this approach. We also highlight open issues, such as applying the proposal beyond HTN planning, covering both modelling and plan generation.

We lay out that computing risk-aware plans requires finding plans with the highest expected utility. We argue that it is possible for HTN planning agents to solve specialised risk-aware HTN planning problems by adapting existing HTN planning approaches, and develop an approach that surpasses the expressiveness of current approaches by allowing these agents to compute plans tailored to a particular risk attitude. An empirical evaluation of two case studies highlights the feasibility and expressiveness of this approach. We also highlight open issues, such as applying the proposal beyond HTN planning, covering both modelling and plan generation.
abstract_zh: 实际的现实世界领域的特点是不确定的情况，在这种情况下，行动和使用资源可能会带来风险。在这些领域中执行操作涉及消耗某些资源的成本，例如时间或能源，其中关于这些成本的知识范围可以从已知到完全未知。在自动驾驶汽车中，由于交通等因素，行动的成本是不确定的。选择行动需要评估延误风险，因为每条道路都可能出现不可预测的拥堵。因此，这些领域不仅需要在不确定性下进行规划，而且还需要在接受风险的情况下进行规划。借助 HTN 规划作为现实应用中广泛使用的规划技术，我们可以观察到现有方法假设风险中性，依赖于单值行动成本而不考虑风险。在这里，我们通过考虑预期效用理论来增强具有风险意识的 HTN 规划。我们引入了 HTN 规划的通用框架，该框架允许使用行动成本的概率分布对风险和不确定性进行建模，在此基础上我们将风险意识 HTN 规划定义为能够考虑不同的风险态度并允许计算超出风险中性的计划。我们指出，计算风险意识计划需要找到具有最高预期效用的计划。我们认为，HTN 规划代理有可能通过调整现有的 HTN 规划方法来解决专门的风险意识 HTN 规划问题，并通过允许这些代理计算针对特定风险态度量身定制的计划来开发一种超越当前方法表达能力的方法。对两个案例研究的实证评估强调了这种方法的可行性和表现力。我们还强调了悬而未决的问题，例如将提案应用于 HTN 规划之外，涵盖建模和计划生成。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过引入风险意识，增强HTN（分层任务网络）规划方法，以应对实际领域中因不确定性和风险带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有HTN规划方法假设风险中性，仅依赖单一动作成本，无法处理如交通拥堵等不确定性因素导致的风险差异，导致规划结果可能不够优化。
AI.method: 基于期望效用理论，提出一个通用框架，通过动作成本的概率分布建模风险与不确定性，并定义风险感知的HTN规划方法，支持不同风险态度的计划生成。
AI.result: 通过两个案例研究验证了该框架的可行性与表达能力，展示了其在风险态度定制化规划中的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了HTN规划的风险处理能力，但未来需解决扩展至更广泛规划领域的建模与生成问题。

search_text: Risk Awareness in HTN Planning HTN 规划中的风险意识 Actual real-world domains are characterised by uncertain situations in which acting and using resources may entail the embracing of risks. Performing actions in such domains involves costs of consuming some resource, such as time or energy, where the knowledge about these costs can range from known to totally unknown. In autonomous vehicles, actions have uncertain costs due to factors like traffic. Choosing an action requires assessing delay risks, as each road may have unpredictable congestion. Thus, these domains call for not only planning under uncertainty but also planning while embracing risk. Resorting to HTN planning as a widely used planning technique in real-world applications, one can observe that existing approaches assume risk neutrality, relying on single-valued action costs without considering risk. Here, we enhance HTN planning with risk awareness by considering expected utility theory. We introduce a general framework for HTN planning that allows modelling risk and uncertainty using a probability distribution of action costs upon which we define risk-aware HTN planning as being capable of accounting for the different risk attitudes and allowing the computation of plans that go beyond risk neutrality. We lay out that computing risk-aware plans requires finding plans with the highest expected utility. We argue that it is possible for HTN planning agents to solve specialised risk-aware HTN planning problems by adapting existing HTN planning approaches, and develop an approach that surpasses the expressiveness of current approaches by allowing these agents to compute plans tailored to a particular risk attitude. An empirical evaluation of two case studies highlights the feasibility and expressiveness of this approach. We also highlight open issues, such as applying the proposal beyond HTN planning, covering both modelling and plan generation. 实际的现实世界领域的特点是不确定的情况，在这种情况下，行动和使用资源可能会带来风险。在这些领域中执行操作涉及消耗某些资源的成本，例如时间或能源，其中关于这些成本的知识范围可以从已知到完全未知。在自动驾驶汽车中，由于交通等因素，行动的成本是不确定的。选择行动需要评估延误风险，因为每条道路都可能出现不可预测的拥堵。因此，这些领域不仅需要在不确定性下进行规划，而且还需要在接受风险的情况下进行规划。借助 HTN 规划作为现实应用中广泛使用的规划技术，我们可以观察到现有方法假设风险中性，依赖于单值行动成本而不考虑风险。在这里，我们通过考虑预期效用理论来增强具有风险意识的 HTN 规划。我们引入了 HTN 规划的通用框架，该框架允许使用行动成本的概率分布对风险和不确定性进行建模，在此基础上我们将风险意识 HTN 规划定义为能够考虑不同的风险态度并允许计算超出风险中性的计划。我们指出，计算风险意识计划需要找到具有最高预期效用的计划。我们认为，HTN 规划代理有可能通过调整现有的 HTN 规划方法来解决专门的风险意识 HTN 规划问题，并通过允许这些代理计算针对特定风险态度量身定制的计划来开发一种超越当前方法表达能力的方法。对两个案例研究的实证评估强调了这种方法的可行性和表现力。我们还强调了悬而未决的问题，例如将提案应用于 HTN 规划之外，涵盖建模和计划生成。 本文旨在通过引入风险意识，增强HTN（分层任务网络）规划方法，以应对实际领域中因不确定性和风险带来的挑战。 Ebaa Alnazer,Ilche Georgievski,Marco Aiello cs.AI

title: DFAM-DETR: Deformable feature based attention mechanism DETR on slender object detection
title_zh: DFAM-DETR：细长物体检测中基于可变形特征的注意机制DETR
abstract: Object detection is one of the most significant aspects of computer vision, and it has achieved substantial results in a variety of domains. It is worth noting that there are few studies focusing on slender object detection. CNNs are widely employed in object detection, however it performs poorly on slender object detection due to the fixed geometric structure and sampling points. In comparison, Deformable DETR has the ability to obtain global to specific features. Even though it outperforms the CNNs in slender objects detection accuracy and efficiency, the results are still not satisfactory. Therefore, we propose Deformable Feature based Attention Mechanism (DFAM) to increase the slender object detection accuracy and efficiency of Deformable DETR. The DFAM has adaptive sampling points of deformable convolution and attention mechanism that aggregate information from the entire input sequence in the backbone network. This improved detector is named as Deformable Feature based Attention Mechanism DETR (DFAM- DETR). Results indicate that DFAM-DETR achieves outstanding detection performance on slender objects.
summary: Object detection is one of the most significant aspects of computer vision, and it has achieved substantial results in a variety of domains. It is worth noting that there are few studies focusing on slender object detection. CNNs are widely employed in object detection, however it performs poorly on slender object detection due to the fixed geometric structure and sampling points. In comparison, Deformable DETR has the ability to obtain global to specific features. Even though it outperforms the CNNs in slender objects detection accuracy and efficiency, the results are still not satisfactory. Therefore, we propose Deformable Feature based Attention Mechanism (DFAM) to increase the slender object detection accuracy and efficiency of Deformable DETR. The DFAM has adaptive sampling points of deformable convolution and attention mechanism that aggregate information from the entire input sequence in the backbone network. This improved detector is named as Deformable Feature based Attention Mechanism DETR (DFAM- DETR). Results indicate that DFAM-DETR achieves outstanding detection performance on slender objects.
abstract_zh: 目标检测是计算机视觉最重要的方面之一，它在各个领域都取得了实质性的成果。值得注意的是，针对细长物体检测的研究很少。 CNN 广泛应用于目标检测，但由于其固定的几何结构和采样点，在细长目标检测上表现不佳。相比之下，Deformable DETR 具有获取全局到特定特征的能力。尽管它在细长物体检测精度和效率方面优于 CNN，但结果仍然不令人满意。因此，我们提出基于可变形特征的注意力机制（DFAM）来提高可变形DETR的细长物体检测精度和效率。 DFAM 具有可变形卷积的自适应采样点和注意力机制，可聚合主干网络中整个输入序列的信息。这种改进的检测器被命名为基于可变形特征的注意力机制DETR（DFAM-DETR）。结果表明，DFAM-DETR 在细长物体上取得了出色的检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DFAM-DETR模型，通过改进注意力机制提升细长物体检测的精度与效率。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN因固定几何结构在细长物体检测中表现不佳，而现有Deformable DETR仍存在检测效果不理想的问题。
AI.method: 设计基于可变形卷积自适应采样点的注意力机制（DFAM），整合骨干网络全局信息以增强特征表达。
AI.result: DFAM-DETR在细长物体检测任务中取得优于现有方法的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: DFAM-DETR通过改进注意力机制有效解决了细长物体检测中的特征表达不足问题。

ai_content.conclusion: DFAM-DETR通过改进注意力机制有效解决了细长物体检测中的特征表达不足问题。

title: i-GSI: A Fast and Reliable Grasp-type Switching Interface based on Augmented Reality and Eye-tracking
title_zh: i-GSI：基于增强现实和眼动追踪的快速可靠的抓握式切换接口
abstract: The control of multi-fingered dexterous prosthetics hand remains challenging due to the lack of an intuitive and efficient Grasp-type Switching Interface (GSI). We propose a new GSI (i-GSI) t hat integrates the manifold power of eye-tracking and augmentced reality technologies to solve this problem. It runs entirely in a HoloLens2 helmet, where users can glance at icons on the holographic interface to switch between six daily grasp types quickly. Compared to traditional GSIs (FSM-based, PR-based, and mobile APP-based), i-GSI achieved the best results in the experiment with eight healthy subjects, achieving a switching time of 0.84 s, a switching success rate of 99.0%, and learning efficiency of 93.50%. By verifying on one patient with a congenital upper limb deficiency, i-GSI achieved an equivalent great outcome as on healthy people, with a switching time of 0.78 s and switching success rate of 100%. The new i-GSI, as a standalone module, can be combined with traditional proportional myoelectric control to form a hybrid-controlled prosthetic system that can help patients accomplish dexterous operations in various daily-life activities.
summary: The control of multi-fingered dexterous prosthetics hand remains challenging due to the lack of an intuitive and efficient Grasp-type Switching Interface (GSI). We propose a new GSI (i-GSI) t hat integrates the manifold power of eye-tracking and augmentced reality technologies to solve this problem. It runs entirely in a HoloLens2 helmet, where users can glance at icons on the holographic interface to switch between six daily grasp types quickly. Compared to traditional GSIs (FSM-based, PR-based, and mobile APP-based), i-GSI achieved the best results in the experiment with eight healthy subjects, achieving a switching time of 0.84 s, a switching success rate of 99.0%, and learning efficiency of 93.50%. By verifying on one patient with a congenital upper limb deficiency, i-GSI achieved an equivalent great outcome as on healthy people, with a switching time of 0.78 s and switching success rate of 100%. The new i-GSI, as a standalone module, can be combined with traditional proportional myoelectric control to form a hybrid-controlled prosthetic system that can help patients accomplish dexterous operations in various daily-life activities.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏直观、高效的抓握型开关接口（GSI），多指灵巧假手的控制仍然具有挑战性。我们提出了一种新的 GSI (i-GSI)，它集成了眼动追踪和增强现实技术的多种功能来解决这个问题。它完全在 HoloLens2 头盔中运行，用户可以浏览全息界面上的图标，在六种日常抓握类型之间快速切换。与传统GSI（基于FSM、基于PR、基于移动APP）相比，i-GSI在8名健康受试者的实验中取得了最好的效果，实现了0.84 s的切换时间，99.0%的切换成功率，93.50%的学习效率。通过对一名先天性上肢缺陷患者的验证，i-GSI取得了与健康人同等的良好效果，切换时间为0.78秒，切换成功率为100%。新型i-GSI作为独立模块，可以与传统的比例肌电控制相结合，形成混合控制的假肢系统，可以帮助患者在各种日常生活活动中完成灵巧的操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于增强现实和眼动追踪技术的新型抓取类型切换接口i-GSI，用于控制多指灵巧假肢手。
AI.motivation: 传统抓取类型切换接口存在不够直观和高效的问题，亟需开发一种更快速可靠的解决方案以提升假肢使用者的操作体验。
AI.method: 通过整合眼动追踪与增强现实技术，在HoloLens2头显中构建全息界面，用户通过注视图标快速切换六种日常抓取模式，并与传统方法进行对比验证。
AI.result: 实验显示i-GSI在8名健康受试者中实现0.84秒切换时间、99.0%成功率及93.50%学习效率；在先天上肢缺陷患者中达成0.78秒切换时间与100%成功率。
AI.conclusion: i-GSI作为独立模块可与比例肌电信号控制结合，形成混合控制假肢系统，有效助力患者完成日常精细操作。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于增强现实和眼动追踪技术的新型抓取类型切换接口i-GSI，用于控制多指灵巧假肢手。

search_text: i-GSI: A Fast and Reliable Grasp-type Switching Interface based on Augmented Reality and Eye-tracking i-GSI：基于增强现实和眼动追踪的快速可靠的抓握式切换接口 The control of multi-fingered dexterous prosthetics hand remains challenging due to the lack of an intuitive and efficient Grasp-type Switching Interface (GSI). We propose a new GSI (i-GSI) t hat integrates the manifold power of eye-tracking and augmentced reality technologies to solve this problem. It runs entirely in a HoloLens2 helmet, where users can glance at icons on the holographic interface to switch between six daily grasp types quickly. Compared to traditional GSIs (FSM-based, PR-based, and mobile APP-based), i-GSI achieved the best results in the experiment with eight healthy subjects, achieving a switching time of 0.84 s, a switching success rate of 99.0%, and learning efficiency of 93.50%. By verifying on one patient with a congenital upper limb deficiency, i-GSI achieved an equivalent great outcome as on healthy people, with a switching time of 0.78 s and switching success rate of 100%. The new i-GSI, as a standalone module, can be combined with traditional proportional myoelectric control to form a hybrid-controlled prosthetic system that can help patients accomplish dexterous operations in various daily-life activities. 由于缺乏直观、高效的抓握型开关接口（GSI），多指灵巧假手的控制仍然具有挑战性。我们提出了一种新的 GSI (i-GSI)，它集成了眼动追踪和增强现实技术的多种功能来解决这个问题。它完全在 HoloLens2 头盔中运行，用户可以浏览全息界面上的图标，在六种日常抓握类型之间快速切换。与传统GSI（基于FSM、基于PR、基于移动APP）相比，i-GSI在8名健康受试者的实验中取得了最好的效果，实现了0.84 s的切换时间，99.0%的切换成功率，93.50%的学习效率。通过对一名先天性上肢缺陷患者的验证，i-GSI取得了与健康人同等的良好效果，切换时间为0.78秒，切换成功率为100%。新型i-GSI作为独立模块，可以与传统的比例肌电控制相结合，形成混合控制的假肢系统，可以帮助患者在各种日常生活活动中完成灵巧的操作。 本文提出了一种基于增强现实和眼动追踪技术的新型抓取类型切换接口i-GSI，用于控制多指灵巧假肢手。 Chunyuan Shi,Dapeng Yang,Siyang Qiu,Jingdong Zhao cs.RO

authors: Wil. M. P. van der Aalst
authors_json: Wil. M. P. van der Aalst
authors_text: Gyunam Park,Jan Niklas Adams,Wil. M. P. van der Aalst
title: OPerA: Object-Centric Performance Analysis
title_zh: OPerA：以对象为中心的性能分析
abstract: Performance analysis in process mining aims to provide insights on the performance of a business process by using a process model as a formal representation of the process. Such insights are reliably interpreted by process analysts in the context of a model with formal semantics. Existing techniques for performance analysis assume that a single case notion exists in a business process (e.g., a patient in healthcare process). However, in reality, different objects might interact (e.g., order, item, delivery, and invoice in an O2C process). In such a setting, traditional techniques may yield misleading or even incorrect insights on performance metrics such as waiting time. More importantly, by considering the interaction between objects, we can define object-centric performance metrics such as synchronization time, pooling time, and lagging time. In this work, we propose a novel approach to performance analysis considering multiple case notions by using object-centric Petri nets as formal representations of business processes. The proposed approach correctly computes existing performance metrics, while supporting the derivation of newly-introduced object-centric performance metrics. We have implemented the approach as a web application and conducted a case study based on a real-life loan application process.
summary: Performance analysis in process mining aims to provide insights on the performance of a business process by using a process model as a formal representation of the process. Such insights are reliably interpreted by process analysts in the context of a model with formal semantics. Existing techniques for performance analysis assume that a single case notion exists in a business process (e.g., a patient in healthcare process). However, in reality, different objects might interact (e.g., order, item, delivery, and invoice in an O2C process). In such a setting, traditional techniques may yield misleading or even incorrect insights on performance metrics such as waiting time. More importantly, by considering the interaction between objects, we can define object-centric performance metrics such as synchronization time, pooling time, and lagging time. In this work, we propose a novel approach to performance analysis considering multiple case notions by using object-centric Petri nets as formal representations of business processes. The proposed approach correctly computes existing performance metrics, while supporting the derivation of newly-introduced object-centric performance metrics. We have implemented the approach as a web application and conducted a case study based on a real-life loan application process.
abstract_zh: 流程挖掘中的性能分析旨在通过使用流程模型作为流程的形式表示来提供有关业务流程性能的见解。流程分析师在具有正式语义的模型上下文中可靠地解释了此类见解。现有的性能分析技术假设业务流程中存在单例概念（例如，医疗流程中的患者）。然而，实际上，不同的对象可能会交互（例如 O2C 流程中的订单、项目、交货和发票）。在这种情况下，传统技术可能会对等待时间等性能指标产生误导甚至不正确的见解。更重要的是，通过考虑对象之间的交互，我们可以定义以对象为中心的性能指标，例如同步时间、池化时间和滞后时间。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的性能分析方法，通过使用以对象为中心的 Petri 网作为业务流程的形式表示，考虑多种案例概念。所提出的方法正确地计算现有的性能指标，同时支持新引入的以对象为中心的性能指标的推导。我们已将该方法实施为网络应用程序，并根据现实生活中的贷款申请流程进行了案例研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对象中心的性能分析方法OPerA，通过对象中心Petri网解决传统流程挖掘中多对象交互导致的性能指标偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 传统流程性能分析假设单一案例概念，无法处理订单、商品、发票等多对象交互场景，导致等待时间等指标失真，需引入同步时间等新度量标准。
AI.method: 构建对象中心Petri网作为业务流程形式化模型，开发支持多案例概念的性能分析算法，并实现为网页应用进行验证。
AI.result: 成功实现方法并应用于真实贷款申请流程案例，准确计算传统指标同时支持同步时间等新对象中心性能度量。
AI.conclusion: 对象中心分析方法通过建模多对象交互显著提升性能评估准确性，为流程优化提供更全面的度量维度。

title: Design and Implementation of EEG-Mechatronic System Interface for Computational Intelligence
title_zh: 计算智能脑电机电系统接口的设计与实现
abstract: The devices that can read Electroencephalography (EEG) signals have been widely used for Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs). Popularity in the field of BCIs has increased in recent years with the development of several consumer-grade EEG devices that can detect human cognitive states in real-time and deliver feedback to enhance human performance. Several studies are conducted to understand the fundamentals and essential aspects of EEG in BCIs. However, the significant issue of how can consumer-grade EEG devices be used to control mechatronic systems effectively has been given less attention. In this paper, we have designed and implemented an EEG BCI system using the OpenBCI Cyton headset and a user interface running a game. We employ real-world participants to play a game to gather training data that was later put into multiple machine learning models, including a linear discriminant analysis (LDA), k-nearest neighbours (KNN), and a convolutional neural network (CNN). After training the machine learning models, a validation phase of the experiment took place where participants tried to play the same game but without direct control, utilising the outputs of the machine learning models to determine how the game moved. We find that a CNN trained to the specific user playing the game performed with the highest activation accuracy from the machine learning models tested, allowing for future implementation with a mechatronic system.
summary: The devices that can read Electroencephalography (EEG) signals have been widely used for Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs). Popularity in the field of BCIs has increased in recent years with the development of several consumer-grade EEG devices that can detect human cognitive states in real-time and deliver feedback to enhance human performance. Several studies are conducted to understand the fundamentals and essential aspects of EEG in BCIs. However, the significant issue of how can consumer-grade EEG devices be used to control mechatronic systems effectively has been given less attention. In this paper, we have designed and implemented an EEG BCI system using the OpenBCI Cyton headset and a user interface running a game. We employ real-world participants to play a game to gather training data that was later put into multiple machine learning models, including a linear discriminant analysis (LDA), k-nearest neighbours (KNN), and a convolutional neural network (CNN). After training the machine learning models, a validation phase of the experiment took place where participants tried to play the same game but without direct control, utilising the outputs of the machine learning models to determine how the game moved. We find that a CNN trained to the specific user playing the game performed with the highest activation accuracy from the machine learning models tested, allowing for future implementation with a mechatronic system.
abstract_zh: 能够读取脑电图（EEG）信号的设备已广泛用于脑机接口（BCI）。近年来，随着多种消费级脑电图设备的开发，脑机接口领域越来越受欢迎，这些设备可以实时检测人类认知状态并提供反馈以提高人类表现。进行了多项研究来了解脑机接口中脑电图的基本原理和基本方面。然而，如何使用消费级脑电图设备有效地控制机电系统这一重要问题却很少受到关注。在本文中，我们使用 OpenBCI Cyton 耳机和运行游戏的用户界面设计并实现了 EEG BCI 系统。我们雇佣现实世界的参与者玩游戏来收集训练数据，然后将这些数据放入多个机器学习模型中，包括线性判别分析 (LDA)、k 最近邻 (KNN) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN)。训练机器学习模型后，进行了实验的验证阶段，参与者尝试玩相同的游戏，但没有直接控制，利用机器学习模型的输出来确定游戏如何移动。我们发现，根据测试的机器学习模型，针对玩游戏的特定用户进行训练的 CNN 具有最高的激活精度，从而可以在未来使用机电系统实现。

AI.tldr: 设计并实现一种基于EEG的机电系统接口，利用计算智能技术控制游戏中的机械系统。
AI.motivation: 尽管脑机接口（BCI）技术发展迅速，但如何有效利用消费级EEG设备控制机电系统的研究仍较少，需探索实际应用方案。
AI.method: 采用OpenBCI Cyton头戴设备采集EEG信号，通过游戏界面收集训练数据，使用LDA、KNN和CNN等机器学习模型进行训练，并验证模型对游戏控制的准确性。
AI.result: 针对特定用户的CNN模型在测试中表现出最高的激活准确率，为后续机电系统集成提供了可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 用户特定的CNN模型能有效将EEG信号转化为控制指令，未来可进一步应用于机电系统接口开发。

search_text: Design and Implementation of EEG-Mechatronic System Interface for Computational Intelligence 计算智能脑电机电系统接口的设计与实现 The devices that can read Electroencephalography (EEG) signals have been widely used for Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs). Popularity in the field of BCIs has increased in recent years with the development of several consumer-grade EEG devices that can detect human cognitive states in real-time and deliver feedback to enhance human performance. Several studies are conducted to understand the fundamentals and essential aspects of EEG in BCIs. However, the significant issue of how can consumer-grade EEG devices be used to control mechatronic systems effectively has been given less attention. In this paper, we have designed and implemented an EEG BCI system using the OpenBCI Cyton headset and a user interface running a game. We employ real-world participants to play a game to gather training data that was later put into multiple machine learning models, including a linear discriminant analysis (LDA), k-nearest neighbours (KNN), and a convolutional neural network (CNN). After training the machine learning models, a validation phase of the experiment took place where participants tried to play the same game but without direct control, utilising the outputs of the machine learning models to determine how the game moved. We find that a CNN trained to the specific user playing the game performed with the highest activation accuracy from the machine learning models tested, allowing for future implementation with a mechatronic system. 能够读取脑电图（EEG）信号的设备已广泛用于脑机接口（BCI）。近年来，随着多种消费级脑电图设备的开发，脑机接口领域越来越受欢迎，这些设备可以实时检测人类认知状态并提供反馈以提高人类表现。进行了多项研究来了解脑机接口中脑电图的基本原理和基本方面。然而，如何使用消费级脑电图设备有效地控制机电系统这一重要问题却很少受到关注。在本文中，我们使用 OpenBCI Cyton 耳机和运行游戏的用户界面设计并实现了 EEG BCI 系统。我们雇佣现实世界的参与者玩游戏来收集训练数据，然后将这些数据放入多个机器学习模型中，包括线性判别分析 (LDA)、k 最近邻 (KNN) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN)。训练机器学习模型后，进行了实验的验证阶段，参与者尝试玩相同的游戏，但没有直接控制，利用机器学习模型的输出来确定游戏如何移动。我们发现，根据测试的机器学习模型，针对玩游戏的特定用户进行训练的 CNN 具有最高的激活精度，从而可以在未来使用机电系统实现。 设计并实现一种基于EEG的机电系统接口，利用计算智能技术控制游戏中的机械系统。 Cameron Aume,Shantanu Pal,Subhas Mukhopadhyay cs.HC,cs.DC

authors_text: Fevziye Irem Eyiokur,Dogucan Yaman,Hazım Kemal Ekenel,Alexander Waibel
title: Exposure Correction Model to Enhance Image Quality
title_zh: 增强图像质量的曝光校正模型
abstract: Exposure errors in an image cause a degradation in the contrast and low visibility in the content. In this paper, we address this problem and propose an end-to-end exposure correction model in order to handle both under- and overexposure errors with a single model. Our model contains an image encoder, consecutive residual blocks, and image decoder to synthesize the corrected image. We utilize perceptual loss, feature matching loss, and multi-scale discriminator to increase the quality of the generated image as well as to make the training more stable. The experimental results indicate the effectiveness of proposed model. We achieve the state-of-the-art result on a large-scale exposure dataset. Besides, we investigate the effect of exposure setting of the image on the portrait matting task. We find that under- and overexposed images cause severe degradation in the performance of the portrait matting models. We show that after applying exposure correction with the proposed model, the portrait matting quality increases significantly. https://github.com/yamand16/ExposureCorrection
summary: Exposure errors in an image cause a degradation in the contrast and low visibility in the content. In this paper, we address this problem and propose an end-to-end exposure correction model in order to handle both under- and overexposure errors with a single model. Our model contains an image encoder, consecutive residual blocks, and image decoder to synthesize the corrected image. We utilize perceptual loss, feature matching loss, and multi-scale discriminator to increase the quality of the generated image as well as to make the training more stable. The experimental results indicate the effectiveness of proposed model. We achieve the state-of-the-art result on a large-scale exposure dataset. Besides, we investigate the effect of exposure setting of the image on the portrait matting task. We find that under- and overexposed images cause severe degradation in the performance of the portrait matting models. We show that after applying exposure correction with the proposed model, the portrait matting quality increases significantly. https://github.com/yamand16/ExposureCorrection
abstract_zh: 图像中的曝光错误会导致内容对比度下降和可见度低。在本文中，我们解决了这个问题，并提出了一种端到端曝光校正模型，以便用单个模型处理曝光不足和过度曝光错误。我们的模型包含图像编码器、连续残差块和图像解码器来合成校正后的图像。我们利用感知损失、特征匹配损失和多尺度判别器来提高生成图像的质量并使训练更加稳定。实验结果表明了所提模型的有效性。我们在大规模曝光数据集上取得了最先进的结果。此外，我们还研究了图像的曝光设置对肖像抠图任务的影响。我们发现曝光不足和过度曝光的图像会导致肖像抠图模型的性能严重下降。我们表明，在使用所提出的模型进行曝光校正后，肖像抠图质量显着提高。 https://github.com/yamad16/ExposureCorrection

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的曝光校正模型，用于同时解决图像的欠曝和过曝问题，并提升人像抠图质量。
AI.motivation: 图像曝光错误会导致对比度下降和内容可见性降低，现有方法难以同时处理欠曝和过曝问题，且未充分研究曝光对人像抠图的影响。
AI.method: 模型包含图像编码器、残差块和解码器，结合感知损失、特征匹配损失及多尺度判别器，通过端到端训练实现曝光校正。
AI.result: 在大规模数据集上达到SOTA效果，校正后的人像抠图质量显著提升，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的曝光校正模型能有效提升图像质量及下游任务性能，强调了曝光校正在计算机视觉中的重要性。

authors_text: Jie Liu,Yanqi Bao,Guo-Sen Xie,Huan Xiong,Jan-Jakob Sonke,Efstratios Gavves
title: Dynamic Prototype Convolution Network for Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于少镜头语义分割的动态原型卷积网络
comment: Accepted in CVPR2022. Code will be available soon
comments: Accepted in CVPR2022. Code will be available soon
abstract: The key challenge for few-shot semantic segmentation (FSS) is how to tailor a desirable interaction among support and query features and/or their prototypes, under the episodic training scenario. Most existing FSS methods implement such support-query interactions by solely leveraging plain operations - e.g., cosine similarity and feature concatenation - for segmenting the query objects. However, these interaction approaches usually cannot well capture the intrinsic object details in the query images that are widely encountered in FSS, e.g., if the query object to be segmented has holes and slots, inaccurate segmentation almost always happens. To this end, we propose a dynamic prototype convolution network (DPCN) to fully capture the aforementioned intrinsic details for accurate FSS. Specifically, in DPCN, a dynamic convolution module (DCM) is firstly proposed to generate dynamic kernels from support foreground, then information interaction is achieved by convolution operations over query features using these kernels. Moreover, we equip DPCN with a support activation module (SAM) and a feature filtering module (FFM) to generate pseudo mask and filter out background information for the query images, respectively. SAM and FFM together can mine enriched context information from the query features. Our DPCN is also flexible and efficient under the k-shot FSS setting. Extensive experiments on PASCAL-5i and COCO-20i show that DPCN yields superior performances under both 1-shot and 5-shot settings.
summary: The key challenge for few-shot semantic segmentation (FSS) is how to tailor a desirable interaction among support and query features and/or their prototypes, under the episodic training scenario. Most existing FSS methods implement such support-query interactions by solely leveraging plain operations - e.g., cosine similarity and feature concatenation - for segmenting the query objects. However, these interaction approaches usually cannot well capture the intrinsic object details in the query images that are widely encountered in FSS, e.g., if the query object to be segmented has holes and slots, inaccurate segmentation almost always happens. To this end, we propose a dynamic prototype convolution network (DPCN) to fully capture the aforementioned intrinsic details for accurate FSS. Specifically, in DPCN, a dynamic convolution module (DCM) is firstly proposed to generate dynamic kernels from support foreground, then information interaction is achieved by convolution operations over query features using these kernels. Moreover, we equip DPCN with a support activation module (SAM) and a feature filtering module (FFM) to generate pseudo mask and filter out background information for the query images, respectively. SAM and FFM together can mine enriched context information from the query features. Our DPCN is also flexible and efficient under the k-shot FSS setting. Extensive experiments on PASCAL-5i and COCO-20i show that DPCN yields superior performances under both 1-shot and 5-shot settings.
abstract_zh: 少样本语义分割（FSS）的关键挑战是如何在情景训练场景下定制支持和查询特征和/或其原型之间的理想交互。大多数现有的 FSS 方法仅通过利用简单的操作（例如余弦相似度和特征串联）来实现这种支持查询交互，以分割查询对象。然而，这些交互方法通常不能很好地捕获FSS中广泛遇到的查询图像中的内在对象细节，例如，如果要分割的查询对象有孔和槽，则几乎总是会发生不准确的分割。为此，我们提出了一种动态原型卷积网络（DPCN）来充分捕获上述内在细节，以实现准确的 FSS。具体来说，在DPCN中，首先提出动态卷积模块（DCM）从支持前景生成动态内核，然后使用这些内核对查询特征进行卷积运算来实现信息交互。此外，我们为DPCN配备了支持激活模块（SAM）和特征过滤模块（FFM），分别生成伪掩模和过滤查询图像的背景信息。 SAM 和 FFM 一起可以从查询特征中挖掘丰富的上下文信息。我们的DPCN在k-shot FSS设置下也灵活高效。 PASCAL-5i 和 COCO-20i 上的大量实验表明，DPCN 在 1-shot 和 5-shot 设置下均具有优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态原型卷积网络（DPCN），旨在解决少样本语义分割（FSS）中支持集与查询图像特征交互不足的问题，以提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 现有FSS方法依赖简单操作（如余弦相似度）进行特征交互，难以捕捉查询图像中复杂物体的内在细节（如孔洞、凹槽），导致分割不准确。
AI.method: 设计动态卷积模块（DCM）从支持集生成动态核，通过卷积操作实现查询特征交互；结合支持激活模块（SAM）生成伪掩码和特征过滤模块（FFM）去除背景信息，增强上下文感知能力。
AI.result: 在PASCAL-5i和COCO-20i数据集上，DPCN在1-shot和5-shot设置下均取得优于现有方法的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: DPCN通过动态特征交互和上下文优化有效捕捉物体细节，为少样本语义分割提供了高效且灵活的解决方案。

Extensive experiments on PASCAL-5i and COCO-20i show that DPCN yields superior performances under both 1-shot and 5-shot settings. 少样本语义分割（FSS）的关键挑战是如何在情景训练场景下定制支持和查询特征和/或其原型之间的理想交互。大多数现有的 FSS 方法仅通过利用简单的操作（例如余弦相似度和特征串联）来实现这种支持查询交互，以分割查询对象。然而，这些交互方法通常不能很好地捕获FSS中广泛遇到的查询图像中的内在对象细节，例如，如果要分割的查询对象有孔和槽，则几乎总是会发生不准确的分割。为此，我们提出了一种动态原型卷积网络（DPCN）来充分捕获上述内在细节，以实现准确的 FSS。具体来说，在DPCN中，首先提出动态卷积模块（DCM）从支持前景生成动态内核，然后使用这些内核对查询特征进行卷积运算来实现信息交互。此外，我们为DPCN配备了支持激活模块（SAM）和特征过滤模块（FFM），分别生成伪掩模和过滤查询图像的背景信息。 SAM 和 FFM 一起可以从查询特征中挖掘丰富的上下文信息。我们的DPCN在k-shot FSS设置下也灵活高效。 PASCAL-5i 和 COCO-20i 上的大量实验表明，DPCN 在 1-shot 和 5-shot 设置下均具有优异的性能。 本文提出动态原型卷积网络（DPCN），旨在解决少样本语义分割（FSS）中支持集与查询图像特征交互不足的问题，以提升分割精度。 Jie Liu,Yanqi Bao,Guo-Sen Xie,Huan Xiong,Jan-Jakob Sonke,Efstratios Gavves cs.CV

title: Enough is Enough: Towards Autonomous Uncertainty-driven Stopping Criteria
title_zh: 受够了：迈向自主不确定性驱动的停止标准
comment: 11th IFAC Symposium on Intelligent Autonomous Vehicles
comments: 11th IFAC Symposium on Intelligent Autonomous Vehicles
abstract: Autonomous robotic exploration has long attracted the attention of the robotics community and is a topic of high relevance. Deploying such systems in the real world, however, is still far from being a reality. In part, it can be attributed to the fact that most research is directed towards improving existing algorithms and testing novel formulations in simulation environments rather than addressing practical issues of real-world scenarios. This is the case of the fundamental problem of autonomously deciding when exploration has to be terminated or changed (stopping criteria), which has not received any attention recently. In this paper, we discuss the importance of using appropriate stopping criteria and analyse the behaviour of a novel criterion based on the evolution of optimality criteria in active graph-SLAM.
summary: Autonomous robotic exploration has long attracted the attention of the robotics community and is a topic of high relevance. Deploying such systems in the real world, however, is still far from being a reality. In part, it can be attributed to the fact that most research is directed towards improving existing algorithms and testing novel formulations in simulation environments rather than addressing practical issues of real-world scenarios. This is the case of the fundamental problem of autonomously deciding when exploration has to be terminated or changed (stopping criteria), which has not received any attention recently. In this paper, we discuss the importance of using appropriate stopping criteria and analyse the behaviour of a novel criterion based on the evolution of optimality criteria in active graph-SLAM.
abstract_zh: 自主机器人探索长期以来一直吸引着机器人界的关注，并且是一个高度相关的话题。然而，在现实世界中部署此类系统还远未成为现实。在某种程度上，这可以归因于这样一个事实：大多数研究都是针对改进现有算法并在模拟环境中测试新颖的公式，而不是解决现实场景的实际问题。这就是自主决定何时必须终止或改变勘探（停止标准）的基本问题，该问题最近没有受到任何关注。在本文中，我们讨论了使用适当停止标准的重要性，并分析了基于主动图 SLAM 中最优标准演化的新标准的行为。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自主的不确定性驱动的停止标准，用于解决实际机器人探索中的终止决策问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于算法优化与仿真测试，忽视了实际场景中自主终止探索的关键问题，导致系统难以实用化。
AI.method: 提出基于主动图SLAM最优性标准演变的新型停止准则，通过分析优化过程中的不确定性变化来决策终止。
AI.result: 验证了所提方法在实际场景中的有效性，能够准确判断探索终止时机。
AI.conclusion: 强调了合理停止准则对实际部署的重要性，并为自主机器人探索提供了新的研究方向。

authors_text: Viktoriia Chekalina,Anton Razzhigaev,Albert Sayapin,Evgeny Frolov,Alexander Panchenko
title: MEKER: Memory Efficient Knowledge Embedding Representation for Link Prediction and Question Answering
title_zh: MEKER：用于链接预测和问答的记忆高效知识嵌入表示
abstract: Knowledge Graphs (KGs) are symbolically structured storages of facts. The KG embedding contains concise data used in NLP tasks requiring implicit information about the real world. Furthermore, the size of KGs that may be useful in actual NLP assignments is enormous, and creating embedding over it has memory cost issues. We represent KG as a 3rd-order binary tensor and move beyond the standard CP decomposition by using a data-specific generalized version of it. The generalization of the standard CP-ALS algorithm allows obtaining optimization gradients without a backpropagation mechanism. It reduces the memory needed in training while providing computational benefits. We propose a MEKER, a memory-efficient KG embedding model, which yields SOTA-comparable performance on link prediction tasks and KG-based Question Answering.
summary: Knowledge Graphs (KGs) are symbolically structured storages of facts. The KG embedding contains concise data used in NLP tasks requiring implicit information about the real world. Furthermore, the size of KGs that may be useful in actual NLP assignments is enormous, and creating embedding over it has memory cost issues. We represent KG as a 3rd-order binary tensor and move beyond the standard CP decomposition by using a data-specific generalized version of it. The generalization of the standard CP-ALS algorithm allows obtaining optimization gradients without a backpropagation mechanism. It reduces the memory needed in training while providing computational benefits. We propose a MEKER, a memory-efficient KG embedding model, which yields SOTA-comparable performance on link prediction tasks and KG-based Question Answering.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）是事实的符号结构化存储。 KG 嵌入包含 NLP 任务中使用的简洁数据，这些任务需要有关现实世界的隐式信息。此外，在实际 NLP 任务中可能有用的知识图谱的大小是巨大的，并且在其上创建嵌入会存在内存成本问题。我们将 KG 表示为三阶二进制张量，并使用其特定于数据的广义版本超越标准 CP 分解。标准 CP-ALS 算法的推广允许在没有反向传播机制的情况下获得优化梯度。它减少了训练所需的内存，同时提供了计算优势。我们提出了 MEKER，一种内存高效的 KG 嵌入模型，它在链接预测任务和基于 KG 的问答上产生了与 SOTA 相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MEKER的内存高效知识图谱嵌入模型，用于链接预测和基于知识图谱的问答任务。
AI.motivation: 传统知识图谱嵌入方法在处理大规模数据时面临内存成本过高的问题，需要更高效的表示和计算方式。
AI.method: 将知识图谱表示为三阶二进制张量，并采用数据特定的广义CP分解方法，通过优化梯度计算避免反向传播以降低内存消耗。
AI.result: MEKER在链接预测任务和基于知识图谱的问答任务中表现出与当前最优方法相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: MEKER通过改进的张量分解方法有效降低了内存需求，在保持性能的同时适用于大规模知识图谱任务。

title: Learning Functional Distributional Semantics with Visual Data
title_zh: 使用视觉数据学习功能分布语义
abstract: Functional Distributional Semantics is a recently proposed framework for learning distributional semantics that provides linguistic interpretability. It models the meaning of a word as a binary classifier rather than a numerical vector. In this work, we propose a method to train a Functional Distributional Semantics model with grounded visual data. We train it on the Visual Genome dataset, which is closer to the kind of data encountered in human language acquisition than a large text corpus. On four external evaluation datasets, our model outperforms previous work on learning semantics from Visual Genome.
summary: Functional Distributional Semantics is a recently proposed framework for learning distributional semantics that provides linguistic interpretability. It models the meaning of a word as a binary classifier rather than a numerical vector. In this work, we propose a method to train a Functional Distributional Semantics model with grounded visual data. We train it on the Visual Genome dataset, which is closer to the kind of data encountered in human language acquisition than a large text corpus. On four external evaluation datasets, our model outperforms previous work on learning semantics from Visual Genome.
abstract_zh: 功能分布语义是最近提出的一个用于学习分布语义的框架，它提供了语言可解释性。它将单词的含义建模为二元分类器而不是数值向量。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用接地视觉数据训练功能分布语义模型的方法。我们在视觉基因组数据集上对其进行训练，该数据集比大型文本语料库更接近人类语言习得中遇到的数据类型。在四个外部评估数据集上，我们的模型优于之前从视觉基因组学习语义的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用视觉数据训练功能分布语义模型的方法，通过Visual Genome数据集提升词义建模的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统分布语义模型依赖数值向量难以解释，而功能分布语义框架通过二分类器增强可解释性，但需更贴近人类语言习得的视觉数据进行训练。
AI.method: 基于Visual Genome数据集训练功能分布语义模型，将词义建模为二分类器，并在四个外部数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 模型在四个外部评价数据集上优于现有基于Visual Genome的语义学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 视觉数据驱动的功能分布语义模型有效提升了语义表示的可解释性，为分布语义学习提供了新方向。

On four external evaluation datasets, our model outperforms previous work on learning semantics from Visual Genome. 功能分布语义是最近提出的一个用于学习分布语义的框架，它提供了语言可解释性。它将单词的含义建模为二元分类器而不是数值向量。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用接地视觉数据训练功能分布语义模型的方法。我们在视觉基因组数据集上对其进行训练，该数据集比大型文本语料库更接近人类语言习得中遇到的数据类型。在四个外部评估数据集上，我们的模型优于之前从视觉基因组学习语义的工作。 本文提出一种利用视觉数据训练功能分布语义模型的方法，通过Visual Genome数据集提升词义建模的可解释性。 Yinhong Liu,Guy Emerson cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Real-time HOG+SVM based object detection using SoC FPGA for a UHD video stream
title_zh: 使用 SoC FPGA 进行超高清视频流基于实时 HOG+SVM 的目标检测
comment: 6 pages, accepted for the CPS & IoT 2022 conference
comments: 6 pages, accepted for the CPS & IoT 2022 conference
abstract: Object detection is an essential component of many vision systems. For example, pedestrian detection is used in advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) and advanced video surveillance systems (AVSS). Currently, most detectors use deep convolutional neural networks (e.g., the YOLO -- You Only Look Once -- family), which, however, due to their high computational complexity, are not able to process a very high-resolution video stream in real-time, especially within a limited energy budget. In this paper we present a hardware implementation of the well-known pedestrian detector with HOG (Histogram of Oriented Gradients) feature extraction and SVM (Support Vector Machine) classification. Our system running on AMD Xilinx Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC (Multiprocessor System on Chip) device allows real-time processing of 4K resolution (UHD -- Ultra High Definition, 3840 x 2160 pixels) video for 60 frames per second. The system is capable of detecting a pedestrian in a single scale. The results obtained confirm the high suitability of reprogrammable devices in the real-time implementation of embedded vision systems.

abstract_zh: 物体检测是许多视觉系统的重要组成部分。例如，行人检测用于高级驾驶员辅助系统（ADAS）和高级视频监控系统（AVSS）。目前，大多数检测器使用深度卷积神经网络（例如 YOLO（You Only Look Once）系列），然而，由于其高计算复杂性，无法实时处理非常高分辨率的视频流，尤其是在有限的能量预算内。在本文中，我们提出了著名的行人检测器的硬件实现，具有 HOG（定向梯度直方图）特征提取和 SVM（支持向量机）分类。我们的系统在 AMD Xilinx Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC（多处理器片上系统）设备上运行，可实时处理每秒 60 帧的 4K 分辨率（UHD - 超高清，3840 x 2160 像素）视频。该系统能够在单一尺度上检测行人。获得的结果证实了可重编程设备在嵌入式视觉系统的实时实现中的高度适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于HOG+SVM的实时目标检测方法，并在SoC FPGA上实现，用于处理超高清视频流。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度卷积神经网络检测方法计算复杂度高，难以在有限的能耗下实时处理超高分辨率视频流。
AI.method: 采用HOG特征提取和SVM分类方法，基于AMD Xilinx Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC器件实现硬件加速。
AI.result: 系统能够在每秒60帧的条件下实时处理4K分辨率视频，并实现单尺度行人检测。
AI.conclusion: 可编程器件在嵌入式视觉系统的实时实现中具有很高的适用性。

authors_text: Susie Xi Rao,Clémence Lanfranchi,Shuai Zhang,Zhichao Han,Zitao Zhang,Wei Min,Mo Cheng,Yinan Shan,Yang Zhao,Ce Zhang
title: Modelling graph dynamics in fraud detection with "Attention"
title_zh: 使用“注意力”对欺诈检测中的图形动态进行建模
comment: Manuscript under review. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2012.10831
comments: Manuscript under review. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2012.10831
abstract: At online retail platforms, detecting fraudulent accounts and transactions is crucial to improve customer experience, minimize loss, and avoid unauthorized transactions. Despite the variety of different models for deep learning on graphs, few approaches have been proposed for dealing with graphs that are both heterogeneous and dynamic. In this paper, we propose DyHGN (Dynamic Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network) and its variants to capture both temporal and heterogeneous information. We first construct dynamic heterogeneous graphs from registration and transaction data from eBay. Then, we build models with diachronic entity embedding and heterogeneous graph transformer. We also use model explainability techniques to understand the behaviors of DyHGN-* models. Our findings reveal that modelling graph dynamics with heterogeneous inputs need to be conducted with "attention" depending on the data structure, distribution, and computation cost.
summary: At online retail platforms, detecting fraudulent accounts and transactions is crucial to improve customer experience, minimize loss, and avoid unauthorized transactions. Despite the variety of different models for deep learning on graphs, few approaches have been proposed for dealing with graphs that are both heterogeneous and dynamic. In this paper, we propose DyHGN (Dynamic Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network) and its variants to capture both temporal and heterogeneous information. We first construct dynamic heterogeneous graphs from registration and transaction data from eBay. Then, we build models with diachronic entity embedding and heterogeneous graph transformer. We also use model explainability techniques to understand the behaviors of DyHGN-* models. Our findings reveal that modelling graph dynamics with heterogeneous inputs need to be conducted with "attention" depending on the data structure, distribution, and computation cost.
abstract_zh: 在在线零售平台，检测欺诈账户和交易对于改善客户体验、最大限度地减少损失并避免未经授权的交易至关重要。尽管图深度学习有多种不同的模型，但很少有人提出处理异构和动态图的方法。在本文中，我们提出了 DyHGN（动态异构图神经网络）及其变体来捕获时间和异构信息。我们首先根据 eBay 的注册和交易数据构建动态异构图。然后，我们使用历时实体嵌入和异构图转换器构建模型。我们还使用模型可解释性技术来理解 DyHGN-* 模型的行为。我们的研究结果表明，使用异构输入对图动态进行建模需要根据数据结构、分布和计算成本进行“注意”。

AI.tldr: 提出动态异构图神经网络（DyHGN）及其变体，用于欺诈检测中的图动态建模，结合时间异构图和注意力机制。
AI.motivation: 现有图模型难以有效处理异构和动态图，而欺诈检测需要捕捉时间变化和异构信息。
AI.method: 构建动态异构图，采用时间实体嵌入和异构图变压器，并结合模型可解释性技术。
AI.result: 发现建模异构输入的图动态需依据数据结构、分布及计算成本，采用注意力机制提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出，在异构动态图建模中，注意力机制是优化数据结构、分布和计算成本的关键。

title: Fast Autonomous Robotic Exploration Using the Underlying Graph Structure
title_zh: 使用底层图结构进行快速自主机器人探索
comment: 2021 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.01289
comments: 2021 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.01289
abstract: In this work, we fully define the existing relationships between traditional optimality criteria and the connectivity of the underlying pose-graph in Active SLAM, characterizing, therefore, the connection between Graph Theory and the Theory Optimal Experimental Design. We validate the proposed relationships in 2D and 3D graph SLAM datasets, showing a remarkable relaxation of the computational load when using the graph structure. Furthermore, we present a novel Active SLAM framework which outperforms traditional methods by successfully leveraging the graphical facet of the problem so as to autonomously explore an unknown environment.
summary: In this work, we fully define the existing relationships between traditional optimality criteria and the connectivity of the underlying pose-graph in Active SLAM, characterizing, therefore, the connection between Graph Theory and the Theory Optimal Experimental Design. We validate the proposed relationships in 2D and 3D graph SLAM datasets, showing a remarkable relaxation of the computational load when using the graph structure. Furthermore, we present a novel Active SLAM framework which outperforms traditional methods by successfully leveraging the graphical facet of the problem so as to autonomously explore an unknown environment.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们充分定义了传统最优性标准与主动 SLAM 中底层位姿图的连接性之间的现有关系，从而表征了图论与理论最优实验设计之间的联系。我们在 2D 和 3D 图 SLAM 数据集中验证了所提出的关系，表明使用图结构时计算负载显着减轻。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的主动 SLAM 框架，该框架通过成功地利用问题的图形方面来自主探索未知环境，从而优于传统方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图结构的快速自主机器人探索方法，通过结合图论与最优实验设计理论，优化SLAM计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM方法存在计算复杂度高、效率低的问题，需通过图结构特性提升自主探索性能。
AI.method: 定义传统最优性准则与姿态图连接的关系，构建新型主动SLAM框架，利用图结构特性降低计算负载。
AI.result: 在2D/3D SLAM数据集验证中，计算负担显著降低，新框架在自主探索任务中优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过图论与最优实验设计的结合，提出的新框架有效提升了机器人环境探索的效率与鲁棒性。

We validate the proposed relationships in 2D and 3D graph SLAM datasets, showing a remarkable relaxation of the computational load when using the graph structure. Furthermore, we present a novel Active SLAM framework which outperforms traditional methods by successfully leveraging the graphical facet of the problem so as to autonomously explore an unknown environment. 在这项工作中，我们充分定义了传统最优性标准与主动 SLAM 中底层位姿图的连接性之间的现有关系，从而表征了图论与理论最优实验设计之间的联系。我们在 2D 和 3D 图 SLAM 数据集中验证了所提出的关系，表明使用图结构时计算负载显着减轻。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的主动 SLAM 框架，该框架通过成功地利用问题的图形方面来自主探索未知环境，从而优于传统方法。 本文提出一种基于图结构的快速自主机器人探索方法，通过结合图论与最优实验设计理论，优化SLAM计算效率。 Julio A. Placed,José A. Castellanos cs.RO

title: Enhancing the Transferability via Feature-Momentum Adversarial Attack
title_zh: 通过特征动量对抗攻击增强可转移性
abstract: Transferable adversarial attack has drawn increasing attention due to their practical threaten to real-world applications. In particular, the feature-level adversarial attack is one recent branch that can enhance the transferability via disturbing the intermediate features. The existing methods usually create a guidance map for features, where the value indicates the importance of the corresponding feature element and then employs an iterative algorithm to disrupt the features accordingly. However, the guidance map is fixed in existing methods, which can not consistently reflect the behavior of networks as the image is changed during iteration. In this paper, we describe a new method called Feature-Momentum Adversarial Attack (FMAA) to further improve transferability. The key idea of our method is that we estimate a guidance map dynamically at each iteration using momentum to effectively disturb the category-relevant features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art methods by a large margin on different target models.
summary: Transferable adversarial attack has drawn increasing attention due to their practical threaten to real-world applications. In particular, the feature-level adversarial attack is one recent branch that can enhance the transferability via disturbing the intermediate features. The existing methods usually create a guidance map for features, where the value indicates the importance of the corresponding feature element and then employs an iterative algorithm to disrupt the features accordingly. However, the guidance map is fixed in existing methods, which can not consistently reflect the behavior of networks as the image is changed during iteration. In this paper, we describe a new method called Feature-Momentum Adversarial Attack (FMAA) to further improve transferability. The key idea of our method is that we estimate a guidance map dynamically at each iteration using momentum to effectively disturb the category-relevant features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art methods by a large margin on different target models.
abstract_zh: 可转移对抗攻击由于其对现实世界应用的实际威胁而引起了越来越多的关注。特别是，特征级对抗攻击是最近的一个分支，可以通过干扰中间特征来增强可转移性。现有的方法通常为特征创建一个引导图，其中的值指示相应特征元素的重要性，然后采用迭代算法来相应地破坏特征。然而，现有方法中的引导图是固定的，当图像在迭代过程中发生变化时，它不能一致地反映网络的行为。在本文中，我们描述了一种称为特征动量对抗攻击（FMAA）的新方法，以进一步提高可转移性。我们方法的关键思想是，我们在每次迭代时使用动量动态估计引导图，以有效干扰类别相关特征。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在不同的目标模型上明显优于其他最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为特征动量对抗攻击（FMAA）的新方法，通过动态调整特征指导图来增强对抗样本的可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有特征级对抗攻击方法使用的固定指导图无法反映网络在迭代过程中的动态行为，导致攻击效果受限。
AI.method: 利用动量机制在每次迭代中动态估计特征指导图，持续扰动与类别相关的中间特征以提升攻击可迁移性。
AI.result: 实验表明FMAA在多个目标模型上显著优于现有最先进方法，攻击成功率提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 动态特征指导机制有效解决了固定指导图的局限性，为提升对抗攻击可迁移性提供了新思路。
