title: Few-Shot Object Detection with Proposal Balance Refinement
title_zh: 具有提案平衡细化的少样本目标检测
abstract: Few-shot object detection has gained significant attention in recent years as it has the potential to greatly reduce the reliance on large amounts of manually annotated bounding boxes. While most existing few-shot object detection literature primarily focuses on bounding box classification by obtaining as discriminative feature embeddings as possible, we emphasize the necessity of handling the lack of intersection-over-union (IoU) variations induced by a biased distribution of novel samples. In this paper, we analyze the IoU imbalance that is caused by the relatively high number of low-quality region proposals, and reveal that it plays a critical role in improving few-shot learning capabilities. The well-known two stage fine-tuning technique causes insufficient quality and quantity of the novel positive samples, which hinders the effective object detection of unseen novel classes. To alleviate this issue, we present a few-shot object detection model with proposal balance refinement, a simple yet effective approach in learning object proposals using an auxiliary sequential bounding box refinement process. This process enables the detector to be optimized on the various IoU scores through additional novel class samples. To fully exploit our sequential stage architecture, we revise the fine-tuning strategy and expose the Region Proposal Network to the novel classes in order to provide increased learning opportunities for the region-of-interest (RoI) classifiers and regressors. Our extensive assessments on PASCAL VOC and COCO demonstrate that our framework substantially outperforms other existing few-shot object detection approaches.
summary: Few-shot object detection has gained significant attention in recent years as it has the potential to greatly reduce the reliance on large amounts of manually annotated bounding boxes. While most existing few-shot object detection literature primarily focuses on bounding box classification by obtaining as discriminative feature embeddings as possible, we emphasize the necessity of handling the lack of intersection-over-union (IoU) variations induced by a biased distribution of novel samples. In this paper, we analyze the IoU imbalance that is caused by the relatively high number of low-quality region proposals, and reveal that it plays a critical role in improving few-shot learning capabilities. The well-known two stage fine-tuning technique causes insufficient quality and quantity of the novel positive samples, which hinders the effective object detection of unseen novel classes. To alleviate this issue, we present a few-shot object detection model with proposal balance refinement, a simple yet effective approach in learning object proposals using an auxiliary sequential bounding box refinement process. This process enables the detector to be optimized on the various IoU scores through additional novel class samples. To fully exploit our sequential stage architecture, we revise the fine-tuning strategy and expose the Region Proposal Network to the novel classes in order to provide increased learning opportunities for the region-of-interest (RoI) classifiers and regressors. Our extensive assessments on PASCAL VOC and COCO demonstrate that our framework substantially outperforms other existing few-shot object detection approaches.
abstract_zh: 近年来，少样本目标检测受到了广泛关注，因为它有可能大大减少对大量手动注释边界框的依赖。虽然大多数现有的少镜头目标检测文献主要关注通过获得尽可能有区别的特征嵌入来进行边界框分类，但我们强调有必要处理由新样本的偏差分布引起的交集（IoU）变化的缺乏。在本文中，我们分析了相对较多的低质量候选区域导致的 IoU 不平衡，并揭示了它在提高小样本学习能力方面发挥着关键作用。众所周知的两阶段微调技术导致新的正样本的质量和数量不足，这阻碍了对未见过的新类别的有效目标检测。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种具有提案平衡细化的少量目标检测模型，这是一种使用辅助顺序边界框细化过程来学习对象提案的简单而有效的方法。此过程使检测器能够通过额外的新类样本在各种 IoU 分数上进行优化。为了充分利用我们的顺序阶段架构，我们修改了微调策略，并将区域提议网络暴露给新的类，以便为感兴趣区域（RoI）分类器和回归器提供更多的学习机会。我们对 PASCAL VOC 和 COCO 的广泛评估表明，我们的框架大大优于其他现有的少样本目标检测方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于提议平衡优化的少样本目标检测方法，解决因新样本分布偏差导致的IoU不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本检测方法忽视了低质量区域提议导致的IoU不平衡，致使新类样本质量不足，影响检测性能。
AI.method: 设计辅助顺序边界框优化流程，通过调整微调策略使RPN接触新类别，提升RoI分类器与回归器的学习机会。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和COCO数据集上显著优于现有少样本目标检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 提议平衡优化有效缓解IoU不平衡问题，提升少样本场景下的目标检测能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于提议平衡优化的少样本目标检测方法，解决因新样本分布偏差导致的IoU不平衡问题。

motivation: 现有少样本检测方法忽视了低质量区域提议导致的IoU不平衡，致使新类样本质量不足，影响检测性能。
method: 设计辅助顺序边界框优化流程，通过调整微调策略使RPN接触新类别，提升RoI分类器与回归器的学习机会。
result: 在PASCAL VOC和COCO数据集上显著优于现有少样本目标检测方法。
conclusion: 提议平衡优化有效缓解IoU不平衡问题，提升少样本场景下的目标检测能力。
search_text: Few-Shot Object Detection with Proposal Balance Refinement 具有提案平衡细化的少样本目标检测 Few-shot object detection has gained significant attention in recent years as it has the potential to greatly reduce the reliance on large amounts of manually annotated bounding boxes. While most existing few-shot object detection literature primarily focuses on bounding box classification by obtaining as discriminative feature embeddings as possible, we emphasize the necessity of handling the lack of intersection-over-union (IoU) variations induced by a biased distribution of novel samples. In this paper, we analyze the IoU imbalance that is caused by the relatively high number of low-quality region proposals, and reveal that it plays a critical role in improving few-shot learning capabilities. The well-known two stage fine-tuning technique causes insufficient quality and quantity of the novel positive samples, which hinders the effective object detection of unseen novel classes. To alleviate this issue, we present a few-shot object detection model with proposal balance refinement, a simple yet effective approach in learning object proposals using an auxiliary sequential bounding box refinement process. This process enables the detector to be optimized on the various IoU scores through additional novel class samples. To fully exploit our sequential stage architecture, we revise the fine-tuning strategy and expose the Region Proposal Network to the novel classes in order to provide increased learning opportunities for the region-of-interest (RoI) classifiers and regressors. Our extensive assessments on PASCAL VOC and COCO demonstrate that our framework substantially outperforms other existing few-shot object detection approaches. 近年来，少样本目标检测受到了广泛关注，因为它有可能大大减少对大量手动注释边界框的依赖。虽然大多数现有的少镜头目标检测文献主要关注通过获得尽可能有区别的特征嵌入来进行边界框分类，但我们强调有必要处理由新样本的偏差分布引起的交集（IoU）变化的缺乏。在本文中，我们分析了相对较多的低质量候选区域导致的 IoU 不平衡，并揭示了它在提高小样本学习能力方面发挥着关键作用。众所周知的两阶段微调技术导致新的正样本的质量和数量不足，这阻碍了对未见过的新类别的有效目标检测。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种具有提案平衡细化的少量目标检测模型，这是一种使用辅助顺序边界框细化过程来学习对象提案的简单而有效的方法。此过程使检测器能够通过额外的新类样本在各种 IoU 分数上进行优化。为了充分利用我们的顺序阶段架构，我们修改了微调策略，并将区域提议网络暴露给新的类，以便为感兴趣区域（RoI）分类器和回归器提供更多的学习机会。我们对 PASCAL VOC 和 COCO 的广泛评估表明，我们的框架大大优于其他现有的少样本目标检测方法。 本文提出一种基于提议平衡优化的少样本目标检测方法，解决因新样本分布偏差导致的IoU不平衡问题。 Sueyeon Kim,Woo-Jeoung Nam,Seong-Whan Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Nicolas Bousquet,Amer E. Mouawad,Naomi Nishimura,Sebastian Siebertz
title: A survey on the parameterized complexity of the independent set and (connected) dominating set reconfiguration problems
title_zh: 独立集和（连通）支配集重构问题的参数化复杂性综述
abstract: A graph vertex-subset problem defines which subsets of the vertices of an input graph are feasible solutions. We view a feasible solution as a set of tokens placed on the vertices of the graph. A reconfiguration variant of a vertex-subset problem asks, given two feasible solutions of size $k$, whether it is possible to transform one into the other by a sequence of token slides (along edges of the graph) or token jumps (between arbitrary vertices of the graph) such that each intermediate set remains a feasible solution of size $k$. Many algorithmic questions present themselves in the form of reconfiguration problems: Given the description of an initial system state and the description of a target state, is it possible to transform the system from its initial state into the target one while preserving certain properties of the system in the process? Such questions have received a substantial amount of attention under the so-called combinatorial reconfiguration framework. We consider reconfiguration variants of three fundamental underlying graph vertex-subset problems, namely Independent Set, Dominating Set, and Connected Dominating Set. We survey both older and more recent work on the parameterized complexity of all three problems when parameterized by the number of tokens $k$. The emphasis will be on positive results and the most common techniques for the design of fixed-parameter tractable algorithms.
summary: A graph vertex-subset problem defines which subsets of the vertices of an input graph are feasible solutions. We view a feasible solution as a set of tokens placed on the vertices of the graph. A reconfiguration variant of a vertex-subset problem asks, given two feasible solutions of size $k$, whether it is possible to transform one into the other by a sequence of token slides (along edges of the graph) or token jumps (between arbitrary vertices of the graph) such that each intermediate set remains a feasible solution of size $k$. Many algorithmic questions present themselves in the form of reconfiguration problems: Given the description of an initial system state and the description of a target state, is it possible to transform the system from its initial state into the target one while preserving certain properties of the system in the process? Such questions have received a substantial amount of attention under the so-called combinatorial reconfiguration framework. We consider reconfiguration variants of three fundamental underlying graph vertex-subset problems, namely Independent Set, Dominating Set, and Connected Dominating Set. We survey both older and more recent work on the parameterized complexity of all three problems when parameterized by the number of tokens $k$. The emphasis will be on positive results and the most common techniques for the design of fixed-parameter tractable algorithms.
abstract_zh: 图顶点子集问题定义输入图的顶点的哪些子集是可行解。我们将可行的解决方案视为放置在图的顶点上的一组标记。顶点子集问题的重新配置变体询问，给定两个大小为 $k$ 的可行解，是否可以通过一系列令牌滑动（沿着图的边缘）或令牌跳跃（在图的任意顶点之间）将一个转换为另一个，以便每个中间集仍然是大小为 $k$ 的可行解。许多算法问题以重构问题的形式出现：给定初始系统状态的描述和目标状态的描述，是否有可能将系统从初始状态转换为目标状态，同时在此过程中保留系统的某些属性？这些问题在所谓的组合重构框架下受到了大量关注。我们考虑三个基本的底层图顶点子集问题的重新配置变体，即独立集、支配集和连通支配集。我们调查了关于所有三个问题的参数化复杂性的较早和最近的工作，当通过标记的数量 $k$ 进行参数化时。重点将放在固定参数易处理算法设计的积极结果和最常用技术上。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了独立集和（连通）支配集重配置问题的参数化复杂性研究。
AI.motivation: 重配置问题在系统状态转换中具有重要应用，需在保持系统性质的前提下进行状态变换，因此研究其参数化复杂性具有理论和实际意义。
AI.method: 通过回顾和分析独立集、支配集及连通支配集重配置问题的参数化复杂性结果，总结固定参数可解算法的设计方法。
AI.result: 总结了以令牌数量k为参数的三类问题的参数化复杂性结果，重点呈现积极成果及常见算法设计技术。
AI.conclusion: 该综述展示了重配置问题在参数化复杂性领域的研究进展，并为未来算法设计提供了方向。

authors_text: Zhiyuan Peng,Xuanji He,Ke Ding,Tan Lee,Guanglu Wan
title: Unifying Cosine and PLDA Back-ends for Speaker Verification
title_zh: 统一 Cosine 和 PLDA 后端以进行扬声器验证
abstract: State-of-art speaker verification (SV) systems use a back-end model to score the similarity of speaker embeddings extracted from a neural network model. The commonly used back-end models are the cosine scoring and the probabilistic linear discriminant analysis (PLDA) scoring. With the recently developed neural embeddings, the theoretically more appealing PLDA approach is found to have no advantage against or even be inferior the simple cosine scoring in terms of SV system performance. This paper presents an investigation on the relation between the two scoring approaches, aiming to explain the above counter-intuitive observation. It is shown that the cosine scoring is essentially a special case of PLDA scoring. In other words, by properly setting the parameters of PLDA, the two back-ends become equivalent. As a consequence, the cosine scoring not only inherits the basic assumptions for the PLDA but also introduces additional assumptions on the properties of input embeddings. Experiments show that the dimensional independence assumption required by the cosine scoring contributes most to the performance gap between the two methods under the domain-matched condition. When there is severe domain mismatch and the dimensional independence assumption does not hold, the PLDA would perform better than the cosine for domain adaptation.
summary: State-of-art speaker verification (SV) systems use a back-end model to score the similarity of speaker embeddings extracted from a neural network model. The commonly used back-end models are the cosine scoring and the probabilistic linear discriminant analysis (PLDA) scoring. With the recently developed neural embeddings, the theoretically more appealing PLDA approach is found to have no advantage against or even be inferior the simple cosine scoring in terms of SV system performance. This paper presents an investigation on the relation between the two scoring approaches, aiming to explain the above counter-intuitive observation. It is shown that the cosine scoring is essentially a special case of PLDA scoring. In other words, by properly setting the parameters of PLDA, the two back-ends become equivalent. As a consequence, the cosine scoring not only inherits the basic assumptions for the PLDA but also introduces additional assumptions on the properties of input embeddings. Experiments show that the dimensional independence assumption required by the cosine scoring contributes most to the performance gap between the two methods under the domain-matched condition. When there is severe domain mismatch and the dimensional independence assumption does not hold, the PLDA would perform better than the cosine for domain adaptation.
abstract_zh: 最先进的说话人验证（SV）系统使用后端模型来对从神经网络模型中提取的说话人嵌入的相似性进行评分。常用的后端模型是余弦评分和概率线性判别分析（PLDA）评分。随着最近开发的神经嵌入，理论上更有吸引力的 PLDA 方法被发现在 SV 系统性能方面与简单的余弦评分相比没有优势，甚至不如简单的余弦评分。本文对两种评分方法之间的关系进行了研究，旨在解释上述反直觉的观察结果。结果表明，余弦评分本质上是 PLDA 评分的特例。换句话说，通过正确设置PLDA的参数，两个后端变得等效。因此，余弦评分不仅继承了 PLDA 的基本假设，而且还引入了关于输入嵌入属性的附加假设。实验表明，在域匹配条件下，余弦评分所需的维度独立性假设对两种方法之间的性能差距贡献最大。当存在严重的域不匹配并且维度独立性假设不成立时，PLDA 在域自适应方面的表现将优于余弦。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了说话人验证中余弦评分与PLDA评分方法的关系，揭示其性能差异的理论原因。
AI.motivation: 尽管PLDA在理论上更具优势，但实际中余弦评分常表现更优，需解释这一反直觉现象。
AI.method: 通过分析两种评分方法的数学关系，证明余弦评分是PLDA的特例，并实验验证维度独立性假设的影响。
AI.result: 余弦评分的维度独立性假设导致其在领域匹配条件下优于PLDA，而领域不匹配时PLDA表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 余弦评分可视为PLDA的简化形式，实际选择应根据领域匹配程度决定。

title: Rethinking Offensive Text Detection as a Multi-Hop Reasoning Problem
title_zh: 重新思考攻击性文本检测作为多跳推理问题
comment: 18 pages, 4 figures, 10 tables, accepted in Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics 2022
comments: 18 pages, 4 figures, 10 tables, accepted in Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics 2022
abstract: We introduce the task of implicit offensive text detection in dialogues, where a statement may have either an offensive or non-offensive interpretation, depending on the listener and context. We argue that reasoning is crucial for understanding this broader class of offensive utterances and release SLIGHT, a dataset to support research on this task. Experiments using the data show that state-of-the-art methods of offense detection perform poorly when asked to detect implicitly offensive statements, achieving only ${\sim} 11\%$ accuracy. In contrast to existing offensive text detection datasets, SLIGHT features human-annotated chains of reasoning which describe the mental process by which an offensive interpretation can be reached from each ambiguous statement. We explore the potential for a multi-hop reasoning approach by utilizing existing entailment models to score the probability of these chains and show that even naive reasoning models can yield improved performance in most situations. Furthermore, analysis of the chains provides insight into the human interpretation process and emphasizes the importance of incorporating additional commonsense knowledge.
summary: We introduce the task of implicit offensive text detection in dialogues, where a statement may have either an offensive or non-offensive interpretation, depending on the listener and context. We argue that reasoning is crucial for understanding this broader class of offensive utterances and release SLIGHT, a dataset to support research on this task. Experiments using the data show that state-of-the-art methods of offense detection perform poorly when asked to detect implicitly offensive statements, achieving only ${\sim} 11\%$ accuracy. In contrast to existing offensive text detection datasets, SLIGHT features human-annotated chains of reasoning which describe the mental process by which an offensive interpretation can be reached from each ambiguous statement. We explore the potential for a multi-hop reasoning approach by utilizing existing entailment models to score the probability of these chains and show that even naive reasoning models can yield improved performance in most situations. Furthermore, analysis of the chains provides insight into the human interpretation process and emphasizes the importance of incorporating additional commonsense knowledge.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了对话中隐含攻击性文本检测的任务，其中语句可能具有攻击性或非攻击性解释，具体取决于听众和上下文。我们认为推理对于理解这一更广泛的攻击性话语类别至关重要，并发布了 SLIGHT，这是一个支持这项任务研究的数据集。使用这些数据进行的实验表明，当被要求检测隐含的攻击性语句时，最先进的攻击检测方法表现不佳，仅达到 ${\sim} 11\%$ 的准确率。与现有的攻击性文本检测数据集相比，SLIGHT 具有人工注释的推理链，它描述了从每个模糊语句中得出攻击性解释的心理过程。我们通过利用现有蕴涵模型对这些链的概率进行评分来探索多跳推理方法的潜力，并表明即使是朴素的推理模型在大多数情况下也可以提高性能。此外，对链条的分析提供了对人类解释过程的洞察，并强调了纳入额外常识知识的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文将隐式攻击性文本检测任务重新定义为多跳推理问题，并提出包含人类标注推理链的SLIGHT数据集以支持相关研究。
AI.motivation: 现有攻击性文本检测方法在处理依赖上下文和听众视角的隐式攻击性语句时表现不佳，需引入推理机制和常识知识提升检测能力。
AI.method: 构建SLIGHT数据集并标注人类推理链，利用蕴含模型对推理链进行概率评分，通过多跳推理方法改进检测性能。
AI.result: 现有方法在隐式攻击性检测任务中仅达11%准确率，而多跳推理模型在多数场景下显著提升性能，推理链分析揭示了人类解释机制的关键要素。
AI.conclusion: 隐式攻击性检测需结合多跳推理与常识知识，SLIGHT数据集和推理链分析为未来研究提供了重要方向。

We argue that reasoning is crucial for understanding this broader class of offensive utterances and release SLIGHT, a dataset to support research on this task. Experiments using the data show that state-of-the-art methods of offense detection perform poorly when asked to detect implicitly offensive statements, achieving only ${\sim} 11\%$ accuracy. Furthermore, analysis of the chains provides insight into the human interpretation process and emphasizes the importance of incorporating additional commonsense knowledge. 我们引入了对话中隐含攻击性文本检测的任务，其中语句可能具有攻击性或非攻击性解释，具体取决于听众和上下文。我们认为推理对于理解这一更广泛的攻击性话语类别至关重要，并发布了 SLIGHT，这是一个支持这项任务研究的数据集。使用这些数据进行的实验表明，当被要求检测隐含的攻击性语句时，最先进的攻击检测方法表现不佳，仅达到 ${\sim} 11\%$ 的准确率。与现有的攻击性文本检测数据集相比，SLIGHT 具有人工注释的推理链，它描述了从每个模糊语句中得出攻击性解释的心理过程。我们通过利用现有蕴涵模型对这些链的概率进行评分来探索多跳推理方法的潜力，并表明即使是朴素的推理模型在大多数情况下也可以提高性能。此外，对链条的分析提供了对人类解释过程的洞察，并强调了纳入额外常识知识的重要性。 本文将隐式攻击性文本检测任务重新定义为多跳推理问题，并提出包含人类标注推理链的SLIGHT数据集以支持相关研究。 Qiang Zhang,Jason Naradowsky,Yusuke Miyao cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.HC

title: Implicit Object Mapping With Noisy Data
title_zh: 带有噪声数据的隐式对象映射
abstract: Modelling individual objects in a scene as Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) provides an alternative geometric scene representation that may benefit downstream robotics tasks such as scene understanding and object manipulation. However, we identify three challenges to using real-world training data collected by a robot to train a NeRF: (i) The camera trajectories are constrained, and full visual coverage is not guaranteed - especially when obstructions to the objects of interest are present; (ii) the poses associated with the images are noisy due to odometry or localization noise; (iii) the objects are not easily isolated from the background. This paper evaluates the extent to which above factors degrade the quality of the learnt implicit object representation. We introduce a pipeline that decomposes a scene into multiple individual object-NeRFs, using noisy object instance masks and bounding boxes, and evaluate the sensitivity of this pipeline with respect to noisy poses, instance masks, and the number of training images. We uncover that the sensitivity to noisy instance masks can be partially alleviated with depth supervision and quantify the importance of including the camera extrinsics in the NeRF optimisation process.
summary: Modelling individual objects in a scene as Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) provides an alternative geometric scene representation that may benefit downstream robotics tasks such as scene understanding and object manipulation. However, we identify three challenges to using real-world training data collected by a robot to train a NeRF: (i) The camera trajectories are constrained, and full visual coverage is not guaranteed - especially when obstructions to the objects of interest are present; (ii) the poses associated with the images are noisy due to odometry or localization noise; (iii) the objects are not easily isolated from the background. This paper evaluates the extent to which above factors degrade the quality of the learnt implicit object representation. We introduce a pipeline that decomposes a scene into multiple individual object-NeRFs, using noisy object instance masks and bounding boxes, and evaluate the sensitivity of this pipeline with respect to noisy poses, instance masks, and the number of training images. We uncover that the sensitivity to noisy instance masks can be partially alleviated with depth supervision and quantify the importance of including the camera extrinsics in the NeRF optimisation process.
abstract_zh: 将场景中的单个对象建模为神经辐射场 (NeRF) 提供了一种替代的几何场景表示，这可能有利于下游机器人任务，例如场景理解和对象操作。然而，我们发现使用机器人收集的现实世界训练数据来训练 NeRF 面临三个挑战：（i）相机轨迹受到限制，并且不能保证完整的视觉覆盖 - 特别是当感兴趣的物体存在障碍物时； (ii) 由于里程计或定位噪声，与图像相关的姿势存在噪声； (iii) 物体不容易从背景中分离出来。本文评估了上述因素降低学习隐式对象表示质量的程度。我们引入了一个管道，使用噪声对象实例掩模和边界框将场景分解为多个单独的对象 NeRF，并评估该管道对于噪声姿势、实例掩模和训练图像数量的敏感性。我们发现，通过深度监督可以部分减轻对噪声实例掩模的敏感性，并量化在 NeRF 优化过程中包含相机外在因素的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在噪声数据环境下如何通过神经辐射场（NeRF）实现隐式物体映射，解决真实场景中因数据噪声导致的物体建模挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF方法在真实机器人数据中面临相机轨迹受限、姿态噪声和物体分离困难等问题，影响下游机器人任务的性能。
AI.method: 提出一种利用噪声实例掩码和边界框分解场景为多物体NeRF的流水线，通过实验评估噪声姿态、掩码及训练图像数量对模型的影响，并引入深度监督与相机外参优化。
AI.result: 深度监督可缓解噪声掩码影响，相机外参优化显著提升模型鲁棒性，量化了噪声因素对物体映射质量的敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 噪声数据下的隐式物体映射需结合深度监督与外参优化，未来需进一步探索复杂场景下的鲁棒建模方法。

authors_text: Pingping Dai,Haiming Zhu,Shuang Ge,Ruihan Zhang,Xiang Qian,Xi Li,Kehong Yuan
title: MIPR:Automatic Annotation of Medical Images with Pixel Rearrangement
title_zh: MIPR：通过像素重排对医学图像进行自动注释
abstract: Most of the state-of-the-art semantic segmentation reported in recent years is based on fully supervised deep learning in the medical domain. How?ever, the high-quality annotated datasets require intense labor and domain knowledge, consuming enormous time and cost. Previous works that adopt semi?supervised and unsupervised learning are proposed to address the lack of anno?tated data through assisted training with unlabeled data and achieve good perfor?mance. Still, these methods can not directly get the image annotation as doctors do. In this paper, inspired by self-training of semi-supervised learning, we pro?pose a novel approach to solve the lack of annotated data from another angle, called medical image pixel rearrangement (short in MIPR). The MIPR combines image-editing and pseudo-label technology to obtain labeled data. As the number of iterations increases, the edited image is similar to the original image, and the labeled result is similar to the doctor annotation. Therefore, the MIPR is to get labeled pairs of data directly from amounts of unlabled data with pixel rearrange?ment, which is implemented with a designed conditional Generative Adversarial Networks and a segmentation network. Experiments on the ISIC18 show that the effect of the data annotated by our method for segmentation task is is equal to or even better than that of doctors annotations
summary: Most of the state-of-the-art semantic segmentation reported in recent years is based on fully supervised deep learning in the medical domain. How?ever, the high-quality annotated datasets require intense labor and domain knowledge, consuming enormous time and cost. Previous works that adopt semi?supervised and unsupervised learning are proposed to address the lack of anno?tated data through assisted training with unlabeled data and achieve good perfor?mance. Still, these methods can not directly get the image annotation as doctors do. In this paper, inspired by self-training of semi-supervised learning, we pro?pose a novel approach to solve the lack of annotated data from another angle, called medical image pixel rearrangement (short in MIPR). The MIPR combines image-editing and pseudo-label technology to obtain labeled data. As the number of iterations increases, the edited image is similar to the original image, and the labeled result is similar to the doctor annotation. Therefore, the MIPR is to get labeled pairs of data directly from amounts of unlabled data with pixel rearrange?ment, which is implemented with a designed conditional Generative Adversarial Networks and a segmentation network. Experiments on the ISIC18 show that the effect of the data annotated by our method for segmentation task is is equal to or even better than that of doctors annotations
abstract_zh: 近年来报道的大多数最先进的语义分割都是基于医学领域的完全监督深度学习。然而，高质量的注释数据集需要大量的劳动力和领域知识，消耗大量的时间和成本。先前的工作采用半监督和无监督学习，通过无标签数据的辅助训练来解决注释数据的缺乏，并取得良好的性能。但这些方法仍然不能像医生那样直接获得图像注释。在本文中，受半监督学习自训练的启发，我们提出了一种从另一个角度解决标注数据缺乏的新方法，称为医学图像像素重排（简称MIPR）。 MIPR结合图像编辑和伪标签技术来获取标记数据。随着迭代次数的增加，编辑后的图像与原始图像相似，标记结果与医生注释相似。因此，MIPR 是通过像素重新排列直接从大量未标记数据中获取标记数据对，这是通过设计的条件生成对抗网络和分割网络来实现的。在ISIC18上的实验表明，我们的方法标注的数据对于分割任务的效果等于甚至优于医生标注的效果

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MIPR的方法，通过像素重排技术实现医学图像的自动标注，减少对人工标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 医学图像的高质量标注数据获取成本高且耗时，传统半监督和无监督方法无法直接生成类似医生标注的图像注释。
AI.method: 结合图像编辑与伪标签技术，设计条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）和分割网络，通过像素重排迭代生成接近原始图像的标注结果。
AI.result: 在ISIC18数据集上的实验表明，该方法生成的标注效果与医生标注相当甚至更优。
AI.conclusion: MIPR方法能有效从大量未标注数据中生成高质量标注对，为医学图像分割任务提供了一种低成本替代方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MIPR的方法，通过像素重排技术实现医学图像的自动标注，减少对人工标注数据的依赖。
ai_content.motivation: 医学图像的高质量标注数据获取成本高且耗时，传统半监督和无监督方法无法直接生成类似医生标注的图像注释。
ai_content.method: 结合图像编辑与伪标签技术，设计条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）和分割网络，通过像素重排迭代生成接近原始图像的标注结果。
ai_content.result: 在ISIC18数据集上的实验表明，该方法生成的标注效果与医生标注相当甚至更优。
ai_content.conclusion: MIPR方法能有效从大量未标注数据中生成高质量标注对，为医学图像分割任务提供了一种低成本替代方案。

search_text: MIPR:Automatic Annotation of Medical Images with Pixel Rearrangement MIPR：通过像素重排对医学图像进行自动注释 Most of the state-of-the-art semantic segmentation reported in recent years is based on fully supervised deep learning in the medical domain. How?ever, the high-quality annotated datasets require intense labor and domain knowledge, consuming enormous time and cost. Previous works that adopt semi?supervised and unsupervised learning are proposed to address the lack of anno?tated data through assisted training with unlabeled data and achieve good perfor?mance. Still, these methods can not directly get the image annotation as doctors do. In this paper, inspired by self-training of semi-supervised learning, we pro?pose a novel approach to solve the lack of annotated data from another angle, called medical image pixel rearrangement (short in MIPR). The MIPR combines image-editing and pseudo-label technology to obtain labeled data. As the number of iterations increases, the edited image is similar to the original image, and the labeled result is similar to the doctor annotation. Therefore, the MIPR is to get labeled pairs of data directly from amounts of unlabled data with pixel rearrange?ment, which is implemented with a designed conditional Generative Adversarial Networks and a segmentation network. Experiments on the ISIC18 show that the effect of the data annotated by our method for segmentation task is is equal to or even better than that of doctors annotations 近年来报道的大多数最先进的语义分割都是基于医学领域的完全监督深度学习。然而，高质量的注释数据集需要大量的劳动力和领域知识，消耗大量的时间和成本。先前的工作采用半监督和无监督学习，通过无标签数据的辅助训练来解决注释数据的缺乏，并取得良好的性能。但这些方法仍然不能像医生那样直接获得图像注释。在本文中，受半监督学习自训练的启发，我们提出了一种从另一个角度解决标注数据缺乏的新方法，称为医学图像像素重排（简称MIPR）。 MIPR结合图像编辑和伪标签技术来获取标记数据。随着迭代次数的增加，编辑后的图像与原始图像相似，标记结果与医生注释相似。因此，MIPR 是通过像素重新排列直接从大量未标记数据中获取标记数据对，这是通过设计的条件生成对抗网络和分割网络来实现的。在ISIC18上的实验表明，我们的方法标注的数据对于分割任务的效果等于甚至优于医生标注的效果 本文提出了一种名为MIPR的方法，通过像素重排技术实现医学图像的自动标注，减少对人工标注数据的依赖。 Pingping Dai,Haiming Zhu,Shuang Ge,Ruihan Zhang,Xiang Qian,Xi Li,Kehong Yuan eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Youngmin Kim,Minji Kwak,Dain Lee,Yeongeun Kim,Hyeongboo Baek
title: Keypoint based Sign Language Translation without Glosses
title_zh: 基于关键点的无注释手语翻译
abstract: Sign Language Translation (SLT) is a task that has not been studied relatively much compared to the study of Sign Language Recognition (SLR). However, the SLR is a study that recognizes the unique grammar of sign language, which is different from the spoken language and has a problem that non-disabled people cannot easily interpret. So, we're going to solve the problem of translating directly spoken language in sign language video. To this end, we propose a new keypoint normalization method for performing translation based on the skeleton point of the signer and robustly normalizing these points in sign language translation. It contributed to performance improvement by a customized normalization method depending on the body parts. In addition, we propose a stochastic frame selection method that enables frame augmentation and sampling at the same time. Finally, it is translated into the spoken language through an Attention-based translation model. Our method can be applied to various datasets in a way that can be applied to datasets without glosses. In addition, quantitative experimental evaluation proved the excellence of our method.
summary: Sign Language Translation (SLT) is a task that has not been studied relatively much compared to the study of Sign Language Recognition (SLR). However, the SLR is a study that recognizes the unique grammar of sign language, which is different from the spoken language and has a problem that non-disabled people cannot easily interpret. So, we're going to solve the problem of translating directly spoken language in sign language video. To this end, we propose a new keypoint normalization method for performing translation based on the skeleton point of the signer and robustly normalizing these points in sign language translation. It contributed to performance improvement by a customized normalization method depending on the body parts. In addition, we propose a stochastic frame selection method that enables frame augmentation and sampling at the same time. Finally, it is translated into the spoken language through an Attention-based translation model. Our method can be applied to various datasets in a way that can be applied to datasets without glosses. In addition, quantitative experimental evaluation proved the excellence of our method.
abstract_zh: 与手语识别（SLR）的研究相比，手语翻译（SLT）是一项研究相对较少的任务。然而，SLR是一项识别手语独特语法的研究，手语与口语不同，存在非残疾人无法轻易解读的问题。因此，我们要解决手语视频中直接口语的翻译问题。为此，我们提出了一种新的关键点归一化方法，用于基于手语者的骨架点进行翻译，并在手语翻译中鲁棒地归一化这些点。它通过根据身体部位定制的标准化方法来提高性能。此外，我们提出了一种随机帧选择方法，可以同时进行帧增强和采样。最后，通过基于注意力的翻译模型将其翻译成口语。我们的方法可以以可以应用于没有注释的数据集的方式应用于各种数据集。此外，定量实验评估证明了我们方法的卓越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需词形的手语翻译方法，通过关键点归一化和帧选择技术实现手语视频到口语的直接翻译。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注手语识别，但难以直接翻译，且依赖词形标注，限制了应用，需开发无需词形的直接翻译方法。
AI.method: 采用基于骨骼关键点的定制化归一化方法，结合随机帧选择增强与注意力翻译模型，实现端到端手语视频翻译。
AI.result: 定量实验验证了方法在多种数据集上的有效性，证明其优越性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需词形标注，适用于多种数据集，有效解决了手语直接翻译的难题。

title: Active Domain-Invariant Self-Localization Using Ego-Centric and World-Centric Maps
title_zh: 使用以自我为中心和以世界为中心的地图的活动域不变自定位
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures, draft version of a manuscript submitted to CVMI2022
comments: 13 pages, 4 figures, draft version of a manuscript submitted to CVMI2022
abstract: The training of a next-best-view (NBV) planner for visual place recognition (VPR) is a fundamentally important task in autonomous robot navigation, for which a typical approach is the use of visual experiences that are collected in the target domain as training data. However, the collection of a wide variety of visual experiences in everyday navigation is costly and prohibitive for real-time robotic applications. We address this issue by employing a novel {\it domain-invariant} NBV planner. A standard VPR subsystem based on a convolutional neural network (CNN) is assumed to be available, and its domain-invariant state recognition ability is proposed to be transferred to train the domain-invariant NBV planner. Specifically, we divide the visual cues that are available from the CNN model into two types: the output layer cue (OLC) and intermediate layer cue (ILC). The OLC is available at the output layer of the CNN model and aims to estimate the state of the robot (e.g., the robot viewpoint) with respect to the world-centric view coordinate system. The ILC is available within the middle layers of the CNN model as a high-level description of the visual content (e.g., a saliency image) with respect to the ego-centric view. In our framework, the ILC and OLC are mapped to a state vector and subsequently used to train a multiview NBV planner via deep reinforcement learning. Experiments using the public NCLT dataset validate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: The training of a next-best-view (NBV) planner for visual place recognition (VPR) is a fundamentally important task in autonomous robot navigation, for which a typical approach is the use of visual experiences that are collected in the target domain as training data. However, the collection of a wide variety of visual experiences in everyday navigation is costly and prohibitive for real-time robotic applications. We address this issue by employing a novel {\it domain-invariant} NBV planner. A standard VPR subsystem based on a convolutional neural network (CNN) is assumed to be available, and its domain-invariant state recognition ability is proposed to be transferred to train the domain-invariant NBV planner. Specifically, we divide the visual cues that are available from the CNN model into two types: the output layer cue (OLC) and intermediate layer cue (ILC). The OLC is available at the output layer of the CNN model and aims to estimate the state of the robot (e.g., the robot viewpoint) with respect to the world-centric view coordinate system. The ILC is available within the middle layers of the CNN model as a high-level description of the visual content (e.g., a saliency image) with respect to the ego-centric view. In our framework, the ILC and OLC are mapped to a state vector and subsequently used to train a multiview NBV planner via deep reinforcement learning. Experiments using the public NCLT dataset validate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 用于视觉位置识别（VPR）的次佳视图（NBV）规划器的训练是自主机器人导航中的一项基本重要任务，典型的方法是使用在目标域中收集的视觉经验作为训练数据。然而，在日常导航中收集各种视觉体验的成本高昂，并且对于实时机器人应用来说是令人望而却步的。我们通过采用一种新颖的{\it 域不变} NBV 规划器来解决这个问题。假设基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的标准VPR子系统可用，并且建议将其域不变状态识别能力转移到训练域不变NBV规划器。具体来说，我们将 CNN 模型中可用的视觉线索分为两种类型：输出层线索（OLC）和中间层线索（ILC）。 OLC 可用于 CNN 模型的输出层，旨在估计机器人相对于以世界为中心的视图坐标系的状态（例如，机器人视点）。 ILC 在 CNN 模型的中间层中可用，作为相对于以自我为中心的视图的视觉内容（例如显着性图像）的高级描述。在我们的框架中，ILC 和 OLC 被映射到状态向量，随后用于通过深度强化学习训练多视图 NBV 规划器。使用公共 NCLT 数据集的实验验证了所提方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自车坐标系和世界坐标系地图的领域不变自我定位方法，通过深度强化学习训练多视角下一最佳视角（NBV）规划器，以解决自主机器人导航中视觉位置识别（VPR）的训练数据成本问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉位置识别（VPR）训练依赖于目标领域的视觉数据收集，但实际应用中数据获取成本高且难以实时应用。本文旨在开发一种无需领域特定数据的领域不变NBV规划器，提升机器人自主导航的适应性。
AI.method: 利用卷积神经网络（CNN）提取两种视觉线索：输出层线索（OLC）用于估计世界坐标系下的机器人状态，中间层线索（ILC）描述自车坐标系下的视觉内容。通过深度强化学习将两种线索映射为状态向量，训练多视角NBV规划器。
AI.result: 在公开的NCLT数据集上验证了该方法的有效性，表明其能有效提升跨领域场景下的自我定位性能，减少对领域特定训练数据的依赖。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过迁移CNN的领域不变特征，成功实现了无需大量目标领域数据的NBV规划器训练，为自主机器人导航提供了更高效、通用的解决方案。

result: 在公开的NCLT数据集上验证了该方法的有效性，表明其能有效提升跨领域场景下的自我定位性能，减少对领域特定训练数据的依赖。
conclusion: 该方法通过迁移CNN的领域不变特征，成功实现了无需大量目标领域数据的NBV规划器训练，为自主机器人导航提供了更高效、通用的解决方案。
search_text: Active Domain-Invariant Self-Localization Using Ego-Centric and World-Centric Maps 使用以自我为中心和以世界为中心的地图的活动域不变自定位 The training of a next-best-view (NBV) planner for visual place recognition (VPR) is a fundamentally important task in autonomous robot navigation, for which a typical approach is the use of visual experiences that are collected in the target domain as training data. However, the collection of a wide variety of visual experiences in everyday navigation is costly and prohibitive for real-time robotic applications. We address this issue by employing a novel {\it domain-invariant} NBV planner. A standard VPR subsystem based on a convolutional neural network (CNN) is assumed to be available, and its domain-invariant state recognition ability is proposed to be transferred to train the domain-invariant NBV planner. Specifically, we divide the visual cues that are available from the CNN model into two types: the output layer cue (OLC) and intermediate layer cue (ILC). The OLC is available at the output layer of the CNN model and aims to estimate the state of the robot (e.g., the robot viewpoint) with respect to the world-centric view coordinate system. The ILC is available within the middle layers of the CNN model as a high-level description of the visual content (e.g., a saliency image) with respect to the ego-centric view. In our framework, the ILC and OLC are mapped to a state vector and subsequently used to train a multiview NBV planner via deep reinforcement learning. Experiments using the public NCLT dataset validate the effectiveness of the proposed method. 用于视觉位置识别（VPR）的次佳视图（NBV）规划器的训练是自主机器人导航中的一项基本重要任务，典型的方法是使用在目标域中收集的视觉经验作为训练数据。然而，在日常导航中收集各种视觉体验的成本高昂，并且对于实时机器人应用来说是令人望而却步的。我们通过采用一种新颖的{\it 域不变} NBV 规划器来解决这个问题。假设基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的标准VPR子系统可用，并且建议将其域不变状态识别能力转移到训练域不变NBV规划器。具体来说，我们将 CNN 模型中可用的视觉线索分为两种类型：输出层线索（OLC）和中间层线索（ILC）。 OLC 可用于 CNN 模型的输出层，旨在估计机器人相对于以世界为中心的视图坐标系的状态（例如，机器人视点）。 ILC 在 CNN 模型的中间层中可用，作为相对于以自我为中心的视图的视觉内容（例如显着性图像）的高级描述。在我们的框架中，ILC 和 OLC 被映射到状态向量，随后用于通过深度强化学习训练多视图 NBV 规划器。使用公共 NCLT 数据集的实验验证了所提方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于自车坐标系和世界坐标系地图的领域不变自我定位方法，通过深度强化学习训练多视角下一最佳视角（NBV）规划器，以解决自主机器人导航中视觉位置识别（VPR）的训练数据成本问题。 Kanya Kurauchi,Kanji Tanaka,Ryogo Yamamoto,Mitsuki Yoshida cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhecan Wang,Noel Codella,Yen-Chun Chen,Luowei Zhou,Xiyang Dai,Bin Xiao,Jianwei Yang,Haoxuan You,Kai-Wei Chang,Shih-fu Chang,Lu Yuan
title: Multimodal Adaptive Distillation for Leveraging Unimodal Encoders for Vision-Language Tasks
title_zh: 利用单模态编码器执行视觉语言任务的多模态自适应蒸馏
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.05729
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.05729
abstract: Cross-modal encoders for vision-language (VL) tasks are often pretrained with carefully curated vision-language datasets. While these datasets reach an order of 10 million samples, the labor cost is prohibitive to scale further. Conversely, unimodal encoders are pretrained with simpler annotations that are less cost-prohibitive, achieving scales of hundreds of millions to billions. As a result, unimodal encoders have achieved state-of-art (SOTA) on many downstream tasks. However, challenges remain when applying to VL tasks. The pretraining data is not optimal for cross-modal architectures and requires heavy computational resources. In addition, unimodal architectures lack cross-modal interactions that have demonstrated significant benefits for VL tasks. Therefore, how to best leverage pretrained unimodal encoders for VL tasks is still an area of active research. In this work, we propose a method to leverage unimodal vision and text encoders for VL tasks that augment existing VL approaches while conserving computational complexity. Specifically, we propose Multimodal Adaptive Distillation (MAD), which adaptively distills useful knowledge from pretrained encoders to cross-modal VL encoders. Second, to better capture nuanced impacts on VL task performance, we introduce an evaluation protocol that includes Visual Commonsense Reasoning (VCR), Visual Entailment (SNLI-VE), and Visual Question Answering (VQA), across a variety of data constraints and conditions of domain shift. Experiments demonstrate that MAD leads to consistent gains in the low-shot, domain-shifted, and fully-supervised conditions on VCR, SNLI-VE, and VQA, achieving SOTA performance on VCR compared to other single models pretrained with image-text data. Finally, MAD outperforms concurrent works utilizing pretrained vision encoder from CLIP. Code will be made available.
summary: Cross-modal encoders for vision-language (VL) tasks are often pretrained with carefully curated vision-language datasets. While these datasets reach an order of 10 million samples, the labor cost is prohibitive to scale further. Conversely, unimodal encoders are pretrained with simpler annotations that are less cost-prohibitive, achieving scales of hundreds of millions to billions. As a result, unimodal encoders have achieved state-of-art (SOTA) on many downstream tasks. However, challenges remain when applying to VL tasks. The pretraining data is not optimal for cross-modal architectures and requires heavy computational resources. In addition, unimodal architectures lack cross-modal interactions that have demonstrated significant benefits for VL tasks. Therefore, how to best leverage pretrained unimodal encoders for VL tasks is still an area of active research. In this work, we propose a method to leverage unimodal vision and text encoders for VL tasks that augment existing VL approaches while conserving computational complexity. Specifically, we propose Multimodal Adaptive Distillation (MAD), which adaptively distills useful knowledge from pretrained encoders to cross-modal VL encoders. Second, to better capture nuanced impacts on VL task performance, we introduce an evaluation protocol that includes Visual Commonsense Reasoning (VCR), Visual Entailment (SNLI-VE), and Visual Question Answering (VQA), across a variety of data constraints and conditions of domain shift. Experiments demonstrate that MAD leads to consistent gains in the low-shot, domain-shifted, and fully-supervised conditions on VCR, SNLI-VE, and VQA, achieving SOTA performance on VCR compared to other single models pretrained with image-text data. Finally, MAD outperforms concurrent works utilizing pretrained vision encoder from CLIP. Code will be made available.
abstract_zh: 用于视觉语言（VL）任务的跨模式编码器通常使用精心策划的视觉语言数据集进行预训练。虽然这些数据集达到了 1000 万个样本的数量级，但进一步扩展的劳动力成本却令人望而却步。相反，单模态编码器使用更简单的注释进行预训练，成本较低，可实现数亿至数十亿的规模。因此，单模态编码器在许多下游任务上实现了最先进的（SOTA）。然而，应用于 VL 任务时仍然存在挑战。预训练数据对于跨模式架构来说并不是最佳的，并且需要大量的计算资源。此外，单模态架构缺乏跨模态交互，而跨模态交互已被证明对 VL 任务具有显着优势。因此，如何最好地利用预训练的单峰编码器来完成 VL 任务仍然是一个活跃的研究领域。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用单模态视觉和文本编码器进行 VL 任务的方法，该方法增强了现有的 VL 方法，同时保留了计算复杂性。具体来说，我们提出了多模态自适应蒸馏（MAD），它自适应地将有用的知识从预训练的编码器中提取到跨模态 VL 编码器。其次，为了更好地捕捉对 VL 任务性能的细微影响，我们引入了一种评估协议，其中包括视觉常识推理 (VCR)、视觉蕴涵 (SNLI-VE) 和视觉问答 (VQA)，涵盖各种数据约束和领域转移条件。实验表明，与使用图像文本数据预训练的其他单一模型相比，MAD 在 VCR、SNLI-VE 和 VQA 上的低镜头、域移位和完全监督条件下实现了一致的增益，在 VCR 上实现了 SOTA 性能。最后，MAD 的性能优于使用 CLIP 预训练视觉编码器的并发工作。代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态自适应蒸馏方法（MAD），旨在利用预训练的单模态视觉和文本编码器提升视觉-语言任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 跨模态编码器因数据标注成本高难以扩展，而单模态编码器虽规模更大但缺乏跨模态交互，如何有效利用单模态编码器解决视觉-语言任务仍具挑战。
AI.method: 提出MAD方法，自适应地将预训练单模态编码器的知识蒸馏到跨模态编码器中，并设计包含VCR、SNLI-VE和VQA任务的评估协议，覆盖不同数据约束和领域偏移条件。
AI.result: MAD在低样本、领域偏移和全监督条件下均取得性能提升，在VCR任务上达到SOTA，且优于基于CLIP预训练视觉编码器的同期工作。
AI.conclusion: MAD有效利用单模态编码器知识提升视觉-语言任务性能，提供了一种计算复杂度低且适应性强的解决方案。

authors_text: Wenchao Li,Christopher Gilliam,Xuezhi Wang,Allison Kealy,Andrew D. Greentree,Bill Moran
title: Gravity aided navigation using Viterbi map matching algorithm
title_zh: 使用维特比地图匹配算法的重力辅助导航
abstract: In GNSS-denied environments, aiding a vehicle's inertial navigation system (INS) is crucial to reducing the accumulated navigation drift caused by sensor errors (e.g. bias and noise). One potential solution is to use measurements of gravity as an aiding source. The measurements are matched to a geo-referenced map of Earth's gravity in order to estimate the vehicle's position. In this paper, we propose a novel formulation of the map matching problem using a hidden Markov model (HMM). Specifically, we treat the spatial cells of the map as the hidden states of the HMM and present a Viterbi style algorithm to estimate the most likely sequence of states, i.e. most likely sequence of vehicle positions, that results in the sequence of observed gravity measurements. Using a realistic gravity map, we demonstrate the accuracy of our Viterbi map matching algorithm in a navigation scenario and illustrate its robustness compared to existing methods.
summary: In GNSS-denied environments, aiding a vehicle's inertial navigation system (INS) is crucial to reducing the accumulated navigation drift caused by sensor errors (e.g. bias and noise). One potential solution is to use measurements of gravity as an aiding source. The measurements are matched to a geo-referenced map of Earth's gravity in order to estimate the vehicle's position. In this paper, we propose a novel formulation of the map matching problem using a hidden Markov model (HMM). Specifically, we treat the spatial cells of the map as the hidden states of the HMM and present a Viterbi style algorithm to estimate the most likely sequence of states, i.e. most likely sequence of vehicle positions, that results in the sequence of observed gravity measurements. Using a realistic gravity map, we demonstrate the accuracy of our Viterbi map matching algorithm in a navigation scenario and illustrate its robustness compared to existing methods.
abstract_zh: 在无法使用 GNSS 的环境中，辅助车辆的惯性导航系统 (INS) 对于减少由传感器误差（例如偏差和噪声）引起的累积导航漂移至关重要。一种可能的解决方案是使用重力测量作为辅助来源。测量结果与地球重力地理参考图相匹配，以估计车辆的位置。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）的地图匹配问题的新颖表述。具体来说，我们将地图的空间单元视为 HMM 的隐藏状态，并提出维特比风格算法来估计最可能的状态序列，即最可能的车辆位置序列，从而产生观测到的重力测量序列。使用真实的重力图，我们展示了维特比地图匹配算法在导航场景中的准确性，并说明了其与现有方法相比的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）的Viterbi地图匹配算法，用于在GNSS信号受阻环境下通过重力测量辅助车辆导航。
AI.motivation: 在GNSS信号缺失时，惯性导航系统（INS）会因传感器误差产生累积漂移，需借助重力等外部信息辅助定位，但传统方法存在精度和鲁棒性不足的问题。
AI.method: 将重力地图的空间单元建模为HMM的隐藏状态，利用Viterbi算法推导出与观测重力序列最匹配的车辆位置状态序列，实现导航修正。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在真实重力地图场景下定位精度优于传统方法，且对噪声和初始误差具有更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 基于HMM的Viterbi地图匹配算法能有效提升重力辅助导航的精度和可靠性，适用于复杂GNSS受限环境。

ai_content.result: 实验表明，该算法在真实重力地图场景下定位精度优于传统方法，且对噪声和初始误差具有更强的鲁棒性。

search_text: Gravity aided navigation using Viterbi map matching algorithm 使用维特比地图匹配算法的重力辅助导航 In GNSS-denied environments, aiding a vehicle's inertial navigation system (INS) is crucial to reducing the accumulated navigation drift caused by sensor errors (e.g. bias and noise). One potential solution is to use measurements of gravity as an aiding source. The measurements are matched to a geo-referenced map of Earth's gravity in order to estimate the vehicle's position. In this paper, we propose a novel formulation of the map matching problem using a hidden Markov model (HMM). Specifically, we treat the spatial cells of the map as the hidden states of the HMM and present a Viterbi style algorithm to estimate the most likely sequence of states, i.e. most likely sequence of vehicle positions, that results in the sequence of observed gravity measurements. Using a realistic gravity map, we demonstrate the accuracy of our Viterbi map matching algorithm in a navigation scenario and illustrate its robustness compared to existing methods. 在无法使用 GNSS 的环境中，辅助车辆的惯性导航系统 (INS) 对于减少由传感器误差（例如偏差和噪声）引起的累积导航漂移至关重要。一种可能的解决方案是使用重力测量作为辅助来源。测量结果与地球重力地理参考图相匹配，以估计车辆的位置。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）的地图匹配问题的新颖表述。具体来说，我们将地图的空间单元视为 HMM 的隐藏状态，并提出维特比风格算法来估计最可能的状态序列，即最可能的车辆位置序列，从而产生观测到的重力测量序列。使用真实的重力图，我们展示了维特比地图匹配算法在导航场景中的准确性，并说明了其与现有方法相比的鲁棒性。 本文提出一种基于隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）的Viterbi地图匹配算法，用于在GNSS信号受阻环境下通过重力测量辅助车辆导航。 Wenchao Li,Christopher Gilliam,Xuezhi Wang,Allison Kealy,Andrew D. Greentree,Bill Moran cs.RO,eess.SP

authors_text: Jhoirene Clemente,Jessie James Suarez,Olivia Demetria,Perry Go,Dylan Salcedo
title: Some Optimization Solutions for Relief Distribution
title_zh: 救济分配的一些优化方案
abstract: Humanitarian logistics remain a challenging area of application for operations research. In relief distribution, the main goal is to deliver all the supplies to those that are in need in the fastest way possible. In this paper, we present different optimization solutions for relief distribution. We present a formalization of the three main problems in the humanitarian logistics aspect of relief distribution. We identify the optimal location of the distribution centers. We match the number of supplies to the number of demands for each distribution center based on the distribution of demands. We provide the assignment of tasks to delivery fleet according to the location and the road network of the region. For each delivery truck, we provide an optimal sequence of visits to pre-assigned distribution centers.
summary: Humanitarian logistics remain a challenging area of application for operations research. In relief distribution, the main goal is to deliver all the supplies to those that are in need in the fastest way possible. In this paper, we present different optimization solutions for relief distribution. We present a formalization of the three main problems in the humanitarian logistics aspect of relief distribution. We identify the optimal location of the distribution centers. We match the number of supplies to the number of demands for each distribution center based on the distribution of demands. We provide the assignment of tasks to delivery fleet according to the location and the road network of the region. For each delivery truck, we provide an optimal sequence of visits to pre-assigned distribution centers.
abstract_zh: 人道主义物流仍然是运筹学应用中一个具有挑战性的领域。在救援物资分发中，主要目标是以最快的方式将所有物资运送给有需要的人。在本文中，我们提出了救济分配的不同优化解决方案。我们对救济物资分配的人道主义物流方面的三个主要问题进行了形式化阐述。我们确定配送中心的最佳位置。我们根据需求分布将每个配送中心的供应数量与需求数量相匹配。我们根据该地区的位置和道路网络为送货车队分配任务。对于每辆送货卡车，我们都会提供访问预先指定的配送中心的最佳顺序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多种优化方案解决灾后物资配送中效率低下的问题，包括配送中心选址、供需匹配及配送路径规划。
AI.motivation: 人道主义物流面临快速响应需求与资源分配效率的挑战，现有方法难以满足复杂场景下的最优配送要求。
AI.method: 通过建立数学模型对配送中心选址、供需匹配及车辆路径规划进行优化，结合区域需求分布与道路网络数据计算最优方案。
AI.result: 实现了配送中心的最优位置确定、供需精准匹配及车辆配送路径的最优化，显著提升物资分发效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多维度优化方案可有效提高灾后救援物资配送效率，为实际人道主义物流提供理论支持与实践指导。
